description: Alc Vol: 42.7% Size: 70cl This extraordinary Spanish Gin is all about Mediterranean flavours. It’s infused with unique botanicals from the Costa Dorada (golden coast) region, including rosemary, thyme, arbequina olive, mandarin, and basil. Pronounced ‘mar-ray’ Made in a lovely 19th century chapel in a Spanish fishing town outside Barcelona The citrus component is a blend of Seville lemons, mandarins, and oranges macerated in traditional clay jars for one year The other botanicals are steeped separately for 36 hours or more, then distilled individually Herbal nose with lovely hints of berry fruits and perfume Aromatic palate with hints of coriander, citrus zest, and tart juniper Fresh spiced finish

name: Gin Mare Capri Mediterranean Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 42.7% Size: 70cl Gin Mare Capri was conceived as a homage to one of the most iconic spots of our Mediterranean, sharing a hint of its unique citrus aromas, its breathtaking landscapes and its vivid colours. Its natural wonders merged with its unique Italian style, its fresh gastronomy and array of aromas make Capri one of the most captivating places in the world. Gin Mare has distilled and bottled the Mediterranean - the food, the climate, the sea, and ultimately, the attitude. The true essence of the Mediterranean is perfectly captured in every bottle of Gin Mare, each of them crafted with dedication. Because that’s how exceptional gins are made.

name: Gin Palace Gift Set
description: A fantastic Gin Palace gift set which include the following; 1 x 5cl Miniature Bottle of Bombay Sapphire Gin 1 x 5cl Miniature Bottle of Tanqueray Imported Rangpur Gin 1 x Metal Barmans Jigger 1 x Bartender's Guide To Gin Hardback Cookbook

name: Gin Sul Dry Gin 50cl
description: ABV - 43% Size - 50cl The Hamburg-based brand Gin Sul has long been able to establish itself at the very top of German gins. This drink just ticks off all the boxes when it comes to taste, looks and concept. Regarding the taste, it can be declared that Gin Sul tastes like a vacation filled into a bottle ready to drink. The aromas responsible for that are derived from ingredients the likes of which you'll certainly meet at the Portuguese west coast. Apart from the usual suspects such as juniper, cardamom, lavender and lemon peel, you will encounter cinnamon, rose blossoms, allspice, rosemary and labdanum. Especially the latter is prominently featured on the Algarve. Paired with clear and soft water from Lueneburg Heath, which is used for the production of Gin Sul, you get a perfectly balanced gin that is pleasantly rich at 86 proof. Tasting it neat is obligatory, although you may of course progress to mixing some lovely Gin & Tonics with Gin Sul as the base. The gin in the white clay bottle brings lots of Saudade

name: Ginting Passionfruit, Mango &  Elderflower Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 42.5% Size: 70cl Gin Ting is infused with only natural botanicals, which are, Passion Fruit, Mango and Elderflower, along with Juniper Berries, Cassia Bark, Coriander Seeds, Grapefruit, Orange and Lemon Peel, to create a classic Gin experience. It also features 5 sectret botanicals, that are a secret, but they certainly add to the flavour of this amazing Gin. A Fabulously fruity gin with big flavours like passion fruit and mango followed by fresh, tangy tropical fruit and grapefruit flavours with a hint of spice on the palate - immediately transporting you to a beach bar overlooking the sea You can enjoy it neat, or you can add a twist to your favourite mixers or cocktails with it

name: Girvan Patent Still Proof Strength 70cl
description: Size - 70cl ABV - 57.1% A non-age-statement addition to William Grant & Sons growing collection of single grain Scotch whiskies comes in the shape on The Girvan Patent Still No. 4 Apps, which takes its name from the distillery term for 'Apparatus'. No. 4 Apps has been in use at the Girvan distillery in Ayrshire since 1992. The single grain whisky itself spends its maturation in American oak barrels. Nose Vanilla, light orchard fruits, bubblegum and cherry lips. Palate Candied citrus peels, icing sugar, vanilla and a hint of oak spice. Foam bananas and a little honey. Finish Short and sweet with a peppery hint near the end. Overall Easy to enjoy, if a little sweet. A suitable introduction to single grain whisky for the uninitiated.

name: Glasgow Gin Original 70cl
description: ABV: 43.3% Bottle Size: 70cl Glasgow Gin has a personality all of its own, it's fun and playful, echoing the famous Glaswegian sense of humour. It's a light, fresh and fruity gin, and offers a fun twist on the traditional. Glasgow Gin is made to a special recipe at Wester Spirit Company Distillery in Partick, Glasgow. No corners cut, no compromises made. A quadruple-distilled pure grain spirit, made from 100% wheat, is redistilled using ten flavoursome botanicals, creating a gin of outstanding flavour and smoothness.

name: Glayva Liqueur 50cl
description: Alc Vol: 35% Size: 50cl The perfect harmony of honey, spices, tangerines, almonds and blended Scotch whisky “The world’s best liqueur,” this honey flavoured Scotch whisky has won the prestigious International Wine and Spirit Competition not just once or twice, but five times. Five-time IWSC award recipient Made with exotic ingredients to add an exotic blend of flavours to a classic Scotch whisky base - a medley of tastes that include nutty almonds, sweet honey, spicy cinnamon, tangy Mediterranean tangerines, and other spices A deep, coppery amber in appearance Lovely honey and cinnamon aroma with hints of nutmeg, toffee apple, clove, and raisins Lightly sweet and velvety on the palate, with punches of orange zest, toffee, clove spice, nutmeg, and warming cinnamon in every swig. Glayva finishes with a satisfying honey and vanilla nuttiness on top of its malty Scotch whisky base A harmony of flavours in a silky sweet liqueur

name: Glen Keith Distillery Edition Single Malt Whisky 70cl
description: ABV: 40% Size: 70CL Single Malt Scotch Whisky from Speyside The first official bottling from the re-opened Glen Keith distillery in Speyside, which was revived in 2013. This new, no-age-statement whisky is a gentle dram with notes of poached pears, honeycomb and vanilla toffee. Glen Keith is a single malt scotch aged in the finest traditional oak casks for a distinctive, smooth and easy-drinking whisky. It has hints of fresh-picked orchard fruits, rich toffee notes and a satisfying, warm and long finish. Sold in its signature gift box, making it the perfect whisky to celebrate a special occasion. Serving suggestion: Enjoy served straight, on ice or mixed in a cocktail. The Glen Keith Distillery perches on the Linn of Keith, a sparkling, free-flowing waterfall on the river Isla. It's an historic spot, once the stronghold of the Ogilvie's of Milton, a branch of one of the most prominent ancient clans of Scotland. Today, it is one of Speyside's best kept secrets. Tasting Notes Nose: Ripe fruit aromas of pears and apricots, thick vanilla custard and a subtle sweet citrus orange zest. Taste: Sweet flavours of honeycomb and soft vanilla toffee, perfectly balanced with poached pears and delicate notes of marzipan. Finish: Long and smooth with sweet notes of butterscotch.

name: Glen Moray Speyside Single Malt Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Aromas of citrus and vanilla invitingly balance with tastes of toffee and spice Our Classic Matured in bourbon barrels for vanilla sweetness and light citrus hints, this whisky defines our traditional taste of Speyside. Balancing smooth vanilla with citrus, our whisky tastes exceptional on its own, over ice and in your favourite cocktail. Nose Fragrant with citrus notes, vanilla and aromas of freshly baked shortbread. Taste Malty, toffee sweetness is balanced by notes of blackcurrant and a fragrant, lemongrass edge. Finish Smooth and warm, as hints of caramelised citrus fruits drift into subtle spice. Our Emblem Celebrating our whisky pillars Barley - The key ingredient from which we craft our spirit. Beehive - A tribute to our whisky's smooth, honeyed taste. Cask - Our craftsmen are expert in maturing and marrying casks. Ship - For generations we have shared our whiskey with the world.

name: Glen's Vodka 1 Litre PMP £20.89
description: Alc Vol: 37.5% Size: 1lt Extra Smooth Triple Distilled Pure Quality Vodka Proudly Original

name: Glen's Vodka 20cl
description: 200 mL, 37.5% Glen's vodka is triple distilled vodka which is extra smooth. Vodka Ayrshire, Scotland Loch Lomond Group

name: Glen's Vodka 50cl
description: Alc Vol: 37.5% Size: 50cl Extra Smooth Triple Distilled Pure Quality Vodka Proudly Original Made in Scotland

name: Glen's Vodka 5cl Miniature
description: Alc Vol: 37.5% Size: 5cl Miniature Glen's Vodka is a Scottish vodka distilled from sugar beet. It boasts a clean finish with faint traces of lemon. Perfect for mixing. Read more.

name: Glen's Vodka 70cl PM £15.49
description: Alc Vol: 37.5% Size: 70cl Extra Smooth Triple Distilled Pure Quality Vodka Proudly Original

name: Glen's Vodka 70cl PM £16.29
description: Alc Vol: 37.5% Size: 70cl Extra Smooth Triple Distilled Pure Quality Vodka Proudly Original

name: Glen's Vodka with Cola 12 x 250ml PMP £1.89
description: Size - 12 x 250ml ABV - 5.0 % Smooth Meets Classic Blended with Triple Distilled Glen's Vodka

name: Glendalough Irish Rose Gin 70 cl
description: ABV - 37.5% Size - 70cl This fresh, rose-petal gin was first made to honor our head distiller’s mom, Rose at his little brother’s wedding. Rose had recently passed away, and this was his way to have her there in spirit — literally. Carefully-tended flowers from her rose garden are slowly vapor distilled with wild roses and plants from the mountains around the distillery to make this an intensely floral gin. After distilling, the gin is then further infused with even more roses to deepen the flavors and give it its lovely pink hue.

name: Glenfiddich & Aston Martin Formula One™ Team 19 Year Old Limited Edition.
description: Alc Vol: 43% Size: 70cl Glenfiddich (William Grant & Sons) has released a limited-edition 19 Year Old Single Malt Scotch Whisky, created to mark the first year of its partnership with the Aston Martin Formula One Team. The 19 Year Old was matured in a combination of hand-selected American and European oak casks, complemented by Montilla wine casks. The combination of casks has created a vibrant and complex whisky with notes of Seville oranges and warm, woody spices. Glenfiddich Malt Master Brian Kinsman commented: “At Glenfiddich, our dedication to excellence drives us to continuously refine our craft. The Glenfiddich 19 Year Old is a whisky that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and innovation, drawing inspiration from the same precision and intuition that defines the Aston Martin Formula One Team. “It’s a whisky that challenges the limits of complexity and refinement, making it a true reflection of both our heritage and the future.” On the nose, the whisky opens with notes of raisins, dates, walnut loaf and dark chocolate, Seville orange, sticky marmalade and treacle pudding. On the palate, it delivers vibrant flavours of warm, woody spices with ground nutmeg, cinnamon, a hint of liquorice and a buttery pastry character. The finish is long and lingering, marked by woody spice notes.

name: Glenfiddich 12 Year Old Single Malt Scotch Whisky 35cl - Old Bottling
description: 40% alcohol by volume Comes in golden colour distinctively fresh and fruity with a hint of pear Creamy with a long, smooth and mellow finish Beautifully crafted and delicately balanc Barrel is missing lid - open cylinder with bottle secured inside (reflected in price decrease) Here we have a half-sized 35cl bottle of Glenfiddich’s famous twelve-year-old expression. It’s the most popular whisky released with the famous stag on the label, and it’s a perfectly succinct demonstration of the distillery’s much-adored qualities.

name: Glenfiddich 12 Year Old Single Malt Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: ABV: 40% Size: 70cl Single Malt Scotch Whisky Aged 12 Years One of the world's best-selling malts, Glenfiddich 12yo's famous triangular bottle is a fixture in practically every bar on the globe. Light and easy-drinking stuff loved by millions. Flowing in the Valley of the Deer since 1887, our family's signature expression is the world's most awarded single malt Scotch whisky. With a unique freshness from the same Highland spring water we've used since 1887, its distinctive fruitiness comes from the high cut point William Grant always insisted upon. Carefully matured in the finest American oak and European oak sherry casks for at least 12 years, it is mellowed in oak marrying tuns to create its sweet and subtle oak flavours. Creamy with a long, smooth and mellow finish, our 12 Year Old is the perfect example of Glenfiddich's unique Speyside style and is widely proclaimed the best dram in the valley

name: Glenfiddich 14 Year Old - Bourbon Barrel Reserve Whisky 70cl
description: Size - 70cl ABV - 43% A fabulous 14 year old expression from Glenfiddich! Overseen by the distillery's Malt Master, Brian Kinsman, the whisky is matured in ex-bourbon casks, before being treated to a finishing period in charred new American oak barrels all the way from The Kelvin Cooperage in Louisville, Kentucky. The result is a fabulously fruity number, with a good oaken vanilla Kentucky kick! Nose - A big noseful of oaky vanilla with wafts of candied lemon and orange, apple tart, burnt sugar, and cask char. Palate - Sweet caramel, toffee apples, and creamy vanilla tangle with spicy, toasted oak, cinnamon, and candied oranges. Finish - Warming woody spice, sweet butterscotch, toffee popcorn, and silky sweet malt.

name: Glenfiddich 15 Year Old Single Malt Solera Whisky 70cl
description: ABV:40% Size: 70cl Exemplifying our family’s tradition of innovation, our 15 Year Old expression is created using a technique pioneered by our Malt Master and its warm, spicy flavours are transformed with the alchemy of the Solera Vat. Uniquely amongst Scotch whisky distillers, our Malt Master matures our Glenfiddich 15 Year Old in three types of oak cask, sherry, bourbon and new oak, to pervade it with rich fruit flavours and distinct spice and honey notes. He then marries it in our unique handcrafted Oregon pine Solera vat, which is always kept at least half full, to give it a beautiful balance and create a deliciously harmonious, consistent and complex whisky that gets increasingly complex over time. Our Solera system is the culmination of curious minds and the pioneering spirit of our family. It’s also the secret behind this whisky becoming the first 15 year old expression to enter the top ten best selling single malts. Great for experiencing a premium, mature, rich, silky smooth malt with an intriguingly complex aroma and subtle, sweet layers of sherry oak, marzipan, cinnamon and ginger. An intriguingly complex aroma. Sweet heather honey and vanilla fudge combined with rich dark fruits. Taste: Silky smooth, revealing layers of sherry oak, marzipan, cinnamon and ginger. Full-bodied and bursting with flavour. Finish: Satisfyingly rich with lingering sweetness

name: Glenfiddich 18 Year Old Whisky 70cl
description: Size - 70cl ABV - 40% This 18 year old single malt Scotch whisky from Glenfiddich's core range was matured in a mix of oloroso sherry and bourbon casks. Tasting Note: Nose Loads of fruit. Zesty grapefruit, baked toffee apples. Dry, chocolate Flake-y wood and cinnamon. Palate Candied fruits and Glenfiddich freshness balances richer notes of dried apricot, more cinnamon and toffee, ginger and dry Sherry. Finish Peels and a touch of salted toffee. Overall A wonderfully rich and enjoyable Glenfiddich single malt.

name: Glenfiddich Fire & Cane Experimental Single Malt Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 43% Size: 70cl Glenfiddich Fire & Cane is a bold fusion of smoky and sweet notes. By marrying peated whisky and malts matured in bourbon barrels, and then finishing in Latin rum casks, we created an exquisite whisky with campfire smokiness and toffee sweetness. Fire & Cane is inspired by the early innovation of Glenfiddich Malt Master Brian Kinsman, who in 2003, first ran peated spirit through the Glenfiddich stills, birthing the concept of what would become the innovative Experimental Series. As the fourth expression of the Experimental Series, Fire & Cane fuses the brand’s smoky whisky with malts that had been maturing side-by-side in bourbon casks, showcasing Glenfiddich’s sweet and fruity signature style. Taking it a step further, all of the whiskies were finished in Latin rum casks to produce a surprising overlay of added caramel toffee sweetness. In Gift Box.

name: Glenfiddich IPA Single Malt Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol:43% Size: 70cl The world's first Single Malt Scotch Whisky finished in bespoke craft India Pale Ale craft beer casks. In the first experiment of its kind, Malt Master Brian Kinsman, an entrepreneurial Kinsman collaborated with Seb Jones, an entrepreneurial Speyside brewer, to create a new craft IPA and pioneer the way for a new kind of single malt scotch whisky. This expression is the fruit of a collaboration with a local Speyside craft brewer and imbues the whisky with zesty citrus and tangy hops from the oak casks that previously held a bold Speyside IPA. With delicate ripe green apple, pear and spring blossom on the nose, a vibrant citrus note followed by sweet vanilla and fresh hops on the palate and a long lasting sweetness with subtle green hops on the finish. Colour: Rich golden. Nose: An elegant harmony of fresh green apple, William's pear and spring blossom. Complemented by the subtle tang of fresh aromatic hops and fresh herbs, followed by a long lasting sweetness. Taste: Vibrant with a zesty citrus note followed by creamy vanilla and a hint of fresh hops. Finish: Enduring sweetness with an echo of green hops

name: Glenfiddich Orchard Experiment Single Malt Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: ABV 43% Size 70cl A pioneering single malt Scotch whisky and the fifth release from their world-renowned Experimental Series, the clearest expression of Glenfiddich's Maverick Spirit. It is the first in its history to be finished in Somerset Pomona Spirit casks, born out of craft, tradition, and desire for experimentation. Discover where the sweetness of Somerset's apple orchards meets Scotland's wild and rugged landscape. This innovative 70cl single malt celebrates and elevates the Glenfiddich sweet and fruity signature style by bringing together two iconic families. Glenfiddich Orchard combines the Temperley's and the Grant's, makers of apple cider brandy and Scotch whisky, to create this exquisite blend. Hand-selected Glenfiddich whiskies are finished in casks from the Somerset Cider Brandy Company, previously holding sweet Somerset Pomona, for approximately four months to create this incredible fruity and sweet whisky. Together, they create a Scottish whisky bathed in the sweet warmth of an English summer's day. Take home or gift this truly unique Glenfiddich expression, a tale of two Maverick families, that is sure to delight whisky and cider enthusiasts alike. Available as a 70cl bottle in an exclusive gifting tube for an exquisite year-round gifting experience.

name: Glenfiddich Perpetual Collection Vat 01 Single Malt Scotch Whisky - Twinpack - 2 x 1lt Bottles
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 2 x 1lt Discover the whisky that never sits still with Glenfiddich’s Perpetual Collection. VAT 01 is the first expression of the collection. Four luxury whiskies that are always in motion, thanks to continuous blending in our Solera VAT 1. It is drawn from vats that have never been emptied. VAT 1 is an exceptionally elegant and smooth single malt Scotch suited to every palate. It carries the signature Glenfiddich style highlighted with vibrant notes of oak, spice, and vanilla. This expression uniquely layers sweet and spicy notes for a soft and mellow taste with added depth due to its maturation in bourbon & red wine casks. A balanced and refreshingly smooth Glenfiddich. Available ready to gift within a stunning 1L AI-designed presentation gift Box

name: Glenfiddich Project XX Experimental Series 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 47% Size: 70cl This is one of the first releases in Glenfiddich's Experimental Series. It opens with the distillery’s classic apple blossom, ripe pear and golden sugar notes, giving way to a touch of liquorice, candy floss, toasted almonds and dried fruit. It was xreated through the collaboration of 20 brand ambassadors, who each selected a cask they believed to be exceptional, spanning from sherry butts, bourbon barrels, port pipes, and more. Master blender Brian Kinsman then artfully married them to create a whisky that is bigger than the sum of its parts.

name: Glenfiddich Select Cask - 5cl Miniature - Collectors Item
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 5cl Miniature One of three Single malts launched in 2013 as the first releases in the Glenfiddich Cask Collection, This was part of Glenfiddich’s first no-age-statement range of single malts and have been released into the global travel retail (duty free) market. Created using Glenfiddich's Solera Vat technique. Like other whiskies in the Glenfiddich Cask Collection, this Speyside single malt Whisky is first matured in oak casks before a final maturation period (at least two months) in Solera tuns. The tun is constantly replenished and never let full below half full so ensuring the continuity of the whisky's flavour. Glenfiddich Select Cask is said to contain “layers of sweetness, spice and hints of citrus, matured in hand-selected aged Bourbon, European oak and red wine casks to impart a beautifully soft taste”. Colour: Golden Yellow. Nose: Sweet and malty with plenty of Vanilla fudge, macadamia nuts and gentle American oak. Hints of milky chocolate and nutmeg spice. Pretty much what you’d expect from Glenfiddich. Palate: The palate is very much similar to what your nose finds, it’s rich, malty and sweet. Mellow and easy. summery fruits and some light oak, Vanilla with pancake mix, sweet acacia honey and very gentle cinnamon, nutmeg and black pepper spice. Finish: Fairly fresh with eucalyptus. Sweetly mouth-watering. Nutty buttery fudge with lingering cinnamon spice.Fairly short but flavourful. Thoughts: it’s already setting the bar quite high with quality. It’s light and very drinkable, Aroma: Clear, pale-mid golden amber.

name: Glenfiddich Single Malt Scotch Whisky Aged 12 Years – 5cl Miniature - BOXED
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 5cl Glenfiddich Single Malt Scotch Whisky Aged 12 Years The Glenfiddich Distillery was founded in 1886 by William Grant in Dufftown, Scotland, in the glen of the River Fiddich. The Glenfiddich single malt whisky first ran from the stills on Christmas Day, 1887. In the 1920s, with prohibition in force in the US, Glenfiddich was one of a very small number of distilleries to increase production.

name: Glenfiddich Single Malt Scotch Whisky Minis 3x5cl
description: Single Malt Scotch Whisky Glenfiddich is the best-selling and most awarded Malt Scotch Whisky in the world Aged 12 Years Signature Malt This pioneering single malt has been matured in the finest Oloroso Sherry and Bourbon casks before being married together in oak tuns. It has a beautifully balanced nose and refreshingly rich complex notes of fresh pear and subtle oak. Aged 15 Years Solera Vat Unique to Scotch whisky, our Solera Vat marries whiskies matured in Sherry, Bourbon and new oak casks and is always half full. This creates a deliciously rich, harmonious and intense single malt with complex notes of honey and raisins. Aged 18 Years Batch Reserve Carefully matured for 18 years in the finest Oloroso sherry and bourbon casks built by our own expert coopers. These casks are then nurtured in small batches for a further three months, for a remarkably deep, rich and complex flavour

name: Glenfiddich Single Malt Whisky & Glass Gift Set
description: A 5cl Bottle of Glenfiddich 12 Year Old Single Malt Scotch Whisky and a Dartington Whisky Glass The single malt whisky tasting experience Shaped for flavour The whiskey experience glass The world's most awarded single malt scotch whiskey

name: Glengoyne 10 Years Old Highland Single Malt Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: ABV: 40% Size: 70cl Smooth, fruity and incredibly moreish Fresh green apples, toffee and a hint of nuttiness. This is the taste of distilling slower than anyone else in Scotland, of barley we dry by air – never peat – and of hand-selected sherry casks crafted from European and American oak. PAIRED WITH OYSTERS - Briny oysters and shallot dressing bring out the 10 year old’s oily freshness and clean apple notes

name: Glengoyne 12 Year Old Highland Single Malt Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: ABV: 43% Size: 70cl Glengoyne 12 Years Old Single Malt Scotch Whisky, a Highlander famed for their unpeated single malt. Glengoyne is always very pure in style, allowing their high-quality, easy-drinking whisky to shine in its natural state. On the nose Lemon zest, toffee apples and a scent of coconut. ... Toffee apples, ginger orange, shortbread taste. A hint of sherry, soft oak and cinnamon spice

name: Glengoyne 15 Year Old Highland Single Malt Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: ABV: 43% Size: 70cl Relaunched in 2022. This 15 year old Scotch whisky from Glengoyne uses a trio of cask types; First fill bourbon, first fill sherry balanced with refill casks. Glengoyne 15 Year Old Single Malt Whisky is a well - balanced expression, celebrated for its smooth, rich character and real depth of flavour. Aged in a combination of sherry and bourbon casks, it delivers a harmonious blend of dried fruits, citrus, and subtle oak notes. The perfect balance of bourbon and sherry casks showcases the best of Glengoyne in its mid-teens. Rich with flavour, yet still holds Glengoyne’s signature fruity style from the slow distillation. On the nose, it opens with aromas of fresh green apples, toffee, and a hint of spice. The palate is silky and complex, offering layers of honeyed malt, rich raisins, orange zest, and gentle vanilla. The finish is long, warming, and slightly nutty, making this a refined and elegant whisky, suitable for sipping and savouring.

name: Glengoyne Whisky Blenders Glass
description: Combining the knowledge and expertise of some of the whisky world's leading innovators, the Blenders Malt Glass' roots lie in the traditional nosing and tasting glasses used by master blenders and connoisseurs around the world. The great strength of this glass is that is perfect for nosing and drinking from. 17CL

name: Glenlivet Caribbean Reserve 70cl
description: Single Malt Scotch Whisky Size: 70cl ABV: 40% The Glenlivet has launched The Glenlivet Caribbean Reserve , a new rum barrel finished single malt Scotch. The Glenlivet Caribbean Reserve combines the heritage of Scotch whisky with the flavour and soul of the Caribbean.

name: Glenlivet Founder's Reserve Miniature 5cl
description: ABV - 40% Size - 5cl A miniature bottle of the opening salvo of the Glenlivet range, named in honour of the distillery's founder, George Smith. It's classic Glenlivet, with a creamy and fruity character bolstered by the use of first-fill American oak to mature some of the whisky.

name: Glenmorangie 'The Lasanta' 12 Year Old 70cl - Gift Box
description: Alc Vol: 43% Size: 70cl The Lasanta begins with our giraffe-high stills, which yield a deliciously delicate and fruity spirit. Next, we mature it in bourbon and sherry casks for 12 years, transforming it into a mouth-watering odyssey bursting with rich spiciness and sun-drenched sweetness. It radiates with raisins, honeycomb and chocolate-covered hazelnuts lightened by cinnamon breezes. Glenmorangie’s Highland whisky makers use endless imagination and five key ingredients – wood, water, barley, yeast and time – to dream up delicious single malt whiskies. Known as the Distillers of Tain, they’ve been honing their craft for more than 175 years. In Scotland’s tallest stills, whose necks are as high as a giraffe, they produce a delicate and fruity spirit, ripe for experimentation. Led by Director of Whisky Creation Dr Bill Lumsden, this crackerjack crew are on a mission to bring new flavours and possibilities to the world of single malt. Rich, spicy and sweet with notes of raisins, honeycomb, chocolate- covered hazelnuts and cinnamon 12 Years Aged in Bourbon & Sherry Casks

name: Glenmorangie 12 Year Whisky 70cl Gift Set with 2x Brand Tumblers
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Discover Glenmorangie 12 Years The Original Gift Set, an elegant Highland Single Malt Scotch Whisky presented in a premium gift box with two branded Glenmorangie glasses. Matured for 12 years in carefully selected American oak bourbon casks, this award-winning whisky is celebrated for its smooth, fruity, and exceptionally refined character. Glenmorangie The Original 12 Years offers delicate aromas of citrus, vanilla, peach, honey, and soft floral notes. The palate is creamy and balanced with flavours of orange, caramel, almond, and gentle oak spice, leading to a long and silky finish. Presented in a stylish gift box with two tasting glasses, this Glenmorangie whisky gift set is perfect for whisky lovers, special occasions, birthdays, and premium corporate gifts. A timeless Highland single malt ideal for both newcomers and experienced Scotch whisky enthusiasts. Buy Glenmorangie 12 Years The Original Gift Set online at Whisky Estate and explore our collection of premium Scotch whisky gift packs.

name: Glenmorangie 14 Years Elementa Whisky 1L
description: Size - 1000ml ABV - 43% Glenmorangie 14 Years Elementa Whisky is a remarkable single malt that showcases the unique character of the Glenmorangie distillery, renowned for its innovative approach to whisky-making. Aged for 14 years in carefully selected oak casks, this whisky boasts a rich and complex flavour profile, with notes of warm spice, honey, and a subtle smokiness. Each sip is a tribute to the distillery's commitment to pushing the boundaries of the art of whisky-making, using only the finest ingredients and traditional methods. For those seeking a truly exceptional and memorable whisky experience, Glenmorangie 14 Years Elementa Whisky is not to be missed.

name: Glenmorangie 16 Year Old - The Tribute 1lt
description: Alc Vol: 43% Size: 1lt A lightly peated release from Glenmorangie, this expression explores the distillery’s past, paying tribute to the historic use of a peat fired kiln. Aged in bourbon casks and married with Glenmorangie’s signature spirit, to achieve a clever balance of subtle peat smoke with their characteristic zest, cream and vanilla.

name: Glenmorangie Original 10 Year Old - 5cl Miniature
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 5cl With its refreshingly clean nose, medium body and subtle sweet spices, the Glenmorangie Original 10 Year Old is instantly recognisable. Odds are you’ll upgrade this 5cl Miniature to a 70cl bottle before long!

name: Glenmorangie Quinta Ruban 14 Year Old Bourbon & Port Cask Finish 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 46% Size: 70cl Glenmorangie Quinta Ruban 14 Years Old Single Malt Whisky, the darkest and most intense whisky in the extra-matured range. Glenmorangie Quinta Ruban has spent 10 years maturing in American white oak casks, before being transferred into specially selected ruby port pipes from the Quintas or wine estates of Portugal. Extra maturation in these port pipes develops Glenmorangie Quinta Ruban into a voluptuous spirit with a complex balance of sweet and dry flavours and an intriguing contrast of smooth and crisp, cooling textures. On the nose, Dark mint chocolate, tangerines and Seville oranges mingle with sandalwood and walnut before giving way to a spicy finish of pepper and nutmeg. On the palate Mint chocolate and walnuts envelop the palate like velvet, laying the foundations for Rosé, Turkish delight and sweet Seville oranges.

name: Glenmorangie The Cadboll Estate 15 Years Old Single Malt Scotch 70cl (Limited Edition)
description: Alc Vol: 43% Size: 70cl Crafted by Glenmorangie from field to glass, this limited-edition series brings the spirit and flavour of our Highland home to whisky lovers around the globe. Aged for 15 years, the third batch of Glenmorangie The Cadboll Estate brings a nutty and spicy twist to the series’ award-winning flavour. Each release in the series begins in our Distillery’s own barley fields located on the Cadboll Estate, planted and harvested to Dr Bill’s specifications. This Cadboll barley is then mashed and distilled in our towering copper stills (as tall as an adult giraffe to allow for a more elegant taste and aroma), to bring forth a uniquely delicious spirit. With notes of nuts and sweet spice in mind, Dr Bill selected spirit created from two separate barley harvests and aged it in American oak bourbon casks to enhance those creamy depths. Then, picturing notes of hazelnut, toffee and clove, he finished a small portion in casks which once held Amontillado, his favourite style of sherry. After 15 years, Dr Bill reunited these whiskies in this series’ delicious third batch release; threading hints of toffee and spice around honeysuckle, peaches and cream.

name: Glenmorangie The Original 12 Year Old - Single Malt Scotch Whisky in Gift Box
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Smooth, creamy and luscious with notes of orange, honey, vanilla and peach Highland Single Malt Scotch Whisky 12 Years Aged in Bourbon Casks The Original Description Creamy with notes of vanilla and citrus, our Original is where all our whisky-making adventures begin. Known for its mellow tones and delicacy of flavour, it is an award-winning kaleidoscope of taste.

name: Glenmorangie Triple Cask Reserve 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Rich and spiced with notes of pear, honeysuckle and candied orange Matured in Bourbon, New Charred Oak & Rye Casks Highland Single Malt Scotch Whisky Inspired by nature's splendour and crafted by award-winning whisky maker Dr Bill Lumsden, our Triple Cask Reserve is a deliciously sweet and delicate whisky with notes of pear, candied fruit and honeysuckle. We craft our more delicate, fruity spirit in stills as tall as a giraffe, to create more space for taste and aroma. Then we mature it in Bourbon, New Charred Oak and Rye casks, and blend carefully to create a deeply harmonious whisky.

name: Goldschlager 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Originally from Switzerland, this delectable cinnamon liqueur is now produced in Italy. Goldschlager is German for “Golden Beater,” hence the flakes of actual 23 karat gold inside of each bottle. Dubbed the best of its kind in the market, this cinnamon schnapps is often seen as a glitzy version of Aftershock Better than Jager to many, Goldschlager smells of strong but sweet and fragrant cinnamon and tastes syrupy sweet with hints of cinnamon spice and fiery but pleasant chilli-like heat, touches of cracked black pepper The aftertaste is equally enjoyable, leaving a lingering hot and spicy taste of cinnamon and black pepper

name: Goose Island IPA Perfect Draft 6L KEG
description: ABV: 5.9% Size: 6L Only to be used with Philips Perfect Draft dispensers An English Style IPA, this beer opens with a fruity aroma set off by a dry malt middle and long hop finish. Our India Pale Ale recalls a time when ales shipped from Britain to India were highly hopped to preserve their distinct taste during the long journey. The result is a hop lover's dream with a fruity aroma, set off by a dry malt middle, and long hop finish. Bourbon in colour and 59 in International Bitterness Unit, our IPA uses Pilgrim, Styrian Golding Celeia, Cascade and Centennial Hops. We would recommend serving our IPA with curries, chicken and pork, as well as blue cheeses and aged Gouda. Bright citrus aromas, Bold hop finish, Winner of Six Great American Beer Festival Medals, Hops grown for goose island at elk mountain farm Product Type: PerfectDraft Kegs Style: IPA Country: USA Brewery: Goose Island Serving Temp: 3°C Price Per Pint £3.93

name: Gordon's Distiller's Cut Gin 70cl - DISCONTINUED

Gordon's Distiller’s Cut was distinguished by clear glass rather than the traditional Gordon's green glass, but what set it apart was the addition of lemongrass and ginger to the usual Gordon's botanical line up Unfortunately, this edition was released at a time when gin was less popular, which ultimately led to its discontinuation in 2009. At the time of its launch in October 2004, Gordon's Distillers cut was described by its marketeers as the "latest work of art in the Gordon's collection". To quote the label "Crafted with quadruple distillation and cut with select aromatics" You now have a chance to purchase this collectors item. There are very limited stocks available. name: Gordon's London Dry Gin 1Lt

Alexander Gordon started his distillery in London in 1769 and set about creating the recipe for a brilliant-tasting gin. To this day Gordon's is distilled to this same exacting standard and is the world's number 1 bestselling gin. Gordon's high quality and distinctive juniper flavour has come to define the taste of the classic G&T. Gordon's London Dry is multi-award-winning gin with a distinctive juniper character. name: Gordon's London Dry Gin 35cl - Half Bottle
description: Alc Vol: 37.5% Size: 35cl Gordon's London Dry Gin was established in 1769 by Alexander Gordon as he set out on a mission to produce a gloriously-flavoured gin worthy of carrying his family name. Gordon believed that success lay in the perfect combination of pure distilled grain spirit and rich botanicals. To this day Gordon's is distilled to this same exacting standard and the product is triple-distilled to guarantee the purity of the gin. The exact blend of our botanicals remains a closely guarded secret with a combination of handpicked wild juniper berries, coriander, angelica and liquorice. The attention to detail results in a distinctive flavour that mixes perfectly in long drinks and cocktails. To savour the great taste for yourself, mix a Gordon's and tonic and garnish with lime. Alcohol, 100% Gordon's ™ Gordon’s 0.0% is 24 calories per 50ml Serve New Gordon's Alcohol Free 0% is the perfect alcohol-free alternative to the classic gin & tonic. Made using only the finest distilled botanicals, just like Gordon's London Dry Gin, new Gordon's 0.0% provides the bold, juniper-led character you know and expect from the brand. This makes it the perfect alcohol free alternative to your usual choice of Gordon's and tonic. New Gordon's 0.0% provides the bold, piney juniper led character you'd expect from Gordon's. Gordon's 0.0% is created by distilling the same botanicals used in Gordon's London Dry Gin. These botanicals are individually immersed in water, heated and then distilled before being expertly blended together to capture the essence of Gordon's in a delicious alcohol-free alternative. This special distillation process is a closely guarded secret, known only to a handful of people.. Over 250 years ago, Alexander Gordon started his distillery in London and set about creating the recipe for a brilliant tasting gin. Gordon's Alcohol Free 0.0%, made with only the finest distilled botanicals, just like the original Gordon's London Dry gin has been created as the perfect alcohol-free alternative. Gordon’s 0.0% is suggested served over ice, topped with tonic water and garnished with a wedge of lime.

name: Graffiti Reserve Syrah 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 13.5% Size: 75cl Estate Bottled - Nashik Valley Red Wine 2015 Grown on the hills of Dindori and aged for a year in new oak, the Reserve Syrah is fragrant, elegant and smooth, with lush berry flavours and silky tannins. A full – bodied red wine with memorable flavours. Grapes have existed in the Nashik Valley wine region, near Mumbai, I ndia since the1950s. Our vineyard in the Nashik Valley, imported the grape plant varieties of Chenin blanc, Sauvignon blanc and Syrah and has since become India’s most important and largest winery. Graffiti Wine chose our vineyard because of its unique wine varietals and award winning prestigious wines.

name: Graham's 10 Year Old Tawny Port 75 cl (Packaging May Vary)
description: Alc Vol: 20% Size: 75cl Founded in Porto in 1820 Graham's is renowned worldwide for producing outstanding Ports. Over the past 200 years the family has perfected the art of blending the very best Ports. These are wonderfully complex and widely acclaimed for bringing pleasure from the first sip. In recognition of this quality Graham's was granted a Royal Warrant by Her Majesty The Queen in 2018. A Tribute to Craftsmanship: Graham's 10 Year Old Tawny epitomises the passion for excellence and precision that is at the heart of everyone of Graham's handmade Tawny Ports. A decade of careful slow oak maturation has resulted in a wine with complex nutty aromas, combined with hints of honey and figs. On the palate, rich mature fruit flavours, beautifully mellowed with a luscious long finish. Port Wine is a natural product and may create a deposit. Pairs perfectly with a wide range of desserts from apple pie with vanilla ice cream to crème brulee.

name: Gran Centenario Plata Tequila Blanco 70cl

Its smooth and clean profile makes it the quintessential Tequila for mixing in cocktails and enjoying straight in a snifter Owned by Jose Cuervo, this is an exceptional-quality 100% agave silver tequila with a deliciously subtle palate and a long, smooth finish. A great value white tequila.

name: Gran PATRÓN Platinum Ultra-Premium Tequila 70cl

With notes of citrus, orange and lime and a hint of white pepper, this deliciously smooth luxury tequila arrives in a hand-numbered crystal bottle inside an elegant case. Enjoy it on the rocks or share it with friends—if you dare spare a sip. Great gift idea.

name: Grand Marnier 2012 Edition Paris Limited Edition 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl The Grand Marnier ‘Paris’ Limited Edition is the 11 th in the series. The first one was seen in 1927, with each one offered paying testimony the heritage of the brand. This is the Christmas 2012 Grand Marnier ‘Paris’ Limited Edition. This is a bottle that pays homage to the sheer chic of the Parisian lifestyle, as well as the home of the success story that is Grand Marnier. In a complete contrast to the colouring of the regular Grand Marnier bottle, this Christmas edition comes in a deep midnight blue with a gold frieze silhouette style pattern of a Parisian skyline. The bottle and packaging itself that are the limited edition. The contents are, naturally, the blend of orange and Cognac that is now iconic in all corners of the world. Grand Marnier suggest to enjoy the liqueur either neat, over ice or as a long drink mixed in a cocktail . Or, as is one of our favourite ways, as a delicious way to spice up a crepe with a little sugar… Limited Edition Collectors Item

name: Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl A delicious orange flavoured cognac liqueur brought to life by the essence of exotic, wild tropical oranges. Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge (literally, “Red Ribbon”) is the best known French liqueur, the world over, first served at royal receptions by Emperor Franz Joseph and Edward VII. Grand Marnier is the unique blend of French Cognac and exotic, bitter oranges. It has been crafted in the Cognac region of France with the same care and passion since 1880. Cordon Rouge is the original Grand Marnier, with a full and ample flavour, bitter oranges aroma balanced by Cognac notes of hazelnut and toffee. Grand Marnier elevates cocktail experiencies by adding an eccentric twist to classic cocktails and long drinks. Oak-aged and blended liqueur matured for at least 6 months before bottling Clear topaz in appearance with tinges of amber and gold Zesty orange smells with some light spice and hints of leathery cognac, dried fruit, and slight floral violet Enjoy silky and zesty palate bursts with refreshing juicy flavours, followed by a pleasant bitter orange bite Subtle hints of candied orange zest, luxury marmalade, vanilla, coffee, and toffee, with a cognac undertone Bitter orange marmalade flavours linger with its cracked pepper finish Best enjoyed in a Grand Tonic: fill a large wine glass with ice, add 50 ml Grand Marnier and top up with a premium lemon tonic water and garnish with a slice of orange.

name: Grand Marnier Cuvée du Centenaire Liqueur 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Grand Marnier’s ultra-rare Cuvée du Centenaire Liqueur was launched in 1927 to commemorate the 100th anniversary of La Maison Marnier Lapostolle. It’s an elegant blend of 82% Cognac – the majority coming from the highly prized Fine Champagne region and aged for around the same length of time as top XO Cognacs – and 18% orange liqueur. These two components are matured in oak for at least two years to come together in perfect harmony. First served in Villa Les Cèdres on the Côte d’Azur now one of the most expensive houses on the planet this intense luscious and complex spirit deserves to be sipped neat and lightly chilled in only the most luxurious establishments. Louis-Alexandre Marnier Lapostolle was a man with a plan – to create a liqueur so grand that it would captivate the world for generations. In 1880 he combined the finest Cognac with bitter oranges from the Caribbean called Citrus Bigaradia. These rare exotic green oranges are dried in the hot sun locking in the most luxurious aromas and flavours. He named his new spirit Curaçao but his good friend César Ritz the founder of the eponymous hotel suggested that Grand Marnier would be “a grand name for a grand liqueur”. Changing the bottle shape to one inspired by the silhouette of the traditional Cognac stills Louis-Alexandre’s invention became the belle of La Belle Époque and is still loved to this very day.

name: Grand Marnier Shot Glass

name: Grande Absente Absinthe Originale 70cl
description: Alc Vol; 69% Size 70cl Alc Vol: 69% The very authentic absinthe: Grande Absente is a bitter liqueur which contains more plants of absinthe and less sugar. A vividly green Absinthe, Grand Absente Original is made to a pre-ban recipe at Distilleries et Domaines in Provence. This uses artisanal distillation techniques and local botanicals. Taking care to respect the legacy of the spirit, Distilleries Et Domaines De Provence create their Grande Absente Absinthe using a recipe that was devised prior to the spirit's ban, including wormwood. It has been bottled at a traditionally high strength of 69% ABV. Made in Provence , the absinthe Grande Absente is recognizable by its touch of bitterness. It is made by the Distilleries et Domaines de Provence, a company recognized since 1898 for its quality aperitifs and liqueurs.

A whisky matured in three different types of wood for a smooth, rich and mellow taste Tasting Notes Nose: Complex, clean with notes of ripe pear and summer fruits. Taste: Balances vanilla sweetness with malty and light floral fragrances. Finish: Long and sweet with a subtle hint of smoke

name: Grants Rum Cask Finish Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Along with his team, Master Blender, Brian Kinsman, wanted to see what would happen if we combined our traditional Scotch whisky blend with exotic flavours from the Caribbean. After many years ageing in oak barrels, our whisky is further matured in Caribbean rum casks for a smooth, rich and sweet taste. TASTING NOTES: NOSE: Rich maltiness and tropical fruit TASTE : Vibrant and sweet with tropical fruits and a hint of banana reveal rich vanilla oak and a touch of sweet spice FINISH :Long-lasting and sweet

name: Grants Triple Wood Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Triple Wood Blended Scotch Whisky Many whiskies take their flavour from just one cask, but we mature Grant's Triple Wood in three different types of wood: Virgin Oak cask provides spicy robustness, American Oak lends subtle vanilla smoothness and Bourbon refill offers brown sugar sweetness, resulting in a smoother, richer, mellower taste. It was in 1887 when William Grant opened his first distillery in Scotland with the help of his seven sons and two daughters. Five generations later, we're still family owned. From the highly skilled Coopers who tend our casks to the distillers and maturation experts - Grant's Whisky stays true to William Grant's original, closely guarded recipe. A whisky matured in three different types of wood for a smooth, rich and mellow taste Tasting Notes Nose: Complex, clean with notes of ripe pear and summer fruits. Taste: Balances vanilla sweetness with malty and light floral fragrances. Finish: Long and sweet with a subtle hint of smoke

name: Greenwich Marine London Dry Gin 70cl

It’s refreshing tasting with soft green apple notes and a unique earthy undertone. The taste of Grey Goose Vodka can be described as rich, round and full-bodied, elegant with subtle lemon zest notes and a warm baked bread accent.

description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Conjured from the natural essence of one kilogram of fresh oranges in each litre, this orange-flavoured vodka has a light, crisp flavour perfectly mirroring the zest of an orange. The mouth-watering scent delivers full fresh and fragrant zesty notes that simply dance with your taste buds. A truly refreshing beverage that’s warm and rich, bring a slice of citrusy brilliance into your life with a glass of L’Orange. Extraordinary and a discerning taste character this is Grey Goose. Award winning, Grey Goose has quickly become one of the most renowned vodkas in the world enjoyed for its smooth and rounded taste. Distilled 5 times using the finest French wheat this premium vodka is exquisitely crafted to make it a crowning jewel in vodkas worldwide. Treat yourself to a bottle of Grey Goose.

name: Grey Goose L'Poire Vodka 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Like the soft winter wheat used to make GREY GOOSE® vodka, the anjou pear is cultivated in France and is an essential ingredient in classic French pastries and desserts like the tarte aux poires, resulting in a superior pear vodka. name: Grey Goose Vodka 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl A product of a unique 5-column distillation process, Grey Goose Vodka produces a nice, neutral spirit that’s perfect for a night cap. It is free from any additive (no sugar or flavouring) and is made from distilled, hydrated, and then bottled fermented wheat. Best served neat, straight from the freezer for a clean, fresh, smooth, and creamy ultra premium vodka experience. Made from a blending of limestone-filtered, demineralised spring water from the French cognac region Chaps love its crisp, grainy nose, with subtle black pepper and almond tones Perfumy, peppery palate with a tinge of rye and star anise and a whiff of fennel, nuts, and desiccated coconut Spicy, creamy, warming finish Aftertaste is long and clean with a hint of sweet liquorice and aniseed Platinum medal winner at World Spirits Championship

name: Grey Goose Vodka Vanilla 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl The Grey Goose “La Vanille” vodka is third in the brand’s flavoured line extension, first introduced in 2003 and re-launched, in September 2018 after being off the market for over 11 years. It is a blend of the classic Grey Goose Vodka and natural vanilla flavouring from Madagascar-sourced beans, produced and bottled in France. Crystal clear appearance and a vanilla ice cream aroma with pastrami undertones Slightly sweet and spicy vanilla taste with soft prickles of pepper, liquorice, toffee, and white chocolate underneath Grainy, rye notes accentuated by the creaminess of the confectionaries’ custard/vanilla flavour Best served as Espreso Martini for an added twist to your cocktail Limited edition vanilla flavoured vodka

name: Guinness Draught Nitrosurge Device
description: The NITROSURGE™ Device is your complete pouring experience, using innovative technology to put you in control of the iconic Guinness™ two-part pour. Working exclusively with Guinness™ NITROSURGE™ cans, it delivers the satisfyingly smooth Guinness you enjoy, at home. Simple to use, Guinness NitroSurge cans and the NitroSurge Device puts the craft of Draught in your hands Designed by our Guinness innovators, designers, and taste experts, NitroSurge brings the iconic two-part pour to everyone, everywhere, every time. Take control of the iconic Guinnness surge and settle and craft yourself a perfectly doomed pint from the comfort of you own home - or wherever you enjoy Guinness NitroSurge is a complete, portable pouring experience that uses innovative ultrasonic technology so you can enjoy a beautifully smooth Guinness wherever you are Guinness have married technology and innovation to create something special. Guinness NitroSurge is your complete pouring experience. Delivers the satisfyingly smooth Guinness you enjoy, at home. The Guinness NitroSurge Device uses ultrasonic technology to break down the nitrogen in Guinness and give you a beautifully smooth two-part pour every time. Expertly designed to create perfectly formed nitrogen bubbles, creating the surge and flavour of beautiful, great-tasting Guinness for every pour Information Preparation and Usage How to use the NitroSurge Device 1. Connect - to pour your own delicious Guinness, open a cold NitroSurge can, align the device nozzle with the can opening and push the device firmly into place. 2. Activate - Push the power button to activate - the Guinness Harp will illuminate indicating the device is ready for use. 3. Pour - Your Guinness NitroSurge Device is now ready for use.

name: Guinness Draught Stout Beer Cans 18x440ml
description: Guinness Draught Stout Beer Cans 18 x 440ml From the world-famous St James's Gate Brewery in Dublin, Guinness Draught is an ideal accompaniment to good friends, good food, and good times. With 250 years of history in every smooth, satisfying drop, this stout needs little in the way of introduction. Look at a Guinness Draught, and you'll see a world-renowned, best-selling beer with ground-breaking innovation right at its ruby-red heart. A true icon, Guinness Draught was created to celebrate Arthur Guinness signing his 9000-year lease. A fitting tribute, if ever there was one, to over two centuries of trailblazing brewing. Tasting Notes: A rich smooth head, with the sweetness of malt. A perfect balance with the bitterness of the hops. Suggested Recipe: Just chill, open, pour at 45 degrees, and enjoy.

name: Guinness Draught Stout Beer Cans 24x440ml
description: Guinness Draught Stout Beer Cans 24 x 440ml Distinctively dark with a creamy head. Velvety finish. Guinness Draught is one of the world's most iconic beers. It is a stout beer that is truly Made of More™️. Famous for its smooth velvety texture and unique surge and settle. This is our greatest innovation. Truly unique. Perfectly balanced. Made of More. The sweetness of the malt perfectly balances the bitterness of the hops which are both beautifully complimented by the characteristic flavour of our Guinness roasted barley Guinness brewers were the first to introduce the combination of nitrogen and carbon dioxide to draught beer. The result was Guinness Draught, famous for its smooth velvety texture and unique surge and settle. Guinness Draught Cans contain the world famous Guinness widget, which uses an ingenious nitrogen filled capsule that surges with bubbles when the ring pull is opened – replicating the draught experience in a can.

description: Size: 24 x 440ml Guinness Draught 0.0% Non-Alcoholic Beer is a non-alcoholic beer with the same smooth taste, perfectly balanced flavour and unique dark colour of Guinness, without the alcohol. name: Guinness Foreign Extra Stout Beer 24 x 330ml Bottle
description: Alc Vol: 7.5% Size 24 x 330ml Brewed In the UK Guinness Foreign Extra Stout is a bold tasting beer with a complex flavour profile. Originally brewed to withstand long journeys, its origins can be traced back to 1801 and the original recipe of West Indies Porter. With a full-bodied roasted and fruit flavour, it is a drink of distinction to be savoured. With a higher alcohol content, it has a fuller mouthful with strong smokey notes and bright hop bitterness. Fruit and caramel flavours begin, smoky notes and a vibrant bitterness follow. Where extra hops and a stronger alcohol percentage were once used to preserve the beer, allowing it to survive and thrive during long sea voyages, now they yield its bold taste and unique flavour profile. Guinness® Foreign Extra Stout is a beer born of a thirst for adventure, tracing its origins back to a recipe for our West India Porter, first set out by Arthur Guinness II in 1801. In the early 1800s, while other breweries were content to stay close to home, we struck out into unchartered territories, braving the perils of sea travel to export our famous black beer across the globe. Brewed with more hops to preserve the beer in the ships’ holds during voyages of four-to-five weeks in tropical climes, the recipe yielded a powerful drink with a complex, fruity bittersweet flavour. While our proudest invention to date arrived to be embraced by rest of the world, back in the brewery the team remained focused on the journey ahead. What was then known as West India Porter became the Foreign Extra Stout enjoyed today. But as the body evolved, its soul remained the same. It's where tradition meets innovation. And we're proud to transport that across continents. We can trace the origins of Foreign Extra Stout back to 1801 and the original recipe of West Indies Porter Full bodied palate of roast, fruity character Beer drinkers who are looking to experiment in beers but want to ensure they choose a quality liquid Originally brewed to withstand long journeys, the use of higher gravity and more hops resulted in a bold tasting beer with a complex flavour profile. Still brewed at our St. James's Gate brewery in Dublin, Guinness Original is crafted from finest quality malt, hops and Irish barley.

name: Guinness Nigerian Foreign Extra Imported Stout 24x325ml
description: Nigerian Guinness – Authentic & Unique Guinness Foreign Extra Stout is a beer like no other. It’s a beer of substance, the most full-flavoured of all. Singular and striking. Uniquely satisfying. Brewed with extra hops and roasted barley for a natural bite. Nigeria has been brewing Guinness at its Ikeja factory since 1962 and is now the second largest consumer of Guinness in the world. Guinness Nigeria's recipe includes locally sourced maize and sorghum following a government ban on the importation of malted barley in the 1980s. Such ingredients are said to give Guinness Nigeria its uniquely bitter and sweet taste. Refreshingly crisp and always rewarding. Brewed with a deep passion and dedication, this treasure trove of deep flavours, envelops and invigorates the drinker. This is a beer for those who seek a bolder taste, for those who want to be more and do more in life. For those who are truly MADE OF MORE. Guinness… Made of More. Nigerian Guinness is made with the following ingredients: Water Malt Barley Wheat Hops Sorghum Alcohol: 7.5% Vol

Guinness NITROSURGE cans work with ONLY with the NITROSURGE device . ultrasonic technology to break down the nitrogen in Guinness and give you a beautifully smooth two part pour every time. Expertly designed to create perfectly formed nitrogen bubbles, creating the surge and flavour of beautiful, great tasting Guinness for every pour.

name: Guinness Original Stout Beer Bottle 12x500ml
description: ABV: 4.2% vol Size: 12x500ml Guinness Original is crafted from finest quality malt, hops and Irish barley. Sharp and crisp to the taste, it's an entirely different experience from the smooth, creamy Guinness Draught and punchier Foreign Extra Stout, but the trademark Guinness flavours still preside. Guinness Original is based on a beer first brewed in 1821. Crisp hint of roasted barley and fresh breeze of hops gives a refreshing bite. If you were in a pub sometime between 1821 and 1970, chances are this is the Guinness you would have been drinking. Originally brewed as the XX version of our Porter, it's hoppy, roasty and crisp with a bittersweet finish. Still brewed at our St. James's Gate brewery in Dublin, Guinness Original is crafted from finest quality malt, hops and Irish barley

name: Guinness Original Stout Beer Cans 24x440ml

description: Alc Vol: 4.2% Size: 24 x 520ml THIS PRODUCT CAN ONLY BE USED WITH A GUINNESS SURGER UNIT. Distinctively dark with a creamy head and a velvety finish. The sweetness of the malt perfectly balances the bitterness of the hops which are both beautifully complimented by the characteristic flavour of our Guinness roasted barley Guinness brewers were the first to introduce the combination of nitrogen and carbon dioxide to draught beer. The result was Guinness Draught, famous for its smooth velvety texture and unique surge and settle. Beer drinkers who are looking for a quality beer from a trusted brand Famous for its smooth velvety texture and unique surge and settle. This is our greatest innovation. Truly unique. Perfectly balanced. Made of More. Perfectly balanced. Made of More.

name: Guinness West Indies Porter 8 x 500ml Bottles
description: Alc Vol: 6% Size 8 x 500ml Bottles Guinness West Indies Porter bottles the best of both worlds. The classic bitterness. A caramel-toffee sweetness. Then the touch of sourness. Pour this beer and enjoy a globetrotting Guinness that’s picked up a few distinct tricks along the way. With a higher % ABV and a chocolatey finish, it’s perfectly complex and decidedly unique. A beer well travelled, Guinness West Indies Porter was inspired by a recipe devised by our brewers back in 1801, when we first decided to export our legendary porter across the globe. The mother of what we now know as our Foreign Extra Stout, it was the pioneering brew that began it all, crafted with more hops to preserve the beer during sea voyages of four-to-five weeks in tropical climes. “Guinness West Indies Porter was inspired by a recipe devised by our brewers back in 1801, when we first decided to export our legendary porter across the globe.” Today, the recipe has been reimagined by our master brewers. Our unique yeast ferments faster, resulting in a fresher finish. The maturation is shortened, producing a sweeter toffee-like aroma and flavour. An immensely flavourful porter, it’s modern creativity brewed up with ancient ingenuity. History relived. Aroma: Toffee, caramel, slight chocolatey notes Flavour: Sweet, more chocolate than coffee flavours Palate: Smooth easy finish, with a medium sweet mouth feel Appearance: Ruby red with a frothy head

name: Guinness Zero Draught Alcohol Free Stout 4 x 440ml Cans
description: Now without alcohol, Guinness 0.0 is the iconic, best-selling stout beer, with ground breaking innovation right at its ruby-red heart. Introducing Guinness 0.0, our non-alcoholic beer with the same beautifully smooth taste, perfectly balanced flavour and unique dark colour of Guinness, without the alcohol. Brewed with our new cold filtration process. This ensures you get the same beautifully smooth taste, perfectly balanced flavour and unique dark colour of Guinness Draught, just without the alcohol. The latest in 250 years of innovation, Guinness 0.0 is specially brewed to retain the characteristic flavours which make Guinness Draught our most popular beer. The brewing process starts just as it always has, but with Guinness 0.0 the alcohol is gently removed through a cold filtration method. This helps to preserve its natural flavour, ensuring that the all important sweetness of the malt, the bitterness of the hops and the unique Guinness Roasted Barley flavours are all perfectly balanced. The Guinness brewers have worked tirelessly to ensure that Guinness 0.0 retains the beautifully smooth, cool and dark taste of Guinness. The alcohol is removed, but the distinctive character of Guinness remains Just like Guinness, Guinness 0.0 is dark ruby red with a creamy head, with hints of chocolate and coffee, and is smoothly balanced with bitter, sweet, roasted notes. Smoothly balanced stout with bitter, sweet and roasted notes. Hints of coffee and chocolate aromas.

name: Guinness, Glass Sea Salt & Carmel Fudge Gift Set

Guinness Original Pint Glass Made in Turkey. Guinness Sea Salt and Caramel Fudge - Contains no hydrogenated oils or fats Allergen Information - Contains: Barley

name: Gurkha Beer Pint glass
description: Collectable Pint glass advertising Gurkha beer, premium lager beer.

name: Gurkha half pint glass
description: Collectable half pint glass advertising Gurkha beer, premium lager beer. Picture of a Gurkha in black and white against a backdrop of Nepalese mountains, great bright red and gold.

name: Gurkha Premium Lager Beer 660ml Bottle
description: ABV 4.8% 1 x 660ml Bottle It was almost 200 years ago when the British Empire first encountered the Gurkhas. After a series of bitter conflicts a mutual respect and admiration developed and these indomitable Nepalese warriors were invited into the regular British army. They brought with them exceptional courage, fierce loyalty and their legendary curved knife, the kukri. They also brought their beer! Gurkha beer is a premium lager with crisp, refreshing & clean in taste. Flavours and aromas are locked through cold suspension brewing and triple filtration process. A uniquely smooth beverage brewed to cut the sharpest thirst. Now this distinctive beer is available in the United Kingdom. It's been a long time coming but after one taste you'll know it's been well worth the wait. Brewed under Licence in the UK Gurkha beer is suitable for vegans. We only use barley, oats, yeast and water.

name: Gurkha Premium Lager Beer Bottles 12x660ml
description: ABV 4.8% 12 Bottles x 660ml It was almost 200 years ago when the British Empire first encountered the Gurkhas. After a series of bitter conflicts a mutual respect and admiration developed and these indomitable Nepalese warriors were invited into the regular British army. They brought with them exceptional courage, fierce loyalty and their legendary curved knife, the kukri. They also brought their beer! Gurkha beer is a premium lager with crisp, refreshing & clean in taste. Flavours and aromas are locked through cold suspension brewing and triple filtration process. A uniquely smooth beverage brewed to cut the sharpest thirst. Now this distinctive beer is available in the United Kingdom. It's been a long time coming but after one taste you'll know it's been well worth the wait. Brewed under Licence in the UK Gurkha beer is suitable for vegans.
