name: Haake Beck Pils 6L Keg PerfectDraft
description: ABV: 4.9% Size: 6L Haake Beck Pils is a straightforward and authentic North German Pilsner, brewed in accordance with the German Reinheitsgebot, a purity law that guarantees high quality. The beer has a neat clean foam structure. Nice hop notes, with a hint of citrus. Lean and fresh on the palate. Balanced tart and dry finish. One of the most popular pilsner beers in northern Germany. This product is for use with Perfect Draft Dispensers only and cannot be used on its own. Please check the compatibility of your beer pump.

name: Haig Club Clubman Single Grain Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: ABV 40% Single Grain Scotch Whisky Haig Club Clubman is a modern and stylish Single Grain Scotch Whisky matured exclusively in Bourbon casks. Haig Club Clubman opens up the Scotch category to new people as a result of its lighter and subtle flavour that mixes perfectly with cola to make a delicious long, mixed drink. Notes of vanilla and dried fruits result in a light, sweet and vibrant taste with a smooth, clean finish. Clubman and Cola: the sweet, vanilla flavour of the scotch combines perfectly with the sweet caramel of Cola. Distilled at Cameronbridge Distillery, founded in 1824 by John Haig, Haig Club Clubman is matured exclusively in fresh, bourbon casks creating a scotch whisky which is sweet, light and easy to drink.

name: Haig Club Mediterranean Orange 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 35% Size: 70cl Haig Club Mediterranean Orange Spirit Drink is made with single grain Scotch whisky and paired with zesty Mediterranean oranges and other natural flavours. The taste has an expertly blended citrusy-floral quality which transitions into smooth, juicy, fresh orange peel and orange blossom notes. The sweet orange marmalade elements pair nicely with the signature smooth taste of Haig Clubman. Best enjoyed mixed with Lemonade over ice and a slice of orange for a fresh citrus experience. Ideal for enjoying at home on its own or with a meal.

name: Haig Club Single Grain Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl This single grain Scotch Whisky is remarkable for its fresh and clean style. It certainly stands out in a sea of blends and single malts. The rise of the single grain is eagerly anticipated as the next wave in the spirits industry-and Haig Club Deluxe is at the forefront of the movement. Try this new take on Scotch! Iconic blue bottle - wonderful as a gift and as an addition to your bar shelf Crafted at the oldest Scottish single grain distillery (Cameron bridge) by combining grain whisky from 3 types of casks Versatile, smooth, and delicious This sophisticated Scotch is perfect neat, over ice, or in a cocktail Light gold colour, with aromas of custard, citrus, and tropical fruits Develops with a rich sweetness and a pleasant woody spiciness Short and clean finish

name: Hakushu Peated Malt Spanish Oak - The Kogei Collection Japanese Kimono Edition 70cl - Limited Edition
description: Alc Vol: 43% Size: 70cl Distilled at Hakushu Distillery this peated single malt has been matured in Spanish Oak casks and bottled as the Kimono Edition of The Kogei Collection. Suntory has produced a small quantity of an unknown amount. This repeated itself 3 years ago with only 300 bottles produced of the Spanish Oak peated variety. Double rare! The House of Suntory has released two travel retail-exclusive Japanese whiskies: Yamazaki Peated Malt Spanish Oak and Hakushu Peated Malt Spanish Oak. The word ‘kogei’ can be translated as ‘traditional Japanese craftsmanship’. Master blender Shinji Fukuyo started with the peat-smoking of malt from Islay, then matured the whiskies in Spanish oak casks that were aged during the four seasons of Japan. The casks bring out a selection of spices to the Yamazaki expression. Yamazaki Peated Malt Spanish Oak offers creamy notes of dark mocha, raisins and almonds. On the palate, the whisky provides a ‘deep smooth smokiness, enhanced with rich, roasted cacao’. The long finish leads to bittersweet caramelised baking spices. The use of Spanish oak casks also led to a Hakushu with drier smoke and undertones of fruity sweetness, the House of Suntory said. The aroma of Hakushu Peated Malt Spanish Oak blends ‘rich floral notes of bitter orange marmalade and softly smoky dark chocolate’. On the palate, liquid offers an ‘elegant smokiness, balanced with sweet, subtle citrus, leading a lingering yet clean finish with gentle smoke and tartness’. Kimono collaboration The design of the whiskies, known as the 2024 Japanese Kimono Edition, was created in partnership with Kyoto-based kimono house Chiso. Featuring designs based on Chiso kimonos, the Yamazaki packaging incorporates intricate prints inspired by the Yamazaki distillery, with the depiction of three merging rivers to suggest a sense of calmness. The Hakushu packaging is based on the Japanese Southern Alps that surround the Hakushu distillery. This design features silver stamping, designed to evoke forest clouds and kimono threads. “The Japanese Kimono Editions of our 2024 Kogei Collection are a true embodiment of craft through inspired innovation,” added Beam Suntory brand marketing director, GTR, Manuel Gonzalez. “I’m sure these exceptional expressions will capture the imagination of whisky lovers and collectors.”

name: Half Crown Rhubarb And Ginger Gin Liqueur 70cl
description: ABV - 20% Size- 70cl Rhubarb and ginger is a timeless combination - tangy sweetness and fiery spice just seem to go together so well. Not unlike Hall & Oates, just with fewer moustaches... Anyway, yes, this gin liqueur from the Half Crown range boasts generous helpings of rhubarb and ginger notes. If you love both of those flavours, the Half Crown folks have made your dreams come true (ooh ooh).

name: Half Hitch Small Batch Handcrafted Premium Pink Berry Gin 70cl
description: ABV - 40% Size: 70cl HALF HITCH Pink Berry Gin is a flavoured gin produced using a combination of traditional copper pot distillation and natural fruit infusions. Key ingredients include strawberry, raspberry, and blackberry. Using a notably low sugar dosage, this Pink Gin is an exemplary demonstration of a beautiful balance of dry gin and fruity characteristics. Best enjoyed in mixed drinks such as a gin & tonic, with lemonade, or in a variety of cocktails. Premium British gin handcrafted with raspberry, strawberry & blackberry.

name: Hapkin - 8L BLADE Keg
description: Hapkin is a Belgian, strong blond beer of high fermentation, characterized by a rich foam collar and a dry, bold finish. The different hops, including Saaz and Monroe hops, are added in 4 times during the brewing process. This gives Hapkin its subtle fruitiness, which perfectly complements the slight bitterness of the beer. Blonde, slightly cloudy beer with a very generous white head. Sweet aromas give this beer real body and its aftertaste is deeply sweet and alcoholic. FOR USE IN BLADE BEER SYSTEM ONLY. ABV: 8.3% This item is now available for Next Day Delivery.

name: Hapusa Himalayan Dry Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 43% Size: 70cl Produced in India, this Hapusa Himalaya Dry Gin was the first gin to use exclusively Indian foraged ingredients - juniper, turmeric, mango, ginger, cardamom, coriander seeds, limes and almonds. The result is a multiple award-winning incredible smooth Gin that continues to capture the imagination of gin enthusiasts around the world. Produced from Juniper and botanicals sourced from the pine forests located at the foot of the Himalayans. The concentration of citrus, flora and spice makes it ideal to pairs with a variety of flavoursome cuisines. Distilled in India with foraged Himalayan Juniper and locally sourced botanicals, Hapusa is a gin that is uniquely Indian. Each sip begins in the pine forests of the mountains and leads you along an exploration of this beautiful country and its collection of flavours. Handcrafted with botanicals from all across India.

name: Haribo Box of Happy 120g
description: Fruit Flavour Gums and Sweet Foam Gums The Haribo Box Of Happy is a lovely decorated box of fruit flavour sweets and foam gums. In an array of fun shapes, including Cupcakes, Stars, Hearts and Present shaped treats in a variety of fruit flavours including strawberry, pineapple, blackcurrant, and apple. Perfect for celebrating everyday moments of happiness whether that's to say a little thank you, to share some love, show your appreciation or simply to brighten someone's day. These mini gift boxes are guaranteed to raise a smile with whomever they are gifted to. Free From Artificial Colours A Box of Happy just for you because... You're amazing For all you've done You deserve a little treat All of the above! Kids and grown-ups love it so......the happy world of Haribo! A portion is a little handful Ingredients Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Dextrose, Gelatine, Acid: Citric Acid, Flavouring, Fruit and Plant Concentrates: Apple, Bilberry, Carrot, Safflower, Spirulina, Elderberry, Blackcurrant, Orange Lemon, Mango, Passion Fruit, Aronia, Grape, Sunflower Oil, Elderberry Extract, Glazing Agent: Beeswax

name: Harmony Collection Guardian Oak 70cl
description: Size - 70cl ABV - 44.2% The fourth release in the Harmony Collection has been created in collaboration with Cirque du Soleil to tell our oak story in an imaginative, visual and innovative way. The whisky, created by The Macallan Whisky Mastery Team, is matured in a combination of first fill sherry seasoned European oak casks and refill sherry casks. These have been carefully selected to deliver the classic European oak flavours of dried fruits and sweet spices, naturally derived from the cask during maturation, with a long and rich oak finish. From the Cirque du Soleil SPIRIT Experience, two key characters will each bring to life the oak story. The beautiful illustration features a human figure, Davonna, intricately intertwined within the branches of a European oak tree. This design emphasizes the importance of the connection between the natural world and human experience. It conveys the life and wonder that bloom when humans are “In Harmony with nature.”​ The design also incorporates thistles, representing Scotland and the resilience of nature. They also symbolise Scottish rich natural heritage. ​The human representation links to Cirque du Soleil human performance and potential.​

name: Harrys Peach Schnapps 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 15% Size: 70cl Peach flavoured schnapps. Serving Instructions: Mix with any mixers and serve over ice, or serve as a shot.

name: Harveys Amontillado Sherry 75Cl
description: Alc Vol: 17.5% Size: 75CL Harveys Amontillado is a classic medium dry sherry with a golden amber hue. It is smooth, elegant and full-bodied with a woody aroma and nutty flavours. Harvey brothers. Bristol wine merchants importing from Spain. Blend of amontillados Light, elegant nutty taste Rich with a smooth finish Tasting Notes Medium Dry Sherry is a superb blend of amontillados with a light; elegant nutty taste

name: Harveys Bristol Cream Sherry 1L
description: Alc Vol: 17.5% Size: 1lt Since 1882 the "Bristol Cream" has stood apart - a distinctive mingling of four different sherries from the 'Solera' of casks of differenct ages. Discover the essence of invention - perfectly chilled or over ice, as a long drink or cocktail. Harvey Brothers. Bristol wine merchants importing from Spain. By Appointment to HM Queen Elizabeth II Sherry Suppliers Harveys Jerez Spain Dark, Golden and Complex Rich with a Mellow Sweetness

name: Harveys The Bristol Cream Solera Sherry 75cl
description: ABV: 17.5% Size: 75cl Wine of Spain. Dark, golden and complex. Rich with a mellow sweetness. Harvey brothers, Bristol wine merchants importing from Spain. Since 1882 The "Bristol Cream®" has stood apart - a distinctive mingling of four different sherries from the 'Solera' of casks of different ages. Discover the essence of invention - perfectly chilled or over ice, as a long drink or cocktail. By Appointment to HM Queen Elizabeth II Sherry Suppliers Harveys Jerez Spain Best served chilled - perfect when 'Harveys' turns blue Serve chilled in a wine glass, or over ice with a slice of orange, or mix with 2 parts lemonade over ice with slices of fruit.

name: Hasseroder Perfect Draft 6L Keg
description: ABV: 4.9% Size: 6lt This is the kind of beer that is perfect for a Perfect Draft machine: A hoppy German Pils on tap and dispensed at a perfect 3°C. Hasseröder has been making beer since 1872 in the Harz region and is now one of the most consumed beers in the new states of Germany. It looks like a classic Pils but has a herbaceous hop aroma more prominent than similar beers. There’s a distinctive bitter finish inviting sip after sip. Must be used in conjunction with the Perfect Draft Machine. Price Per Pint £3.59

name: Havana Club 15 Year Old Gran Reserva Rum 70cl
description: Havana Club Gran Reserva 15 Años is a prestigious and rare expression from the heart of Cuba. This limited-edition bottling in its previous, iconic presentation showcases the deep heritage and passion that define Havana Club's legacy. Aged for a minimum of 15 years in carefully selected oak barrels, this Gran Reserva rum is the result of a meticulous blending process. The result is a rich, complex spirit that is both elegant and bold. A true testament to Cuban rum-making tradition. Makes a great gift for a rum fan.

name: Havana Club Añejo 7 Year Old Dark Rum 2024 - Limited Edition Bottle
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Havana Club 7Y Limited Edition 2024 comes with a new design that draws on traditional elegance while introducing modern elements. This special edition has been created in collaboration with renowned jewellery designer Jonathan Raksha , known for his work for music stars, and now his signature adorns this exclusive bottle of rum. The design was inspired by Havana's architecture, which is reflected in the gold accents and intricate details reminiscent of diamonds. Influenced by his deep connection to Havana's beauty and natural wonders, Jonathan Raksha added a personal message on the bottle that celebrates the beauty and spirit of Cuba. “The very essence of Cuban rum” as described by its creator, the late great Don José Navarro. Havana Club 7 Años perfectly demonstrates the versatility of high- quality Cuban rum, as well as the deep commitment and expertise of our Rum Masters to a complex ageing process. To be enjoyed neat, on the rocks or in cocktails, but always in good company! The Rum Masters 2021 – Gold Award Winner. Crafted for sipping, to be enjoyed on the rocks and ideal for rich cocktails: Havana Club 7 Años is highly versatile. This dark rum, matured in ex-Bourbon barrels, showcases the rich natural flavours of Cuba. The liquid unveils the tastes of the Cuban terroir: aromatic tobacco, sweet tropical fruits, molasses, spices, and vanilla from the continuous ageing process, enhanced by the slow release of aromas.

name: Havana Club Anejo 7 Year Old Rum 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Havana Club Añejo 7 Años was the first Cuban extra aged rum that showed the world that rum could be drunk neat as well as enjoyed in cocktails. It has an intense and complex aroma, with a palate of honey, vanilla, chocolate, cocoa, sweet tobacco, dry fruits and spicy notes. The finish is powerful and full-bodied. The Rum Masters Award 2014 - Gold medal, Category: Dark (over 7 years old)

name: Havana Club Cuban Spiced Rum 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 35% Size: 70cl Cuban Rum with Spices & Natural Tropical Flavours Havana Club Cuban Spiced takes inspiration from the vast tropical world of Cuba. Blending our double aged rum with exotic flavours and warming spiced. It balances sweet vanilla and aromatic spiced with hints of juicy ripe guava, toasted coconut and fresh pineapple. Colour -Deep, rich, golden amber. Nose- Fresh tropical notes, with touches of sweet honeycomb and spice Taste- Zesty pineapple, toasted coconut & ripe guava notes with hints of vanilla, cardamom & nutmeg. Finish- Long, welcoming and very well balanced.. 35% 24.5 units. Aged Cuban rum with natural tropical flavours and spices The name "Havana Club" captures Cuba's rum-making heritage and the unique atmosphere of Havana, the country's capital. Havana Club is closely entwined with Cuban culture, and Cubans take pride in what has become a true national icon.

name: Havana Club Iconica 15 Year Gran Reserva Limited Reserve Rum 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Havana Club Anejo 15 year old Gran Reserva rum has a lovely fruity taste. Produced by repeatedly blending and aging selected rums and aguardientes in old oak casks that add that delicate touch of tannin. This unique aging process liberates the aromas and flavour and gives that extra smoothness that is the top mark of top quality rum. Havana Club Gran Reserva has a long and lingering aroma that is smooth and refreshing and delicate upon the palate.

name: Havana Club Rum 15 y.o. 70cl
description: A Cuban magnum opus, Havana Club Rum 15 Year Old is an intense rum with a bold mahogany colour. It goes through a unique process of repeatedly blending aguardientes and rums, and then maturing the blend in old oak barrels. A world-class sipping rum - hard to find! Often described as a great classic in Cuban rum-making Notes of prunes, dates, dried fruits, and raisins on the palate, with hints of rich tobacco, spicy oak, and apples Complex vanilla finish with traces of cocoa and coffee lingering delightfully Fruity and honeyed notes that develop into florals and peppery spices Serve on special occasions or to reward yourself after a long week

name: Havana Club Rum 3 y.o. 70cl
description: A sought after light rum from an esteemed Cuban brand, this 3 year-old rum is a flavourful addition to classic mixers, including Daiquiri and popular rum cocktails. Aged for a total of three years in oak bourbon casks, which give the rum its distinct straw yellow colour. Strong and pungent on the nose, with a mix of toasted coconut, fudge, muscovado sugar scents and faint wine-like notes and herbal vermouth Havana Club Rum Anejo 3 Años has a honeyed dark muscovado sugar sweetness accentuated by caramelised pear tastes and oxidised pineapple esters Balanced by black pepper and mild ginger spices, with mellow citrusy and oaky tones 2016 International Spirits Challenge Gold Medalist

name: Havana Club Rum Anejo Especial 70cl
description: A favourite mixing rum from the makers of perfectly aged Havana Club rums, designed to infuse fresh flavours to new and classic rum cocktails. A fine Cuban rum, this aged blend is also great on its own - neat or on ice. White oak aged rum with a lighter blend and style that provides the perfect base to rum cocktails and mixers Authentically Cuban with quite a complex nose that’s a mixture of honeyed sugar scents and hints of buttery toffee, vanilla cream, cedar, sandalwood, and cinnamon Thick and smooth with a nice caramel-like opening and soft fruity tastes, accentuated by spiced oak, cinnamon, and manuka honey flavours Bittersweet finish with vanilla and citrus undertones

name: Havana Club Seleccion De Maestros 70cl
description: ABV 45% Size 70cl This Seleccion de Maestros is a relaunch of Havana Club's 'Cuban Barrel Proof Edition,' with a new eye-catching packaging and bottled at 45% for that extra kick! The Gold Medal-winning liquid inside Havana club Seleccion de Maestros remains the same as for the old Cuban Barrel Proof – as the name suggests, the casks have been hand-picked by the maestros roneros from the company’s finest aged stocks. The rums selected by the maestros roneros are finished in special casks chosen for their aromatic properties before being bottled at a higher strength (45%) than the standard range for a more intense, immediate flavour throughout the palate and finish.

name: Havana Club Tributo 2018 70cl - Limited Release
description: ABV: 40% Tributo is a collection that was launched in 2016; it pays tribute to diverse aspects of the authentic – and quite idiosyncratic – Cuban rum production process. With each edition, prepared under the auspices of our Maestro del Ron Cubano Asbel Morales, the focuses changes. And for the Havana Club Tributo 2018, Don Asbel looked at oak cask maturation and its effect on Cuban rum. The third bottling in Havana Club's Tributo range sees some very well-aged Cuban rum given some additional maturation time in casks that previously held peaty Scotch whisky! Thought to be a first for Cuban rum, this finishing period has imparted a powerful whack of medicinal peat to the flavour profile, blending well with the classic old rum richness. Adding layers of smoke to this rich, sweet rum. On the nose, expect notes of dried fruits and raisins, with a full-bodied palate of dried fruit, smoke and toasty oak. This could convert Islay fans to rum… A Limited release of 2,500 bottles.

name: Hawksbill Banana Skin Rum 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 37.5% Size: 70cl Born of the Caribbean, Hawksbill spiced rum is inspired by the laid-Back vibes of beach rum shacks, the lively spirit of the people the natural wonder of the ocean and the humble friendship of our wildlife hosts. Taste: Banana and vanilla float across, before a wave of nutmeg, cinnamon and raisin breaks, allowing a hint of cardamom and sea salt to nestle on the taste buds. Tasting Notes: Banana and vanilla float across, before a wave of nutmeg, cinnamon and raisin breaks, allowing a hint of cardamom and sea salt to nestle on the taste buds Suitable for Vegans

name: Hawksbill Island Spices 70cl - NEW
description: Alc Vol: 37.5% Size: 70cl Born of the Caribbean, Hawksbill spiced rum is inspired by the laid-back vibes of beach rum shacks, the lively spirit of the people, the natural wonder of the ocean and the humble friendship of our wildlife hosts. Raise a glass not just to our island soul but to a brighter future. 10% of profits help protect the critically endangered Hawksbill turtle ensuring they swim our shores for years to come. Taste: Sweet vanilla floats across, before a wave of toasted nutmeg, cinnamon and raisin breaks allowing the subtle hint of cardamon and sea salt to come through. Tasting Notes: Sweet vanilla floats across, before a wave of toasted nutmeg, cinnamon i and raisin breaks allowing the subtle hint of Cardan no sea salt to come through

name: Hawkstone 'Filling Station' 2026 Pint Glass
description: Size: Pint Glass 1 x Hawkstone 'Filling Station' Pint Glass. At Hawkstone, we don’t cut any corners when it comes to our brewing process. We use the best ingredients from British farms and always lager for longer. This fantastic pint glass has been meticulously crafted to sit perfectly in one's hand, even filled to the brim it is completely spill proof. It has been finely crafted by blending the highest quality British sand with Hawkstonian angel tears, thus it is virtually indestructible and if dropped it is designed to bounce back into your hand without spilling a drop. name: Hawkstone Cider 12 x 500ml Bottles - NEW
description: 5% Size: 12 x 500ml The ancient Hawkstone stands proud: looking out over the orchards of Gloucestershire, Herefordshire, Oxfordshire & Worcestershire, from where we gather the very finest British heritage cider apple varieties. Using the fresh pressed juice from apples picked locally, our master cider makers ferment with champagne yeast and mature the cider for up to 6 months, before cold-filtering to create a 5% medium dry cider that’s full of flavour and character. Never from concentrate, never pasteurised. Hard to make - easy to drink Suitable for vegetarians, vegans and coeliacs

name: Hawkstone Hedgerow 12 x 500ml Bottles - NEW
description: 4% Size: 12 x 500ml Made with freshly pressed juice from British apples – just like our signature cider. Cider with blackberry & blackcurrant fruit juices and natural flavours But here’s the twist: we’ve also blended in juice from British-farmed blackcurrants and blackberries. The bold, fruity flavours are perfectly balanced with a crisp, clean and refreshing finish. Suitable for Vegans.

name: Hawkstone IPA 12 x 330ml Bottles - NEW
description: 4.8% Size: 12 x 330ml Our IPA leads with a burst of citrus flavour and touches of honey and caramel, balanced by a smooth bitter finish. Hewn from the mineral-rich bedrock of the Cotswold Hills, the Hawkstone, a Neolithic standing stone which gives our brewery its name has stood for generations. The Cotswold Brash soil in which it rests is hard and unforgiving. But for those who persist, it yields malting barley of unusually high quality - ideal for brewing. After harvest, our brewmaster combines the barley with select hops, yeast and the purest local water before allowing it to mature for up to 6 weeks. Hard to make - easy to drink. #Suitable for Vegans

name: Heavens Door Straight Rye (Developed in Partnership with Bob Dylan) 70 cl
description: Alc Vol: 43% Size: 70cl A straight rye whiskey from Bob Dylan's Heaven's Door range, finished in toasted oak cigar barrels from Vosges, France. It is full of orange peel, bright tropical fruit, coriander and spice notes and has already won a clutch of gold medals at spirits competitions over the past two years. The distinctive artwork on the bottle is a replica of metalwork crafted by Bob Dylan at his studio, Black Buffalo ironworks. Heaven’s Door Straight Rye Whiskey is aged for seven years in new, charred American oak barrels. Breaking with tradition, the whiskey is finished in toasted oak cigar barrels, harvested and air-dried in the low-lying mountainous region of Vosges, France. This unique and proprietary finishing process - which has never used before in whiskey making - results in a smoother, more approachable rye, with notes of citrus and spice to shine. Ⓤ Certified Kosher “A rye that does appreciably and with confidence show the bright, tangy, tropical fruit side of the grain that produced colonial America's first successful whiskey.” Highest Recommendation - F. Paul Pacult

name: Heavens Door Tennessee Straight Bourbon (Developed in Partnership with Bob Dylan) 70 cl
description: Alc Vol: 42% Size: 70cl Heaven’s Door Straight Bourbon Whiskey is distilled and aged in Tennessee, for a minimum 6 years in new American oak barrels with a flavor profile of vanilla and baking spices layered over a bed of toasted oak. The sour mash distillation process and non-chill filleted bottling allows this mature whiskey to remain consistent, as well as creating reliable flavor profiles that come from being aged in single story warehouses. Tasting Notes: Heaven’s Door Straight Bourbon Whiskey begins with a nose of baked bread, buttered popcorn, and dried fruit with a smooth and lasting finish of caramel, cinnamon and nutmeg. "A succulent, harmonious bourbon that hits all the right notes at the right moments for the category; a study of equal parts elegance and power." Highest Recommendation - F. Paul Pacult Ⓤ Certified Kosher

name: Hendrick's Absinthe 70cl
description: ABV: 48% Size:70cl Hendrick's are well known in the Gin world and have now ventured into the realms of Absinthe, with this release being bottled at a healthy 48%. This lower ABV allows for a more delicate introduction into the Absinthe range, with the focus on the botanicals and how they combine together to create this release. Using a combination of traditional Absinthe botanicals but of course adding their own Hendrick's twist with their signature Rose and Cucumber.

name: Hendrick's Flora Adora Gin 70cl - Limited Release
description: Alc Vol: 43.4% Size: 70cl Within the walls of the HENDRICK'S GIN Palace Garden, a most magical party is flourishing! Butterflies and bees dance in dizzy reverie, feasting on a banquet of fragrant flowers laid out especially by Ms Lesley Gracie. Now our Master Distiller wishes to invite you to join in these enchanting celebrations and introduce you to this delectable limited release Scottish Gin. Hendrick's Flora Adora is a limited release gin from Ms. Lesley Gracie's cabinet of curiosities. For this luscious masterpiece, Ms. Gracie has selected very enticing flowers beloved by our nectar-loving friends of the garden. Exquisite with tonic & a slice of cucumber or perhaps try it in a Hendrick's Flora Adora wildgarden cup. Limited edition

name: Hendrick's Gin 35cl
description: Alc Vol: 41.4% Size: 35cl It is easy to recognise a Hendrick’s with its distinctive bottle. Contains pot-still distilled gin with cucumber as a primary ingredient, resulting in a one-of-a-kind, incredibly refreshing, and tasty gin. Hendrick's is an infusion of rose petal and cucumber gin made as a delightful antidote to the ordinary Experience the unique infusion of rose and cucumber with Hendrick's Gin. This balance of distinctive yet subtle flavours adds a remarkable twist to the quintessential gin and tonic. Why settle for ordinary when you can have deliciously unusual? From its floral aroma of violet and rose to the subtle hint of spice, Hendrick's Gin takes the senses on a wonderful adventure. Botanicals are sourced from exotic flowers, fruits and seeds all over the world, making it crisp, zesty and entirely exquisite. The floral fragrance and smooth taste of Hendrick's Gin makes it ideal for cocktails that can be as classic or creative as the occasion demands. Raise the bar of elegance with original gin cocktails at drinks parties and garden get-togethers. Or serve in a refreshing gin and tonics to accompany low-key nights in. Wondrously versatile, Hendrick's Gin is as cracking at Christmas as it is sublime in summer. Dressed up in a striking black bottle with an apothecary-inspired look, this premium spirit transforms a drinks cabinet from purely practical to delightfully decorative - the perfect gin gift. No other gin tastes like Hendrick's because no other gin is made like Hendrick's. Handcrafted in Scotland by award-winning distillers William Grant & Sons, the excellent quality and unusual taste of Hendrick's Gin is fiercely protected.

name: Hendrick's Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 41.4% Size: 70cl It is easy to recognise a Hendrick’s with its distinctive bottle. Contains pot-still distilled gin with cucumber as a primary ingredient, resulting in a one-of-a-kind, incredibly refreshing, and tasty gin. Hendrick's is an infusion of rose petal and cucumber gin made as a delightful antidote to the ordinary

name: Hendrick's Lunar Gin - Limited Edition 70cl
description: ABV: 43.4% Size: 70cl Hendrick's Lunar Gin has mellow spice with subtle citrus finish and was conceived under the influence of the celestial light of the moon. It yields an alluring complexity and delightful warmth, best suited to night-sipping, moon-gazing and other sensible modes of contemplation. Released once in a blue moon from master distiller Lesley Gracie, Hendrick's Lunar is an intriguing balance of classic Hendrick's floral notes with a delicate spicy finish and just a hint of citrus. This premium gin transforms a drinks cabinet from purely practical to delightfully decorative - the perfect gin gift. Delectably Cosmic, Delightfully Hendrick's. Serving suggestion: Nose - An intriguing and appealing balance of Hendrick's floral notes with aromatic and spicy scents with just a hint of citrus, Palate - A curious combination of the distinctly floral and richly aromatic with a hint of spice on the finish

name: Hendrick's Midsummer Solstice Gin 70cl
description: ABV 43.4% Size: 70cl Midsummer Solstice is a limited release from our Hendrick's Gin Master Distiller, Lesley Gracie. Infused with an array of natural floral essences in celebration of the eternal mysteries of the Midsummer Solstice. A gin released from Hendrick's Cabinet of Curiosities where our master distiller Ms. Lesley Gracie, devises spirits so delectably peculiar they can only be made in the most limited of quantities. Inspired by the eternal mystery of midsummer solstice, when nature's blooms are most vivid - this deeply floral gin presents a Light & Crisp interpretation of the rounded Hendrick's house style.

name: Hendricks Gin 5cl Miniature
description: Size - 5cl ABV - 41.4% Hendricks Gin is made in a bizarre way produced from two different stills then married together using two unconventional botanicals, the Bulgarian Rosa Damascena and cucumbers. It won double gold at the San Francisco world spirit competition 2010.

name: Hendricks Neptunia Gin 70cl
description: 43.4% ABV The sea is everything! Inspired by the invigorating coastal air and the endless mysteries of the sea, HENDRICK’S Master Distiller Ms. Lesley Gracie considered a bold possibility: expressing the glorious sensory delights of the sea, in a gin. And so began HENDRICK’S NEPTUNIA. HENDRICK’S NEPTUNIA is a limited release that captures the magic of the sea, in a gin. Ms. Lesley Gracie's creation is as refreshing as her muse, the mighty waves that lash the Ayrshire coast. Infused with an exquisite blend of locally sourced coastal botanicals and with a remarkable crisp citrus finish.

name: Hennessy - 50 Years Of Hip Hop - Nas Limited Edition VS Cognac
description: ABV - 40 % Size - 70cl Boxed In 2023, Hennessy VS marks a unique cultural milestone, celebrating a half-century of hip-hop with one of the genre's most prolific talents, Nas. A long-term friend of Hennessy, the multi-hyphenate, multi-platinum rapper and artist captures the movement and the moment in a vibrant limited edition cognac. To inspire the collaboration, Hennessy asked its friend Nas what he wanted to say to Hip Hop on it's 50th Birthday. He penned a hand-written homage to the past, present and future of this beloved culture. His words of tribute became the foundation for a disruptive collage that fuses snap-shot’s of street and studio culture with vibrant orange graffiti accents.

name: Hennessy 'Henry White' 25th Anniversary Edition' Cognac 70cl - Collectors Item
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Far from the rarest release ever, this has been one of the most sought after, and called for Cognacs in this brands storied history. Partially due to the fact that it has only been available at the HQ in Cognac itself or select countries in the Caribbean. This one off limited edition collector's release is the same great liquid packaged with an Anniversary label. Easy to drink, easy to love. This won't be around for long so don't miss your chance to stock up. Hennessy Henry White Cognac presents an innovative take on the traditional category, offering a lighter and fresher profile. Its subtle floral and fruity notes make it ideal for modern cocktails or refreshing serves. It’s a contemporary option for those looking for something unique.

name: Hennessy James Hennessy Cognac 1lt
description: Size: 1lt Alc Vol: 40% Maison Hennessy has been creating one of the finest cognacs since 1765. With the James Hennessy blend, the Tasting Committee today pays tribute to one of its historic figureheads: a pioneering entrepreneur and accomplished traveler, who always had an innate understanding of the need to explore new horizons. This is an remarkable cognac that displays beautiful shades of amber with highlights of bronze, and offers layers of smooth, toasty aromas. Silky, yet well structured, this drink expands across the palate with notes reminiscent of blood peach and roasted almonds, while giving way to an outstanding finish. To be enjoyed neat or on ice. RARE - LIMITED EDITION - COLLECTORS ITEM

name: Hennessy Prive Cognac 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl HENNESSY PRIVE SPECIAL EDITION COGNAC A rare bottle of a special edition Hennessy cognac that was first released in Singapore. This Prive blend was created by master blender Yann Fillioux to replicate a legendary Art Deco Hennessy cognac created by one of his ancestors in the 20's. A blend of around a hundred full bodied 'eaux-de-vie' that has been aged in young oak casks to reinforce its taste. A remarkable refinement and roundness of palate defines PRIVÉ, elegantly structured and velvety in texture, exuding a delicate complexity of crystallized fruit notes. A century after inaugural release, Hennessy has revived Privé, a timeless and enduring Cognac for the most. This is something just a little bit special. COLLECTORS ITEM. LIMITED STOCK.

name: Hennessy Very Special Cognac NBA Season 4 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Hennessy VS Spirit of the NBA This exclusive bottle is a commemoration of the partnership between Hennessy and NBA. Hennessy VS NBA Season 4 edition, housed in a dynamic 70 cl bottle, celebrates the spirit of the game with its vibrant, limited edition design. This Cognac is a rich tribute to Hennessy's long-standing partnership with the NBA, encapsulating the energy and passion of basketball in every pour. The bottle, emblazoned with the iconic NBA logo, contains Hennessy's renowned Very Special Cognac, known for its harmonious and well-structured blend that has become a staple in the world of spirits A wonderful partnership The partnership between the National Basketball Association (NBA) and Hennessy was a dream come true for many cognac and basketball fans. Hennessy itself is very proud to be the partner of this global sports and media company. That is why, in honour of this wonderful partnership, they are now releasing the Hennessy VS Spirit of the NBA 2021 to once again bring great joy to anyone who is passionate about sport or cognac. With the box in the NBA design, this bottle is also ideal as a gift. Hennessy VS The Hennessy VS Cognac is one of the most popular bottles in the world. Delightfully fragrant with pleasant roasted notes, it beguiles its tasters. Its maturation in oak barrels gives it a special aroma. It is lively, dynamic and full of energy. At the same time, it convinces with a rich and characterful taste. For every true cognac fan, this bottle is indispensable in the home bar.

name: Hennessy VS Cognac 35cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 35cl - Half Bottle Being one of the popular cognacs in the world, Hennessy V.S has become an icon for its bottle and its superb taste. The VS means for ‘Very Special,’ made with selected eaux-de-vie (the youngest being 2.5 years old). A spectacular blend of 40+ different eaux-de-vie A quintessential cognac, perfect for enjoying neat or in cocktails Magnificent golden colour Strong and potent alcohol aromas on the nose, with subtle spiciness, oak, and vanilla Sharp, woody, and nutty taste with some sweetness, developing into well-rounded floral flavours with tinges of vanilla and berries Long and strong oak finish Aged in Limousin barrels Elegant, consistently satisfying

name: Hennessy VS Cognac 5cl Miniature
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size 5cl Miniature One of the most popular cognacs on the planet, A Blend of 40 eaux-de-vie, aged 3-8 years. Hennessy VS Cognac brings you a bold and daring cognac with intense depth of flavour. Wild oak rises from the glass, followed by fresh grapes and green apples, and finished with the warming spices of vanilla, cinnamon, cloves, and a hint of ground ginger. Pour a glass and inhale the aromas of wild Limousin oak rising from the glass, alongside grilled almonds, toasted hazelnuts, warming vanilla and a hint of ground ginger. On the palate, you’ll taste the flavours of fresh grapes and crisp green apples at the forefront, followed by the festive flavours of spiced orange, cinnamon and cloves, with a smoky undercurrent of wood staves running throughout. This is a timeless and traditional cognac that also pushes the boundaries with its intense character and bold depth of flavour. Perfect Serve – Inspired by the head bartender at the eponymous Harry’s New York Bar in Paris, the Hennessy Between the Sheets is a seductive blend of 30ml Hennessy VS Cognac, 30ml Rum, 30ml Orange Curacao, and 15ml of lemon juice. Shake with ice and strain into a chilled martini glass, and garnish with a lemon twist.

name: Hennessy VS Cognac 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Being one of the popular cognacs in the world, Hennessy V.S has become an icon for its bottle and its superb taste. The VS means for ‘Very Special,’ made with selected eaux-de-vie (the youngest being 2.5 years old). A spectacular blend of 40+ different eaux-de-vie A quintessential cognac, perfect for enjoying neat or in cocktails Magnificent golden colour Strong and potent alcohol aromas on the nose, with subtle spiciness, oak, and vanilla Sharp, woody, and nutty taste with some sweetness, developing into well-rounded floral flavours with tinges of vanilla and berries Long and strong oak finish Aged in Limousin barrels Elegant, consistently satisfying

name: Hennessy VS Cognac Henny-Rita Cocktail Shaker Gift Set 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Hennessy VS Cocktail Shaker Gift Set 70cl is a premium spirits gift set designed for both cognac enthusiasts and cocktail lovers. This set combines a 70cl bottle of Hennessy Very Special (VS) Cognac with a branded cocktail shaker, offering a complete solution for preparing mixed drinks at home or for entertaining. Hennessy VS is one of the most widely recognised cognacs, produced in France using a blend of carefully selected eaux-de-vie aged in oak barrels. With an alcohol content of 40% ABV, it delivers a bold and balanced flavour profile. On the nose, it presents fruity and lightly oaky aromas, while the palate offers notes of fresh grape, apple, citrus, vanilla, and toasted almond, finishing smooth and lively. The included cocktail shaker is designed for practical use, often featuring measurement markings or a recipe guide, allowing users to easily prepare classic and modern cocktails. This set is commonly associated with the “Henny-Rita”, a variation of the margarita made with cognac, citrus, and sweet elements. This gift set is suitable for multiple occasions, including celebrations, parties, and gifting. It provides both a ready-to-drink premium spirit and the tools needed for cocktail preparation, making it a versatile option for home bars.

name: Hennessy VSOP In Gift Box 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Hennessy V.S.O.P was commissioned in 1817 by the future King George IV of England to enthral guests at a colorful gathering. It’s the very first passionate achivement of Hennessy’s original Master Blender, Jean Fillioux, whose family has continued to perfect it for eight generations over two centuries. With its inviting nose of sweet apricot and its charming palate of voluptuous vanilla and mellow oak, Hennessy V.S.O.P is smooth, charming and all embracing. COLOR -Vibrant ruby-meets-amber creating an inviting glow. NOSE - The rich, inviting aroma of sweet and fresh apricot. Cheerful notes that leave you longing for more. PALATE - Voluptuous vanilla meets mellow oak for a smooth flavor that leaves a lasting impression.

name: Hennessy VSOP LeBron James Edition 70cl
description: ABV - 40% Size - 70cl (Boxed) Hennessy’s jewel in the crown, V.S.O.P has been perfected over more than 250 years. Today, a bold and collectible V.S.O.P Limited Edition honors global icon LeBron James' signature “crowning” gesture as a symbol of greatness and self-confidence. Crafted with excellence, mastery and generosity, this limited edition is shaped to celebrate a timeless legacy. Hennessey and NBA all-time leading scorer LeBron James meet once again! Following on from their collaborative VS Cognac, here we have a limited edition bottle of Hennessy VSOP that celebrates the Lakers legend.

name: Hennessy x V.S.O.P. NBA Limited Collector's Edition Cognac 70cl
description: ABV - 40% Size - 70cl (Boxed) Inspired by the basketball leather. As an ode to a collective game that brings people together. Game is born from passing the ball, creating a culture shaped by community. Honouring a partnership between two icons, Hennessy is proud to present its Hennessy VSOP in an NBA limited edition bottle. Dedicated to those who infuse the NBA with a spirit that transcends the game.

name: Hennessy XO Cognac 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl A premier cognac perfect as business gifts and for special occasions. The original XO (extra-old), first introduced by Maurice Hennessy in 1870, then a special blend for friends and family. This blend has gone through Hennessy’s extensive aging process (up to 30 years). Rich, complex, and robust, developing layered flavours as sipped A blend of more than 100 eaux-de-vie Maurice Hennessy coined the term ‘XO’ for this very recipe in the 19th Century Dried fruit notes hit the nose on the first wave, with dried figs and prunes dominating and then evolving to smells of chocolate black pepper, and cinnamon Very balanced palate Elegant and graceful, revealing roundness, balance, and harmony Long finish, with velvety cinnamon and vanilla aftertaste

name: Hennessy XO Cognac Magnum Gift Box 1.5L
description: Alc Vol; 40% Size: 1.5lt - Magnum In 1870, Maurice Hennessy created Hennessy X.O for his circle of friends and introduced a new style of cognac. Hennessy X.O is the Original, the emblematic icon of the Hennessy Maison. Deep and powerful, the eaux-de-vie of this Hennessy X.O cognac are aged in young barrels and marked out by their power and energy, but also by their capacity to achieve a great roundness through time.

name: Hennessy XO NBA Season 4, 70cl - Collectors Item
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl In its fourth year of collaboration with the NBA, Hennessy is celebrating the culture that's born on the basketball court with a series of limited-release cognac bottles, including this exceptional Hennessy X.O. Inspired by the NBA hardwood courts on which the highest-level games are played, the bottle design and wraparound gift box of Hennessy's top-drawer X.O cognac is a stunning reflection of the meticulous craftsmanship that goes into making both the courts and the cognac. The Original emblematic icon of the Hennessy Maison, Hennessy X.O is a powerful and elegant cognac first created in 1870, by Maurice Hennessy. This bottle is presented in a classic gift box making it the perfect addition to the drinks cabinet or to gift to that special someone. Tasting Notes: This cognac has an intense colour with a velvety texture. The first wave of aromas express rich dried fruits such as prunes and dried figs. The aromas evolve to more dense notes of chocolate and black pepper, mellowed by cinnamon, clove and cardamom. Distinct fragrances of crystallized fruit, oak, spices, and emanations of old leather can be noticed. On the palate the cognac is elegant and robust, revealing balance, roundness, and harmony, underlined by the strength of peppery notes, and vegetable fragrances from the oak. A lovely long after taste with sweet notes of cinnamon and vanilla.

name: Henri La Fontaine Chablis 2021 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 12.5% Size:75cl Country: France Grape Variety: Chardonnay Region: Burgundy Chablis Henri La Fontaine is a pale lemon wine with green hints. It has typical steely, mineral aromas with light buttery notes. Crisp and flinty it is perfect with prawns, salmon and smoked fish

name: Henry Westons Cloudy Vintage Cider 8 x 500ml
description: Alc Vol: 7.3% Size: 8 x 500ML Bottles In 1880 Henry Weston first started crafting cider from bittersweet apples on his farm in Herefordshire. Over many years he refined the art of cider making, and today Henry Westons is produced only from apples from a single year's harvest. Our vintage cider are always slowly matured, and spend time in traditional oak vats, which ensures an exceptional taste. Please gently invert to ensure an even distribution of cloudiness. Sediment may settle as naturally unfiltered. Medium dry Full-bodied & fruity character Unfiltered cloudy cider Suitable for vegetarians, vegans & coeliacs

name: Henry Westons Medium Dry Aged Finish Cider Bottles 8x500ml - 6.5%
description: ABV: 6.5% Slowly ageing Henry Westons Cider gives it a deep long finish. Herefordshire vintage cider Aged up to 180 days Medium Dry with a deep & rich, long finish Suitable for vegetarians, vegans & coeliacs

name: Henry Westons Medium Dry Vintage Cider Bottles 8x500ml - 8.2% ABV
description: ABV: 8.2% In 1880 Henry Weston first started crafting cider from bittersweet apples on his farm in Herefordshire. Over many years he refined the art of cider making, and today Henry Westons is produced only from apples from a single year's harvest. Our vintage ciders are always slowly matured, and spend time in traditional oak vats, which ensures an exceptional taste. Slowly matured in aged oak vats to deliver a smooth, rounded, medium-dry cider packed with magnificently exceptional character Suitable for vegetarians, vegans and coeliacs

name: Henry Westons Organic Cider 8 x 500ml
description: Organic Medium dry Rich & fruity with honey notes Suitable for vegetarians, vegans & coeliacs 6% ABV

name: Henry Westons Vintage Rose Cider 8 x 500ml
description: Alc Vol: 5.5% Size: 500ml Vintage Rosé Cider Look: Blush & Sparkling Aroma: Apple Blossom Finish: Smooth & Rounder Taste: Medium, Smooth with a long, fruity finish In 1880 Henry Weston first started crafting cider from bittersweet apples on his farm in Herefordshire. Over many years he refined the art of cider making, and today Henry Westons is produced only from apples from a single year's harvest. Our vintage ciders are always slowly matured, and spend time in traditional oak vats, which ensures an exceptional taste. Suitable for vegetarians, vegans & coeliacs

name: Hepple Gin 70cl
description: Hepple Gin is crafted using a rather intricate production method, which includes pot stills, vacuum distillation and a supercritical CO2 extraction process! A base spirit is distilling in a pot still using a selection of botanicals including Italian juniper. More botanicals are vacuum-distilled, including locally picked juniper, Amalfi lemon and lovage. The super-critical CO2 extraction process is used to make a spirit flavoured with Macedonian juniper. These are expertly blended together resulting in this fascinating tipple!

name: Hernö Pink BTL Gin 50cl
description: Size - 50cl ABV - 42% Now we know what you might be thinking. Hernö has gone and labelled this gin as Pink, but the spirit is actually clear! Well, this is the Swedish distillery's response to the plethora of pink gins available today, and a its rather tongue in cheek way of pointing out that colour doesn't reflect flavour. That said, a few of the botanicals within are pink, with strawberries and rose petals among the eight used, and they slapped a lovely pink label on the bottle, hence why it's Pink BTL Gin! Suitably floral and fruity, and definitely not pink.

name: Hertog Jan 450ml Glass
description: Size: 450ml Glass The Hertog Jan beer glass has a capacity of 450 ml. In this beer glass, the taste of Hertog Jan comes into its own. The original Hertog Jan beer glass is ideal as a gift for friends and acquaintances. This beer glass is one of the vast selection available from 365 Drinks so have a look at some of our other glasses from around the world!

name: Hertog Jan 6L Keg PerfectDraft
description: ABV: 5.1% Size: 6L Hertog Jan is now available in six-litre PerfectDraft kegs for the first time. This light and crisp pilsner pours beautifully golden with a sprightly head, is full bodied with a fruity aroma, and is well balanced with a pleasantly bitter aftertaste. This product is for use with Perfect Draft Dispensers only and cannot be used on its own. Please check the compatibility of your beer pump.

name: Hibiki Japanese Harmony Master's Select - Limited Edition
description: Size - 70cl ABV - 43% Suntory's specially designed bottle of Hibiki Japanese Harmony - Master's Select highlights the traditional Japanese symbols of the Sakura flower (cherry blossom), Goshoguruma (royal carriage) and Ryusuimon (streaming water). During Japan's Edo period (1603-1868), these were regarded as the symbols of prosperity and good fortune. Not surprisingly therefore, they were often featured in festive costumes and special gifts offered to the Shogun. This bottle honors the artistry of Japanese culture and celebrates the fact that Hibiki is a harmony of Japanese nature and craftsmanship. This Hibiki comprises a blend of more than ten distinct malts and grains, including Yamazaki, Hakushu and Chita. They’re carefully aged in five different types of cask prior to blending. This whisky is the brainchild of the fourth-generation chief blender, Shinji Fukuyo.

name: High Commissioner 1.5Lt - Magnum
description: ABV - 40% Size - 1.5ltr Magnum A blend selected from the finest grain and malt whiskies, High Commissoner has flavours of soft fruits, peach, pear and chewy caramel. Well balanced and complex, sit back and enjoy its long smooth warming finish.

name: High Commissioner Blended Scotch Whisky 20cl
description: 20cl 40% vol A blend selected from the finest grain and malt whiskies, High Commissoner has flavours of soft fruits, peach, pear and chewy caramel. Well balanced and complex, sit back and enjoy its long smooth warming finish.

name: High Commissioner Blended Scotch Whisky 35cl - Half Bottle
description: Size : 35cl 40% vol A blend selected from the finest grain and malt whiskies, High Commissoner has flavours of soft fruits, peach, pear and chewy caramel. Well balanced and complex, sit back and enjoy its long smooth warming finish.

name: High Commissioner Blended Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% vol Size: 70cl A blend selected from the finest grain and malt whiskies, High Commissoner has flavours of soft fruits, peach, pear and chewy caramel. Well balanced and complex, sit back and enjoy its long smooth warming finish.

name: Highland Park 15 Year Old - Viking Heart
description: Size - 700ml ABV - 44% Highland Park distillery is a renowned Scottish distillery located on the Orkney Islands in northern Scotland. The distillery has a rich history, dating back to 1798, making it one of the oldest whisky distilleries in Scotland. To create this 15 Year Old, a combination of sherry seasoned European and American oak casks were utilized. This produces a dram packed with warm, spicy notes balanced with notes of sweet vanilla & citrus fruits. This release is presented in a stunning porcelain decanter, designed to show a glimpse into the past as to how their whisky would have been stored in earthenware vessels. Tasting Notes Nose Rich and spicy fragrances of crème brulee, heather honey, and crushed cinnamon. Light swirl of coastal peat at the back. Palate Wonderfully rich and complex single malt. Bursting with notes of orange zest, sponge cake & fresh pineapple. Finish Citrus and vanilla flavours linger in the peat smoke's fragrant waves.

name: Highland Park Dragon Legend Malt Whisky Smoky 70cl
description: ABV 43.1% The Orkney Single Malt with Viking Soul The wise Viking Sigurd became a great Norse hero after bravely battling an evil serpent dragon. Only a single malt that's as bold, bright, clear and unconventional as the warrior himself would be worthy of such a name as Highland Park Dragon Legend. The whisky's rich smokiness is born from the woodless peat found locally to the distillery on Orkney's Hobbister Moor, and its sweet fragrant spiciness comes from slowly maturing in sherry-seasoned European and American oak casks. Hints of warm spicy fruit cake, dollops of vanilla custard, lemon and honey combine with this aromatic smokiness to make a whisky that's perfectly at home being drunk next to a fire, while sharing stories of old.

name: Highland Park Svein (Warrior Series) Whisky 100cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 1lt Svein comes from Highland Park's Warrior series, which was released for the travel retail market. It's named after a legendary Viking leader known for his fiery temper but also for his boundless hospitality. The whisky is matured predominately in ex-American oak casks, which has resulted in plenty of orange oil, vanilla, caramel and peppery oak, along with plenty of smoke Svein has both a sweetness due in part to the high percentage of American oak casks used and a spiciness - representing his notoriously fiery temper.

description: Hildon Delightfully Still. An English natural mineral water of exceptional taste. Low in Sodium.

name: HILMAR SPRINGS ZINFANDEL BLUSH 75CL
description: Size - 75cl ABV - 10.5% Bright salmon pink in colour, this wine has a fresh nose of strawberry and raspberry fruits. On the palate it is juicy and refreshing. A delicious strawberry finish completes this easy drinking wine. Made for summer evenings, or to help remember summer over the winter months. Food Match: Great with spicy dishes

name: Hobgoblin Gold Ale Golden Beer 8x500ml Bottle
description: Alc Vol: 4.2% Size: 8 x 500ml A solid gold legend. The combination of four hop varieties infused with malted barley and a touch of wheat give this easy drinking golden beer tropical aromas of citrus and passion fruit. A biscuit-like malt base gives way to heaps of fresh lemon and lime zest. A hop kick riot of rascally refreshment. Return for refund where applicable

name: Hobgoblin Gold Cans 24 x 440ml
description: Alc Vol: 4.2% Size: 24x440ml A hidden treasure has been unearthed in the Wychwood Brewery… and it’s as pure and precious as it’s forefather. Hobgoblin Gold is the latest beer carrying the little fella’s moniker, and while Gold might be lighter in colour, it’s definitely no lightweight. A combination of hop varieties & an infusion of wheat and malted barley has resulted in the perfect golden beer – with a huge hop punch. Guilt edged golden refreshment. Well what did you expect? The combination of four hop varieties infused with malted barley and a touch of wheat give this easy drinking golden beer tropical aromas of citrus and passion fruit. A biscuit-like malt base gives way to heaps of fresh lemon and lime zest. A hop kick riot of rascally refreshment Taste: Mouth-watering malt & refreshing citrus hop kick. Nose: Fragrant citrus and wild forest gooseberries.

name: Hobgoblin IPA - Wychwood Brewery - 8 x 500ml Bottles
description: Alc Vol: 5% Size: 8x500ml There are IPAs and there are legendary IPAs. Ours is legendary. Pale golden with orange glints, this beer is forged from the finest British hops and varieties gathered from the far-flung shores of the Pacific. Prepare for an intense tropical explosion of zesty oranges, grapefruit, honey and juicy bitterness. An IPA with legendary status, forged from the finest hops. Famed for its taste explosion of hops, grapefruit and honey, leaving a juicy bitterness to finish.

name: Hobgoblin Ruby Ale Beer 8x500ml Bottle
description: Alc Vol: 5% Size: 8 x 500ml This distinct ruby beer's sweet caramel and fruity aromas tease the taste buds. Brewed with smooth and rich chocolate and crystal malts & a blend of fuggles and styrian golding hops. Expect a delicious full-bodied toffee flavour and a fruity finish of figs, raisins and dates

name: Hobgoblin Ruby Beer Cans 24x440ml
description: Alc Vol:4.5% size 24x440ml Drink legendary. This distinct ruby beer’s sweet caramel and fruity aromas tease the taste buds. Brewed with smooth and rich Chocolate and Crystal malts & a blend of Fuggles and Styrian Golding hops. Expect a delicious full-bodied toffee flavour and a fruity finish of figs, raisins and dates. Hobgoblin: Born Different.

name: Hoegaarden Bar Runner
description: This Hoegaarden Bar runner is made from a tough, durable non-slip rubber and is designed to keep your pint in place and catch any spills or drips. The textured ribbed surface has a red and white design and the Hoegaarden logo in the middle. Whether it's for a pub or restaurant that serves Hoegaarden or as the perfect accessory for a home bar, this drip runner will help catch drips and protect your bar surface when serving a pint. Size: 880mm x 252m Official Hoegaarden branded product Non slip pvc rubber Ribbed texture allows drips to be caught in the mat without running off Catch drips and spill on bar surfaces

name: Hoegaarden Blanche Perfectdraft 6lt Keg
description: ABV: 4.9% Size: 6L Only to be used with Philips Perfect Draft dispensers Hoegaarden Blanche is the world's most famous Wheatbeer and now you can enjoy the perfect draft glass at home thanks to PerfectDraft. Brewed with lemon zest, and coriander for the ultimate Blanche beer reshness, Hoegaarden Witbier pours attractive hazy pale yellow beneath a puffy white head. The aroma is an inviting mix of fine citrus and coriander with crisp wheat notes. This profile is echoed on the super-refreshing, light body with more zingy fruit and light airy wheat tones that lift the palate to a light, bright, perfectly refreshing finish. Product Type: PerfectDraft Kegs Style: Wheat Beer Country: Belgium Brewery: Hoegaarden Serving Temp: 3°C

name: Hoegaarden Rose PerfectDraft 6L Keg
description: ABV: 3.0% Size: 6L Only to be used with Philips Perfect Draft dispensers It is said that when the villagers in Hoegaarden ran out of beer glasses they began drinking out of jam jars, apparently the leftover fruit only added to the flavour! This old tale inspired Hoegaarden to create this delightful twist on their famous weissbier. Hoegaarden Rosée is light and pours a pale shade of pink. It has a delicate hint of raspberries and a sweet, slightly jammy fruit quality. This product is for use with Perfect Draft Dispensers only and cannot be used on its own. Product Type: PerfectDraft Kegs Style: Wheat Beer Country: Belgium Brewery: Hoegaarden Serving Temp: 3°C

name: Honours Gin 1881 Distillery 70cl - Navy strength 57% ABV
description: Alc Vol: 57% Size: 70cl Peebles Hydro once served as a Military hospital during WWII. Our award-winning Navy Strength Gin is named Honour of those injured, our heritage of hospitality preserved in waves of citrus and cardamom. Honours Gin won two awards within its first year of release. The Cardamom and dry citrus notes are all highlighted by the heightened alcohol content, this is unimaginably smooth. Nose : Juniper and grapefruit in abundance with a peppery, woody backing supplied by birch bark and angelica root. Palate : Robust pine flavours with pronounced spice, ginger and grapefruit character held at the fore by the heightened alcohol content. Finish : Despite its 57%ABV strength, this is an extremely smooth gin, with a rounded and creamy finish that stretches into the distance of the Peeblesshire hills. Serve : a dash of angostura bitters and tonic water let this navy strength gin’s character shine – garnish with orange peel.

name: Hooch Alcoholic Lemon Brew with Vodka & Fruit Juice 24 x 275ml
description: ABV: 3.4% Size: 24 x 275ml Bottles A classic alco-pop, made with natural flavours and juicy bits of lemon. A sparkling alcoholic brew made with real lemons and natural lemon flavours. Hooch is truly a legend of the drinks world. Originally launched in 1995 we had a brief sabbatical in the noughties but are now firmly back in the nation's hands. Our outrageously refreshing, alcoholic fruit brew comes in two flavours; the original lemon with its signature citrus hit and our new passion fruit and mango Hoola Hooch which has received rave reviews from all that have tried it. Enjoy chilled or pour over ice. We recommend adding an extra shot of vodka for good measure.

You’ve seen how others do pink… but you can forget pristine, delicate and tired pink drinks. It’s time for a new kind of pink, pink with attitude, Pink Hooch. A satisfyingly sweet alcoholic raspberry lemonade with that signature Hooch citrus kick. Set to be the drink of the summer, thirst quenching and on trend. Pink Hooch is here to shake it up.

To microwave, simply follow the directions above with cold milk, microwave for 1 minute (800W). Stir well, heat for a further 30 seconds, stir again and enjoy. name: Horse With No Name Bourbon Whiskey infused with HABANERO 50 cl
description: Alc Vol: 45% Size: 50cl BOURBON infused with HABANERO A horseman on his journey through the desert, which is also the sea? It sounds like a work of magic that pushes the boundaries of the possible, and it is precisely this magic that is created by an unusual combination: a bourbon from Texas with notes of oak, vanilla and coconut, refined with a habanero distillate. The distillate is traditionally produced in the Black Forest, whereby the extreme heat of the chili disappears and its lively fruitiness remains. Our bourbon is made from deep yellow Texas corn, bright red winter wheat, malted barley and yeast from organically grown pecan nuts. The whiskey is stored for at least three years in freshly charred barrels made from American white oak. The nose is dominated by vanilla, caramel and coconut. The taste is a well-balanced combination of sweetness and piquancy with notes of vanilla, caramel and nut butter.

name: Hotel  Chocolat Salted Caramel Velvetised Chocolate Cream 50cl
description: ABV - 12% Size - 50cl Silky, not-too-sweet caramel and milk chocolate with a dash of sea salt meet warming vodka soothed with cream in this velvet-smooth alternative to a classic cream liqueur.

name: Hotel Chocolat - Velvetised Chocolate Cream Liqueur 50cl
description: Alc Vol: 15% Size: 50cl Deep cocoa notes, a creamy finish and warming boozy undertones; our Chocolate Cream Liqueur is the perfect tipple for when you need a bit of indulgence in your life. The secret to how we get our liqueurs so smooth? We took our signature chocolate and velvetised it with vodka and cream, for a cleaner finish than traditional cream liqueurs. We’re the only chocolatier to run two bars; one in London’s Borough Market and another at our hotel in Saint Lucia. Surrounded by cacao, we started stirring it into cocktails; the nibs, the shells and the resulting creamy chocolate. The results were so good, we bottled them. At Hotel Chocolat, we directly grow some of our cocoa beans on our very own St Lucian plantation. That means we have all the knowledge needed to ensure we don’t lose any of the delicate cocoa notes throughout each stage of production, from bean to bar - or bottle. As winner of the Best British Cream Liqueur 2019 awards, we think our Chocolate Cream Liqueur is devilishly good - without being biased! Serve neat over ice to enjoy the multi-layered cocoa notes, lightened with cream and warmed with vodka. Or, if you’re after an evening tipple, why not stir into a hot chocolate for a drink that will leave you feeling satisfied, with a gentle heat to keep you going throughout the night. We suggest a high cocoa hot chocolate to add an extra depth of flavour to your evening drink.

name: Hotel Chocolat Premium Liqueurs Collection 3x5cl
description: Hotel Chocolat Premium Liqueurs Collection gift pack Chocolate Cream 15% VOL Salted Caramel Vodka 24.4% VOL Mint Chocolate Cream 15% VOL They'd make a nice gift or a good way of trying all 3 of Hotel Chocolat's cream liqueurs without breaking the bank!

name: Hotel Chocolat Tasting Selection Gift Set
description: Premium Velvetised Tasting Experience Set If Hotel Chocolat’s Velvetised Creams weren’t special enough on their own, now you can sip in style with a sophisticated coupe glass. Add a nibble of sumptuous caramel chocolate batons and you’ve got an indulgent treat like no other. The long-stemmed coupe glass is the perfect companion for any satisfying tipple. Its traditional design with a contemporary twist makes it a modern classic worthy of any glass cabinet. Alongside your coupe glass, you’ll also receive two 50ml bottles of chocolate cream liqueur and three divine caramel chocolate batons. A beautiful gift, or a moment of heaven just for yourself.

name: Hotel Chocolat Velvetised Chocolate Cream - Rum & Raisin 50cl - Limited Edition
description: Alc Vol: 12% Size: 50cl Introducing a new arrival to our Velvetised Cream collection — our limited edition Rum & Raisin variety. Irresistibly smooth, sumptuously chocolatey, and infused with two spirits, rum and vodka, this drink makes a statement. Experience velvetised bliss with this rich, tipple-infused taste of the Caribbean sun. Inspired by our neighbours in Saint Lucia, who distil their rum down the road from our historic cacao estate, we knew that dark and stormy Caribbean rum had to star in this concoction. We added naturally sweet notes of red raisin, our very own high-cacao dark chocolate, and a dash of expertly distilled vodka to create a well-balanced, full-bodied flavour. If you’ve sampled our other Velvetised Creams before, you’ll know how utterly smooth and indulgent they are. Oh-so-sumptuous and inexplicably heavenly, our Rum & Raisin Velvetised Cream is no different. Perfect for serving neat over ice or bringing to a cocktail party, you’ll never stop discovering delectable new ways to enjoy this delight.

name: Hoxton Banana Rum 50cl
description: ABV - 40% Size - 50cl A 50cl bottle of the brilliantly banana-forward Hoxton Banana Rum! A blend of rum from Barbados, the Dominican Republic, and Nicaragua is treated to maceration with both dried, and fresh ripe bananas for a whopping five weeks, resulting in a tremendously fruity sipper. Superb for adding a tropical twist to Daiquiris and the like.

Nearly half a billion packs of Hula Hoops are eaten in the UK every year, making it one of the country’s most iconic and best-loved snack brands. Known for its mega crunch, delicious flavours and unique ability to fit on fingers, Hula Hoops was first launched in 1973. Since then it has continued to evolve and spread mischievous fun across the nation. As well as Original Hula Hoops, you can also now buy Big Hoops for bigger crunch; light and crispy Hula Hoops Puft and Flavarings for big bursts of flavour. But they don’t just taste great… with Hoops on your fingers, no-one can interrupt your Hula Hoops break! name: Hyke Gin 50cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 50cl HYKE Gin ingeniously re-invents internationally sourced grapes that are surplus to the requirements of the supermarket supply chain as a luxurious, handcrafted spirit The grape spirit is blended with grain spirit and flavoured with a blend of botanicals inspired by the grapes’ global origins, including coriander, Juniper, myrrh and rooibos giving HYKE its distinctive character. IWSC Gold Medal winning Gin created with grapes that are surplus to the supermarket supply chain. Co-created by Foxhole Spirits - an innovator in the drinks industry specialising in the production of premium spirits from otherwise unused resources - and Richard Hochfeld Ltd, one of the UK's largest fruit importers. Botanicals: Juniper, Myrrh, Nigella Seed, Rooibos, Cumin, Bay Leaf, Green Cardamon, Black Cardamon, Coriander, Angelica Root, Angelica Seed, Orris Root, Liquorice Root, Aniseed, Lemon Zest. The result is a one-of-a kind gin that can be enjoyed as part of your favourite gin and tonic, in any gin-based cocktail, or in some of our other delicious signature cocktails. HYKE Gin is made in England using a sustainably sourced grape spirit. Tasting Notes Delightful, superb complexity; a nose of zesty citrus peel and coriander leads to onto flavours of vanilla, resinous juniper and cedar wood, and a long complex finish.

description: Alc Vol: 40% Size; 70cl i heart have distilled their gin using the finest botanicals to create an exceptionally smooth and aromatic blend. The mission was simple, to make a premium spirit to simply enjoy. They have created a spirit that captures the classic style and flavour of a delicious gin right here in this bottle. Perfect for every occasion. Don't know your cassia bark from your grains of paradise, who does?! Fancy a straight talking, simply delicious gin? Let the good times be... Gin! Serving suggestion: Pour over ice and a slice and add your favourite tonic!

name: I Heart Rosé Mediterranean 75cl
description: Elegant, stylish with a touch of pink. Med Rosé's delicate, fresh flavours will have you reminiscing about that sun-kissed skin, turquoise sea and those instagrammable holiday moments. Dry, light in body with a refreshing fruity taste. This sophisticated, blush-coloured Rosé can be enjoyed with summer salads, fish and will no doubt be your go-to barbecue wine. We've sourced our wines from some of the best wine-producing regions in the world. The mission was simple, to make a great wine that we are sure you will enjoy. We didn't find this hard. We have found something that captures all we love about good wine right here in this bottle. Perfect for every occasion we love. Here at I heart we put our passion into creating straight-talking, great tasting wines for you to simply enjoy, whatever the occasion.

name: Ichnusa Sardinian Lager Bottles 24x330ml
description: Alc Vol: 4.7% Size: 24x330ml THE TASTE OF ICHNUSA TAKES YOU AWAY TO DREAMY GOLDEN SANDS AND CRYSTAL-CLEAR WATERS. As the second largest island in the Mediterranean Sea, many say Sardinia’s shape looks like a footprint. That why the premium beer brewed here’s named Ichnusa after the Greek word Ichnos meaning footstep. Amiscora Capra crafted the first batch of Ichnusa back in 1912 after setting out to create the perfect beer for the people of his beloved island. Now enjoyed across the world, every refreshing sip of this sunny, golden lager takes you back to the place where it was made.

Serving suggestions: It matches perfectly with white meat and fish dishes.

name: Imperial Blue Superior Grain Whisky 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 42.8% Size: 75cl One of the world’s best-selling whiskies, Imperial Blue is a superior blend of Indian grain spirits and imported Scotch malts. Since Imperial Blue became part of Pernod Ricard in 2002, its success has grown year on year, and today it is the group’s largest brand by volume. Seagrams Imperial Blue is a flawless blend of Indian grain spirits and imported Scotch malts. You will note its balanced taste and exceptional smoothness.
