name: Indri Agneya Single Malt Indian Whisky 70cl - NEW
description: ABV 46% Size: 70cl The name Agneya is derived from the Sanskrit word meaning 'belonging to fire', and this smoky release has been matured in a combination of bourbon and PX sherry casks. A tropical-fruit led dram with notes of mango, banana and melon, backed up by toffee, spice and dried peat smoke.

name: Indri Agneya Single Malt Peated Indian Whisky Gift Set 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 46% Size: 70cl We are delighted to offer this superb Beautifully presented Agneya Single Malt Peated Indian Whisky Gift limited edition pack, with only 800 sets available in the UK , this exclusive release offers premium quality, stunning presentation. The Indri Agneya premium gift pack features a beautifully designed bottle and two elegant glasses—ideal for festive indulgence or gifting. Agneya, meaning “belonging to fire” in Sanskrit, is a lightly peated single malt whisky matured in both Sherry and Bourbon casks, where depth and complexity unfold to embody the very essence of fire and wood, giving it depth and complexity. Produced close to the Himalayas, in the serene village of Indri, Haryana, in 2 different casks including ex-bourbon, and ex-sherry cask.. The result is a complex yet easy-going dram packed with tropical-fruit flavour and gentle sweet spices. A long-lingering smokiness finish, that makes it truly distinctive. Indri Agneya Single Malt Peated Indian Whisky Gift Set is a bold, smoky expression with depth and elegance. Crafted in India and presented in a premium gift box, it is a striking choice for whisky lovers who enjoy a peated twist. Indri Agneya Single Malt Peated Single Malt Whisky (70cl) – A world-renowned Indian whisky, Indri Agneya Peated Single Malt Indian Whisky is crafted using six-row Indian barley and matured in a combination of ex-bourbon and PX sherry casks, before being finished in Pedro Ximénez casks selected by the Master Blender. Two Branded Indri Whisky Glasses – Designed for the perfect serve, these stylish, durable glasses enhance the drinking experience while adding elegance to any collection. Luxury Presentation Box – A beautifully designed gift box that makes this set ideal for whisky lovers, special occasions, or corporate gifting. Tasting Note by Indri: Nose: Delicate hints of chocolate intertwined with subtle vanilla sweetness, with a touch of spice, dried apple and apricot. Notes of fruit jam balanced by soft earthy undertones. Palate: Tropical fruits like mango, ripe banana, rich toffee and light spice followed by a warm aroma of dried peat smoke. Melon and refreshing papaya add sweetness before a soft, rounded smokiness lingers. Finish: A blend of sweet and salty nuances with lingering wood smoke. Balanced layers of fruit sweetness and soft spice leave a lasting, mellow and lightly smoky aftertaste.

name: Indri Diwali Collectors Edition Indian Whisky 2023 70cl 'THE BEST WHISKY IN THE WORLD'
description: Alc Vol: 58% Size: 70cl INDRI'S DIWALI COLLECTOR'S EDITION 2023 BECOMES THE BEST WHISKY IN THE WORLD Wins ‘Best in Show, Double Gold’ at Whiskies of the World Awards 2023 Only 421 bottles were produced in the world. This peated Indian single malt was released by Indri for the 2023 Diwali celebrations. It was distilled from peated Indian Six-row barley before a generous maturation in Pedro Ximénez sherry casks in the sub-tropical climate of northern India, bringing layers of sweet spice, toasted nuts and candied fruit to the elegant smoke at its core.

name: Indri Diwali Collectors Edition Indian Whisky 2024 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 58.5% / 102.4 Proof Size: 70cl INDRI'S DIWALI COLLECTOR'S EDITION 2024 ‘Gold Medal’ at the Whiskies of the World Awards 2024 Wins coveted ‘Gold Medal’ at the Whiskies of the World Awards 2024 Only 600 bottles were produced in the world. Indri Diwali Collector’s Edition 2024, has once again claimed the spotlight by securing a coveted ‘Gold Medal’ at the Whiskies of the World Awards 2024 , continuing its remarkable winning streak on the global stage. The prestigious competition, known for celebrating the finest whiskies from across the globe, awarded Indri’s second expression of the Diwali Collector’s Edition for its exceptional craftsmanship, flavour, complexity, and distinctively Indian character for the second year in running. Indri Diwali Collector’s Edition 2024, bottled at 58.5% ABV, is crafted from peated Indian six-row barley and distilled in traditional Indian made copper pot stills, filled in hand selected sherry cask and matured in the subtropical climate of the northern plains of India. It enlightens your senses with gentle peat and elegant sherry notes complimenting each other. The flavours of dates, raisins, caramel, soft spice and oak await to tantalise your taste buds. Every dram leaves a lingering desire for another. The Indri Diwali Collector’s Edition 2024 stood out among a competitive field, impressing an esteemed panel of whisky experts with its signature notes of light fruits, delicate florals, and subtle spice. This award adds to the growing legacy of Indri single malt, which has consistently garnered international acclaim for its high-quality, innovative releases that redefine the art of Indian single malt whisky-making.

name: Indri Diwali Collectors Edition Indian Whisky 2025 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 58.5% / 117 Proof Size: 70cl The Indri Diwali Collector's Edition 2025 (Marsala Cask) is a highly limited release, with only 636 bottles produced worldwide . Indri’s Diwali Collectors Edition 2025 Marsala Cask Finish made the finals in the world whisky category at the 2025 Las Vegas Global Spirits Awards. It took top honors as the Best World Whisky with a near-perfect score of 99.1/100 The Diwali Collector’s Edition 2025 is a celebration of India’s vibrant spirit, encapsulating the essence of Diwali through an artfully crafted whisky experience. The intricate artwork on this exclusive release captures India’s rich landscapes and timeless beauty, blending tradition with modern elegance which echo the festive spirit of Diwali, symbolising light, culture and joy. Crafted in small batches, this rare expression is finished in hand-selected Marsala wine barrels sourced from boutique wineries across Sicily, renowned for their unique, characterful wines. It is a confluence of Indian soul and Italian elegance. The whisky features aromas of candied orange and apricot, golden raisins, fig jam, honeycomb, vanilla and seasoned oak. The marsala cask adds a distinctive nutty and almond/marzipan note. It’s sweet, smooth, viscous and spice-forward on the palate, showcasing flavors of dried fruits, marmalade, toffee, toasted nuts and subtle hints of seasoned, gently tannic oak, as well as baking cocoa. The finish is long, sweet and spicy, with lingering notes of wood spices, orange oils, almond brittle and a dry wine, slightly tannic note.

name: Indri Drú Cask Strength Indian Single Malt Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 57.2% Size: 70cl From Indian single malt brand Indri comes a cask strength single malt named Drú. It was distilled and then matured in bourbon casks in the extreme temperatures of the northern plains of India which had a distinct effect on the maturation process. It was bottled to preserve all that flavour that had been driven by the cask profile and ageing conditions so there's no added colour, it's non-chill-filtered, and is presented at a cask strength of 57.2% ABV.

name: Indri Game Of Thrones Whisky House Of Black - House Of The Dragon 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 46% Size: 75cl No Box - Bottle Only Game Of Thrones Whisky Indri House Of Black - House Of The Dragon. This peated House of Black embodies the fiery spirit of The Black Council, whilst the unpeated House of Green is a testament to the refined tastes of The Green Council. A must have for collector's of limited edition Game of Thrones Whisky. Each bottle includes a QR Code to claim your NFT certificate & proof of provenance, making it a must-have for whisky enthusiasts and GOT collectors alike. NOTES Nose Sweet toffee, hints of creamy vanilla, subtle peat notes with a fruity, floral profile followed by raisins, dry fruits & hints of nuttiness on the nose. Palate Sweet, light & mellow, a shy peat is complimented by chocolate/ toffee hints, light earthiness. Dates, figs, vanilla linger on the palate. Finish A sweet richness with light peat which gives you a medium to long finish. This bottle is from a private collection & is not eligible for a Vat receipt.

name: Indri Trini Three Wood Indian Single Malt 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 46% Size: 70cl Indri single malt is distilled in Indri, Haryana, near the Himalayan foothills, near the Yamuna basin. This remarkable single malt is made from indigenous six-row barley grown for hundreds of years in Rajasthan. Matured with care since 2010, Indri–Trini is also the first Indian whisky to be produced in three different wooden barrels: in ex-bourbon, ex-wine, and PX sherry casks. THE SPIRIT OF THE FIVE SENSES: The Sanskrit word Indriya or Indris also refers to the senses. From its pleasant, golden, amber colour, to the nutty depth of flavor from burnt pineapple, citrus, and raisins, Indri will tantalize your senses COLOUR: Earthy and subtle, no added colour. Amber; golden; sunset. NOSE: Gentle and mellow. Black tea; caramelized pineapple; oak; vanilla; honey; raisin; sweet cherry. TASTE: Smooth and warm. Gently spiced; woody; nutty; a slowly deepening, full-mouthed feel.​ FINISH: On the tongue. Velvety; complex; long-lasting warm .

The result is a complex yet easy-going dram packed with tropical-fruit flavour and gentle sweet spices. A long-lingering finish. name: Isle Of Jura Seven Wood Single Malt Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl A signature bottling of Isle Of Jura Seven Wood Whisky. This characterful Jura has been shaped by seven separate Oak woods; first-fill ex-bourbon American White Oak, Vosges, Bertranges, Jupilles, Allier, Tronçais and Limousin barrels. An aromatic fusion of coffee, ginger spice and a hint of milk chocolate followed by smoky flavours. Magnificent whisky. Influenced by seven select French and American oak barrels for a rare balance and depth with a hint of smoke. Mahogany gold in colour with an aromatic fusion of coffee, ginger spice and a hint of chocolate; followed by caramelised peach, chewy liquorice and candied orange with a hint of sea-spray and smoke in the aftertaste. Winner of ISC Gold 2020

name: J.J Whitley Artisanal Vodka 70cl PM £13.99

name: J.J Whitley Pink Cherry Gin 70cl

The finish is smooth with cherry, almond and a little lingering spice.

description: Alc Vol: 25% Size: 75cl Multi-award winning Canadian Sweet Paan Liqueur, made by combining grain spirit with maple syrup alongside a selection of exotic herbs and spices. Jaan Colada 2oz Jaan Paan Liqueur 1oz Premium Light Rum 2oz Pineapple Juice 1oz Coconut Cream Pineapple and Blueberries (Garnish) Add ice in a blender, add Jaan Paan Liqueur, light tum, pineapple juice and coconut cream. Blend thorougly. Strain and pour into a martini glass and garnish with pineapple wedge and blueberries.

name: Jack Daniel's - Gentleman Jack Limited Edition Patek-Phillipe Timepiece Whiskey 1lt
description: Alc Vol: 43% Size: 1lt Jack Daniel, Was held in high regard for his fine tastes as The Gentleman Distiller of Lynchburg, Tennessee. This Limited Edition Gentleman Jack is inspired by his one-of-a-kind handcrafted Swiss pocketwatch. To commemorate the moment, we hand-selected barrels to craft a special, 86 proof (43%) expression of our Double Mellowed Tennesse Whiskey , which is a slightly higher abv than traditional Gentleman Jack. Double mellowed Tennessee whiskey Jack Daniel of Tennessee whiskey fame owned a Patek Philippe repeating rattrapante It is kind of surprising that Jack Daniel’s, the oldest registered distillery in the United States, is not only still going strong, but continues to be incredibly famous. Jasper Newton “Jack” Daniel seems to have had a good eye for early classics: his 1891 watch was of the same ilk. Who would have pictured the Lynchburg, Tennessee native as a connoisseur of fine timepieces. But then again, who can ignore the lure of Patek Philippe’s beautiful wares – especially an amazing split-seconds chronograph with minute repeater? The limited edition 30th anniversary Gentleman Jack whiskey is inspired by the legendary Swiss watch Daniel Daniel. And they gave her more than enough time in Tennessee. Compared to the classic Jack No. 7 Gentleman undergoes double filtration, which makes it even finer, sweeter and less woody. Its taste stands out fully with tones of caramel, fruit and vanilla shrouded in smoke. In addition, the Patek Philippe edition is a bit stronger than usual. The ideal companion for whiskey beginners and Jack’s loyal friends. Forget about time and enjoy it.

name: Jack Daniel's - Miniature & Apple IPhone 5 Case Gift Set
description: 5cl | 40% A 5cl Miniature bottle of Jack Daniel Old No.7 Whiskey and a Jack Daniels Branded Apple iPhone 5 Case

name: Jack Daniel's 3L Old No.7 Tennessee Whiskey JEROBOAM
description: This 3L Jack Daniel's Old No.7 is over 4 times larger than a standard 70cl bottle. Every drop of Jack Daniels Tennessee Whiskey is still made in Lynchburg, Tennessee at the oldest registered distillery in the United States. Mr. Jack Daniel chose to establish his distillery in this location to take advantage of the Cave Spring that provides the cool, iron-free water essential to great tasting whiskey. Before maturing in new American oak barrels, the whiskey is dripped through ten feet of sugar maple charcoal. It is this step that distinguishes Jack Daniels from bourbon and makes it a Tennessee Whiskey. The extreme heat and cold of the Tennessee seasons forces a greater interaction between the whiskey and the wood of the barrels, which imparts the vanilla, caramel and oak notes characteristic of Jack Daniels

name: Jack Daniel's and Coca-Cola 12 x 330ml cans
description: Size - 12 x 330 ml ABV - 5.0% When you mix the best, you get the best. That's why, since the first person mixed it over 100 years ago, Jack Daniel's & Coca-Cola was born ready. And now the world's most celebrated cocktail is available pre-mixed and ready for you to enjoy anytime, anywhere. Best served chilled. Contains sugars. Contains natural flavours. This product is GMO, gluten and allergen free.

name: Jack Daniel's and Coca-Cola Zero 12 x 330ml
description: Size - 12 x 330ml ABV - 5.0% All the taste & zero sugar Ready-to-drink Premium crafted Unmistakable taste Perfect match Born Ready with Great Taste and Zero Sugar Old No.7 Tennessee Whiskey mixed with Coca-Cola Zero Caffeine free GMO Free When you mix the best, you get the best. That's why, since the first person mixed it over 100 years ago, Jack Daniel's & Coca-Cola Zero Sugar was born ready. Ready to taste like nothing else you've ever tasted. Ready to show up big at every event. Ready to reject every garnish known to bartenders. Ready to set the standard. Ready to create a taste so unique that it would be loved by everyone. Ready to dismiss the need for any explanation. Ready to be so loved that it's mentioned in over 1000 song lyrics. Ready to become the go-to drink of everyone who will ever try it. Ready to be in a can for the first time ever. The same great taste the world loves, now readier than ever. A pre-mixed cocktail that mixes the bold flavor of Jack Daniel's with the unmistakable, crisp taste of Coca-Cola Zero Sugar, creating something truly delicious & refreshing in taste. A globally renowned bar call: Jack Daniel's & Coca-Cola. A premium, crafted ready-to-drink format. Now also available with Coca-Cola Zero Sugar. Already good on their own, together unleashing something special in one another. The smooth character of Jack Daniel's blends perfectly with the great taste of Coca-Cola Zero Sugar, unlike any other alcoholic pairing out there. A taste so unmistakable and unique that it can only come from a perfect match. Made with Jack Daniel's and Coca-Cola Zero Sugar, bringing together two of the most authentic and iconic brands in the world. The highest quality ingredients are at the core of this crafted cocktail in a can. A pre-mixed cocktail that mixes the bold flavor of Jack Daniel's with the unmistakable, crisp taste of Coca-Cola Zero Sugar, creating something truly delicious & refreshing in taste.

name: Jack Daniel's Apple Whiskey Liqueur 5cl Miniature
description: Alc Vol: 35% Size: 5cl - Miniature Miniature format of the Jack Daniel's Apple - a blend of Jack famous Tennessee sipping whiskey married with an all-natural, crisp green apple liqueur made by the folk at Jack Daniel's. The result is a delicious, complex Jack. Jack Daniel's Tennessee Apple has the unique character of Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey, the crisp taste of green apple and a rewarding finish; it's been described by our master Chris Fletcher as being ‘like freshly picked apple in a glass of Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey'. Unique attributes of the liquid Jack Daniel's Tennessee Apple has the unique character of Jack Daniel's Tennesse Whiskey, the crisp taste of three varieties of green apple (McIntosh, Red Delicious and Granny Smith) and a rewarding finish.

name: Jack Daniel's BBQ Sauce Variety Pack, 3 x 553g
description: Jack Daniel's BBQ Sauce Variety Pack containing 3 sauces kettle cooked and bottled with Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey. The sauces contain no preservatives and no high fructose corn syrup. Jack Daniel's Honey BBQ Sauce, 553g - Coat babyback ribs, grilled chicken, roasted turkey and honey wings. Jack Daniel's Original BBQ Sauce, 553g - Slather on smoked BBQ ribs, pulled pork, char-grilled burgers, sausages and BBQ chicken pizza. Jack Daniel's Sweet & Spicy BBQ Sauce, 553g - Douse hot wings, crispy nachos, BBQ chicken and grilled ribeye steak. Kettle Cooked Bottled With Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey Gluten Free 3 x 553g

name: Jack Daniel's Bonded Tennessee Whiskey 70Cl
description: Alc Vol: 50% Size: 70cl The ingredients and whiskey making process of Jack Daniel’s Bonded is the same as Jack Daniel’s Tennessee Whiskey - 80% corn, 12% barley and 8% rye. After the charcoal mellowing process, new whiskey is placed in select barrels during the same season and aged for a minimum of 4 years. The finished product is bottled at 50% ABV that is darker & bolder liquid. Jack Daniel’s Bonded is a unique whiskey from Jack Daniel Distillery. Jack Daniel’s Bonded Tennessee Whiskey is a big, bold Tennessee whiskey bottled at 50% ABV. This American whiskey delivers layered flavor notes of caramel, rich oak and spice giving way to a pleasantly lingering finish with a hint of smoke. Enjoy this whiskey on the rocks or in mixed drinks. This edition of Jack is one you can enjoy when you're out with friends or when you're relaxing after a long week. It's a Bottled-in-Bond whiskey, which means it's distilled by a single distiller during a single distillation season, matured in a government-bonded warehouse for at least four years and bottled at 50% ABV. The whiskey barrels that are used in this process are hand-selected for their characteristics of deep colour, flavour and aroma, which deliver a darker, richer and more oak-forward character. . Aroma: Caramel, rich oak and spice Color: Dark Mahogany Taste: Big and bold with dark brown sugar, cooked fruit and seared oak Finish: Warm baking spice with a bit of smoke Jack Daniel’s Tennessee Whiskey comes from the United States oldest registered distillery and is charcoal mellowed through 10 feet of sugar maple charcoal. The Distillery, founded in 1866 by Mr. Jack Daniel in Lynchburg, Tennessee, is one of the most well-known producers of whiskey in the world. Jack Daniel’s Tennessee Whiskey is made with the finest corn, rye and barley malt. Its distinctive character is a result of natural fermentation, careful distillation, and use of the Distillery’s iron-free water from the Cave Spring that runs at a constant 13°C. Big and bold with dark brown sugar, cooked fruit and seared oak Jack Daniel’s Bonded Tennessee Whiskey is Bottled-in-Bond, aged in select barrels and bottled at 50% ABV.

name: Jack Daniel's Family Whiskey 3x5cl Miniatures Gift Pack
description: This gift set contains three of Jack Daniel's most prized whiskies. The classic Old No.7, the refined Gentleman Jack and the elegant Single barrel. These three whiskies are the corner stone for the Jack Daniel's range and perfect for Jack Daniel's enthusiasts. 1x 5cl Gentleman Jack 1X 5cl Jack Daniels No7 1x 5cl Jack Daniels Single Barrel

name: Jack Daniel's Fire 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 35% Size: 70cl Jack Fire is a genius mix of blazing cinnamon spice liqueur and Jack Daniel’s classic Tennessee Whiskey. The cinnamon’s hot and sweet kick perfectly complements the whiskey’s luxurious taste, resulting in a satisfying drink with complex character. Super smooth - enjoy it slightly chilled on its own. Eagerly anticipated in the UK since release in the US in 2014 A spicy onslaught of cinnamon fireballs on the nose, but surprisingly drinkable - full flavoured but less fiery than its aroma suggests Lovely vanilla undertones, a perfect balance of sweet and spicy with notes of vanilla Pleasant heat, lots of flavour, finishes with butter and brown sugar tones Leaves a subtle taste of cinnamon biscuits on the tongue, with a dash of barrel char that perfectly balances out the sweetness

name: Jack Daniel's Frank Sinatra Edition Whisky 1 L
description: ABV: 45% Size: 1lt In honour of a legendary friendship that stretched more than half a century. Frank Sinatra was a long time fan of Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey and was often seen sipping a glass of it on stage while singing 'Fly Me To The Moon' or 'My Way'. He even kept a stash of the classic whiskey on his private plane to enjoy while on the way to his next show. Jack Daniel's Sinatra Select has been created in honour of this friendship with Old Blue Eyes. The bold, smooth qualities of the Sinatra Select come from the specially made Sinatra barrels in which part of the whiskey was aged. Deep grooves were cut into the staves of the casks, increasing the amount of exposure the whiskey had to the wood. It is then married with Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 and bottled at 45% abv, which is how Sinatra would have enjoyed it back in the day. The Jack Daniel distillery has released a special edition Tennesse whiskey as bold and satisfying as these two timeless spirits.

name: Jack Daniel's Gentleman Jack 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Charcoal-mellowed two times (before and after ageing), Gentleman Jack is a clean and refined drink. It’s the perfect gift, packaged in a smart-looking bottle. Drier on the nose compared to Old No.7, with lighter oak and subtler hints of vanilla, maple, apple, and brown sugar Smooth finish, starts with a subtle charred oak and develops into a fruity undertone with floral honey and maple This premium drink exhibits remarkable complexity and flavour Double mellowed because it is filtered through charcoal twice, before going into the barrel and before bottling Great on its own or in a classic Jack and Coke

name: Jack Daniel's Holiday Countdown 24 Day Advent Calendar
description: LIMITED EDITION JACK DANIEL’S ADVENT CALENDAR – Celebrate the countdown to Christmas with this exclusive festive gift set featuring miniatures and collectibles. DISCOVER 6 ICONIC JACK DANIEL’S WHISKEYS – Includes Old No.7, Tennessee Honey, Tennessee Apple, Tennessee Fire, Gentleman Jack and Single Barrel, each in 5cl bottles. PREMIUM JACK DANIEL’S COLLECTIBLES – Stainless steel hip flask, whiskey stones, Tennessee Honey ice mould, branded pourer, poker chips and playing cards included. THE PERFECT CHRISTMAS ALCOHOL GIFT – Ideal for men and women who enjoy premium whiskey; whether as a festive treat, whiskey sampler or collector’s item, this calendar makes December unforgettable. OFFICIAL JACK DANIEL’S PRODUCT – A must-have seasonal release combining authentic Lynchburg craftsmanship with a luxury advent calendar experience. JACK DANIEL'S TENNESSEE HONEY ICE MOULD HAND WASH ONLY. WASH BEFORE FIRST USE. DIRECTIONS FOR USE: 1. Tightly secure the ice mould halves together to avoid leaks. 2. Pour water into the hole located at the top of the mould. 3. Once full, freeze for 3-4 hours. 4. Open the mould, if there have been any leaks to the join, leave for a few minutes to warm slightly so mould can be seperated. Then drop your honeycomb ice ball into a glass & serve with Tennessee Honey & lemonade. JACK DANIEL'S 3OZ HIPFLASK DIRECTIONS FOR USE: Your Stainless Steel Hipflask is specifically designed to carry alcoholic drinks and therefore should not be used for beverages with an acidic content, such as fruit juices and cordials. You can extend the life of the hipflask simply by following a few simple rules: 1. Rinse the inside with clean water before filling the flask. 2. Always empty the flask after use and rinse it out before refilling. 3. Do not keep alcohol in the flask longer than a period of 3 days. 4. Refill only when you are about to use the flask JACK DANIEL'S BOTTLE POURER & JACK DANIEL'S WHISKY STONES HAND WASH ONLY. WASH BEFORE FIRST USE.

name: Jack Daniel's Honey Whiskey Liqueur - 5cl Miniature
description: Size: 5cl - Miniature Tennessee Honey has proven to be one of the most popular alternatives in the now extensive Jack Daniel’s range, effortlessly blending the good old No.7 with that sweet honey flavour. It’s delicious all on its own but don’t be shy to try it with a mixer or in a cocktail for something truly distinctive.

description: Alc Vol: 35% Size: 35cl Half Bottle of Jack Daniel's Honey a blend of Jack famous Tennessee sipping whiskey, mixed with a unique honey liqueur made by the folk at Jack Daniel's for a taste that is unmistakably Jack.

name: Jack Daniel's McLaren X  2026 JD Limited Edition Bottle - Boxed - NEW
description: Alc Vol: 43% Size: 70cl The 2026 Limited Edition Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey x McLaren Mastercard Formula 1 Team is the fourth bottle in the partnership series. A legacy on the track, a legacy in the bottle. For decades, both Jack Daniel's and the McLaren Mastercard Formula 1 Team have proudly preserved a perfect blend of heritage, innovation, and high performance. 2026 celebrates the year of McLaren's 1000th Formula 1 Grand Prix race and the 160th anniversary of the Jack Daniel Distillery, two milestones that mark an enduring legacy and a shared vision that unites them in the pursuit of possibility. This year's release features a striking new design inspired by the McLaren Mastercard Formula 1 Team's 1,000th Grand Prix campaign. Distilled in Lynchburg, Tennessee, the whiskey is mellowed drop by drop through 10 feet of charcoal before maturing in new, American white oak barrels handcrafted to the highest standards.

name: Jack Daniel's McLaren X JD Limited Edition 2025
description: Jack Daniel's x McLaren Limited Edition No.3 / 2025 - the most important facts at a glance Exclusive 3rd edition of the successful Jack Daniel's x McLaren partnership Limited collector's bottle with new 2025 design & high-quality gift box For the first time with 43% alcohol by volume - for a more intense flavour Contains the classic Old No.7 Tennessee Whiskey - flavours of vanilla, caramel & oak Refined using the famous charcoal mellowing process Symbolises the combination of whiskey tradition & Formula 1 passion Ideal for collectors, motorsport enthusiasts & whiskey lovers Jack Daniel's x McLaren Limited Edition No.3 / 2025 - Legendary whiskey meets Formula 1 lifestyle The success story enters its third round: two absolute legends - Jack Daniel's and the McLaren Formula 1 Team - continue their extraordinary partnership with the Jack Daniel's x McLaren Limited Edition No.3 / 2025. This strictly limited special edition will not only delight collectors, but also fans of motorsport and premium whiskey. The eye-catching design of the bottle and the elegant gift box in the new 2025 look make this edition a real eye-catcher and must-have.

name: Jack Daniel's No.27 Gold Tennessee Whiskey 70 cl
description: Created by taking Jack Daniel's standard Tennessee whisky (No. 7) and then "double barreling and double mellowing" it - meaning it enjoys an extra maturation period in maple wood before being double charcoal filtered. Finished in golden-hued maple wood barrels and twice charcoal mellowed providing a luxurious hint of maple and a wonderfully smooth finish. Double mellowed for smoothness and hints of maple Double charcoal filtered with a warm finish Its an addition for any celebration or party

name: Jack Daniel's Old No 7 1L
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 1lt Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 is a premium Tennessee Whiskey. A warm amber colour with fragrances of sweet vanilla, this is a smooth, full-bodied whiskey, with flavours of orange, brown sugar and spice, and a long rich finish. Jack Daniel registered his distillery in 1866, making it the oldest registered distillery in the United States.

name: Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Sweet & Spicy Barbecue Sauce 553g
description: For an extra “kick” try Sweet & Spicy Jack Daniel’s BBQ Sauce and experience a bit of excitement with your meal or appetizers. This is a blend of a little bit of heat and a little bit of sweetness that delivers zip and zing but won’t overpower your pallet.

name: Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey 1.5L
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 1.5lt - Magnum Jack Daniel's Old Time Number 7 in a large bottle! Undergoes the signature Lincoln County Process - filtration through sugar maple charcoal - which makes Tennessee whiskey distinct from bourbons and other types of American whiskey. Made of corn (80%) barley (12%) and rye (8%) Medium amber colour Matured in the company’s signature handcrafted barrels Sweet and light on the nose, with hints of smoke, oily nuts, and dry spice Smooth and soft on the palate, with banana milkshake notes, mixed nuts, butterscotch, and caramel with crème anglaise undertones Sweet cereal finish combined with toasty oak Perfect for a classic Jack and Cola

name: Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Made the traditional Jack Daniels way, this whiskey is ready when expert tasters say it is-it doesn't follow a calendar. It goes through the brand's signature charcoal mellowing process and is matured in handcrafted barrels. Perfectly balanced sweet and oaky flavours, with gentle aromas of vanilla, butterscotch, caramel, and hints of wood and toffee An original cola-friendly concoction that is world-famous for its smoothness One of the best-selling whiskeys globally This signature Tennessee whiskey brand can be enjoyed neat or on the rocks Also perfect for a Lynchburg Lemonade or a classic Jack and Coke Expect a consistent, top-quality drink in every bottle

name: Jack Daniel's Old No.7 Brand Mini & Tumbler Set (Black text)
description: Mini & Tumbler Set Here at the Jack Daniel Distillery, we're proud to honor the independence and integrity of the man who established our Distillery at the Cave Spring Hollow. True to Mr. Jack's whiskey-making tradition, every drop is still made in Lynchburg, Tennessee, and true to Jack's charge: "Every day we make it, we'll make it the best we can. 1x 5cl Jack Daniels No7 1x Branded Jack Daniel Tumbler Glass

name: Jack Daniel's Old No.7 Tennessee Whiskey 20cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 20cl - Quarter Bottle Jack Daniel's Old No.7 Tennessee Whiskey A warm amber colour with aromas of sweet vanilla, this is a smooth, full-bodied whiskey, with flavours of orange, brown sugar and spice, and a long rich finish. It is this unique way of making whiskey and the extra steps such as charcoal mellowing that makes Jack Daniel's what it is - a smooth sipping Tennessee whiskey and not a bourbon. Jack Daniel registered his distillery in 1866, making it the oldest registered distillery in the United States. It's here in Lynchburg that every drop of Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey is still produced and bottled today. Flavour profile: Full and spicy. Colour: Warm amber. Nose: Sweet, rich, vanilla. Taste: Hints of orange, brown sugar and spice, full-bodied oak and dry apple.

name: Jack Daniel's Rye 70cl
description: ABV: 45% Size: 70cl The first new Jack Daniel's whiskey since before Prohibition. Tennessee Straight Rye is created from 70% rye, 18% corn and 12% malted barley, and is put through the same charcoal filtration process as Jack Daniel's bourbons. The result is a mellow and sweet whiskey that's enlivened with distinctive rye spice.

name: Jack Daniel's Single Barrel 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 45% size 70cl A bar favourite that layers delicate notes of spice, caramel, bright fruits, and sweet aromatics. This Tennessee whiskey draws a distinctly robust essence from the barrel. Bottled straight from a single barrel, this richer, less sweet variation of a classic Jack Daniels No. 7 is popular with aficionados Good body with lots of toasty oak, corn and cereal notes, some smoke, spice, and toffee Mouth-filling, full taste with hints of cereal sweetness Well-defined aromas of golden syrup and honeyed fruit Long finish with some citrusy, spicy oak, and fruit aftertaste Precise and clean palate, a big-hitting dry bourbon that you will be proud to serve

name: Jack Daniel's Single Barrel Barrel Strength Whiskey
description: Alc Vol: 62.5% Size: 70cl Selected by our Master Distiller and presented at 129 proof, this high character single barrel Tennessee Whiskey reflects the flavour imparted by our handmade, toasted and charred, American Oak barrels. It's always rather interesting to see Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey drawn from a single barrel, but this one has been drawn from a single barrel and then bottled at cask strength too! Bottled a barrel at a time, Barrel Strength lifts Jack's trademark vanilla and toasted oak flavors to bold new levels for an aromatic and smooth whiskey experience, complemented by notes of sweet brown sugar that give way to hints of dark spice. It's intense, flavoursome stuff, well worth a spot in your drinks collection

name: Jack Daniel's Single Barrel Rye 70cl
description: Size - 70cl ABV - 45% If you didn’t think that Jack Daniel’s made rye whiskey, think again! The distillery in Lynchburg, Tennessee produces over 16 million barrels of whiskey a year and rye has always been a fixture in its mashbills. What we have here is a rye-forward whiskey, however, one that’s the result of the first new grain recipe in 150 years, made with 70% rye, 18% corn and 12% malted barley. What's more, this rye is drawn from single barrels.

name: Jack Daniel's Tennessee Apple 35cl - Half Bottle
description: Alc Vol: 35% Size: 35cl Jack Daniel's Tennessee Apple has the unique character of Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey, the crisp taste of green apple and a rewarding finish; it's been described by our master Chris Fletcher as being ‘like freshly picked apple in a glass of Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey'. Unique attributes of the liquid Jack Daniel's Tennessee Apple has the unique character of Jack Daniel's Tennesse Whiskey, the crisp taste of three varieties of green apple (McIntosh, Red Delicious and Granny Smith) and a rewarding finish.

name: Jack Daniel's Tennessee Apple 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 35% Size: 70cl Jack Daniel's Tennessee Apple has the unique character of Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey, the crisp taste of green apple and a rewarding finish; it's been described by our master Chris Fletcher as being ‘like freshly picked apple in a glass of Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey'. Unique attributes of the liquid Jack Daniel's Tennessee Apple has the unique character of Jack Daniel's Tennesse Whiskey, the crisp taste of three varieties of green apple (McIntosh, Red Delicious and Granny Smith) and a rewarding finish.

name: Jack Daniel's Tennessee Blackberry 70cl - New
description: Alc Vol: 35% Size: 70cl Jack Daniel's Tennessee Blackberry has the distinctive character of Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey, combined with vibrant blackberry notes and hints of creamy vanilla, toasted oak and honey for a taste like no other. Flavours: Sweet blackberries, vanilla, caramel, subtle spice Character: Mild, fruity and balanced Alcohol content: 35 % vol. Enjoyment tip: Pure, on ice or as a fruity base for long drinks & cocktails Speciality: New, berry-sweet interpretation of the legendary Tennessee Whiskey Blackberry meets Tennessee Whiskey Jack Daniel's Blackberry brings a new, surprisingly fruity side to the well-known whiskey brand. Based on the legendary Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey, this variant combines sweet blackberry flavours with the smoky, smooth depth of the original. The result: a pleasantly mild whiskey liqueur with a fruity soul and authentic character. The nose reveals ripe, juicy blackberries, accompanied by vanilla, caramel and a hint of oak. Soft and round on the palate with a harmonious sweetness, embedded in the typical Jack Daniel's flavour. The finish is velvety, fruity and inviting - ideal for relaxed moments of enjoyment. How to enjoy Jack Daniel's Blackberry Whether enjoyed neat on ice, as part of summer long drinks or in creative cocktails - Jack Daniel's Black berry is versatile and appeals to whiskey fans and beginners alike. Tip: Serve with tonic water or lemonade for a tangy, fruity drink.

name: Jack Daniel's Tennessee Fire - 5cl Miniature
description: ABV - 35% Size - 5cl Taking the good old No.7 blend to the next level, Tennessee Fire is a statement of intent from Jack Daniel’s. The gloves are off and the cinnamon is abundant, the sweet vanilla notes providing ultimate salvation from the beautiful fiery flavour that attacks your tongue upon first sip.

name: Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey McLaren F1, Racing Edition 2024 - 70cl - In Gift Box
description: ABV - 40% Size - 70cl Two iconic brands, united in independence, living boldly and doing it responsibly. In an exciting partnership with McLaren Racing, Jack Daniel's have released a limited editon Old No. 7. The collaboration bottle features a custom label and box design that pays tribute to the car design and McLaren crew uniform. In turn, Jack Daniel’s branding will be featured on the nose of McLaren’s 2024 F1 cars as well as on the driver’s overalls and pit crew’s helmets. Jack Daniel & Bruce McLaren founded their brands with a pioneering spirit driven by the continuous quest for perfection. This partnership is a perfect union that honors the founders behind Jack Daniel’s and McLaren Racing.

name: Jack Daniel’s x McLaren Limited Edition Collector Pack - 2023, 2024 & 2025 Bottles - Only 2,000 Available - Exclusive Premium Whiskey Gift Set - 3 × 70 cl
description: Alc Vol: 2023 - 40%, 2024 - 40%, 2025 - 43% Size: 3 X 70cl Limited Edition - Collectors Item Celebrate an iconic collaboration with the Jack Daniel’s x McLaren Limited Edition Collector Box, a rare release that brings together the official partnership bottles from 2023, 2024 and 2025 in one exclusive set. Limited to just 2,000 individually numbered collector boxes worldwide, this release marks the first time the three annual editions have been curated into a single collection. Each bottle features its own unique design inspired by McLaren Formula 1 livery and crafted using Jack Daniel’s world-famous Tennessee Whiskey distilling process. Housed in a premium presentation case, this set embodies heritage, craftsmanship and the shared spirit of innovation between two globally recognised brands. Designed for collectors, enthusiasts and gift-givers, this limited edition box is a standout display piece for home bars, collections or motor sport memorabilia shelves. Whether you’re commemorating the ongoing partnership, celebrating a milestone, or securing a rare investment bottle, this collector box brings together three remarkable limited editions in a single, beautifully finished package.

description: Alc Vol: 12.2% Chardonnay - White Australian Wine Tasting Notes: This Chardonnay is soft and well-rounded with melon, peach, and toasted oak flavours and a creamy textural finish. Serving Suggestion: Enjoy on its own or with white fish or creamy chicken pasta.

name: Jacob's Creek Merlot Red Wine 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 13.5% Premium red wine from South Eastern Australia Tasting Notes: Velvety and spicy with red currant, black cherry, and fresh mulberry. Medium ruby purple. Fresh mulberry, spicy cherry and currant fruit aromas, with subtle and well-integrated cedary vanilla oak notes adding richness and complexity. A medium bodied wine displaying true varietal Merlot characters of cherry fruit flavours and a soft, fleshy mid palate, rounded out by balanced acidity and fine, silky tannins to finish Serving Suggestions: Enjoy with your favourite pasta, pizza or semi-hard cheeses like Edam. Won Gold at New York International Wine Competition 2020

Enjoy on its own, with canapés, seafood dishes or salads Tasting Notes: A light to medium bodied wine with lemon and pear fruit flavours with crisp green apple notes. This is a light to medium bodied white wine with fresh lemon and pear fruit flavours and crisp green apple notes. Serving Suggestions: Perfect served chilled, with grilled fish or seafood and salads or by itself as an after work treat.

name: Jacob's Creek Sauvignon Blanc White Wine 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 12.2% Sauvignon Blanc - White Australian Wine Tasting Notes: A light to medium bodied wine with tropical flavours of passionfruit and guava with a fresh, crisp finish. Serving Suggestion: Enjoy Chilled on its own with canapés, grilled fish or chicken.

name: Jacob's Creek Shiraz Red Wine 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 13.7% Premium red wine from South Eastern Australia Won Silver at New York International Wine Competition 2020 This red wine is spicy and silky with plum, blackberries, and hints of rich dark chocolate leading to a long, satisfying finish. Tasting Notes: Mid crimson red. The nose shows ripe plum and spicy fruitcake aromas, with hints of currant, chocolate and well-handled cedary oak. The palate is medium bodied in structure, with ripe plum fruit flavours, good mid palate fruit sweetness and rich yet soft, velvety Shiraz tannins through to the finish. Serving Suggestions: Enjoy on its own or with roasted red meat, Ideal with char grilled steak.

name: Jagermeister & 2 Shot Glasses Gift Set
description: Jägermeister 2 x 2cl 2 x Shot Glasses The origins of Jägermeister can be traced back over 80 years to the small town of Wolfenbüttel, Germany. Since production began here, a lot of passion and hard work has gone into ensuring that our meticulously blended and complex recipe of 56 roots, herbs and spices works so perfectly. Always served chilled

name: Jägermeister Cold Brew Coffee Liqueur 2cl Miniature
description: Alc Vol: 33% Size: 2cl Miniature Our signature German Herbal Liqueur with an added punch of cold brew coffee and bitter chocolate Jägermeister cold brew coffee is the perfect blend of our classic herbal liqueur with a generous helping of strong roasted Arabica coffee and a hint of chocolatey cacao. Distinctive aromatic spicy notes lead to a delicious, sweet and rich finish. Crafted exclusively with all-natural ingredients, every element comes together to create a taste of the unexpected.

name: Jägermeister Cold Brew Coffee Liqueur 50cl
description: Alc Vol: 33% Size: 50cl Our signature German Herbal Liqueur with an added punch of cold brew coffee and bitter chocolate Matured in oak barrels for up to one year Jägermeister x Cold Brew Coffee Inspired by the innovative, ever-changing drinks scene, we instinctively knew how a drop of Jägermeister and a backbeat of coffee could transform any night. A unique fusion of Jägermeister's 56 botanicals and intense cold brew coffee Just don't forget to shake to wake the natural ingredients, rouse the characteristic sediment and serve this spirit at -18C as an ice cold shot.

description: Size: 180mm Height x 220mm Width Branded large Jagermeister galvanised metal Ice Bucket with handle Add a touch of sophistication to your barware collection with this Jägermeister Ice Bucket. Crafted from high-quality metal, this ice bucket is perfect for keeping your drinks cold and refreshing. The silver colour gives it a sleek and modern look that will complement any kitchen or home décor. Featuring the iconic Jägermeister branding, this ice bucket is a must-have for any fan of the brand. Its sturdy construction ensures that it can withstand the rigours of everyday use, making it a great investment for anyone who enjoys entertaining guests or hosting parties. Whether you're serving ice-cold water or chilled cocktails, this Jägermeister Ice Bucket is the perfect addition to your collection.

name: Jagermeister Liqueur 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 35% Size: 70cl What is Jagermeister? . Jägermeister is a secret recipe of 56 herbs, roots and fruits. These ingredients give Jager a smooth, rich flavour with a distinctive bitter sweet finish Smooth, rich flavour, with a distinctive bitter sweet finish. Best served as an ice cold shot.

name: Jagermeister Manifest 50cl
description: Alc Vol: 38% Size: 50cl SURPRISINGLY BALANCED. UNPRETENTIOUSLY PREMIUM. Like Jägermeister, Manifest is a product like no other. Manifest is a ramped-up edition of Jägermeister, with extra focus on the spicy elements. It's still great as a shot or in cocktails, though! Jagermeister Manifest Herbal Liqueur refines the original Jagermeister recipe with its 56 herbs and spices with a five-macerate base and a fine wheat distillate, aged for 15 months in fresh oak barrels. Delight in the quintessentially Jägermeister base of our herbal liqueurs, infused with notes of oakwood storage and suggestive of anise and dried fruit, giving way to a light hint of spice and bitterness. Give that special someone a special alcohol gift with a signature serve over ice, mix into a sour for indulgent night-timer. Only the creators of Jägermeister could develop a spirit as unique as MANIFEST, a dynamic taste experience that defies all expectations. Now we could tell you about our multi-layered flavor profile that is different from any other: The 100% naturalness. The extended range of botanicals. The prominent notes of vanilla, cardamom, and saffron. The aged wheat distillate. We could also tell you about our elaborate process that comes with it. Distillate aging. Botanical maceration. Blending. Filtration. Or, you know… you could just go out and try it yourself.

name: Jägermeister Minis Gravity Pack 12 x 2cl
description: Alc Vol: 35% Size:12 x 2cl What is Jagermeister? . Jägermeister is a secret recipe of 56 herbs, roots and fruits. These ingredients give Jager a smooth, rich flavour with a distinctive bitter sweet finish Smooth, rich flavour, with a distinctive bitter sweet finish. Best served as an ice cold shot.

name: Jagermeister Orange Liqueur 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 33% Size: 70cl Crafted from Sicilian orange zests , SIGNATURE TASTE WITH ORANGE TWIST: Jägermeister Orange combines the iconic herbal notes of the original 56-botanical recipe with the zesty sweetness of Sicilian orange zest for a bold and refreshing flavour experience. PREMIUM SICILIAN CITRUS: Crafted using essential oils extracted from orange and mandarin peels sourced from a select region of Sicily, known for producing fruit with exceptionally full-bodied flavour. GENTLE EXTRACTION PROCESS: The essential citrus oils are extracted using a particularly gentle method to preserve the smooth, fruity character whilst maintaining the signature bitter edge. BEST SERVED ICE-COLD: Enjoy as a chilled shot at -18°C to experience the perfect balance of herbal complexity and citrus brightness at 33% ABV, slightly lighter than the original. BOLD FRUITY AROMAS: Delivers exhilarating fruity aromas with a smooth finish, offering a sophisticated twist on the classic Jägermeister that's both familiar and refreshingly unique. Jägermeister ORANGE is best enjoyed as a shot at -18°C . The signature herbal notes of Jägermeister combine with the zesty sweetness of orange , delivering a flavor that is both familiar and exhilarating. This chilled shot offers a sophisticated twist, perfect for those seeking a unique and refreshing experience .

name: Jagermeister Spice Cinnamon and Vanilla Blend Liqueur 70 cl
description: Alc Vol: 25% Size: 70cl Jägermeister Spice, a blend of Jägermeister’s traditional herbal liqueur recipe with additional vanilla and cinnamon. “The limited edition launch of Jägermeister Spice proved extremely popular with consumers, which is why we’re pleased to introduce it as a permanent offering alongside Jägermeister original,” said Nicole Goodwin, marketing director of Mast-Jägermeister UK.

name: JAH 45 Dark Rum 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl During the 1950s in Kingston, Disc Jockeys would get the latest records and some huge speakers and set up street dances, and eventually this music was translated into the local rums. Jah45 takes inspiration from this period, with 45 referring to the 45 rpm that the records were played at. This dark rum is a blend of three year old Jamaican pot still rum with some unaged column still rums from Hampden, Monymusk and New Yarmouth. Jamaica Natural caramel added for deep flavour and colour

name: Jam Shed Argentina Malbec 750ml
description: Alc Vol: 13% Size: 75cl Country of origin: Argentina Rich, Jammy & Smooth Jam Shed Malbec is made with grapes sourced from selected vineyards in the hills of Argentina's famous Mendoza wine region. This Malbec has rich, opulent plum and blackberry flavours, rounded off with a hint of cocoa and vanilla. It's a seriously delicious red wine that's jam packed with flavour! So you want to know more about Jam Shed? Well, it's quite simple really - Jam Shed is made for people who like to drink wine, not just talk about it. Seriously Shareable, Seriously Delicious Seriously... give it a go! This Malbec has rich, opulent plum and blackberry flavours, rounded off with a hint of cocoa and vanilla. It's a seriously delicious red wine that's jam packed with flavour!

name: Jam Shed Chardonnay White Wine 75cl

It's a seriously delicious white wine, jam packed with flavour! Seriously shareable. Seriously delicious. Seriously... give it a go!

name: Jam Shed Rosé Wine 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 11% Size: 75cl Wine of South Eastern Australia Sourced from selected vineyards, this Rosé is rich and juicy, with flavours of fresh red summer berries and cream. It's a seriously delicious pink wine, jam packed with flavour!

name: Jam Shed Shiraz 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 13.5% Size: 75cl Wine of South Eastern Australia Rich, Jammy & Smooth Jam Shed Shiraz Red Wine is rich & opulent, with sweet red berry flavours and balanced with a subtle hint of vanilla and spice. It's a seriously delicious red wine, jam packed with flavour! This wine is best served slightly chilled, over ice or as the perfect base for a Jam Shed mulled wine or an ice cold sangria. Whichever way you drink it, you are sure to love it. Seriously shareable. Seriously delicious. Seriously... give it a go!

name: Jam Shed Tempranillo Red Wine 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 13.5% Size: 75cl Wine of Spain Jam Shed Tempranillo Red Wine is sourced from selected vineyards, this Spanish Tempranillo wine offers rich & smooth flavours of juicy cherry, ripe plum and a hint of sweet spice. It's a seriously delicious red wine, jam packed with flavour. Strong Oak influence to provide a fuller body and good balance of natural acidity, fruit and round tannins with a long, sweet finish. Seriously Shareable. Seriously Delicious. Seriously... Give it a go!

name: Jamaica Cove Black Pineapple Rum 70cl
description: Size - 70cl ABV - 40% This release from the Jamaica Cove team is a combination of Jamaican Rums which have been distilled in both Column and Pot Stills and infused with Pineapples to create a Sweet Treat. This Rum has Sweet notes of Pineapples running throughout and has hints of Caramel and and Brown Sugar alongside touches of other Exotic Fruits.

name: Jameson 18 Years Irish whiskey 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 46% Size: 70cl You’ve landed on something special here. Jameson 18 Years was made to make any occasion memorable. This is an 18 year old whiskey, the kind of thing you only pull out for best mates. And if you want to impress them just throw this line into conversation: “It’s a unique blend of three signature distillates matured in the finest oak for almost two decades and is given a final marrying period of at least 6 months in a fresh American oak barrel, adding a unique complexity and elegance’. Ok, that is a mouthful. Just let the bottle do the talking. NOSE Aromatic oils with a touch of wood and spicy toffee. TASTE Wonderfully mellow and smooth, a mouthful of complex flavours –toffee, spice, hints of wood and leather, gentle sherry nuttiness and vanilla. FINISH A long lingering finish carries the theme of the wood, spice and toffee right through to the end.

name: Jameson 4.5L Rehoboam Triple Distilled Irish Whiskey
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 4.5lt - Rehoboam This 4.5L Jamesons Triple Distilled Irish Whiskey is almost 6 times larger than a standard 70cl bottle. Blended with a delicate grain whiskey, infused with the nuttiness of the sherry casks, and balanced with the fragrant vanilla of the bourbon casks, this triple distilled Irish whiskey has exceptional smoothness with hints of sweet sherry. You can't go wrong with this best-selling Irish Whiskey. Awards Won The International Spirits Challenge 2014 Silver Award Aged for a Minimum of 4 Years Full floral nose, opens with the smooth sugariness of fudge and marmalade, leaves hints of cut grass and madeira Thick on the palate Good body with flavours of fresh and cooked orchard fruits, some vanilla cream Medium-length finish with traces of spice and honey Delicious with game day foods like pretzels with beer and cheese dip Carries the Jameson hallmark of quality, world-famous for its smoothness and distinctive flavour

name: Jameson Black Barrel Irish Whiskey & Glasses Gift Set
description: ABV: 40% Size: 70cl A super release from Jameson, with a high proportion of Irish pot still whiskey as well as small batch grain. This is a gift set with 2 tumbler glasses. The Jameson Black Barrel is a blend of small batch grain and traditional Irish pot still whiskeys. These are then aged (matured) in a combination of American oak, sherry and double charred bourbon casks. Charring is an age-old method for invigorating barrels to intensify the taste. The resulting whiskey has a sweet and smooth taste, with a richer flavour than that of the regular Jameson. This is balanced with nutty, spice and vanilla notes

name: Jameson Black Barrel Whiskey 70cl
description: ABV: 40% Size: 70cl A super release from Jameson, with a high proportion of Irish pot still whiskey as well as small batch grain. The result is an increased body and level of richness when compared to the core expression. It's aged in double charred first fill bourbon casks (black barrels) Matured in reawakened bourbon barrels, for another level of smoothness. Unique richness with intense vanilla sweetness, pot still spiciness & nutty notes. From our land, to your hand.

name: Jameson Caskmates IPA Edition 70cl
description: ABV - 40% Size: 70cl Whiskey and beer are no strangers behind the bar, but for the first time they have come together to create Jameson's latest innovation - Jameson Caskmates - Irish whiskey that has been patiently finished in craft beer-seasoned barrels. The second release in Jameson Caskmates range, Jameson Caskmates IPA Edition is Jameson whiskey in craft IPA barrels. The result is a whiskey that features the signature smoothness of Jameson alongside light hints of hops, zesty citrus and fresh floral notes. Floral, herbal hops, grapefruit citrus notes with subtle orchard fruits, complemented by wood shavings and a little nuttiness. Hops and light citrus with sweet herbal notes and delicate spicy tones. The lingering fresh fruit and hops give way to grains of barley and a signature smooth finish. Best enjoyed on the rocks, or paired with a hoppy IPA.

name: Jameson Caskmates Stout Edition 70cl
description: Alc Vol- 40% Size: 70cl The trademark smoothness of Jameson Original, with additional rich flavours of coffee, butterscotch and cocoa from the beer cask finish. An initial aroma of freshly cut hay is complemented by a crisp orchard fruit character - green apples and pears, with a twist of lime zest. Mild pot still spices appear, deepening from green tea to hazelnut and milk chocolate. The initial sweet mouth coating typical of the Irish pot still inclusion is quickly complemented by the subtle touch of hops and cocoa beans from the beer cask finish Long and sweet with milk chocolate and butterscotch. Enjoy neat, paired with a stout beer or in an Irish coffee!

name: Jameson Cold Brew Irish Whiskey 5cl Miniature - IMPORTED FROM USA
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 5cl miniature Indulge in the smooth blend of Jameson Cold Brew, crafted with 100% Arabica beans for a unique coffee whiskey experience Introducing Jameson Cold Brew, the ultimate blend of premium whiskey and 100% Arabica beans. This unique infusion is crafted with the finest quality coffee whiskey that delivers an unparalleled taste experience. The subtle notes of rich coffee are perfectly balanced with the smoothness of aged Irish whiskey, making it a perfect choice for those who love to savour their drinks in style. Whether you prefer it straight up or mixed into your favourite cocktail, Jameson Cold Brew's exquisite flavour profile will leave you mesmerized and yearning for more!

name: Jameson Crested Blended Irish Whiskey
description: Jameson Crested is a tribute to the first drops bottled at The Bow Street Distillery and it is Jameson's oldest distillery bottled brand. It reveals delicate sherry undertones and toasted wood, with fruit, spice and chocolate notes. ABV 40% Nose Vivid sherry pot still aroma. Taste Delicate sherry undertones and toasted wood, with fruit, spice and chocolate notes. Finish Warm, lingering sherry.

name: Jameson Ginger Ale & Lime Irish Whiskey 12x330ml
description: Size - 12 x 330ml ABV - 5.0 % Jameson Triple Distilled Irish Whiskey, Ginger Ale and Lime. A unique blend of smooth triple distilled Irish Whiskey with perfectly balanced Ginger Ale and lime. The perfect refreshing twist on a classic combination. This can is best enjoyed chilled, drank either straight from the can, or served up in your favourite glass with some ice and a lime wedge. Refreshing taste has never been easier – simple grab a can, gather your friends and enjoy. Perfect for watching the big game, BBQs and social gatherings. Irish Whiskey Suitable for vegans Triple Distilled Aged 4 Years in Oak Casks Smooth & Balanced Best Served Chilled 330ml Can · 5% ABV

name: Jameson Irish Whiskey Triple Distilled Blended 1L
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 1lt Triple Distilled Irish Whiskey Jameson Irish whiskey is a triple-distilled blended Irish whiskey, as versatile as it is smooth. Whiskey like Jameson isn't just born smooth and balanced. First, we take the best of pot still and fine grain whiskeys. Then we triple distil them. Not because we have to, because we want to. This gives Jameson its signature smoothness. This tradition began in 1780 with John Jameson, and we continue his legacy to this day. Finally, we age our whiskey in oak casks for a minimum of 4 years. The result? A unique whiskey with a perfect balance of spicy, nutty and vanilla notes with hints of sweet sherry. Simply enjoy neat, poured over ice, or in any of your favourite whiskey cocktails. Winner of the 2018 The Irish Whiskey Masters (TIWM) Gold award Tasting Notes Colour: Rich, deep amber. Nose: Jameson has a light floral fragrance, peppered with spicy wood and sweet notes. Taste: Perfect balance of spicy, nutty and vanilla notes with hints of sweet sherry. Finish: Exceptional smoothness

name: Jameson Single Pot Still Irish Whiskey 46% ABV 70CL
description: ABV 46% Size: 70cl FIVE OAK CASK RELEASE Jameson Single Pot Still embodies the traditional Irish Whiskey making style after which it is named. Malted and unmalted barley is triple distilled for a rich, unmistakable silkiness with distinctive pot still spiciness. This Five Oak Cask Release is matured in a combination of three different types of virgin oak (Irish, European and American), in addition to ex-bourbon and ex-sherry casks. The finished result is a whiskey that is equal parts complex and smooth.

name: Jameson Triple Triple Irish Whiskey 1L
description: ABV - 40% Size - 1L Jameson Triple Triple is triple distilled and triple cask matured. We introduced our Bourbon and sherry casks to hand-selected Málaga casks. It turned out to be a match made in wood heaven.

name: Jameson Triple Triple Irish Whiskey 70cl
description: ABV - 40% Size - 70cl Jameson Triple Triple is triple distilled and triple cask matured. We introduced our Bourbon and sherry casks to hand-selected Málaga casks. It turned out to be a match made in wood heaven. Velvety notes of toffee, cacao and toasted almond with an extra drop of smoothness Good things come in threes. Always Triple Distilled and now Triple Cask. We introduced whiskeys matured in a combination of Bourbon and Sherry casks with a portion further matured in Chestnut casks. The result? A new taste experience with additional layers of flavour and an extra drop of smoothness. Triple Distilled Triple Cask Bourbon, Sherry & Chestnut Casks Extra Smooth Layers of Flavour

name: Jameson Whiskey Miniatures - 12 x 5cl
description: Strength / ABV : 40% Size : 5cl / 50ml Packaging : Glass Country / Region : Ireland / Dublin Jameson Irish Whiskey is triple distilled from only the finest Irish barley and pure spring water. It is then matured in oak casks to produce a whiskey that is world famous for its smooth characteristics and distinctive flavour. Bottle shape may vary to image in height and width.

name: Jammie Doughnut Cocktail Set
description: Gift set includes : Baileys Original Irish Cream Liqueur 5cl - ABV 17% Raspberry Flavour Liqeuer 5cl - ABV 18% 2 x Shot glasses Instructions: First, chill your shot glass and components - a cold glass and liquid helps keep the layers. When ready, pour approx. 25ml of the Raspberry Flavour Liqueur into the bottom of the shot glass. Now for the layering! Using the back of a teaspoon (held just above the Raspberry Flavour Liqueur and touching the inside of the shot glass), slowly pour your Baileys over the top of the spoon. The Baileys will create a smooth layer on the top of the Raspberry Flavour Liqueur. Take your time... the slower the pour, the better the layer. Serve and enjoy! Wash before first use. Hand wash only.

name: Jamun The Himalayan Juniper Dry Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 42.8% Size: 70cl The newly launched Himalayan Dry gin, “JAMUN”, made from the Himalayan Juniper (known as the Indian blackberry) is handcrafted in small batches through a process of maceration and distillation. Made with the Himalayan spring water, it is infused with an aroma of botanicals including coriander, mint, lemon peel and citrus. Quite unique in its taste and flavour of the Himalayan Juniper, it clearly stands out in the gin category. Embark on an elevated gin experience with Jamun, The Himalayan Juniper Dry Gin, a creation of Mohan Meakin in the picturesque Himachal Pradesh, India.

name: Janelas Antigas Vinho Verde 75cl
description: ABV: 11% Size: 75cl Country: Portugual Suitable for Vegetarians, Suitable for Vegans By blending four of the most famous grape varieties of the region, a fresh and fruity wine with a great balance of flavour and acidity is produced.

name: Jarrah Wood Semillon Chardonnay 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 12.5% Size: 75cl Country: Australia Grape Variety White Blend A Great blend from this Aussie white wine. It has a refreshing dry style with lively citrus fruit characters and a crisp finish.

These 12 x 370ml glass bottles are ideal for having at home, office or while on the go. Made in Mexico, this soda is a must-try for anyone who loves Mexican cuisine or is simply looking to try something new. Add it to your pantry and enjoy it as a refreshing drink with your meals or as a standalone beverage.
