name: Ming River Sichuan Baijiu Grain Spirit 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 45% Size: 70cl Baijiu is unlike any Western spirit with respect to production methods, ingredients, flavor and origin. Baijiu pronounced bye-j’yo, meaning “white spirits” in Mandarin—is a category that encompasses all traditional Chinese grain spirits. Baijiu is China’s national drink (meaning ‘clear spirit’). Ming River Sichuan Baijiu is produced at Luzhou Laojiao, the oldest operating distillery in China. It is made with red sorghum grain, and fermented in earthen pits with naturally harvested yeast cultures. After resting for two months, the mash is distilled in a traditional Chinese pot still. Baijiu is most commonly distilled from sorghum, but is also often made from rice, wheat, corn and millet. Baijiu production techniques differ significantly by region and style, and different styles of baijiu can be as distinct as whiskey is to tequila.

name: Mini Moet & Chandon Imperial Rose Non Vintage Champagne 20cl - Single Serve
description: Alc Vol: 12% Size: 20cl Lively and generous, Rose Imperial distinguishes itself by a radiant colour, an intense fruitiness and flamboyance on the palate, that instantly seduce and delight. The color is a glowing pink with dominant red tones and purple highlights. The aromas are intense and irresistible, a lively bouquet of fresh red summer berries (strawberry, raspberry and red currant) with floral nuances (rose, hawthorn) and a light peppery touch. The palate is flamboyant and combines intensity and roundness: fleshy and juicy at first, then firm (fruit stone), with a subtle herbal (mint) finish. Rose Imperial's assemblage is built on the intensity of Pinot Noir (40 to 50%, 10% of which are red wine), the fruitiness of Pinot Meunier (30 to 40%, 10% of which are red wine) and the finesse of Chardonnay (10 to 20%). The use of 20 to 30% of carefully selected reserve wines complete the assemblage and enhance its intensity, subtlety and consistency.

description: Alc Vol: 4.5% Size: 12x355ml “A full flavoured Mexican pilsner-lager.” A pilsner-style lager brewed with premium barley malt, Modelo Especial is characterised by its deep golden hue, orange blossom aroma and slight hint of sweetness. It is bright gold with apple, pear and citrus fruit freshness with undertones of brioche. Perfect as an aperitif or throughout dinner with fish, light white meats and pastry desserts.

Its aromas are radiant, revealing bright white-fleshed fruits (apple, pear, white peach), citrus fruits (lemon), floral nuances (lime blossom) and elegant blond notes (brioche and fresh nuts). The palate is seductive, richly flavourful and smooth combining generosity and elegance, fullness and finesse, followed by a delicately fresh crispiness (fruit with seeds), to reveal the magical balance of champagne.

name: Moet & Chandon Grand Vintage Collection 2002
description: Alc Vol: 12.5% Size: 75cl Moët & Chandon Grand Vintage champagnes, unlike most champagnes, are made from the grapes of a single exceptional year. Each Grand Vintage is unique. Each Grand Vintage possesses the distinctive, imitable qualities of that year’s outstanding grapes, qualities which have been elevated to their fullest expression through the savoir-faire, experience and expertise of Moët & Chandon and the House’s chef de cave. Since 1842, the House has released 74 vintage champagnes. Grand Vintage 2002, the 68th Vintage from the Maison, which was founded in 1743, is a wine of extraordinary character . The House’s 68th vintage, Grand Vintage 2002 is a well-rounded, polished, harmonious wine with a complex, uncompromising personality. Warm harvest notes and notes of frangipani, white peach and nectarine, a velvety texture and a crisp finish make for an exceptional champagne (Chardonnay 51%, Pinot Noir 26%, Pinot Meunier 23%). Disgorged in November 2009 - Dosage : 5,5 g/l. The 2002 Grand Vintage was initially released in October 2010 and it was first disgorged in November 2009, so chef de cave Benoît Gouez has actually slightly lengthened the post disgorgement ageing on the white style partly, “to help it recover from the oxidation trauma of the disgorgement process”. Moët Grand Vintage usually gets disgorged in three tranches spread over 18 months or so, depending on levels of demand, so by the time of the third release it has had nearly eight years on its lees. Tasting Notes: Grand Vintage 2002 is mature, harmonious and precise. Seven years in the cellars have developed the mature, toasty flavours, both sweet and dry, with warm notes of grain and frangipane along with toasted almonds and malt, mocha and light tobacco. Notes of ripe fruits follow: pear, candied citrus, plum, nectarine and white peach. On the palate, the construction is precise and the substance is velvety. The first impression of creamy roundness progressively allows the linear, tight structure to appear. The flavours of fruit become fresher: mandarin orange and pink grapefruit. The deliberately light dosage (5.5 g/l), creates a firm, precise finish, deliciously tonic and refreshing, with notes of rhubarb and currant as well as quinine and citrus. Grape Variety: 51% Chardonnay, 26% Pinot Noir, 23% Pinot Meunier Moët & Chandon possesses one of the world’s most prestigious collection of vintage champagnes, all of which are safeguarded in the Grand Vintage Reserve cellars

name: Moët & Chandon Ice Impérial 75cl
description: ABV 12% Size: 75cl Moët & Chandon Ice Impérial, the first and only champagne especially created to be enjoyed over ice. A new champagne experience combining fun, fresh and free sensations while remaining true to the Moët & Chandon style, a style distinguished by its bright fruitiness, its seductive palate and its elegant maturity Moët & Chandon Ice Impérial was specifically developed by Chef de Cave Benoît Gouez to be served on ice. The wine's exceptional balance reaches its fullest expression when meeting the ice to reveal intense fruitiness, richness and freshness for a pure moment of summertime pleasure By Appointment to Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II. Purveyors of Champagne. Champagne Moët & Chandon Épernay

description: There are many varieties of agave that are used to make spirits commonly used in the world of mixology: Mezcal and Tequila. Mezcal is produced from vivipira, asperrima, weberi, pototarum et salmania varieties. Tequila from tequilina or blue agave like agave syrup. Le Sirop de MONIN Agave from Mexico, with its herbaceous notes, is the ideal pairing to elevate a multitude of hot or cold applications bringing a delicate touch of sweetness.

Made with natural almond flavouring and pure beetroot sugar, Le Sirop de MONIN Almond is the authentic ingredient to add a touch of luxury to your drink creations.

name: Monin Apricot Syrup 70cl
description: Monin apricot is bursting with the full flavour, sweet taste and aroma of apricot jam. Great for mixing with other flavours or blended into cocktails, fruit punches, smoothies and even ice tea.

name: Monin Basil Syrup 70cl
description: An annual herb belonging to the mint family, basil is often referred to as the “royal herb”. It is a fragile and sensitive herb and is a widespread ingredient in Mediterranean cuisine. It has different varieties, from Italian to Thai basil. It is increasingly popular among bartenders who wish to add a hint of freshness to their creations. Le Sirop de MONIN Basil tastes incredible in cocktails and mocktails alike, lifting each drink with a strong, herbal flavour with peppery hints.

name: Monin Blackberry Syrup 70cl
description: This small yet plump, juicy berry, with its sweet and sour flavour, is originally from Asia. Rarely farmed in France, luckily it can easily be found in the wild for our enjoyment. Nowadays the blackberry is usually used in jams and desserts. Le Sirop de MONIN Blackberry, with notes of matured fruit and an intense violet colour will elevate all of your alcoholic and non-alcoholic creations.

name: Monin Blackcurrant Syrup 70cl
description: A plant originally from Europe, the blackcurrant bush has been cultivated since the Renaissance. Strongly established in France, this pretty berry, with its sweet and slightly bitter flavour is enjoyed both in dishes and drinks, notably in the famous crème de cassis. Le Sirop de MONIN Blackcurrant brings a sweet and fruity flavour with hints of bitterness to all of your creations, such as a Collins, Mojito and even in your smoothies!

name: Monin Blood Orange Syrup 70cl
description: MONIN Premium Blood Orange Syrup 700ml for Cocktails and Mocktails. Vegan-Friendly, Allergen-Free, 100 Percent Natural Flavours and Colourings. Perfect for Non-Alcoholic Spritzes

name: Monin Blueberry Syrup 70cl
description: A delicious superfood that works beautifully in a wide range of drinks and desserts, the blueberry has a mild yet tangy flavour which is captured perfectly in Monin's Blueberry Syrup. Add a sweet and tart taste to your smoothies, cocktails and sweet dishes with this syrup, or add it, along with some whipped cream and an N2O charger, to your whipping dispenser to create a decadent whipped cream topping.

name: Monin Bubble Gum Syrup 70cl
description: Size: 70cl With a perfectly pink colouring, this Monin Bubblegum Syrup will take you back to your childhood in no time! Originally invented in the USA in 1928, bubble gum has been a firm favourite with children and adults ever since. Monin Bubble Gum syrup captures the fun, nostalgic essence of this unique flavour, taking inspiration from famous bubble gum brands such as Hubba Bubba or the French Malabar brand. It’s perfect for Bubble Gum Daiquiris and other fun cocktail twists, and a bubble gum milkshake is a must try Kosher-Friendly, GMO-Free and Vegan

name: Monin Butterscotch Syrup 70cl
description: A wonderfully indulgent butterscotch syrup from Monin, brilliant in coffee and cakes and divine when poured over vanilla ice cream. Utterly delicious.

name: Monin Candy Strawberry Syrup 70cl
description: A sweeter, candied version of Monin’s strawberry syrup, evoking memories of childhood while adding an irresistible sweet strawberry note to your cocktails and mocktails. Massively popular.

name: Monin Caramel Syrup 70cl
description: Drenched in sweet, sticky flavours and those delicious buttery sugar notes, Monin Caramel Syrup is a coffee lovers dream companion. Try in cocktails.

name: Monin Chaï Tea 70cl
description: MONIN Chai Tea concentrate delivers the warm, spicy aromas associated with the now world famous beverage. Masala Chai or Chai means spiced tea. Chai originated in India and quickly gained worldwide popularity. MONIN Chai Tea concentrate is perfect in a Chai Latte simply combined with steamed milk. It also works well in iced lattes, frappes, cocktails and mocktails. Suitable for vegan, vegetarian diets. Alcohol-free, Halal, Kosher. Pure sugar syrup. Natural flavourings.

name: Monin Cherry Syrup 70cl
description: A small fruit known since Antiquity, the cherry is the first pitted fruit of the year available in market stalls. Hundreds of cherry varieties exist, with very different flavour profiles, all equally delicious: the Burlat, sweet and tender, the Reverchon, sour and crunchy, or the Sweetheart, pink and firm. Often enjoyed in jams, this sublime, intense red fruit can be savoured in desserts, often chocolatey, but can also be enjoyed in drinks. Le Sirop de MONIN Cherry's light hint of cherry pit and ripe, juicy cherry flavours is the ideal ingredient to help bring a refreshing note to all of your creations. Try it in an iced tea, in a dark chocolate frappe or even in a white chocolate Martini.

name: Monin Cherry Syrup 70cl - DATED 03/23
description: Size: 70cl A small fruit known since Antiquity, the cherry is the first pitted fruit of the year available in market stalls. Hundreds of cherry varieties exist, with very different flavour profiles, all equally delicious: the Burlat, sweet and tender, the Reverchon, sour and crunchy, or the Sweetheart, pink and firm. Often enjoyed in jams, this sublime, intense red fruit can be savoured in desserts, often chocolatey, but can also be enjoyed in drinks. Le Sirop de MONIN Cherry's light hint of cherry pit and ripe, juicy cherry flavours is the ideal ingredient to help bring a refreshing note to all of your creations. Try it in an iced tea, in a dark chocolate frappe or even in a white chocolate Martini. Best Before Dated; 03/2023

name: Monin Chocolate Cookie Syrup 70cl
description: MONIN Chocolate Cookie syrup provides a perfect balance of doughy, chewy biscuits alongside rich notes of chocolate. Add MONIN Chocolate Cookie Syrup to an iced latte, frappe, coffee, cocktails or cocktails.

name: Monin Chocolate Syrup 70cl
description: With its decadently rich cocoa taste, Monin Chocolate syrup is ideal for puddings, milkshakes, cocktails and so much more.

name: Monin Cinnamon Syrup 70cl
description: Size: 70cl This fragrant spice flavour evokes dreams of hot cinnamon rolls from the oven, Derived from the bark of an evergreen tree native to Sri Lanka, cinnamon is one of the oldest spices known, Among ancient nations, it was so highly prized that it was regarded as a gift fit for monarchs and other great potentates. The characteristic rich, warm and sweet fragrance of cinnamon made it one of the most evocative spices and a much used ingredient in many cuisines worldwide, Use In: Teas, Smoothies, Coffees, Flavoured milks, Cocktails

name: Monin Cloudy Lemonade Syrup 70cl
description: Cloudy Lemonade is a traditional homemade lemonade commonly found in North America. It bottles a taste of American life and evokes childhood memories. Made with Sicilian lemons, Le Sirop de MONIN Cloudy Lemonade is the perfect combination of sweetness and fine acidity. Use it to make delicious homemade lemonade and other refreshing drinks. Incredibly easy to use, it can be prepared in an instant. It’s the perfect partner for a multitude of applications, creating summery thirst-quenchers.

name: Monin Coconut Syrup 70cl
description: Monin have taken their lovely sugar syrup and introduced the tropical coconut. Monin Coconut Syrup; Sweet and balanced with a lovely clean finish.

name: Monin Coffee Syrup 70cl
description: Colour: Dark brown with gold glints Tasting Notes : Intense bitter filter coffee notes. Tastes of brewed coffee with some after notes of typical Colombian coffee. Application: Ideal for dessert drinks, cocktails, lattes and frozen drinks and milkshakes Simply pour this syrup and experience the intense coffee aroma. Try combining this unique syrup with milk and caramel sauce, blending until smooth. The perfect coffee delight.

name: Monin Cucumber Syrup 70cl
description: Crisp and cool freshness makes cucumbers a refreshing garden favourite. It lends a distinct, summery accent to your mojitos, mocktails, cocktails and lemonades.

name: Monin Gingerbread Syrup 70cl
description: Colour: Bright gold with amber glints Tasting Notes: Complex nose of spices with strong notes of cinnamon, gingerbread cookies taste. Application: Coffees, flavoured milks, dessert drinks, cocktails, cocoas. Typically, the word gingerbread is often associated with gingerbread cookies, the gingerbread house and, of course, the gingerbread man! All of these gingerbread items are associated with a feeling of warmth and cosiness during the winter holidays. Recreate that cosy feeling of warmth around the fireplace when flavouring your beverages with Monin Gingerbread! Monin Gingerbread presents a perfectly balanced blend of ginger and cinnamon for a true Gingerbread taste. Beyond the winter season, Monin Gingerbread can also be enjoyed year-round in milkshakes or iced and frozen coffees.

name: Monin Gomme Syrup 70cl
description: Made from sugar beets, Monin Gomme Syrup was first created for bars, to add sweetness to cocktails in a consistent form. A great addition for those who like to play with cocktail creations.

name: Monin Green Apple Syrup 70cl
description: Monin Green Apple shot to fame a few Christmases ago when it was recommended by Nigella Lawson in her Green Apple Martini. Here's the recipe that made this one of our most popular syrups - it's still one of our biggest sellers: 1 shot vodka or gin 1 shot sour apple liqueur 1/2 shot Monin Green Apple syrup Slice of Granny Smith apple to garnish 1. In a martini glass, combine the vodka/gin over lots of ice, and add the liqueur and syrup. 2. Slice a segment of apple, removing any core. Cut a nick in the bottom of the slice horizontally, and slip it onto the edge of the glass.

name: Monin Green Mint Syrup 70cl
description: Originally from the south of Europe and the Middle East, mint is an aromatic herb that has been recognized since Greek mythology. Greatly appreciated thanks to its refreshing virtues, green mint is used in cooking all over the world. With its intense emerald green colour and its notes of peppery mint, Le Sirop de MONIN Green Mint will bring a twist of freshness to all of your creations. Often mixed with water or milk, it will be a perfect addition to a hot chocolate or a mocha, but also in soda, lemonades and frappés.

name: Monin Hazelnut Syrup 70cl
description: Size: 70cl With its beautiful golden hue and fresh hazelnut taste, Le Sirop de MONIN Hazelnut has a powerful aromatic and is ideal in both hot and cold applications. Its natural flavour imparts the freshest hazelnut taste to this syrup.

name: Monin Hibiscus Syrup 70cl
description: This vibrant flower is originally from Egypt and China, and mainly grows around the Indian and Pacific oceans. It is mostly consumed as an infusion: from Bissap in Africa to Karkadé in the Arab world. Le Sirop de MONIN Hibiscus perfectly captures its astringent, floral flavor with notes of red fruit and the flower’s bright red colour. Add an elegant twist to your teas, lemonades and wine-based cocktails.

name: Monin Lime Syrup 70cl
description: and drinks. High quality syrup with premium flavours, all-natural ingredients, including lime juice and lime zest. Lime can give margarita cocktails their kick, balance the sweetness of desserts, or deliver a fruity zest to a host of lime recipes. With Monin Lime Syrup, it is extra convenient to include the flavour with whatever you wish. From mojito cocktails to meringues, a dash of the syrup will take a large variety of beverages and food to the next level. It is believed the fruit first originated in either Southeast Asia or Indonesia. The general understanding is that, around the year 1000, Arabian traders introduced limes along with lemons to eastern Mediterranean countries and North Africa. During the 12th and 13th centuries, travelling Crusaders brought limes to the western side of the Mediterranean. Then during a 1493 voyage, Christopher Columbus transported citrus seeds which most likely included limes to the West Indies, and soon the trees began spreading across Mexico, the West Indies and Florida.

name: Monin Lychee Syrup 70cl
description: Beautiful Chinese lychees are infused with a wonderful sugar syrup to produce Monin Lychee Syrup. A fragrant and versatile syrup ideal for cocktails.

name: Monin Madagascar Vanilla Syrup 70cl
description: Monin Vanilla syrup in stylish 70cl glass bottle. To create the finest vanilla syrup in the world, you must first start with the finest vanilla extract in the world. For more than 90 years, Monin has been using premium vanilla extract from Madagascar. This pure extract is what gives MONIN Vanilla the superior taste that makes the difference in your recipes. Discover how popular Monin Vanilla can enhance virtually any beverage!

name: Monin Mojito Mint Syrup 70cl
description: Monin Mojito Mint syrup in stylish 70cl glass bottle. The famous Mojito cocktail was born in the sultry bars of pre-revolutionary Havana. Skilled bartenders called upon the local abundance of wild mint, cane sugar, lime and rum to create a refreshing cocktail sensation that flavoured the sensual Cuban nightlife. Yet the time consuming preparation of mojitos involving making simple syrup and thoroughly muddling lime and mint leaves, as well as its hard to find ingredients did not travel well to the international bar scene. With Monin Mojito Mint, making mojitos is now easy. Just combine with rum, club soda and a squeeze of lime! The Mojito is now a standout favourite among American bars and restaurants patrons. Additionally, Monin Mojito Mint is a refreshing mint and lime flavour that can be used beyond the bar in countless non-alcoholic applications.

name: Monin Passion Syrup 70cl
description: Truly tropical, sweet and tangy; Monin Passionfruit syrup is made from pure passionfruit juice. The ideal companion for a wide variety of cocktails

name: Monin Peach Syrup 70cl
description: Peaches are believed to be native to China where the legend said the peach was consumed by the immortals, due to the fruit's mystic virtue of conferring longevity to all who ate it. Each year, the summer season signals the arrival of juicy, sweet peaches. But infusing your recipes with the sweet, unmistakable flavour and rich golden colour of peaches does not have to end when the long days of summer fade. Discover how MONIN Peach can enhance your beverages with fruity, delicious flavour!

name: Monin Pear Syrup 70cl
description: Cultivated for millennia, the pear is a fruit enjoyed across the world and consumed all year round. Today, about a dozen varieties exist, all more delicious than the other. This orchard fruit works wonders in desserts, either plain or poached. All its flavours truly shine whilst paired with aromatic herbs, vanilla, chocolate, citrus fruits and dried fruits. Le Sirop de MONIN Pear will be a true asset to all of your cocktails and mocktails. Its sweet notes and tender pulp flavour profile will bring a touch of decadence to your smoothie with caramel, a Spritz or a Sours with a twist of lime juice.

name: Monin Pineapple Syrup 70cl
description: Delicious, sweet juicy pineapple flavours are infused with their classic sugar syrup to make Monin Pineapple syrup. Great for fruit based drinks

name: Monin Pink Grapefruit Syrup 70cl
description: MONIN Pink Grapefruit syrup has the tart, juicy, zing of fresh pink grapefruits. Grapefruits are a hybrid of pomelo and sweet orange, originated in Barbados in the 18th Century. The name comes from a Jamaican farmer who on first tasting them claimed it was close to that of a grape and subsequently named it Grapefruit. MONIN Pink Grapefruit syrup is great in lemonades, iced teas, cocktails and mocktails.

name: Monin Pistachio Syrup 70cl
description: Crack open rich and roasted pistachio flavour, and forget about the pesky shells. This naturally-flavoured Pistachio Syrup adds smooth, slightly roasted nut flavour and subtle sweetness to your favourite lattes, mochas, cocktails and more.

name: Monin Pomegranate Syrup 70cl
description: Monin Pomegranate Syrup, is a wonderful blend of slightly sweet and tart pomegranate notes, laced with red berries and freshness. A superb addition to a multitude of drinks and recipes.

name: Monin Popcorn Syrup 70cl
description: MONIN Popcorn syrup immediately offers the aroma of roasted, buttery popcorn on the nose with an intense flavour profile of salted, nutty caramel in the mouth, which matches up with everyone's favourite movie theatre snack. Popcorn has been consumed for thousands of years, with remnants of popcorn being found in Mexico which date back to 3600BC. Nowadays, the snack is synonymous with visits to the cinema or stay at home movie nights. Try MONIN Popcorn syrup in a frappe, a latte or in an old fashioned for an easy, yet delicious classic cocktail twist. Flavour: Rich buttery toasted notes of popcorn on the palate. Reminiscent to that classic Cinema aroma. Used in coffee-based drinks, hot chocolates and hot drinks, milkshakes, frappes and dessert drinks Use 15-20ml per serve for hot drinks, 10-25ml for cocktails, 20-30ml for frappes and milkshakes, depending on recipe Suitable for vegan, vegetarian diets. Nut-free, alcohol-free, Halal, Kosher. Pure sugar syrup. Natural flavourings. Volume: 700ml glass bottle

name: Monin Pure Cane Sugar Syrup 70cl
description: Monin's pure cane sugar syrup, a top class simple syrup for adding a touch of sweetness to your cocktails without the fuss and hassle of having to dissolve your granulated sugar.

name: Monin Raspberry Syrup 70cl
description: Originally from Western Europe, the raspberry was used for its fragrance during centuries before being consumed as a fruit. Today, there are over thirty varieties of this tiny summer fruit. Le Sirop de MONIN Raspberry boasts a natural tint, coloured by raspberry juice. Its sweet and slightly sour notes will be the perfect addition to hot and cold drinks, with or without alcohol. It can be enjoyed in teas, lemonades or smoothies, but also in coffees, frappes and even in gin, vodka or rum based cocktails.

name: Monin Rose Syrup 70cl
description: With the beautiful perfume and sweet taste of roses, Monin Rose syrup has the perfect balance of sweet and floral notes. A great addition to drinks

name: Monin Tangerine Syrup 70cl
description: Tangerine or mandarin? Actually, all tangerines are mandarins. The term “tangerine” has no botanical meaning and the two names can be used interchangeably. The tangerine is an orange coloured citrus fruit. They look like clementines or small oranges, but the taste is often sourer, or tarter, than that of an orange. Should you enjoy the tender and juicy tangerine flavour in your drinks, add Le Sirop de MONIN Tangerine which keeps all subtle sweetness of fresh tangerine fruit.

name: Monin Violet Syrup 70cl
description: Colour: Bright deep purple colour Tasting Notes: Authentic violet blossom aroma; acidulous floral flavour which will remind you of violet candies Application: Will bring roundness to your coffees, dessert drinks, milkshakes, alcoholic or non alcoholic cocktails One of the floral range of syrups inspired by the traditional violet sweets, MONIN Violet delivers the sweet, fragrant taste of this pretty springtime flower. Defined by its flirtatious scent which teases the nose, violet’s distinguishing feature is that its perfume emits a chemical which temporarily turns of the human ability to smell the fragrance. Perhaps the reason why William Shakespeare described it as: “Forward, not permanent; sweet, not lasting. The perfume and suppliance of a minute.” The flowers are often used to flavour salads, soufflés, creams, desserts and teas. Candied or crystallised violets are flowers preserved by a coating of egg white and crystallised sugar and are still made in the French city of Toulouse. Create flirty floral drinks and use MONIN Violet’s attractive bright blue-purple colour to make pretty martini, candy-themed novelty cocktails or fragrant teas and creamy drinks.

name: Monin Watermelon Syrup 70cl
description: Enjoyed all throughout the summer in French markets, watermelon is consumed across the world: as a condiment seasoned with vinegar in the United States, as an ingredient in beer in Russia, etc. Easily recognisable with its thick, stripy green skin and its intensely red flesh, watermelon is known for its hydrating properties as it is gorged with water. In jams, cold soups or fruit salads, it pairs wonderfully well with mint, basil or even lemon. Le Sirop de MONIN Watermelon captures all of its refreshing, juicy notes and will be a great addition to lemonades, iced teas, fruity punches or gin-based cocktails.

name: Monin White Chocolate Syrup 70cl
description: Monin White Chocolate syrup is full of the creamy, buttery taste of white chocolate loved by many. A great addition to an array of cocktails and drinks.

name: Monin Yellow Banana Syrup 70cl
description: The banana is the most well-known tropical fruit, with many eating it as a healthy snack throughout the day. Its sweet, velvety flavour makes it a perfect dessert fruit or addition to pastries and confectionaries. Le Sirop de MONIN Yellow Banana pairs perfectly with chocolate, caramel, rum, and other exotic fruits, bringing a tropical touch to cocktails and hot drinks alike.

name: Monkey 47 Gin 50cl
description: Alc Vol: 47% Size: 50cl Contains lingonberries, a unique ingredient that makes Monkey 47 a distinctive, one-of-a-kind dry gin. The number 47 pertains to the number of botanicals in this gin’s formulation. 47 also refers to the fact that this gin is consistently bottled at 47% Critically acclaimed and constantly praised ’Less is more’ doesn’t apply to Monkey 47 The aroma will remind you of a pine forest after a downpour A complex taste with a lot of herby, fruity, and spicy flavours, but very structured Heavy and wooded finish Best for martinis Make sure it’s partnered with a robust vermouth

name: Monkey Shoulder Smokey Monkey Blended Malt Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl A deeper, smokier side of Monkey Shoulder, the perfect balance of sweet and peat. Created by bartenders, for bartenders, this unique blend was so popular it’s now available in over 25 countries.

name: Monkey Shoulder Whisky 70cl
description: Great on its own or with mixers! Monkey Shoulder is a blend of three Speyside single malts using a closely-guarded secret recipe. The result is a smooth concoction that's sweet and easy to drink. You will appreciate the orange zest combined with spicy vanilla and floral flavours. Malty and fruity—the perfect combination Aged in first-fill casks (ex-Bourbon) Vatted in small batches for up to 6 months then bottled at 40% abv Wonderfully creamy, smooth, and supple Elegant and stylish aromas with marmalade, malt, and cocoa notes Lots of vanilla and hints of winter spices (cloves, cinnamon, nutmeg) Medium length finish, with lingering peppermint and spicy oak on the tail This malty Scotch is delicious neat or over ice and can be used in whisky cocktails

description: Size: 12 x 500ml Carbonated energy drink with 160mg Caffeine. Citrus Fruit Lemonade flavour. Inspired by the land down under with over 10,000 beaches, the Great Barrier Reef, and home to some of the most exotic citrus on earth we created Juiced Monster Aussie Syle Lemonade. Monster's twist on classic lemonade, we hit the ideal balance of tart and sweet with a burst of fresh citrus flavour. As always, it's chockers with our world-famous Monster energy blend. Crack a coldie and give it a go

Bad Apple is so good, it's almost worth getting kicked out of Eden over. It's got a crisp, dry apple flavour that's not too sweet and goes down smooth. Sinfully great taste and packed with a full load of our legendary Monster Energy blend. Unleash the Beast! ® Carbonated Energy Drink with 6% Fruit Juice from Fruit Juice Concentrate, Taurine, Ginseng, Caffeine, L-carnitine and B-vitamins with Sugars and Sweeteners. name: Monster Energy Drink Khaotic 12 x 500ml PM
description: Size: 12 x 500ml Back in “05” the original Monster with juice shook-up the game by combining great tasting juice with energy drink functionality and attitude. Now over a decade later we decided it was time for a little makeover of the classic. We lightened-up the flavour and adjusted the blend to create a taste that is better experienced than described. Of course our Monster Energy DNA remains unchanged. For our new paint job we called on longtime friend and legendary street artist Risk. His iconic west coast style and vibrant presentation perfectly captures the spirit of our original Khaos reborn as Khaotic! Unleash the Beast!®

name: Monster Energy Lewis Hamilton Zero Sugar 12 x 500ml PM £1.55
description: Size: 12 x 500ml Every day we strive to give our best performance, but to do this we need the right fuel. I know how important this is when preparing to tackle each championship season. With this mission in mind, I worked with Monster to make this limited edition can. Infused with the refreshing taste of stone fruits, this energy drink is packed with all the vegan ingredients needed to turbo charge your drive. Wrapped in a bespoke design I co-created with Mad Dog Jones, this delicious formula will have you ready for anything.

name: Monster Energy Pipeline Punch 12 x 500ml PM £1.75
description: Banzai Pipeline, the world's most famous wave, on Oahu's fabled North Shore comes alive for just a few brief months every winter. In honour of this epic force of nature, we created Juice Monster Pipeline Punch. The perfect blend of the best flavours Hawaii has to offer - passion fruit, orange & guava then “Monsterised” with a full load of our famous energy blend. And, just like the wave it was named for, it is destined to become a legend! Unleash the Beast! Our team riders and Monster Girls are no different.....They've been dropping some hints lately. They've been asking us for a new Monster drink. A little less sweet, lighter-tasting and zero calories, but with a full load of our Monster energy blend. Sure, white is the new black. We went all out: Monster Energy Ultra. Unleash the ultra beast!

Monster Monarch named for the humble butterfly has a light subtle flavour with hints of peach and nectarine. name: Monster Pacific Punch Energy Drink 12 x 500ml PM
description: Size: 12 x 500ml Punch Monster is an energy drink by Monster Energy, known for its bold and fruity flavor profile. Packed with caffeine and designed to provide a quick energy boost, Punch Monster is a popular choice for those seeking a flavorful and energizing beverage. Monster Pacific Punch, it's Not! name: Mortlach 15 Year Old Whisky Game of Thrones Limited Edition 70cl
description: Limited edition Game of Thrones Mortlach 15 year old single malt scotch whisky 70cl ABV: 46% Best served neat, on the rocks or by adding a little water which develops the fresh fruit characters. The ninth and final bottling in the Game of Thrones Limited Edition Single Malt Scotch Whisky Collection, the Six Kingdoms Mortlach pays tribute to one of the show’s most powerful characters and the fate of Westeros, whose long-held Seven Kingdoms ultimately became six at the conclusion of the show’s climatic battle for the Iron Throne.

name: Morveren Absinthe 66% Alc vol. In Gift Box 35cl
description: Alc/Vol: 66% Size: 35CL Morveren Absinthe is sold in a striking presentation pack that tells the Cornish legend about the mermaid Morveren of Zennor. This handcrafted Absinthe has a stunning pale green colour, enhanced by the unique use of Cornish seaweed for both the colour and for a background unami flavour. It fills your glass with aromas of aniseed and delicious herbal undertones. We source our wormwood from Josh at Wild St Ives who grows it himself on the cliffs near Zennor (just above Pendour Cove – the exact location of the Morveren legend). Despite the 66% Alc/Vol, the finish is very smooth and long, with a fresh zing and precious little burn.

name: Mount Gay Barbados Rum Black Barrel Double Cask Blend 70cl
description: Tasting Notes: Lots of woody and buttery notes complemented with dried fruit and spices. Notes of gingerbread, lychee and toffee Serving suggestions: Perfect for classic, spirit-forward cocktails such as the Old Fashioned. Production: Rums matured separately for 3 to 7 years in American Whiskey casks. Final blend finished for 6 months in deeply charred Bourbon casks. ABV 43%

name: Mount Gay Rum 35cl - Half Bottle
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 35cl - Half Bottle Distilled in Barbados, this expression from Mount Gay was named for the 'double phenomenon' of a total solar eclipse and the passage of Halley's comet in 1910.

name: Mount Gay Rum Eclipse 70cl
description: Flagship Mount Gay Rum named and launched after the cosmic and historic 1910 total solar eclipse phenomenon, which occurred side by side the Halley’s comet passage. Eclipse is a blend of two molasses distillates (pot still and column rums), combined and aged in bourbon barrels. Distinct golden amber hue with perfect clarity - an excellent sign of purity Pungent aroma with hints of toffee and creamy vanilla along with dried apricot undertones and more aggressive and pronounced black pepper scents, balanced out by faint citrus and peppermint wafts Great for those who enjoy a dry palate, enhanced by black pepper and caramel flavours. A rich butterscotch taste rises over more citrusy flavours, along with ginger, vanilla, and spearmint tastes

name: Mount Gay XO Triple Cask Blend Reserve Rum 70cl - Boxed
description: ABV 43% Size: 70cl Mount Gay XO, the first XO in the rum category, is a small-batch blend of carefully selected mature rums. It is distilled in traditional copper pot and column stills and matured between 5 to 17 years in American whiskey, Bourbon and Cognac casks. This outstanding Barbadian rum is aged in thee different woods before being blended to the new Master Blender Trudiann Branker's specification, Notes of clove, salted caramel, baked fig and dark chocolate. Enjoy on the rocks.

It's enjoyable as a replacement for gin in a G&T or as an addition to a glass of prosecco.

name: Mumm Cordon Rouge Brut Champagne 75cl
description: ABV 12% G.H. Mumm Champagne Cordon Rouge Brut is a fresh, golden yellow colour with hints of jade, the wine’s abundant bubbles, both fine and elegant, demonstrate the finesse of Mumm’s Cordon Rouge Champagne. On the nose, aromas of lemon and grapefruit, combined with the richness of firm, fleshy fruits such as white peaches, apricots and tart apples bring freshness and liveliness to the wine. These are followed by hints of vanilla, enriched with caramel. Honeyed nuts also play their part. The bubbles are rich on the palate, but never overpowering. The perfect balance is combined with a rounded, full vinosity. The mix of fresh fruit and caramel aromas give even more intensity to the finish. This is a subtly balanced wine with a remarkable capacity to linger in the mouth. Country: France Grape Variety: Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, Pinot Meunier ABV: 12% Bottle Size: 75cl Vegetarian friendly Vegan friendly

name: Negroni Cocktail Bundle
description: A brilliant bundle for Negroni lovers! Keep it classic with Bathtub Gin, Campari, and Martini Rosso, and a tasty saving too. This Bundle Includes: - Campari 70cl - Martini 75cl - Bathtub Gin 70cl Method: You can follow this simple 1:1:1 recipe for classic aperitifs! 25ml of each liqueur: 1. Pour the gin, vermouth and Campari into a mixing glass or jug with ice. 2. Stir well until the outside of the glass feels cold. 3. Strain into a tumbler and add 1 large ice sphere or some fresh ice, and garnish with an orange slice, using a blood orange when in season. The Negroni is one of our favourite cocktails, and we're sure that isn't something unique to us here at MoM Towers – people across the globe adore this astounding aperitif. If you fancy putting together your own Negroni cocktails at home, whether you're intrigued by the outpouring of emotion for them in this bottling note, or you're already part of the Negroni faithful, we've got a brilliant bundle here that will let you add the three fantastic ingredients you'll need to your basket in one swift click, and save you some money in the process! This bundle contains a classic pair of ingredients – namely Campari and Martini Rosso – as well as the multi-award-winning Bathtub Gin, superb for some magnificent Negroni deliciousness.

name: Neptune Rum Barbados Gold 70 cl
description: Alc Vol:40% Size: 70cl NEPTUNE RUM BARBADOS GOLD ( 40 % vol). THE WORLDS MOST AWARDED RUM OF 2018/19 Over 65 global awards and rising, a beautiful golden pot and column still rum, with a blend of 8, 5 and 3 year old rum. ONLY NATURAL INGREDIENTS Neptune Rum Barbados Gold contains no sugars or chemicals, the velvety smoothness of Neptune Rum is a result of the top-secret final stage of the proprietary process. EXCEPTIONAL QUALITY Our Multi-Award-Winning Gold Barbados Rum is distilled and aged at the celebrated family-owned Foursquare Rum Distillery set within a former 17th-century sugarcane plantation at the southern end of the island of Barbados. VERSATILE A beautifully smooth pot and column stilled rum that’s been lovingly aged in American bourbon oak casks is a blend of 3, 5 and 8-year-old aged rums. BEAUTIFULLY BALANCED With nuances of apricot, banana and coconut overlaid with soft hints of honey and vanilla. Neptune rum can be enjoyed on it’s own or in your favourite cocktail. name: Never Never Dark Series Black Juniper Amaro 50cl
description: Size - 50cl ABV - 29% Australia's Never Never Distilling Co. teamed up with Australian cocktail bar Black Pearl to create this fantastic Black Juniper Amaro! With a hefty helping of juniper at its core, supported by a host of traditional amaro ingredients bringing the familiar rich, rootsy bitterness, this is intense stuff, perfect for enjoying after a hearty meal. Black Juniper Amaro is the latest edition of our Dark Series and is a collaboration with Black Pearl, one of Australia’s greatest cocktail bars. We have always been massive fans of what the Black Pearl represents. The bartenders that have graced the boards of the Pearl are some of the most respected and talented hospitality professionals in the country. The amaro combines three different juniper components: roasted juniper, basket juniper and fresh juniper, all steeped in neutral spirit and then hand-pressed to extract maximum flavour. By heavily roasting the juniper we are able to extract dark and earthy characteristics from the berry adding bitterness and a slight menthol note to the final amaro blend. Traditional alpine herbs such as gentian and wormwood develop bitterness and length, creating layers of complexity. Each ingredient has been selected not only for flavour, but for their digestif properties, making it perfectly suited to the after-dinner occasion, mixed with cola or in a classic cocktail. – Never Never Distilling Co.

name: Never Never Distilling Co Triple Juniper - 50cl
description: ABV - 43% Size - 50cl Gin may be typically associated with the UK, but there are now many producers around the world who are putting their own spin on things by creating exciting expressions that reflect their local heritage and provenance. Australia’s Never Never Distilling Company, based in the south of the country, is known for its innovative production methods. Described as a “modern classic”, Never Never Triple Juniper Gin undergoes three distillation processes using copious amounts of juniper. First, juniper is steeped in alcohol for around 24 hours before the liquid, plus fresh juniper, is added to the pot still, with extra quantities of juniper added to the vapour basket. Suggested serves: Quinine-rich tonic waters should be used in G&Ts, and herbal garnishes work well. Never Never Triple Juniper also forms a great base for a Red Snapper, which is essentially a Bloody Mary made with gin instead of vodka. Tasting Notes A bold aroma of juicy juniper and zesty citrus, along with earthy cooked thyme. The palate opens with earthy juniper and black pepper, while a deliciously oily texture coats the palate. Hints of orange zest, honey and oak follow. Very rounded and integrated flavours from start to finish.

name: Never Never Ginache Gin 50cl
description: Size - 50cl ABV - 38% Premium Grenache Gin Bursting With Red Berry Flavour. Bright, Vibrant and Delicious, Ginache was named Australia's Best Flavoured Gin in 2022.

name: Never Never Juniper Freak Gin 50cl
description: Size - 50cl ABV - 58% A lot of juniper goes into making the Never Never Distilling Co.'s Juniper Freak Gin (as is only fair when you pick a name like that). It's a navy strength gin that features a base of Triple Juniper Gin, made with juniper steeped in the spirit, redistilled with fresh juniper and with juniper in the still's vapour basket. But as if that wasn't enough, the Australian distillers blend a pure juniper distillate made with Macedonian juniper into the mix!

name: Never Never Southern Strength Gin 50cl
description: ABV - 52% Size - 50cl This overproof London Dry gin comes in at a powerful 52% ABV. Just 5% short of being a Navy Strength gin, it doesn’t hold back on flavour! You’ll experience a strong, juniper-driven journey from the nose to the palate, with warming notes of pine and mellow angelica. I love the tingling peppery feeling and citrus and cinnamon flavours that dance in your mouth after the first sip. Never Never Southern Strength was, quite simply, created by bartenders to be enjoyed at any occasion that calls for a gin-based cocktail! Its strong juniper and citrus-forward notes offers beginners the opportunity to explore more robust flavours in classics such as G&Ts and Martinis, and also make it a loyal ingredient for expert gin drinkers and bartenders to mix into more complex cocktails.

name: Newcastle Brown Ale 12x550ml
description: Alternating hints of nuts and caramel give Newcastle Brown Ale a smooth, slightly sweet, and deeply satisfying taste. It’s brewed with a signature blend of dark caramel and pale malt to achieve a distinct colour and flavour. First brewed in 1927 in Newcastle-upon-Tyne! An iconic English brown ale, often described as the “favoured beer” of North East England Chocolatey notes with moderate bitterness Strong malty centre Medium mouthfeel with some carbonation Pairs deliciously with grilled fish, pork dishes, sausages, and roasted chicken Also great with nutty hard cheeses such as young Comte or aged Gouda Stands up to spicy Indian and Thai dishes

name: Niel Joubert Chenin Blanc 2015 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 13% Size: 75cl A crisp and vibrant fruit-forward dry white with flavours of tropical citrus, passion fruit and guavas. This flavoursome wine is named after the late Niel Joubert’s faithful dog Byter (pronounced ‘Baiter’). Byter was always by Niel’s side as he whizzed around his estate, tending to the vines and checking the grape in the valleys of the Simonsberg Mountain. This Niel Joubert Byter Chenin Blanc was names after Niel’s loyal and gentle dog. Packed with fresh, ripe tropical notes on the nose with delightful mingle of citrus, guava and granadilla. Ultra smooth across the palate with a nicely balanced lively tingle.

name: Niel Joubert Patrysbult Pinotage 2014 75cl
description: ABV 13.5% Size 75cl Winery - Niel Joubert Grapes - Pinotage Region - South Africa / Western Cape Niel Joubert Patrysbult Pinotage - This Pinotage is medium-bodied and silky-textured with oodles of soft dark fruit and finely balanced tannins. name: Nikka Coffey Grain Whisky
description: Size - 70cl ABV - 45% Using the two Coffey stills at the Miyagikyo distillery, which were imported from Scotland to Japan in 1963, Nikka have produced a number of single cask single grain whiskies from time to time over the years. This, however, is their larger release of wonderfully exotic grain whisky. Now in a 70cl bottle! Hooray! Nose Bourbon-like vanilla and corn notes with a herbal hint of chamomile. Palate Sweet, fruity flavours of melon, grapefruit and thick syrup, balanced by crunchy biscuits and fresh vanilla. Finish The corn notes, sweet and vibrant, last on the finish. Overall Fans of grain whisky should be pretty happy with this, as well as bourbon lovers.

name: Ninefold Cask Aged Rum 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 45% Size: 70cl Cask No: #46 An IWSC Gold Award-winning single cask Scottish rum, double pot-distilled from scratch in Dumfries & Galloway, and matured for in American oak standard barrels. Luxurious and unique, each cask is slightly different for a subtly new experience each time we bottle. Tasting notes: sweet, butterscotch, caramel, toffee, chocolate, oak, vanilla, coconut and banana. Cask #46 Cask: New American Oak, American Standard Barrel Filled: 3rd February 2023 Fill proof: 63.4% Disgorged: 21st October 2024 Age: 1yr 8months Disgorge proof: 62.5% Angel’s share (annual): 4.1%

name: Ninefold Experimental Cask Editions Overproof Rum 62.3% 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 62.3% Size: 70cl Limited to 238 bottles. Ninefold Distillery's fourth experimental single cask release, casked on Christmas Eve 2021 in ex-Oloroso Sherry octaves that were previously used to mature Scotch whisky. Non chill filtered, no added sugar or no artificial colours added. Some cask sediment may be present. Our semi-regular one-off single cask releases at cask strength, showcasing the variety of rums and maturation at Ninefold. Since pretty much all of our maturation is experimental to a degree, and we like to play with rum recipes for ageing, each release is a unique and delicious offering. Long-term fans of Ninefold have their favourite ‘ECE’ release - do you know yours? Experimental Cask Edition #4 is our latest ECE release. A heady and intense ‘sherry bomb’ or a rum, that definitely appeals to the whisky drinker! Our core Pure Single Rum marque, matured for 2 years and 9 months exclusively in 60 litre Oloroso casks. Bottled at cask strength of 62.3%, and limited to 238 bottles. EDITION #4 Wood: Oloroso sherry (all), Glenrothes whisky (#19 & #20), Benriach whisky (#21) Size: Octave (65 litres) Filled: 24th December 2021 Fill proof: 63.8% Fill volume: 197 litres, total Disgorged: 17th September 2024 Age: 2 years 9 months Disgorge proof: 62.2-62.4% Angel’s share (annual avg.): 4.78-5.31% Bottling proof: 62.3% Bottles released: 238 Release date: 3rd October 2024 Heather honey, roses, banana, toffee, chocolate… what flavours will you find? Awarded Gold and Style Winner at the 2025 World Rum Awards, and Silver in the 2024 Scottish Rum Awards. Enjoy neat - it’s way more drinkable than you’d imagine - or with coke and a squeeze of lime. Perfect with pineapple (4 parts pineapple to rum), or you could try with coconut water to complement the flavours of the rum.

description: Introducing the Ninja Swirl by CREAMi 13-in-1 Soft Serve & Ice Cream Maker. Featuring Soft Serve Creamify Technology, turn almost anything into ice cream, soft serve and more. Simply freeze ingredients for 24 hours, select a function, process and enjoy! Enjoy CREAMi classics such as Ice Cream, Sorbet and Mix-In. Or create the perfect swirl with 6 soft serve programs. Create four ice cream cones for family or friends using a single tub*. (*Using ice cream cones.) And discover the new CreamiFit mode that can help you make protein-packed treats under 150 kcal**. (**Per 120ml serving excl. cone and toppings, using 9 CreamiFit recipes included. ) 13 frozen treat programs From scoops to swirls, the choice is yours with 13 functions, including 6 soft serve modes, 6 Scoop modes and the Mix-In function, so you can customise your scoopable creations. Soft Serve Creamify technology Swirl’s robust motor drives the Creamerizer Paddle, powering through frozen ingredients to create indulgently creamy ice creams to silky-smooth soft serve. Soft Serve Handle with 3 speeds Enjoy better control when serving soft serve creations. Simply pull the lever towards yourself to select a speed for the perfect swirled cone or sundae. CreamiFit Use protein shakes or protein mixes to create a delicious frozen treat. Choose from Soft Serve or Scoop. Frozen treats, your way Customise your ice cream, soft serve and frozen treats to suit your lifestyle - from dairy free to vegan. Easy to clean All removeable parts including the Swirl Tubs, Creamerizer Paddle, Outer Bowl and lids. Included in the box Motor Base, 2x 480ml Swirl Tubs with Nozzles & Lids, Dispensing Lid, Outer Bowl & Lid, Creamerizer Paddle, Drip Tray & Recipe Inspiration Guide.

name: Ninja Luxe Café Premier Bean to Cup Coffee Machine, ES601UK
description: Ninja Luxe Cafe Premier Bean to Cup Coffee Machine ES601UK Meet Luxe Café Premier, the bean-to-cup Ninja coffee machine that helps you make barista-quality drinks in minutes. This versatile 3-in-1 espresso, cold brew and filter coffee machine takes the guesswork out of coffee and includes a built-in grinder for extra convenience. Create a range of delicious café favourites, from flat whites to espresso martinis with ease. Prefer a hands-on approach? Experiment with 25 grind settings, master micro foam and latte art. And whether you’re a coffee newbie or barista in training, the hardest part will be choosing which one you'll indulge in first. Discover the all-in-one coffee machine that does the job of three coffee making tools: Espresso machine: Create espresso shots to enjoy on their own or as a base for a cappuccino, latte or Americano. Filter coffee machine: Perfectly balanced brews with a choice of Classic, Rich, Over Ice and drink size settings including 175ml to 530ml. Cold Brew maker: Indulge in fast cold brew and cold pressed coffee – perfect for making iced coffee drinks or espresso martinis. name: Ninja Slushi FS301UK Frozen Drink Maker, Arctic Blue Grey
description: Enjoy one-touch frozen drinks with the Ninja SLUSHi. No ice needed, no sharp blades, and no blending; simply pour, slush, and enjoy. From frozen fruit juice to cool coffee shop-inspired frappés, mocktails, and cocktails, Ninja SLUSHi has got you covered—super simple to use and easy to clean. Full-on flavour No added ice means no watering down, so you can enjoy full-flavour frozen drinks. Freezes fast and stays frozen Rapid Chill Technology can transform your liquid into thirst-quenching slush in as little as 30 minutes*—staying frozen for up to 12 hours** Five pre-sets for all your favourites Serving a silky-smooth milkshake or mixing a classic-cool frozen margarita needs the right consistency and temperature control. Ninja SLUSHi lets you create the perfect frozen drink at the press of a button, with five presets – Slush, Frozen Cocktail, Frappé, Milkshake, Frozen Juice – and temperature control, so you’re prepared for every occasion. Slush: turns your favourite beverages into fabulous frozen slush Frozen Cocktail: for beverages with alcohol content, to create frozen cocktails including margaritas and strawberry daiquiris Frappé: to make cool, coffee shop-inspired frozen frappés Milkshake: for dairy, or plant-based alternatives, to create creamier-based beverages, and marvellous milkshakes Frozen Juice: for naturally sweetened fruit juices, to make super smoothies Frozen fun for all your friends and family An Easy-Fill vessel with a 2.5L*** capacity means that your frozen drinks can keep on flowing, making up to 7+ servings**** per batch Quietly Cool Ninja SLUSHi comes with a WhisperChill compressor, which quietly keeps your treats at the perfect frozen temperature and texture, without disturbing everyone. *Creating drinks can take up to 15–60 minutes depending on ingredients, volume, and starting temperature. Must include sugar.

name: No.3 London Dry Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 46% Vol Size: 70cl Winning Flavour : We've won 'World's Best Gin' four times at the International Spirits Challenge and awarded the Platinum Medal at the San Francisco World Spirits competition, only awarded to Spirits who have won a double gold medal 3 years in a row. No. 3 London Dry Gin is distilled to a proprietary recipe of London's oldest wine and spirit merchant. The name No. 3 refers to its address in St James's Street in London. name: Ocho Single Estate Reposado Tequila Vintage 2024 50cl
description: ABV 40% Size 50cl TEQUILA - OCHO - Vintage 2024 - Reposado - Tierras Negras - 40% Tequila Ocho is made in Mexico . The brand was founded in 2008 by Carlos Camarena (a 5th-generation farmer and 3rd-generation Tequilero) and Tomas Estes, the man responsible for bringing tequila culture to Europe. Each bottle of Tequila Ocho showcases a unique terroir and is made from the Weber blue agave plant. Each lot comes from a different field, or "Rancho," with its own regional characteristics. Located in the community of "La Parada" (the stopping place) in the municipality of San Ignacio Cerro Gordo, this historic site was a 17th-century horse-changing station for travelers moving between haciendas. Although it was used exclusively for cattle grazing, this is the first time agave was planted and harvested in this field. This mostly flat terrain has a slight slope toward the east and is composed of stones, cactus, huizache, and other desert shrubs. The clayey, gray color of the soil gives this field its name, "Mirandillas ." The Reposado is aged for 8 weeks and 8 days in American oak barrels that previously held whiskey. Nose – Rich fruits, soft vanilla, butterscotch Palate – Plum, White Pepper, toffee, creme brulee and almonds.

name: Old J Admiral Vernons Tiki Fire 151 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 75.5% Size: 70cl In 1740, Admiral Edward Vernon enforced a reduction on the strength of navy rum. When his men complained, he suggested the introduction of limes and sugar to make the drink more enjoyable. Admiral's Old J Tiki Fire Rum redresses the strength reduction by increasing the volume to 151 proof. This spiced rum is rich and sweet, rounded out with a whack of vanilla. Comes pretty close to the original flavour of the last generation - definitely a must-try. Vibrant palate A blast of Persian lime, classic rum, and vanilla Well-rounded on the tongue, with limey goodness cutting through spice and toffee Smooth and sweet vanilla finish Delicious by itself over ice You can also splash it in a summer cocktail Mix with ice, ginger beer, or coke Serve with lime wedges Inspired by mixologist Admiral Vernon's original recipe for the British Navy - a perfect melange of lime, a dash of sugar, and delicious rum

name: Old J Collection Rum 5cl Miniatures - Set of 6
description: Alc Vol: 35%/40% Size: 5cl Miniature In 1740 Admiral Edward Vernon enforced a reduction in the strength of the British navy's rum ration. Old J has been created in honour of this unlikely mixologist. Set contains: 1 x 5cl Old J Pineapple Rum - 35% ABV 1 x 5cl Old J Coconut Rum - 35% ABV 1 x 5cl Old J Dark Spiced Rum - 40% ABV 1 x 5cl Old J Tiki Fire Rum - 75.5% ABV 1 x 5cl Old J Cherry Rum - 35% ABV 1 x 5cl Old J Silver Spiced Rum - 35% ABV Old J Pineapple infuses our special blend of 11 flavours into the finest Caribbean rum. The sweet kick of refreshing pineapple cuts through subtle hints of vanilla, creating a totally tropical all year round drinking experience. Old J Coconut is a blend of Caribbean rum and fragrant coconut crafted for those who want to expand their catalogue of flavours without leaving their comfort range of a familiar base spirit. Tasting notes include vanilla, brown sugar, and nutty coconut perfect for classic cocktails like the pina colada or mojito. Old J Dark Spiced submerges our aged Gold Rum into aphotic depths, creating a tempestuous flavour that can rock the boat or calm the waters. With prominent notes of salted caramel, coffee and spices - it is a dark and moody rum, whilst maintaining a splash of Admiral Vernon’s trademark vanilla and Persian lime. Old J Tiki Fire redresses the strength reduction by increasing the strength to 151 proof but keeps the same great tasting spices, lime and sugar to create a truly special rum. Old J Cherry Spiced Rum is made using the same recipe as the classic Gold Spiced, but it is infused with marasca cherries for extra fruitiness. Serve over ice with cola and you have a delicious cherry cola. Old J Silver Spiced Rum retains some of the main flavour notes of Old J original, keeping the smooth toffee, sweet lime and heady vanilla hit. However for Old J Silver, the heavy spicing of the other Old J styles have been toned right down to allow the more subtle un-aged white rum to shine. Old J Silver Spiced Rum will add an extra element to any white rum based cocktail.

name: Old J Dark Spiced 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Dark and moody spiced rum Notes of salted caramel and vanilla, The newest addition to the Old J collection, Old J Dark Spiced Rum. Boasting fantastic vanilla notes and aphotic spices, this is definitely one of the hottest new drinks on the market!

description: Alc Vol: 35% Size: 5cl Miniature In 1740 Admiral Edward Vernon enforced a reduction in the strength of the British navy's rum ration. name: Old J Silver Spiced Rum 5cl Miniature
description: Alc Vol: 35% Size: 5cl Miniature A miniature serving of the world’s first spiced white rum. An unaged rum blended with the classic Old J blend of spices, sweet vanilla and Persian lime, this is a far more flavourful sip than your average white rum. Here’s a first – a world first, in fact – Old J Silver is the first ever spiced white rum! An unaged rum blended with the classic Old J blend of spices, sweet vanilla and Persian lime, this is a far more flavourful sip than your average white rum. Where the classic taste of Old J Spice is present, this is a more toned-down version of the Old J flavour profile which blends perfectly for summer rum cocktails. Want to make more than one cocktail with Old J Silver? Grab yourself a 70cl bottle. Perfect Serve – This miniature serving is ideal to try in a classic rum cocktail – add to your next Mai Tai or Mojito for a blast of vanilla and lime.

Well-rounded and fruity, but still very much a spice rum (not a cherry liqueur) Works brilliantly in all kinds of cocktails, especially cherry cola 70 proof A blend of Marasca cherries and 11 other flavours A fine Caribbean rum inspired by the original 1740 recipe by Admiral Edward Vernon, who needed to come up with an enjoyable rum recipe upon reducing the British navy's alcohol ration One of six spiced rums in Admiral Vernon's line, launched alongside Gold Spiced Rum

name: Old J Spiced Rum 5cl Miniature
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 5cl Miniature A miniature serving of Admiral Vernon’s Old J Gold Spiced, a premium aged rum flavoured with sweet vanilla & Persian lime Winner – Bronze Award – Spiced Rum – World Rum Awards 2020 A miniature serving of Admiral Vernon’s Old J Gold Spiced. A premium edition of the original Old J Spiced, Gold is blended from rums sourced from the British Virgin Islands distilled in a single pot still, blended with exotic vanilla and Persian lime and then matured for up to three years. The resulting sip is the classic Old J taste with a depth of aged rum flavour which has reaped a whole bunch of awards for this sweet and spicy rum. Sounds like something you want to try more than once? We also sell this premium rum in a 70cl Bottle. Perfect Serve – This is the perfect rum for tropical punch cocktails, blend with exotic fruit juice and a touch of sweet grenadine.

description: Alc Vol: 75.5% Size: 12 x 5cl Miniature Tiki Fire is Old J’s overproof expression – bottled at an intense 75.5% ABV (151 proof) to give your rum cocktails a super-fiery kick! A blend of spices, vanilla, brown sugar and dried Persian lime peels, Old J Tiki Fire keeps the classic flavour of Old J and turns up the intensity. As the name suggests, this is the perfect rum for adding a fiery twist to your favourite tiki cocktails such as the Mai Tai, Zombie and Hurricane. Old J was created in honour of this unlikely mixologist who was known as 'Old Grog'. Old J Tiki Fire redresses the strength reduction by increasing the strength to 151 proof but keeps the same great tasting spices, lime and sugar to create a truly special rum. The intense fiery kick hidden within this beautiful rum also makes it a perfect party shot – just make sure you stick to one – this is strong stuff! Want more for your next tiki cocktail party? We Also have 70cl Bottles Available Perfect Serve – Use Tiki Fire in your next Zombie or Mai Tai for a cool tiki cocktail with a fiery punch.

name: Old Monk Coffee XO 70cl - NEW
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Known for its classic rum, Old Monk has now released a coffee-flavored version called “XO Extra Ordinary.” Old Monk Coffee Rum is a bold and unique fusion of dark rum infused with rich coffee flavours. This smooth and aromatic rum offers notes of roasted coffee beans, caramel, and a hint of chocolate, creating a deep, warming finish. Ideal for sipping neat, over ice, or in creative cocktails, Old Monk Coffee Rum is perfect for those who enjoy a rich and flavourful rum experience with a twist of coffee. Rich coffee aromas lead into notes of caramel, toffee and dark chocolate. Made by Mohan Meakin in India, this molasses-based rum is infused with coffee for added depth of character. Try it over ice or poured into an Espresso Martini. Tasting notes Indulge in a captivating aroma of roasted coffee beans balanced with warm caramel and subtle spice. On the palate, experience layers of dark chocolate, molasses, and a creamy coffee finish with a touch of oak.

name: Old Monk Gold Reserve 12 Year Old Rum 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 42.8% Size: 75cl The Gold Reserve has been aged for a minimum of 12 years in oak and offers a softer and more sophisticated take on its popular younger seven-year-old sibling. On the palate, this Indian rum displays notes of spicy cinnamon, clove and dark chocolate that work well over ice or mixed in a cocktail.

name: Old Monk Indian Rum 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl A 7 year old rum imported from India. Old Monk commonly known as 'OMR' is a vatted Indian dark rum, launched in 1954. It is blended and aged for a minimum of 7 years. It is a dark and aromatic rum with a distinct vanilla flavour made from Indian grown cane sugar. Old Monk is usually mixed with any kind of dark cola, soda or water and often with a twist of lime. In India, Old Monk and water is a popular combination. Known as the Drink of Gods and Lords, Old Monk 7yo is a smooth, dark and aromatic rum Enjoy over rocks or in cocktails as the vanilla notes provide a well balanced palate

name: Old monk Spiced Extra Ordinary XO Spiced Rum 70cl - NEW
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Known for its classic rum, Old Monk has now released a Spiced-flavored version called “XO Extra Ordinary.” Old Monk Spiced XO Spiced Rum is a premium Indian rum known for its rich, smooth flavor. Expertly blended with select spices and aged to perfection, it offers deep notes of caramel, vanilla, and a hint of warm cinnamon. The rum’s velvety texture and balanced sweetness make it an ideal choice for sipping neat or mixing in cocktails. Old Monk XO Spiced Rum is a favorite among rum enthusiasts for its distinctive character and smooth finish. Perfect for any occasion, it delivers a luxurious experience with every sip, showcasing the best of Indian craftsmanship. Tasting notes Indulge in a captivating aroma of roasted coffee beans balanced with warm caramel and subtle spice. On the palate, experience layers of dark chocolate, molasses, and a creamy coffee finish with a touch of oak.

name: Old Monk The Legend Rum in Gift Box 1.00L (42.8% Vol.)

Distilled from molasses and aged approximately 12 years in Oak casks. This quirky bottle is shaped like the head of HG Meakin, a British brewing entrepreneur who moved to India in the late 1800s and founded the company that would go on to produce Old Monk. Smooth, aromatic and well-aged blended rum from the Old Monk range.

A fruity, alcohol-free number made of crisp apples and a mix of cherries and berries Translucent ‘sunset’ red, warm, sweet, and deep Serve over ice, with your choice of berries (strawberries and blueberries recommended) Vegan friendly, does not contain animal products / derivatives The bottle, glue and label are also animal-product-free Note: Ciders with less than 0.5% ABV are ‘alcohol free’; in the UK, all drinks between 0.05% and 0.5% ABV are classified as non-alcoholic.

Our famous beer, with its distinctive and delicious toffee-malt character, was first brewed in 1979 to celebrate the 50th anniversary of the iconic MG factory.

name: Old Speckled Hen PerfectDraft 6L Keg
description: Alc Vol: 4.8% Size: 6L Only to be used with Philips Perfect Draft dispensers Old Speckled Hen is a popular ale in the UK; in fact it’s the country’s best-selling premium ale! It was first brewed in 1979, to commemorate the 50th anniversary of the MG car factory in Abingdon, Oxfordshire, and named after ‘The Owld Speckl’d Un’ – the factory’s much-loved 1920s MG car, frequently seen running errands locally, resplendent in its remarkable black-and-silver-flecks paintwork. Old Speckled Hen is a tasty, superbly balanced beer. It has a copper appearance, distinctive toffee-malt aroma, and malty flavour, with lovely hints of caramel and a touch of fruit – with a palate-cleansing, bitter finish that makes it very drinkable. It pairs especially well with full-flavoured roasts, pies and posh burgers – and its rich malty flavour is the ideal match for a curry. Style: Pale Ale Country : Britain Brewery: Greene King ABV: 4.8% No. Servings per Keg: 10.5 6L Serving Temp: 7°C Price Per Pint £2.85

name: Opihr Gin European Edition Aromatic Bitters London Dry Gin 70cl
description: Size - 70cl ABV - 43% The European Edition blends fragrant myrrh and the distinct aromatic bitterness of cascarilla bark. Inspired by Venice’s 500+ year rich spice trade history and the Italian love affair with cascarilla bark used to create highly aromatic tonics, bitters and vermouths. This is a bold, savoury-led spiced London Dry gin with balanced bitter notes and mixes perfectly with sweet vermouth and Campari to create a spiced twist on a classic Negroni cocktail. While cascarilla bark is not native to Europe, it is present in any bitter liqueurs in the south of the continent and adds an aromatic and fragrant twist to OPIHR’s flavour profile. Aroma : A bold savoury-led gin with balanced burnt orange and bitter notes. It has smooth notes with mature rounded citrus and earthy finish. Taste : A smooth, rounded London Dry Gin; soft camphor balanced with sweet, smoky wood notes and a clean finish.

name: Opihr Oriental Spiced London Dry Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Opihr pronounced {o-peer} Opihr Spices of the Orient Gin is made using hand-picked ancient Spice Route botanicals, including Indonesian cubeb berries, Indian cardamom and Tellicherry black pepper and Moroccan coriander Opihr Gin is taking you on the journey along the Ancient Spice Route with hand-picked exotic botanicals such as cubeb berries from Malaysia, coriander from Morocco and cardamom from India. ABOUT Opihr Spices of the Orient Gin is made using hand-picked ancient Spice Route botanicals, including Indonesian cubeb berries, Indian cardamom and Tellicherry black pepper and Moroccan coriander CRAFT Created by gin aficionado Joanne Moore and produced by England's oldest distillers, makers of quality London Dry Gin since 1761 TASTE Opihr's characterful spiced gin exudes tropical and transcontinental flavours for a smooth, rich taste with bursts of exotic spices, balanced by zesty grapefruit peel ENJOY Serve poured over ice with your favourite tonic, with pineapple and lime for a Moroccan Mojito, or add cider and ginger for a spiced mulled punch

Made from natural spring water, subtle malts, the finest hops and… centuries of Dutch brewing expertise. Pure, refreshing and medium dry, with a mild malted barley flavour

name: Orchard Pig Reveller Medium Dry Cider 6L Perfectdraft Keg
description: Vol: 4.5% Size: 6L Orchard Pig Reveller is a true celebration of the West Country! Using 100% West Country bittersweet apples, it’s absolutely packed with the aroma and flavour of apples. It perfectly balances bitter sweet with bitter sharp to create a crisp, refreshing cider to be enjoyed year round. “More apples, less bubbles” is the ethos of Orchard Pig, so Reveller is a gently sparkling cider with lower carbonation than other ciders on the market. The reason for this is to create a more consistent pint. One that doesn’t lose that initial fizz as you enjoy it. It also makes it perfect for food pairing as less gas means more room for grub! On the pour you will see a lightly sparkling, golden cider without the usual head you would find on a pint of beer. You will be able to smell the apples as soon as you start pouring and the taste finishes with a lime tanginess. This product is for use with Perfectdraft Beer Dispensers only and cannot be used on its own. Please check the compatibility of your beer pump . ABV: 4.5% Size: 6L Serving Temp: 3°C We are currently in the process of transitioning to our new Orchard Pig sleeves in 2025. Until then, Orchard Pig kegs will carry the old design. Rest assured, the cider inside is freshly brewed and up to our high-quality standard.

name: Orchard Thieves Apple 8L Blade Keg
description: This crafty cider is excitingly sour rather than sweet and extremely refreshing. It has been specially crafted from the perfect mix of crisp and tart apples, harvested in Herefordshire, to deliver an strong fruity taste that is perfect for enjoying in the sun. Orchard Thieves Cider is naturally gluten-free, so try it for yourself on home draught today. FOR USE IN BLADE BEER SYSTEM ONLY. ABV: 4.5% AROMA: Super refreshing with a sharp, fast finish. FLAVOUR: Red apple, hint of cinnamon with a scrumpy nose. MOUTHFEEL: Sharp cooking apple with touch of nutmeg. FINISH: Tart apple. FOOD MATCH: Venison sausages. Allergen Information: Sulphur Dioxide/Sulphites This item is now available for Next Day Delivery.

name: Origin Arezzo London Dry Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 46% Size: 70cl Origin London Dry Gin Arezzo Italy 70cl is produced using only one botanical, Juniper, sourced solely from the region of Arezzo in Tuscany, Italy. Using Juniper from one location allows the discerning consumer to explore the effects of terroir, on the development of the juniper berries, and the unique and subtle flavours and aromas that this imparts. Origin distillation is conducted at room-temperature under vacuum. this stops the more complex organic molecules in the juniper being destroyed by heat, and allows every facet of this wonderful botanical's flavour to be retained in the final distillate. In this expession, clean citrus and pine with a really smooth creaminess on the finish. Amazingly long. This is a very enjoyable Gin and Arezzo produce some of the best Juniper berries in the world, making this a very good addition to any Gin or drinks collection. Accolades RUNNER-UP, WORLD GIN AWARDS 2014 GOLD, THE GIN MASTERS 2014 (18 + 1)
