name: Ouzo 12 Greek Aniseed Liqueur 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 38% Size:70cl In 1880, Greeks who loved the real taste of Ouzo, preferred the special Ouzo produced at the most renowned distillery of the time and stored in the barrel with the number 12. Thus Ouzo 12 was born. To this day, only the finest herbs and seeds are harmoniously blended using the same secret recipe and then double distilled to ensure the exquisite aroma of an Ouzo loved by generations of Greeks. Enjoy Ouzo 12 the Greek way: on ice or chilled with water as a refreshing aperitif.

name: Oyster Bay Malborough Sauvignon Blanc 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 12.5% Size: 75cl Country: New Zealand Grape: Sauvignon Blanc Oyster Bay captures the special character of New Zealand's cool climate viticulture... elegant, assertive wines with glorious fruit flavours. Stunningly aromatic tropical fruits and bright citrus notes, with a refreshingly zesty finish

name: Oyster Bay Pinot Noir 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 13.5% Size: 75cl Region: Marlborough, New Zealand Grape: Pinot Noir Fragrant dark cherry with juicy black plum, elegant and silky

name: Oyster Bay Sparkling Cuvée Brut 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 12.5% Size: 75cl Region: Marlborough, New Zealand Grape: Chardonnay Elegant, assertive wines with glorious fruit flavours

name: Paddy Irish Whiskey 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Blended to perfection with triple distilled pot still, malt and grain whiskeys and matured for many years in oak casks, Paddy is a soft and light Irish whiskey with a sweet, malty finish. With a rich heritage dating back to 1779, Paddy® owes its name to the legendary distillery salesman, Paddy Flaherty. Famed throughout his native county Cork for buying rounds of his favourite tipple, he became so synonymous with the whiskey he sold, that in 1913 the distillery owners paid him the ultimate tribute by renaming the whiskey 'Paddy' in his honour. 2019 World Whiskies Awards Bronze 2018 Silver (Irish Blends Standard) International Challenger Tasting Notes One taste of Paddy will reveal the mild, distinctive cereal maltiness, and delicately sweet floral flavours with subtle background notes of spiced vanilla and butterscotch. The finish is gentle, spicy, and dry with more mellow malts, black pepper and a lingering woodiness reminiscent of its time in oak

name: Padre Azul Super Premium Anejo 70cl
description: Size: 70cl Alc Vol: 40% "Padre Añejo" refers to Padre Azul Añejo Tequila, a premium, double-distilled tequila made from 100% Blue Weber agave, aged for at least 18 months in oak barrels. Known for its smooth, complex profile with notes of caramel, chocolate, vanilla, and dried fruit, it is presented in a distinctive bottle with a leather jacket and skull-shaped stopper, reflecting Mexican culture. Our Añejo is aged for 18 months in oak barrels. this gives the spirit a complex and balanced profile. Vanilla paired with caramel and chocolate. elevate your sipping experience with this bottle! Imagine an evening with dear friends, laughter, and the world put to rights—all complemented by a sip of this exceptional tequila. Aged over 18 months in oak bourbon barrels, This Añejo unveils a complexity and smoothness like no other. With hints of vanilla, chocolate, caramelized nuts, and cinnamon, it’s the perfect finale for a convivial night. More than a drink, it’s the soulful touch that completes your memorable moments. Cheers to the extraordinary!

name: Pago Fruit Juice Branded Glass
description: The Pago fruit juice glass . Pago natural fruit juices for mixing or pure.

name: Pallini Lemoncello Liqueur 50cl
description: Alc Vol: 26% Size: 50cl Pallini Limoncello is a natural liqueur that has been crafted by the Pallini family in Italy since 1875. Made from prised non-pesticide Sfusato Amalfitano lemons, which translates to the “Amalfi spindle" , referring to their unique shape. exclusive to the Amalfi coast. The handpicked lemons are infused immediately, so their freshness and flavour is delivered in every bottle. Its versatility is almost endless. The final liqueur is lightly colour stabilized for consistency before bottling. Enjoy it neat, on the rocks, straight from the fridge, or mixed into cocktails and food recipes. For a crisp and authentic taste of Italy, none can compare! GMO Free Gluten Free Kosher

name: Papa Salt Coastal Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 42% Size: 70cl Reminiscent of slow n’ salty days, Papa Salt is an easy-drinking gin made for sharing. The goal was simple – complement any soda, taste great with tonic, and make a mean martini. Fifty nine recipes, and many joy filled sunny afternoons of gin tasting later, we present you with Papa Salt. Papa Salt is an easy-drinking gin that celebrates the subtle taste of native Australian botanicals. Flavours are brightened with hibiscus and citrus peel—all wrapped up with subtle hints of nutty wattleseed, the zing of ginger and an unmistakable minerality from a hint of oyster shell. Yes, there’s a lot to it, but in the end we hope you notice just how easy it is to drink. Have it long or short, this gin was made for session-able drinking — our go-to is Papa Salt with soda, lots of ice and a wedge of fresh orange.

name: Para Dos Malbec 75cl
description: Grapes : 100% Malbec ABV : 13% Style : Full-bodied Region: Argentina, San Juan The translation of Para Dos is “for two”. Whether you are sharing a bottle with your lover or friend you will be sure to keep the Para Dos spirit alive. Argentina stands for this classic red grape with most evident notes of dark forest berries; a red wine with great potential and taste sensation. Like most good Malbecs, this Argentinian Red goes perfectly with steak and red meat, preferably consumed in front of an open fire...bliss. But it is also a vegetarian Malbec so if red meat is not your thing, that should not stop you enjoying Para Dos. Pair it with your vegetarian dish of choice and it will not disappoint. Suitable for Vegetarians

name: Para Dos Malbec Reserva 75cl
description: Grapes : 100% Malbec ABV : 14% Style : Full-bodied Region: Argentina, San Juan Para Dos - or 'for two' - is a superb little Argentinian Malbec meant for sharing. The grapes are carefully selected from the best terraces in the San Juan area, Argentina. The wine has aromas of spice and black pepper with undertones of chocolate and cherry characters. A soft easy drinking wine which, nonetheless, carries a punch. It is well balanced with a good length and long finish. The ripe and rounded tannins allow for a soft and young approach which pleases every time. Like most good Malbecs, this Argentinian Red goes perfectly with steak and red meat, preferably consumed in front of an open fire...bliss. But it is also a vegetarian Malbec so if red meat is not your thing, that should not stop you enjoying Para Dos. Pair it with your vegetarian dish of choice and it will not disappoint. Suitable for Vegetarians

name: Pasquier Desvignes Beaujolais 2017 75cl
description: ABV 12.5% Size - 75cl Vintage: 2017 Grape: 100% Gamay. Location: the heart of Beaujolais, close to Villefranche-sur-Saône. Soil: clay-limestone & silt. Colour: beautiful cherry red color with small red-brick reflections . Bouquet: fine and fruity with hints of small red fruits. Body: smooth and light, lively, very pleasant with a lingering fruity finish. Wine & Dine: delicatessen, roast pork, poultry. Serving Temperature: 12-14°C. Gastronomy - The wine is ideal for feeding with grilled poultry or beef.

name: Passoa Liqueur 70cl
description: Passoa is a passionfruit flavoured liqueur made with natural passionfruit. It is the essential ingredient to make a Passoa Star Martini, a new classic cocktail, and has been a fundamental feature in bars all over the world since 1986. Recently becoming the ultimate item to make and create delicious cocktails at home. The bottle is bold and black and features the star of the show...the passionfruit! The liquid is luscious red and reveals tangy and zesty flavours that invigorate the palate. Passoa can be used in a number of cocktails or with a mixer for those who enjoy the sweeter things in life. Enjoy! The essential ingredient for a Passoa Star Martini with the delicious flavour of passion fruit.

name: Pastures Irish Country Cream 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 12% Size: 70cl A smooth blend of fresh cream with white wine & aged Irish whiskey Pastures is a smooth blend of fresh Irish dairy cream, white wine and a delicate hint of Irish whiskey. It's delicious taste is best enjoyed either straight, chilled, on the rocks or in coffee. For that special treat, try Pastures poured over your favourite ice cream.. Produced and bottled in the home of the original Irish blend - an authentic Irish product A great after-dinner drink with a lovely, smooth, creamy, and light flavour, finishing off with a surprising kick right at the end Delightful on the nose and heavenly in the mouth An excellent low-priced substitute to leading brands that works amazingly with coffee For that special treat, try Pastures poured over your favourite ice cream

name: Paterson's Grove Merlot 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 13% Size: 75cl Country: New Zealand Taste Category: C - Medium Smooth and fruity Merlot from the Hawke's Bay region of New Zealand's North Island, with flavours of dark cherries and plum lifted by subtle spices Serving Suggestion: Best served at room temperature, this wine is an ideal pairing for lamb, pan-fried duck or hearty casseroles

name: Paterson's Grove Reserve Sauvignon Blanc Marlborough 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 13% Size: 75cl Country: New Zealand Taste Category: Dry - 1 Vibrant Sauvignon Blanc from the Marlborough region of New Zealand's South Island. Powerful and aromatic: zesty gooseberry and passion fruit flavours with bright acidity Serving Suggestion: Best served chilled, this wine is a perfect aperitif or ideal accompaniment to grilled fsh lightly spiced cuisine and colourful salads with herbs and greens

name: Paterson's Grove Rosé 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 12.5% Size: 75cl Country: New Zealand Taste Category: Dry - 1 Pale and refreshing rosé from the East Coast region of New Zealand, with flavours of strawberries and red currant balanced by hints of citrus and stone fruit for a long refreshing finish. Serving Suggestion: Best served chilled, this wine is a perfect aperitif or ideal with smoked salmon, salads, or light fruity desserts

name: Patersons Grove Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 12.5% Size: 75cl Powerful and aromatic : zesty gooseberry and passion fruit flavours with a bright acidity Best served chilled, this wine is a perfect aperitif or ideal accompaniment to grilled fish, Asian cuisine and colourful salads with herbs and greens.

name: Patriarche 2015 Macon Blanc Villages White Wine 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 13% Size: 75cl Produced in the Maconnais in southern Burgundy, this wine is well balanced and fleshy. An aromatic wine sporting fruity flavours. For over 230 years, Patriarche have created quality wines accessible to all, for sharing unique moments of discovery and taste sensations for all occasions, whilst pursuing the work started by Jean-Baptiste Patriarche back in 1780.

name: Patriarche Merlot 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 14% Size: 75cl Country: France Region: Languedoc Roussillon Grape variety: Merlot Great example of Merlot, black fruit aromas with a hint of plums, silky flavours that are well-rounded with good tannins and great length

name: Patriarche Viognier 75cl
description: Bottle size: 75cl ABV: 13% Country: France Grape: Viognier Region: Languedoc-Roussillon Suitable for Vegetarians, Suitable for Vegans This superb wine has bags of exotic fruit aromas. Goes great with fish salads

name: Patron Anejo Tequila 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Hand-crafted Tequila made in small batches in Jalisco, Mexico, and aged for over 12 months in a combination of French oak, Hungarian oak and American whiskey barrels. This elegant tequila is made with 100% Weber Blue Agave. Great gift idea.

name: Patron El Cielo Premium Silver Tequila 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl The ultimate silver tequila. PATRÓN EL CIELO is the first-ever four-times-distilled silver tequila made using a unique distillation process that unlocks the subtly sweet flavours of agave while achieving an undeniably light, ultra-smooth finish. Handcrafted from the highest-quality ingredients, the top-shelf tequila offers unparalleled flavour in every drop. THE TASTE OF RADIANCE Enjoy the bright and complex aroma of sweet cooked agave, orange rind, cinnamon and a hint of vanilla that comes with PATRÓN EL CIELO. With its incomparable taste and ultra-smooth, long-lasting finish, this luxury tequila is perfect for any occasion. Great gift idea.

name: Patron Silver Tequila 5cl Miniature
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 5cl Miniature Light, fresh and exquisitely balanced, Patron Silver Tequila is the House’s classic release available in a miniature. It’s soft and citrusy, with notes of pineapple, lavender and gingerbread, a whisper of white chocolate and a crack of black pepper. The brand’s un-aged release, Patron Silver Tequila is a blend of two triple-distilled tequilas to create a crystal-clear party spirit that’s light, fresh and exquisitely balanced. It’s fresh and citrusy in aroma, with notes of fresh pineapple, lavender and a hint of spiced cinnamon giving way to reveal a warming palate of muscovado sugar and gingerbread, with a whisper of white chocolate and marzipan, and a cool crack of black pepper. A pure, clean, and refined tequila, with a delicately fruity profile and a long, savoury finish.

name: Patrón Tequila Citronge 70cl
description: ABV 35% Produced in the highlands of Jalisco, Mexico, crafted from 100% Weber Blue Agave. Meticulously handcrafted in small batches, resulting in a refined orange liqueur offering a sweet and fresh Orange flavour.

name: Patron XO Cafe Coffee Liqueur with Tequila 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 35% Size: 70cl Coffee Liqueur made with Tequila Patrón XO Cafe is a dry, low-proof coffee liqueur that's a blend of Patrón Silver Tequila and the essence of fine coffee. It's excellent for sipping, mixed in cocktails or as a dessert ingredient. Made with 100% Weber Blue Agave and handcrafted in small batches Tasting Notes The coffee and tequila in Patrón XO Cafe come together to produce an "Xtra Ordinary" dark, rich brown spirit, with an aroma and taste of fresh coffee balanced with vanilla notes. The finish is smooth, yet dry

name: Paul John Nirvana Single Malt Whisky 70cl
description: Alv Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Paul John NIRVANA raising the Bar with its 22nd Win in just 6 years! Nirvana proudly wins a Silver Medal in the Single Malt Category at the prestigious Spirit Selection CMB 2023 A captivating expression from the Goan shores of India, the Nirvana arouses the senses with a soft whiff of bourbon, fruitcake and an enticing caramel pudding. The honeycomb sweetness gently touches the palate with a mild salt-tinged barley while the succulent vanilla heralds the honeyed finish of this rich copper whisky, assuring sublime experiences beyond the worldly realm. Nose: An attractive honeycombed bourbon with luscious fruitcake, with a light whiff of enticing caramel pudding. Taste: A delightful soft honey with a slight salt-edged barley; an excellent mouthfeel with honeycomb sweetness. Finish: Immensely long, and richly flavoured with dissolving honey, barley, and succulent vanilla. Balance: A joyous barley plays intricately with high quality oak, that offers a dash of true goan pleasure! Colour: Deep Copper.

name: Paul Langier Champagne Brut 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 12.5 Size: 75cl Toasty and rich, yet balanced with an invigorating seam of freshness, this proved itself a very smart buy. Paul Langier is a stylish brut Champagne offering ripe fruit notes with a classic biscuity finish. A careful blend of Pinot Noir, Pinot Meunier and Chardonnay grapes come together to produce this outstanding cuvée. Suitable for Vegans Suitable for Vegetarians Taste Category: 1 - Very dry Serving Suggestion: Serve chilled

name: Peacock Apple Cider 12x500ml
description: Alc Vol: 4.8% Size: 12 x 500ml Bottles This elegant and easy-to-drink cider offers an interesting layer of flavours but is not too complex. Delicious with Asian food! It is expertly brewed from a combination of fresh-pressed bittersweet and culinary apples-perfect for casual meals and for toasting any special occasion. Clean, nice aroma of fresh apples and faint hints of cut grass Crowd-pleasing flavour—your guests will love it High carbonation adds a lot of bite to this dry cider Dry finish, leaving flavours of cooked apple on the tongue Refreshing, pairs well with Indian food and other spicy Asian dishes Fantastic with curry The name and design of the label is inspired by the peacock—India’s national bird and a symbol of love in China

name: Peacock Mango & Lime Cider 12 x 500ml Bottle
description: Alc Vol: 4.0% Size: 12 x 500ml Try this lively melange of exotic fruits from Asia for that burst of tropical refreshment! Soft and sweet, it stands up to rich and spicy dishes. The saccharinity of the mangoes is perfectly balanced by the tanginess of limes. An exciting new cider variant that’s quickly becoming a best-seller The perfect way to wash down Indian dishes and spicy Asian recipes—great for tempering the heat of chillies and bringing out the flavours of exotic spices Wonderful with curry, paneer pakora, and other favourites Developed by Kingfisher and Aspall Clean, light bodied, medium dry Mango and lime flavours linger on tongue, dry finish Easy drinking, always refreshing

name: Peacock Passion Fruit & Guava 12 x 500ml- NEW
description: Alc Vol: 4.0% Size: 12 x 500ml Tasting : Luscious passion fruit is perfectly balanced by the smooth sweetness of ripe guava Aroma: Exotic tropical notes with hints of passion fruit and soft guava Peacock Passion Fruit & Guava is bright, tropical and fun, and is a flavour that feels like summer all year-round. The passion fruit brings a tangy punch, while guava adds smooth, mellow sweetness for a juicy, exotic taste. The flavour combination feels bold and on trend, with passion fruit being a particular favourite among younger drinkers seeking flavour-led ciders.

name: Pedigree 'Cricket' Pint (14)
description: Pedigree Pint Glass Official England Cricket Team Pint Glass European Central Bank Pedigree Pint Glass England Cricket Team Pint Beer Glass (Box 13/14)

name: Pedigree Amber Ale Bottles 8x500ml
description: Alc Vol: 4.5% Size: 8 x 500ml Bottle Introducing Pedigree, or "P" as it was first known. Strange that, looking back. Anyway, it has a fascinating aroma, with a palate of biscuity malt, spicy hops and light fruitiness. It was renamed in a staff competition back in George Peard's day. He was our Head Brewer at the time - that's him on the front. Cheers George. A classic premium Amber ale brewed using British malt and hop varieties “Brewed in wood” Average carbonation, medium body Goes well with pork pies, darker meats, mash, sausages, and Sunday roast Best served lightly chilled, poured with care so that the natural yeast sediment stays in the bottle 41 million pints sold yearly

name: Pellegrino Marsala Superiore Garabaldi Dolce 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 18% Size: 75cl Country: Italy The perfect after-dinner wine, ideal with dark chocolate desserts. Also suitable for vegans. Description White Italian Wine Cantine Pellegrino is one of Sicily´s most important and prosperous wineries. Today they are one of very few families who can trace their lineage back to the original 19th Century founders of the Marsala trade. This Marsala is produced from a blend of local indigenous grapes and is made in a classic sweet style and aged in oak casks for at least 2 years. Sweet, fresh and fruity, with hints of black cherry, pomegranate and plum. Pleasing aromas of honey and dried figs.

name: Penderyn Single Malt Welsh Whiskey Madeira Finished 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 46% ABV, Size: 70cl This whisky is the original Penderyn ‘house style’, aged in ex-bourbon barrels and finished in ex-Madeira wine casks to bring out its full gold character. A 46% single malt of some refinement, Penderyn Madeira Finish goes down with a pleasing dash of sweetness. Before finishing in wine casks, this Welsh whisky spent serious time in bourbon barrels while the sands of time worked their magic. Penderyn Single Malt has a light fruitiness, generous flavour and a subtle complexity. Our unique stills produce a spirit of extraordinary strength and purity. This is married with water from the Brecon Beacons National Park and matured in the finest ex-bourbon barrels, and finished in hand selected ex-Madeira wine casks. Non chill filtered No Colour Added At a generous 46% ABV,

name: Penderyn Single Malt Welsh Whisky - Legend 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 41% Size: 70cl Aromas of fresh apples and citrus fruits intermingle with cream fudge and sultana raisins in the nose to create a complex yet fresh, clean and well-balanced whisky. In the mouth this single malt whisky is incredibly smooth and both fresh and rich dried fruits abound. Delicate and sweet on the palate with just a hint of bitterness to remain refreshing then slowly this Penderyn presents a long finish leaving an aftertaste of Madeira cake and sultanas. Non chill filtered, No colour added

name: PerfectDraft Kopparberg Strawberry & Lime Draft System Starter Bundle  - Black
description: Say hello to the most streamlined at-home beer dispenser ever. The PerfectDraft Black Machine boasts all our essential features like 12-hour cooling and serving at 3°C with simplicity and ease of use at the heart of a revamped design. With a sleek, matte black finish PerfectDraft Black is a stylish blend of form and function. Kopparberg Strawberry and Lime 6L Keg From the first drink of the afternoon to the last drink of the evening, Kopparberg’s famous fruit ciders bring flavour and refreshment to every occasion. And now you can enjoy the ice-cold, crisp taste of Kopparberg’s draught cider at home. Strawberry & Lime pairs the sweet flavours of fresh strawberry with a subtle taste of tangy lime, making the perfect drink to enjoy with BBQs and meals. Refreshing and delicious, it’s the ultimate summer pour. PerfectDraft Black Machine Features: Maintains the quality of your beer for 30 days, staying fresh and carbonated Cooled to a constant 3°C for the ultimate at-home beer experience Clear LED indicators for when your beer is chilled and when you're running low All PerfectDraft Machines are protected by a 2 year manufacturers warranty. Product Specifications The PerfectDraft Black Machine measures approximately 37.6cm (height) x 26cm (width) x 34.6cm (depth not including drip tray). It weighs approximately 8.16kg What's included: 1 x PerfectDraft Black Machine 1 x PerfectDraft Kopparberg Strawberry and Lime Cider 6L Keg 2 x Kopparberg 500ml Glasses Pack NEXT DAY DELIVERY AVAILABLE ON THIS PRODUCT

name: PerfectDraft Kopparberg Strawberry and Lime Cider Starter Bundle
description: Introducing PerfectDraft® Pro Kopparberg Strawberry and Lime Cider Beer Pump Dispenser Starter Bundle. The ultimate home beer experience - fully connected and app controlled The PerfectDraft® Pro machine - the perfect pour just got smarter. PerfectDraft® Pro brings the ultimate beer experience to your home with game-changing features including variable temperature control from 0°C - 12°C, app connectivity, fast cooling, a smoother pour, and improved temperature stability on the warmest of days. Download the PerfectDraft App Through the PerfectDraft app, PerfectDraft ® Pro gives you total control to serve the perfect pour. All from the palm of your hand. Manage all aspects of your machine, from changing the temperature and monitoring keg levels to getting the latest machine performance improvements over the air and receiving essential notifications. 40kW. 6 litres/25 cup capacity. Variable temperature. Removable drip tray. Energy saving. Size H44, W28, D40cm. Weight 10.05kg. Manufacturer's 2 year frame guarantee. Bundle Contains: 1 x PerfectDraft® Pro machine 1 x 6lt Kopparberg Strawberry and Lime Cider Keg 2 x Branded Kopparberg Glasses

name: PerfectDraft Peroni Draft System Starter Bundle  - Black
description: Say hello to the most streamlined at-home beer dispenser ever. The PerfectDraft Black Machine boasts all our essential features like 12-hour cooling and serving at 3°C with simplicity and ease of use at the heart of a revamped design. With a sleek, matte black finish PerfectDraft Black is a stylish blend of form and function. name: Perla Mocna 24 x 500ml Cans
description: Alc Vol:7.1% Size: 24x500ml Perfect for beer lovers with higher alcohol content What makes it so special? Clearly perceptible bitterness, specific hop flavor and amber color. name: Pernod Absinthe Supérieure 70 cl
description: Alc Vol: 68% Size: 70cl Pernod Absinthe is created using plant extracts including Grand Wormwood, Anise and Fennel. Produced using a time-honoured recipe, Pernod Absinthe is arguably the most authentic absinthe available The great Pontarlier absinth and anise are distilled after maceration in wine alcohol. The best of the high quality distillate is then macerated again. It includes anise, grand wormwood, petit wormwood, hyssop, and melissa, which provides anise, musk and herbaceous tasting notes. Pernod Absinthe contains no artificial dyes or sugar with the ideal serve being the traditional ritual of ice water cascading over a sugar cube. It is also the perfect ingredient to elevate a cocktail for any occasion.

name: Pernod Aniseed Liqueur 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl The oldest anise liqueur in France, Pernod is made from distillates of star anise, fennel and 14 other botanicals such as coriander and mint. It has a low liquorice content, which sets it apart from pastis. The original version included wormwood and was produced as absinthe at the Pernod Fils factory from 1805.

name: Perry’s Tot Navy Strength Gin 70cl
description: ABV - 57% Size - 70cl Perry’s Tot – Navy Strength Gin Perry’s Tot is an American Navy Strength gin made by the New York Distilling Company in Williamsburg, Brooklyn. It was named for Matthew Calbraith Perry, a Commandant of the Brooklyn Navy Yard in the 1840s, who later achieved the prestigious rank of Commodore. As a notable New York naval figure, he was the obvious choice for the New York Distilling Company to name a Navy Strength gin after. At 57% ABV, if this delicious American gin were to spill over some gunpowder, it would still ignite due to science. Yes, science! However, we recommend pouring it over ice or into cocktails (like a Gimlet, perhaps) rather than over gunpowder. It’ll likely taste better that way.

name: Pickering's Gin with Scottish Botanicals 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 42% Size - 70cl The Official Gin of the Royal Edinburgh Military Tattoo. Pickering's Gin with Scottish Botanicals is distilled with four indigenous Scottish botanicals- heather, milk thistle, bog myrtle and Scots Pine which lend sweet, earthy and floral notes to their Bombay recipe, for a smooth and stirring spirit. This complex Gin has been wowing crowds and collecting medals since it was released back in 2017 as The Official Gin of the Royal Edinburgh Military Tattoo. We re-released it in 2020 in a larger bottle size and with more environmentally sensitive label design. True to form, it bears the official Royal Edinburgh Military Tattoo tartan which celebrates the entwined colours of the Armed Forces- The Army, Navy and the RAF.

name: Pierre Brevin Rose D'Anjou French Rose Wine 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 11% Size: 75cl Wine of France. Rose French Wine Situated to the south of Angers, the "Angevin" vineyards stretch from the hillsides along the Loire river to the north of the Deux Sèvres and Vienne departments. The region produces Rose wines that are at once tender, full, fresh and mouth-watering. Here, Pierre Brevin has come up with Rose d' Anjou dominated by freshness, a pale pink colour and fruity bouquet. FOOD PAIRINGS You can enjoy this wine as an aperitif or with delicatessen, mixed salads or a strawberry tart dessert. name: Piper Heidsieck Cuvee Brut Champagne 20cl
description: Size: 20cl ABV 12% Piper-Heidsieck is a luxury champagne house founded in 1785 in Reims, France by Florens-Louis Heidsieck. Piper-Heidsieck is one of Champagne's most well-known yet underestimated houses. From being a favourite of Marilyn Monroe (who claimed she liked a glass to wake up in the morning) to being the first ever bottle of Champagne to feature in a movie (the 1933 Laurel and Hardy film ‘Sons of the Desert'), it has long links to the world of cinema. This signature cuvée of the House is a round and vibrant non-vintage Cuvée Brut, recalling the rich variety of its blend of 100 crus from across the patchwork of Champagne vineyards, located throughout Montagne de Reims, Côte des Blancs, Aube and Vallée de la Marne. The resulting wine is pale golden in colour. On the nose, there are intense notes of almonds and fresh hazelnuts, with flavours of fresh pear and apple with a delicate hint of citrus. It is lively and light with added depth from the Pinot Noir, creating beautiful balance.

name: Piper Heidsieck Cuvee Brut Champagne 75cl
description: Size: 75cl ABV 12% Piper-Heidsieck is a luxury champagne house founded in 1785 in Reims, France by Florens-Louis Heidsieck. Piper-Heidsieck is one of Champagne's most well-known yet underestimated houses. From being a favourite of Marilyn Monroe (who claimed she liked a glass to wake up in the morning) to being the first ever bottle of Champagne to feature in a movie (the 1933 Laurel and Hardy film ‘Sons of the Desert'), it has long links to the world of cinema. This signature cuvée of the House is a round and vibrant non-vintage Cuvée Brut, recalling the rich variety of its blend of 100 crus from across the patchwork of Champagne vineyards, located throughout Montagne de Reims, Côte des Blancs, Aube and Vallée de la Marne. The resulting wine is pale golden in colour. On the nose, there are intense notes of almonds and fresh hazelnuts, with flavours of fresh pear and apple with a delicate hint of citrus. It is lively and light with added depth from the Pinot Noir, creating beautiful balance.

name: Piper-Heidsieck Cuvee Brut Champagne 75cl
description: ABV 12% VOL 75cl The classy gold trimmed, purple labelling of Piper’s Cuvée Sublime is a bit of a rare find on the local Champagne shelf Hailing from one of the Champagne’s oldest producers, this bottle of Piper-Heidsieck Champagne Cuvée Sublime Demi-Sec NV is definitely something special. If you’re looking for a Champagne with a bit of a sweeter side, then this is the bottle for you. Piper Heidsieck has been the Champagne of choice for nobility and celebrities alike such as Marie Antoinette, Marilyn Monroe and Jean Paul-Gaultier. If it’s good enough for them, then I guess you should probably have a taste! Piper-Heidsieck is one of Champagne's most well-known yet underestimated houses. From being a favourite of Marilyn Monroe (who claimed she liked a glass to wake up in the morning) to being the first ever bottle of Champagne to feature in a movie (the 1933 Laurel and Hardy film ‘Sons of the Desert'), it has long links to the world of cinema. You may be wondering how a demi-sec Champagne differs from other ones? Well, basically, once the wine has undergone primary and secondary fermentation, a dosage is added before the cork and cage are put on the bottle. This dosage consists of reserve wine and a bit of sugar. The amount of sugar added depends upon the intended sweetness level of the final wine. For example, a Brut (or dry) Champagne has about 0-12g/L of sugar added, while a demi-sec has around 33-50g/L or sugar added. This demi-sec Champagne has had 33g/L of sugar added. Made from a combination of Pinot Noir (structure), Pinot Meunier (fruit flavours) and Chardonnay (elegance), this Piper-Heidsieck Champagne Cuvée Sublime is filled with tropical pineapple, ripe juicy pear notes, indulgent vanilla and a bit of toasty brioche. To further enhance this beautiful medley, a crisp acidity is enhanced by a vibrant, uplifting effervescence that carries the flavours on a lengthy, indulgent, yet subtly sweet finish. This is an award winning Champagne with endless bubbles, fabulous flavours and a sensational level of sweetness that will bring out the best in any celebration!

description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl AN ODE TO THE BEAUTY OF THE FIJI ISLANDS From the pristine lagoons to the lush jungles, Plantation Isle of Fiji is an ode to the beauty ofthe Fiji Islands. This delicious rum is made using traditional techniques and local Fijian sugar cane. First aged in this tropical climate in bourbon casks, the rum is then sailed to the southwest of France for a second maturation in French oak casks. This double ageing method paired with Fijian know-how creates a rum with warm notes of exotic fruits and raisin TASTING NOTES Color : Gold. Nose : Intense, it starts on molasses, pear and varnish. It then becomes fruitier and spicier on apple, banana and gooseberry, also nutmeg and vanilla with a hint of smoke. Palate : Rich and round, it follows the nose with vanilla fudge, honey, ginger and fruity notes of prune and coconut. Finish : Very long on dried banana, bourbon and allspice.

description: Alc Vol: 41.2% Size: 70cl Plymouth Gin is an award-winning gin distilled using the same blend of seven exotic botanicals, soft Dartmoor water and pure grain alcohol since 1793. Plymouth gin is ideally served with Fever-Tree Aromatic Tonic over ice with a twist of lemon. Alternatively, savour its smooth taste in a classic cocktail. Serving suggestion: Nose: Rich, fresh aroma of juniper, followed by notes of coriander and cardamom. Palate: Extremely smooth, creamy and full bodied, with a slight sweetness. description: Alc Vol: 26% Size: 70cl Plymouth has been making this gin for more than 130 years. Crafted by steeping sloe berries in Plymouth Gin before blending it with Dartmouth water Best enjoyed chilled over ice, or if preferred, simple neat Works well in cocktails, too With a mesmerising fruity aroma of mellow sloe berries, a slight fragrance of almonds and notes of sweet cherry Full-bodied, smooth, and fruity, perfectly balanced with a dry and sweet taste Fruity, fresh, and long finish

name: Pocketful of Stones Dandelion & Burdock Gin  70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl THE MODERN CLASSIC First discovered by St. Thomas Aquinas in 1265 by divine intervention, Dandelion and Burdock is a proven flavour combination that has stood the test of time. We’ve taken fresh north country dandelion blooms and wild-foraged Burdock and carefully distilled them with our favourite combination of botanicals to create a smooth, contemporary gin built on the backbone of British tradition. The Darling of the North. Dandelion and Burdock is a favourite flavour combination. We’ve taken the earthy flavours of the roots of these botanicals and distilled them with locally foraged heather, honeybush to add a floral lift and cola nut and almond to bind the flavours with orris root to add length. A classic dry gin when served with tonic water, but if you’re after that old school northern fish and chip shop Dandelion and Burdock serve with ginger ale / or D&B soda. Our favourite cocktail with this gin is the bramble. The sweetness from the blackberry liqueur perfectly balances the earthy notes of the D&B roots and cola nut.

name: Portobello Road London Dry Gin No 171 70cl
description: Alc Vol : 42% Size: 70cl A gin that’s born in Portobello Star, a Notting Hill bar where the ‘Ginstitute’ is. Undoubtedly good, old-style London dry gin with traditional spices and botanicals that make it a classic and timeless drink. Portobello Road No. 171 epitomises the classic gins of the yesteryears With aromas of heavy berries and hot white pepper, with a lot of juniper Delicious, with properly integrated spice and a healthy dose of juniper A hint of red berries can be perceived from the soft lemon grass flavour The finish is a fresh and dry yet cleansing citrus A good, no-nonsense gin that can easily become a bar staple and a crowd-pleaser at parties

name: Portobello Road Navy Strength Gin 50cl
description: ABV - 57.1% Size - 50cl Navy Strength is bottled with an impressive 57.1% alcohol by volume and is a more powerful and tasty version of 171 London Dry Gin. The gin is distilled with English grown wheat and Portobello Road Gins characteristic recipe of nine excellent botanicals: juniper, coriander seeds, angelica root, iris root, lemon zest, liquorice root, cassia bark and nutmeg. At the end of the distillation process, a small amount of English sea salt is added, resulting in a subtle yet distinct taste. A portion of the proceeds from online sales will be donated to charities working in the field of marine conservation.Tasting notes:Color: Clear. Nose: Fresh, juniper. Taste: Intense, citrus, notes of lemon, bitter orange, coriander. Finish: Long lasting, pepper, liquorice, nutmeg.

name: Portobello Road Temperance Spirit 70 cl
description: Alc Vol : 4.2% Size: 70cl Our Temperance Spirit is a lower-alcohol choice for those who want to moderate their alcohol intake without losing the flavour of gin! Using the same botanicals as the Portobello Road Gin, the Temperance has a well-balanced flavour of warm botanicals, juniper and citruses. Use this spirit as a replacement for any gin cocktail for a less boozy way of enjoying a good drink. Tasting Notes Nose: Intensely aromatic with bold notes of juniper, cinnamon and citrus, reminiscent of gin but not entirely representative of it, a suggestion of citrus, and the mildest hint of grass and wildflowers. Palate: Instantly weighty, with viscosity and a pleasant acidic sharpness, in the mouth the citrus, floral, and particularly the winter spice notes are more pronounced than the nose would suggest, they eventually give way to juniper and pepper. Finish: The flavour lives long on the palate and lingers seductively in the nose, even twenty, thirty seconds after a sip is taken the flavours and characteristics bounce around the palate, as the flavour eventually subside, mouth-watering, salivating sensations persevere.

name: Pothecary Organic Gin 50cl
description: ABV - 44.8% Size - 50cl Pothecary Gin was created with a passion for organic, handcrafted, artisan produce. After many months of research, and tasting, Martin Jennings elected to use the less common process of distilling each botanical separately, and then blending them together before dilution, which yields incomparable, high quality aromas and flavours, creating an exciting gin that’s both well- balanced and refreshingly individual. Pothecary Gin hails from Dorset and includes unusual botanicals including lavender, mulberries and Polish tilia flowers. A herbal and very floral gin. Organic lavender from Provence Wild juniper from Bulgaria Organic black mulberries from Anatolia Organic lemons from Sicily Wild foraged tilia flowers from Poland Nose: Thyme honey and lavender. Soft orange, with a touch of white chocolate. Palate: Spicy juniper at the fore, followed by raspberries and plenty of floral freshness. Finish: Mouthwatering citrus, sherbet and more juicy raspberry.

name: Powers Gold Label Distiller's Cut Irish Whiskey 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 43.2% Size: 70cl This is the original expression of powers Irish whiskey. A process of passion poured into every bottle. A distinctive bold flavour awaits. “Powers Gold Label Distiller's Cut is an Irish Whiskey, cut from the heart of the distillate. That means more top and tail gets thrown away than any other Irish whiskey. Left to mature in selected American oak casks, this is where the spicy, bold character takes hold. A complex and honeyed taste is yours for the taking.” Triple Distilled Bold Flavour from the Heart Non Chill Filtered Full Flavour Gold Liquid, Bold Character, Precious Centre Cut

name: Premium Gin Selection 3x5cl
description: Premium Gin Selection Martin Miller's Gin Alc. 40% vol. Sipsmith Gin Alc. 41.6% vol. Portobello Road Gin Alc. 42% vol. Martin Miller's Gin 2 UK Units per bottle Sipsmith Gin: 2.1 UK Units per bottle Portobello Road Gin: 2.1 UK Units per bottle

The taste of the wine is light, very juicy, fruity - herbal. A beautiful companion for the evening and with the company. Suitable for vegetarians Vegan

Taste: Peaches, pears, strawberries and raspberries, with excellent acidity and minerality. Food Suggestions: Shellfish, Salmon, chicken and light appraisers or fish appetizers.

name: Project Halcyon London Dry Gin 50cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Project Halcyon London Dry Gin is born from the enchanting allure of our clandestine, award-winning cocktail bar where opulence meets innovation, reflecting the essence of our state-of-the-art distillery - But based in Manchester!. Set in the vibrant heart of one of the world's greatest cities, Manchester. Project Halcyon Distillery resides in the basement of a historic bonded warehouse, once home to the world-famous Granada TV studios.Immersed in the ambience of a bygone era's secret warehouse blues bar, this location adds a unique charm to our creation. This exquisite dry gin echoes the spirit of our hidden haven, embodying the fusion of classic charm and contemporary creativity that defines both our corner of the world and the city of Manchester. Showing London how a dry gin is really done!

name: Proper No. Twelve Blended Irish Apple Whiskey 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 35% Size: 70cl You already know what Proper No. Twelve Irish Whiskey tastes like. Now imagine award-winning Proper No. Twelve Irish Whiskey with notes of crisp and fresh Irish Apple. Conor McGregor is back with a new release in the Proper No. Twelve Irish Whiskey range. Created to showcase his passion for his home country, Ireland and his love for Irish Whiskey. Proper No. Twelve Apple takes their award-winning triple distilled Irish whiskey with the crisp, tangy flavour of Apple. Enjoy sweet notes of toasted oak and toffee apples on the nose Leading into a smooth, well-balanced palate of stewing apples, honey and more integrated oak The finish is rich and creamy with notes of brown sugar, more stewed apples and a lingering level of oak Proper No. 12 Apple Whiskey is delicious by itself or add to a cloudy lemonade or ginger ale for a refreshing long drink. For every bottle sold, Conor McGregor and the team are proud to donate to first responders around the world Why are you still standing around? Try it neat, over ice, in a cocktail or a straight shot

name: Proper Twelve Irish Whiskey 70cl
description: 40% VOL Size: 70cl Launched in 2018, Proper No. Twelve is a blended Irish whiskey produced by former UFC lightweight and featherweight champion, Conor McGregor. Crafted with the help of former Bushmills distillery manager David Elder, this expression is triple distilled at one of Ireland's oldest distilleries and matured in ex-bourbon barrels before being bottled at 40% abv. Proper No. Twelve is named in homage to McGregor's hometown, Crumlin, located in the Dublin 12 area. The nose has vanilla pod, floral barley and woody notes. The palate brings fruity apple and honey, followed by a kick of white pepper. The finish brings a toasted oak heat with some soft caramel.

name: Prosan Plus Purple Beer Line Cleaner - 5L

name: Prosecco D.O.C. Extra Dry Millesimato Decastello
description: Size - 75cl ABV - 11% Immediate, aromatic and slightly savoury, Prosecco Extra Dry D.O.C. Dacastello is a versatile wine that knows how to perform at its best on every occasion. Its floral aroma, fine, persistent perlage and pleasant crispness make it the ideal wine to accompany an aperitif or a light meal, or to add a sparkle to the evening after dinner. Colour - Straw yellow with a fine, persistent perlage Bouquet - Delicate and floral Palate - Crisp, aromatic and slightly savoury Pairing - Ideal as an aperitif, it goes well with light meals and is excellent after dinner.

name: Prosecco DOC Vino Spumante Extra Dry, Chambord & Glass Gift Set
description: Product Information A delicious sparkler exploding with zesty lemon, pear and apple fruit flavours, the hint of sweetness is balanced by a refreshing, crisp acidity. A real treat for any day of the week. Preparation and Usage Serve chilled. Chambord Liqueur Kir Royale Recipe 1. Fill your flute glass with 3/4 prosecco. 2. Add 15ml chambord liqueur to your glass, and leave it to settle slightly. 3. Garnish with a raspberry or blackberry.

name: Prosecco Emotivo 75cl
description: An Italian sparkling wine which is aromatic and fresh with lemon, pear and apple flavours. Lively and crisp on the palate with a dry and refreshing finish.

name: Prosecco Emotivo Rose 75cl
description: A sparkling rose with soft strawberry aromas and a clean, refreshing finish.

name: Prosecco Simpatico DOC 75cl
description: Fruity aromas, smooth sparkling wine, Elegant fruity fragrances of apple and apricot. A smooth, fresh and well-balanced sparkling wine.

name: Prosecco Vino Spumante Extra Dry and Vanilla Scented Candle Gift Set
description: ABV - 10.5% A delicious sparkler exploding with zesty lemon, pear and apple fruit flavours, a hint of sweetness is balanced by a refreshing, crisp acidity. A real treat for any day of the week. Included also is a beautifully vanilla scented candle ideal to have whilst you drink! Perfect for gifts!

name: Puerto de Indias Strawberry Gin 70cl
description: It’s easy to fall in-love with this strawberry-flavoured gin from Puerto de Indias. Made in Seville using the freshest Spanish strawberries from Huelva, it’s exactly what you need to add a fruity touch to a gin and tonic. A trendy strawberry-flavoured gin that is here to stay Light and sweet Delicious, even on its own Transform classic cocktails with it! Best enjoyed over ice, with a wedge of lime and fresh strawberry slices, topped with high-quality tonic water Puerto de Indias is among the best-selling gins in Spain, selling 6 million bottles in 2018, making it one of the world’s top 10 gins

name: Pusser's Blue Label British Navy Rum 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl The Pusser's Rum collection has had a bit of a revamp. While their Blue Label is still made with the exact same blend of rums - a recipe from the Admiralty and the the tot given to sailors as their daily ration until Black Tot Day, 31 July 1970. It is now bottled at a lower strength 40% abv rather that 54.5% abv. The reasoning behind this, is it allows Pusser's to be distributed to Naval bases, where the maximum allowed strength is 40%. a classic British Navy style rum, inspired by the recipe used to produce If you're looking for the original 54.5% version, then fear not! It has now been rebranded as Pusser's' Gunpowder Proof' Black Label now available at 365drinks.co.uk

name: Pussers Gunpowder Proof Rum 54.5% ABV - 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 54.5% Size: 70cl Classic style British Navy rum, that takes its name from old naval rum rationing traditions, where in rum is distributed by a pusser or purser who would dispel complaints of a watered-down brew by wetting a small pinch of gunpowder along with the rum and lighting it. An ignited mixture is proof of a strong enough rum—which is never a question with the Pusser label. Clear with a dark copper-amber hue and burnished copper highlights Hints of pungent treacle, molasses, honey, toffee, oak, vanilla, nutmeg, cinnamon and ginger on the nose Full-bodied, rich taste with a blending of some strong and mellow flavours that linger on the mouth as a spicy, burnt caramel mouthfeel that dies down to more subtle prune and cold tea tastes Oak undertones provide the perfect balance of sweetness and structure to the peppery and spirity spice of this potent rum blend

name: QC Medium Sherry 1L
description: Alc Vol: 15% Size:1lt QC Medium is mellow in colour and a smooth, rounded taste - the ideal drink for relaxing at home. Full-bodied, balanced with sweetness, QC Medium is a superb fortified wine with a dark, rich body. To be enjoyed at its best, we recommend this QC Medium is served at room temperature

name: Ramsbury Single Estate Vodka 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 43% Size: 70cl The finest wheat, grown on our quintessential estate here in the ancient Wiltshire landscape. That’s at the heart of the unique flavour profile of our single estate vodka. Every bottle’s heritage is traceable back to its single field of origin. It’s crafted vodka with an English accent. Voted vodka of the year with the London Spirits Competition 2024. Our vodka is incredibly smooth with notes of dried fruits, cocoa and caramel. It features an elegant, medium-bodied texture with hints of dark chocolate, for a distinctive and enigmatic character full of surprises, leaving on a buttery and silky finish.

name: Rebel Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size; 70cl Rebel Straight Bourbon is a bold and flavourful whiskey that is sure to leave a lasting impression. The Rebel Distillery, located in Kentucky, carefully hand-selects the grains used in their mash bill to create a unique taste profile that is both smooth and spicy. Aged for a minimum of two years, Rebel Straight Bourbon is bottled at 80 proof and boasts a rich amber colour. Notes of vanilla and oak are prominent on the nose and palate, while a hint of caramel adds a touch of sweetness to the finish. Enjoy Rebel Straight Bourbon neat or mixed in your favourite cocktail.

name: Red Bonny Dark Rum 75 cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 75cl Red Bonny is a blend of rums from Guyana, aged for at least 3 years. It's named after Anne Bonny, a red-headed Irish woman and famous pirate who lived an extraordinary life full of adventure throughout the Caribbean, fighting and plundering alongside men as an equal back in the early 18th century. Try this rum with ginger beer and freshly squeezed lime juice for a Red & Bonny

name: Red Leg Vanilla Ginger & Pineapple Spiced Rum 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 37.5% Size: 70cl As rum lovers we simply wanted to craft the best tasting rum. We proudly created RedLeg, our award winning Caribbean spiced rum which we rest in oak barrels and infuse with Jamaican vanilla and ginger. For this special edition we've added caramelised pineapple in celebration of traditional hospitality and friendship in the Caribbean Redleg Caramalised Pineapple is a fun and vibrant drink, with sweet notes of pineapple and vanilla and Caribbean spices

name: Red Stripe - 50L Keg
description: Alc Vol: 4.7% Size: 11 Gall / 50lt / 88 Pints FITTING: SANKEY The icon that is Red Stripe is unique. Its crisp grain store character and subtle citrus notes make it stand out from the crowd as it carnivals across your tongue. AROMA: Very short with a hint of warmth and balanced bitterness. FLAVOUR: Grain store, straw and beansprouts. MOUTHFEEL: Fresh bread maltiness, very subtle lemon fruit. FINISH: Light and crisp. FOOD MATCH: BBQ white fish, prawn curry. Allergen information Contains Gluten: Barley

name: Red Stripe 8lt Blade Keg
description: ABV - 4.7% Size: 8lt This lager is great for summer nights and combines the freshness of Jamaican brewing with all the flavour of a traditional lager. Kick off your home draught journey with this cracking pint!

name: Red Stripe Bottles 12 x 660ml
description: ABV - 4.7% Size - 12 x 660ml The icon that is Red Stripe is unique. Its crisp grain store character and subtle citrus notes make it stand out from the crowd as it carnivals across your tongue. Red stripe has a soft taste without strong bitterness, this is a lighter lager that cuts well through big, bold flavours. The lack of bitterness complements sweet tastes of exotic fruit, such as mango or pineapple, and goes well with corn: all essential components in the traditional Jamaican cuisine.

name: Red Stripe Jamaican Lager Beer 440ml Cans
description: Red Stripe Jamaican Lager Beer Cans 440ml 4.7% ABV Since 1928, Red Stripe has embodied the spirit, rhythm and pulse of Jamaica and its people. Red Stipe is a refreshing amber lager from Jamaica, served in an iconic stubby bottle since 1928. Red Stripe is considered the world's effortlessly cool beer brand, and is a firm favourite of the likes of Kate Moss, Oasis, Jay-Z. Kaiser Chiefs gave Red Stripe a shout out in their song ‘What Did I Ever Give You', singing ‘Hold tight to your Red Stripe'! You can enjoy sipping on a Red Stripe at some of the best music events in the industry. The icon that is Red Stripe is unique. Its crisp grain store character and subtle citrus notes make it stand out from the crowd as it carnivals across your tongue Serve ice cold

description: Rekorderlig Mango & Raspberry Cider is an international fusion of Swedish pear cider, tropical mango and sharp raspberries. Sweet, zingy and uplifting. Vegan and gluten-free. Rekorderlig Mango & Raspberry Cider is a fresh fusion of homely pear Swedish cider, the purest spring water, sweet tropical mango, sharp juicy raspberries and just the right amount of citric zest. A cute pink drink with a drop-dead gorgeous flavour and an uplifting aftertaste. Vegan and gluten-free. Perfect Serve – Rekorderlig Mango & Raspberry Cider is best served chilled and with tons of ice.

description: Rekorderlig Pear Cider with Wild Berry flavouring. Pear Cider Blended with Wild Berries Made from Pure Swedish Spring Water Layer of Seasonal Berries Rekorderlig Wild Berries Cider is fresh and juicy with the flavour and fragrance of wild blueberries and raspberries. It is best served cold over ice and can be layered with raspberries and blueberries. Tasting Notes: Appearance -pale pink, mid carbonation Aroma -sweet berries, notes of raspberry and blueberry Taste -refreshing berries Mouthfeel - medium bodied Finish -fruity and sweet Chilled Rekorderlig Wild Berries Cider Beautifully Swedish Refreshment Our cider was first created in 1999 with the purest spring water from Vimmerby, Sweden, where it is still made today by Abro Bryggeri. From its humble Swedish roots, Rekorderlig has retained its dependable honesty to become a much-loved, fourth generation family-brewed cider. Rekorderlig continues to excite consumers in new countries while strongly maintaining its proud Swedish heritage and identity that sets it apart from others. Enjoyed by those who yearn for something refreshingly different, join Rekorderlig on a journey of exploration, innovation and invigoration. Rekorderlig is a registered trade mark of Abro Bryggeri. Pear cider blended with wild berries Made from pure Swedish spring water Gluten Free Suitable for Vegans Pack size: 500ML

name: Rémy Martin 1738 Accord Royal - 300th Anniversary Edition 70cl - In Gift Box
description: Alc Vol; 40% Size: 70cl A special commemorative edition of Rémy Martin 1738 Accord Royal Cognac , released to celebrate the revered Cognac house's 300th anniversary. The limited-edition 300th anniversary bottling of Remy 1738 Accord Royal is a symbol of history and a tribute to the savoir-faire and quality of Rémy Martin cognacs, which were already rewarded in 1738 by the King of France. Adorned with a special neck collar and gift tube, it'll make a splendid gift for anyone who enjoys a good glass of Cognac. The embodiment of traditional craftsmanship, 1738 Accord Royal is made from eaux-de-vie coming exclusively from the Fine Champagne region of Cognac and is traditionally distilled with the lees in small copper stills combined with a distinctive selection of eaux-de-vie aged in toasted barrels. Like all Rémy Martin cognacs, 1738 Accord Royal is harmonious, rich and long on the palate with generous notes of plum and fig marmalade rounded out by intense oaky notes of toffee and toasted bread. Exceptionally round with a creamy aftertaste and a concentration of nutty aromas, this is an excellent Cognac that boasts great quality.

name: Remy Martin 1738 Accord Royal Cognac 70cl
description: ABV 40% Size 70cl Remy Martin's 1738 Accord Royal Cognac was created to sit between their VSOP and XO. It is named in honour of the Accord Royal granted by King Louis XV to Rémy Martin in 1738, allowing the firm to use his land to plant vines. This is a rich and robust Cognac. Best enjoyed neat or with frozen grapes. For the ultimate pairing experience, compliment with a cheese platter or chocolate truffles on the side Tasting Notes Generous notes of plum and fig marmalade rounded out by intense oak notes of toffee & toasted bread. The mellowness of butterscotch; baked spices with hints of dark chocolate. Exceptionally round with a creamy aftertaste and a concentration of nutty aromas imparted by a careful blend of eaux-de-vie aged in toasted French oak casks

name: Rémy Martin Brandy XO, Cognac Fine Champagne, 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Ideal for gifting Limited edition Tasting notes: Rich fruity aromas, floral notes of jasmine Best enjoyed neat or on ice, or try in an Old Fashioned cocktail Pair with parmesan cheese, bellotta ham, dry fruits or dark chocolate Allergens: None Suitable for Vegetarians and Vegans Gluten Free XO: Extra Old, made from eaux-de-vie aged in French oak barrels A charming half sized bottle of Rémy Martin XO fine Champagne Cognac! This smaller bottle still features the iconic design of its larger counterpart and contains 350ml of the stunning expression, combining a blend of 85% Grande Champagne and 15% Petite Champagne and matured for at least ten years. A blend of up to 400 different eaux-de-vie. The art of blending allows Remy Martin to express the full aromatic complexity of this XO Cognac Fine Champagne. Produced since 1981, Remy Martin XO has excellent texture, complexity and richness. Remy Martin set out to create something special when producing this- sourcing resources only from what are considered to be the Top 2 sub regions of Cognac, Grande and Petite Champagne. There is a wide spectrum of aromas of late summer fruit, combined with rich floral notes of white flowers such as jasmine. To say that Remy Martin has been around for a while is something of an under statement. Their roots stretch as far back as 1724 when the business was first established. Another key date comes much later in 1948 when Remy Martin decided to source their grapes from only 2 of the 6 regions within Cognac- Grande and Petit Champagne. This can be seen as a very strong quality statement as these two regions are generally considered to provide the best grapes in the region. The velvet texture, the myriad of aromas of jasmine, iris, fig and cinnamon, the memorable taste that lingers longer on the palate

name: Rémy Martin Cognac Fine Champagne Club Exception 1l
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size; 1lt Growing Region: Petit & Grande Champagne DISCOVER NEW REALMS Cellar Master Baptiste Loiseau has created a brand-new realm of discovery: a special edition of the iconic Remy Martin CLUB blend elevated by the addition of exceptional eaux-de-vie from Grande Champagne and Petite Champagne, in the heart of the Cognac region. Multiple aromatic facets, well-balanced, complex EYE: A shimmering shade of copper, like the color of the cognac pot stills. NOSE: Ageing in French oak brings aromas of burnished almonds followed by warm, spiced cinnamon. TASTE: An abundance of intense flavours traveling from rich apricot to sweet nutmeg and roasted coffee. BODY: Multiple aromatic facets lead to a long, lingering finish, perfect for pairing with flavourful foods.

name: Rémy Martin Fine Champagne Cognac VSOP 35cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 35cl The first Cognac VSOP Fine Champagne created in 1927 A superior blend of several hundreds of eaux-de-vie aged for a minimum of 4 years An iconic, versatile worldwide recognised frosted bottle Well-balanced and structured. Roundness of ripe fruit with a pleasant mouth feel and silky texture. Dominant notes of vanilla due to longer ageing in French Limousin oak barrels. Followed by ripe apricot, baked apple and elegant floral notes. A perfect harmony between the firm character of ripe fruit and subtle notes of licorice; offering a great complexity of elegant and powerful aromas.

name: Remy Martin Tercet 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 42% Size: 70cl Rémy Martin Tercet is a unique Cognac Fine Champagne blended from aromatic eaux-de-vie with notes of fresh tropical fruits. Reflecting the style of the Maison, Tercet lights up a new path for cognac.

name: Remy Martin VSOP Cognac Fine Champagne 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size; 70cl Created in 1927, Rémy Martin VSOP is the first ever VSOP Cognac Fine Champagne blend (using only the finest grapes), and the first to be enshrined in the iconic frosted bottle. Today, it continues to hold its place as one of the best amongst Cognac connoisseurs all over the world. This original VSOP blend is the reference of the house of Rémy Martin - the pure, authentic essence of Cognac Fine Champagne. On the nose: a perfect harmony of powerful and elegant aromas with dominant notes of vanilla, followed by ripe apricot, baked apple and a fine floral bouquet. On the palate: a rounded, well-balanced cognac with multiple layers of ripe fruit and subtle notes of liquorice. Try it in a traditional brandy cocktail, or in a long drink. Why not try it topped up with ginger ale, plenty of ice garnished with a lemon wedge.

name: Remy Martin VSOP Cognac Fine Champagne 70cl - Boxed
description: Alc Vol:40% Size; 70cl Created in 1927, Rémy Martin VSOP is the first ever VSOP Cognac Fine Champagne blend (using only the finest grapes), and the first to be enshrined in the iconic frosted bottle. Today, it continues to hold its place as one of the best amongst Cognac connoisseurs all over the world. This original VSOP blend is the reference of the house of Rémy Martin - the pure, authentic essence of Cognac Fine Champagne. Why not try it topped up with ginger ale, plenty of ice garnished with a lemon wedge.

name: Reverend Hubert Winter Gin Liqueur 50cl
description: ABV - 27% Size - 50cl TASTING NOTES: Our gold award-winning Winter Gin Liqueur is distinctive, original, balanced, & smooth. Bursting with aromatic notes of dried fruit, winter spices from Sri Lanka and the freshest orange & lemon zest from the Amalfi coast. SERVING SUGGESTIONS: The intense flavour & balance of our gin liqueur makes it an exquisite cocktail ingredient. It takes a negroni or a champagne cocktail to the next level & it’s equally delicious in a hot gin punch or served simply on its own over ice. GB: Our products are made in the Cotswolds in small batches by hand using real fruit. Reverend Hubert Winter Gin is great for cosy nights in, winter parties or festive events. It's also a fantastic cocktail ingredient - see our recipes in the description below. THE PERFECT GIFT: The Reverend Hubert Winter Gin Liqueur makes an ideal gift for birthdays, Father’s Day or Christmas. It’s also perfect to serve to family and friends on special occasions and get togethers. OUR STORY: Originally made in the vicarage in 1904 by Reverend Hubert Bell Lester for his congregation’s Christmas party; the recipe has been recreated and improved by his great-grandson Thomas.

name: Reyka Vodka 70cl - Limited Batch
description: 40% ABV Size; 70cl Reyka is an Icelandic vodka, unrivalled in its freshness and distilled from wheat and barley. It is also the world’s first “green” vodka, it being made from glacial water in small batches to ensure exceptional quality. It’s also distilled using sustainable energy from geothermal heat, renewable energy from underground volcanoes which makes a great talking point at parties.

name: Riebeek Cellars Collection Shiraz 2017 75cl
description: ABV 14% Size: 75cl Country: Swartland, South Africa Grape: Shiraz Grapes are selected from defined areas of the Cape for terroir specificity and varietal style, and then fermented on the skin for 7 days at a lower temperature to maintain fruit flavours. A delicious wine, with rich raspberry and mince pie aromas and a soft, well balanced juicy red berry palate.

name: Rievaulx Napoleon Brandy VSOP 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 36% Size 70cl The full bodied yet distinctive mellow flavour of this French Brandy comes from a long maturation in oak. A full flavoured and rounded grape brandy with a mellow fruit character

name: Rievaulx VSOP Napoleon Brandy 35cl
description: ABV - 30% Size - 35cl Country of Origin: France This rich, warming brandy has been matured in finest oak casks for 3 years which imparts woody, earthy aromas and sweet vanilla and raisin flavours.

description: Alc Vol: 43% Size; 5cl - Miniature A miniature bottle of single malt whisky under the Robert Burns label from the Isle of Arran distillery, bottled to honour the ploughman poet.

name: Robinsons Trooper Original Perfectdraft 6L Keg
description: ABV: 4.7% Size: 6L Only to be used with Philips Perfect Draft dispensers TROOPER is a Premium British Beer inspired by Iron Maiden and handcrafted at Robinsons Brewery. Malt flavours and citric notes for a unique blend of Bobek, Goldings and Cascade hops give this deep golden ale a subtle hint of lemon. TROOPER takes its name from the Iron Maiden song which itself was inspired by the famous Charge of the Light Brigade. Style Ale Country Britain Brewery Robinsons

name: Rocca 2019 Primitivo Puglia IGT 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 13.5% Size: 75cl Country: Italy The Puglian sunshine brings these grapes to optimum ripeness, resulting in a red wine full of plush dark fruit flavours and spice. A Medium bodied ripe red wine with flavours of Morello cherries, chocolate and spice. This will pair very well with starters, charcuterie, pasta and pizzas. **Please Note back label is slightly scuffed.

name: Rocca Nero d'Avola Sicilia 75cl
description: ABV Size - 75cl Nero d'Avola is grape variety native to Sicily and named after Avola in the far south of the country. Very much like New World Shiraz it is a full-bodied savoury wine with juicy and ripe tannins and plummy flavours. Excellent with red meat and cheese.

name: Rock Rose Citrus Coastal Edition Gin 70cl
description: ABV - 41.5% Size - 70cl Rock Rose Citrus Coastal Edition Gin is a Scottish gin that uses botanicals to showcase the northern coastline of mainland Scotland. The most experimental release to date, the Coastal Edition is distilled using locally foraged kelp from shore seaweed and liquorice salt from Hebridean Mustard Company for an incredibly smooth and delectably sweet gin with a delicious salted edge. Originally made as a limited edition in August 2020, it was so well received that the distillery decided to make it part of the core range. It was released in April 2021.

name: Rock Rose Citrus Coastal Gin 5cl - Miniature
description: Size - 5cl ABV - 41.5% Warm juniper notes giving way to bright lemon and verbena notes. On the palate expect fresh citrus balanced with oceanic umami flavour of kelp. To finish a hint of salinity comes through from the liquorice salt with further citrus notes. Signature Serve Serve as a G&T with goji berries and a slice of grapefruit. The Citrus Coastal Edition is described as a flavour-some and fresh, zesty gin with a bracing sea air finish. This is a 41.5% ABV gin which has distilled in their traditional vapour infusion still.

name: Rock Rose Navy Strength Gin 70cl
description: ABV- 57% Size - 70cl The folks at Dunnet Bay Distillery in Scotland have only gone and made a Navy Strength edition of their very popular Rock Rose Gin! The bumped up ABV brings an intensity to the flavour profile, dialling up the pine freshness, the earthy herbaceous elements and the blaeberry juiciness. (67)

name: ROCK ROSE OLD TOM PINK GRAPEFRUIT GIN MINIATURE 5cl
description: Size - 5cl ABV - 41.5% Using Organic Pink Grapefruit Peel, peeled by the Rock Rose Distillery Team, added to their botanicals and vapour infused along with all their traditional gin botanicals, this is then lightly sweetened with Muscovado sugar. It's perfect paired with a premium tonic, plenty of ice and a slice of fresh grapefruit.

name: Rokeby's Half Crown London Dry Gin 70cl
description: ABV - 40.6% Size- 70cl A classic London Dry style gin, Half Crown distilled this edition in small batches in a traditional copper pot still. It was named to honour the eccentric English peer Lord Rokeby, whose favourite tip was said to be a half-crown coin.

name: Roku Japanese Craft Gin Sakura Bloom Edition 70cl - Limited Edition
description: Alc Vol: 43% Size: 70CL Gin crafted with six Japanese botanicals. The first expression within the Seasonal Festival Collection. Captures the freshness and brightness of springtime and the Hanami Festival in Japan. Soft and elegant floral notes of cherry blossom. Enhances the blend of botanicals and resulting in a delicately complex Roku gin. Crafted by Japanese artisans with meticulous attention to detail, Roku is a perfect balance of flavours. The gin’s unique taste comes from six Japanese botanicals – Sakura flower, Sakura leaf, Yuzu peel, Sencha tea, Gyokuro tea and Sansho pepper. A complex multiple distillation process brings out the best in each.This gin is the true embodiment of ‘Shun’ where each botanical is harvested at its peak flavour, in this case highlighting one particular season – Spring. The Sakura Bloom Edition celebrates the annual Hanami “flower viewing” festivals in Japan. It captures the freshness and brightness of Springtime, bringing a soft and sweet floral taste, layered with hints of saltiness from the blossom leaves.These flavours intertwine with the harmonious blend of botanicals, naturally enhancing the sweetness of Roku and resulting in a delicately complex Roku gin in full bloom. The recommended perfect serve is a gin & tonic, with one part Sakura Bloom Edition, three parts tonic water and a pink grapefruit garnish.

name: Roku Suntory Japanese Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 43% Size: 70CL The first gin of the legendary Suntory in Japan, Roku Gin is crafted out of carefully picked botanicals, including 6 Japanese botanicals that will breeze you through all four seasons. A uniquely Japanese craft gin made with a blend of sakura flowers and leaf (spring), gyokuro and sencha teas (summer), sansho pepper (autumn), and yuzu peel (winter) Also blended with lemon peel, orange peel, juniper, cinnamon, and coriander, among others Vegetal and earthy, with a hint of fruity sweetness Distinct peppery finish Best enjoyed as gin and tonic to ad da taste of the four seasons of Japan The beautiful bottle design reflects Japanese aesthetics

name: Ron Pampero Blanco Rum 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 37.5% Size: 70cl A delicious creamy Blanco rum from popular Venezuelan producer Pampero. By law, Venezuelan rum must be aged for a minimum of two years, meaning this is smoother and more characterful than standard white rums. This is a smooth, premium spirit which works well in cocktails, or with cola and a squeeze of lime.

name: Roos Estate Chenin Blanc - 75cl
description: Size - 75cl ABV - 12.5% A crisp and refreshing Chenin Blanc from the renowned Roos Estate. Aromas of ripe melon and citrus, with a hint of honey and a zesty finish. Perfect for summer days. Roos Estate Chenin Blanc pairs beautifully with light seafood dishes such as grilled salmon with a lemon butter sauce or a light seafood risotto. The bright acidity of the wine will cut through the richness of the butter and the creamy texture of the risotto.

name: Roos Estate PINK Sauvignon Blanc - 75cl
description: Size - 75cl ABV - 12.5% Country: South Africa Roos Estate PINK Sauvignon Blanc is a premium wine produced by Roos Estate, a renowned winery in South Africa. This wine is made from 100% Sauvignon Blanc grapes grown in the Western Cape region of South Africa. The grapes are carefully selected and harvested by hand to ensure the highest quality. After crushing and pressing, the juice is fermented in stainless steel tanks at a controlled temperature to preserve the delicate aromas and flavors of the grapes. The resulting wine is a beautiful light pink color with a fresh and vibrant aroma of red fruits, grapefruit, and hints of floral notes. On the palate, it is crisp and refreshing with flavors of juicy watermelon, strawberry, and lime, with a subtle mineral finish. Roos Estate PINK Sauvignon Blanc is a perfect wine for summer sipping, and pairs well with light salads, seafood, and grilled chicken dishes. It has an alcohol content of 12.5% and is best served chilled at around 8-10°C.

name: Roos Estate Pinotage Red Wine - 75cl
description: Size - 75cl ABV - 13% A wine with an excellent depth of character. Gorgeous red berry fruits are mellow by enticing warm flavours on the palate. Enjoy this wine on its own chilled or with meat dishes.

name: ROOS ESTATE SHIRAZ 2019 SOUTH AFRICA
description: Full bodies with black cherry and blackberry fruit flavours. Our Shiraz is a full bodied wine with robust flavours of peppery black cherry and blackberry fruits rounded with soft tannins. Serve at ambient temperature and enjoy it with roasted or grilled meats, pizza and pasta dishes, cheeses or on its own.

name: Rooster Rojo Blanco Tequila 70cl
description: Size -70cl ABV - 38% With Rooster Rojo Blanco you buy a classic tequila, which fulfils all the requirements you could have for a great agave schnapps. You get the drink here with 0.7L content and an alcohol content of 38% vol. Buy your bottle today! Rooster Rojo Blanco Tequila pays homage to a symbol of its homeland Mexico: the cock. Not just any rooster, but the red rooster, king of roosters. The drink is made in the Fabrica de Tequilas Finos distillery in the city of Tequila. It is based - as is usual for the drink - exclusively on the hearts of the blue weaver ragave, which originate from the regions Los altos de Jalisco and Tequila. These are cooked, fermented and distilled. The distillate is mixed with the finest water, previously filtered through Mexican silver, making the drink smoother and smoother. Rooster Rojo is the first tequila brand to take this step. The Rooster Rojo Blanco is immediately bottled in bottles whose shape resembles that of the Tequila volcano that can be seen from the distillery. Taste In the nose, fresh and lively citrus aromas whet the appetite for more. The palate is soft and sweet at first until it changes into a spicy peppery taste. The medium length finish is quite strong but pleasantly smooth. Cocktails Rooster Rojo Blanco is very versatile. Use it for margaritas or palomas. The brand recommends drinking it in a "Rooster Rojo Bandera". You will need three shot glasses, 5 cl Rooster Rojo Blanco Tequila, 5 cl fresh lime juice and 5 cl Sangrita. Pour the unmixed drinks into a shot glass. Place the glasses in this order: Lime juice, Rooster Rojo Blanco and Sangrita. The result is the Mexican flag, which you can now drink. Ay, caramba!

name: Ropiteau Cote de Beaune-Villages 2006 75cl
description: ABV: 13% Size: 75cl Country: France Region: Burgundy Grape: Pinot Noir Sub Region: Cote de Beaune Appellation: Cote de Beaune-Villages Controlee une Category: Premier Cru Vintage Year:2006 The 2006 Ropiteau Côte de Beaune-Villages is a red Burgundy (Pinot Noir) offering an elegant, dry, and balanced profile, typically featuring aromas of red/black berries, sour cherries, and plums . Aged in oak for around 12 months, this wine offers a well-structured, fresh, and lively palate with soft tannins. It is generally best paired with red meats, duck, or regional cheeses.
