Strain into a short glass filled with ice. Top with the orange slice and cherry on a cocktail stick.

name: Royal Bloodhound - Cocktail Bundle
description: Royal Mash Vintage Vodka 70cl Campari 70cl INGREDIENTS 30ml Royal Mash 60ml Campari Bitter 90ml Pink Grapefruit Juice Garnish - Grapefruit Zest or slice METHOD: Put the vodka, Campari and grapefruit juice in a shaker with ice. Shake briefly. Strain into an ice filled glass. Garnish with the zest or slice.

name: Royal Challenge Finest Premium Blended Whisky 1Lt - Imported From India
description: Alc Vol: Size 1lt Royal Challenge commonly referred to as ‘RC’ amongst whisky drinkers is an amazingly smooth whisky. The secret of its velvet-like texture lies in the use of leisurely matured malt and grain spirit. With its rare texture of antique gold, the finishing gets long, smooth, deep and yet so delicate. Royal Challenge is a grain-based whisky blended with rare Scotch malts and matured Indian malt whiskies. In 1886, the master blender chose not to let convention stand in the way of his vision to create an award-winning, International quality, Indian whisky, matured in charred American Oak Cask – Royal Challenge! The All New Royal Challenge is Smoother, Richer and Bolder. With a perfect fusion of scotch, Indian malts and grain spirits that’s been blended to perfection – you now get a truly royal whisky experience. Right from the blend and packaging to the consumer it appeals to, Royal Challenge Whisky is a celebration of the bold who challenge the status quo. Winner of the best Indian Whisky Gold -2011 – 2011 at the International Whisky Competition. Tasting Notes This Premium Whisky comes with a Golden yellow colour, Blended with rare Scotch & Matured Indian Malt. It has strong sweet Aroma like Brown Sugar, Molasses, Fig & Bit Malty. Mouth feel is Woody, Oaky character, Milk Chocolate, Vanilla, Caramel, Artificial Sweetener, Bit fruity & a Neutral finish.

name: Royal Espresso Martini - Cocktail Bundle
description: Royal Mash Vintage Vodka Tia Maria INGREDIENTS 50ml Royal Mash 25ml Tia Maria 25ml freshly brewed espresso coffee Garnish - Coffee beans METHOD: Fill a shaker with ice cubes. Add all ingredients. Shake and strain into a cocktail glass. Garnish with coffee beans.

name: Royal Mash Vintage Vodka 20cl bottle
description: From the island of Jersey comes a new Crown Jewel. Royal Mash Vintage Vodka, characterized by the exclusive Jersey potatoes from which it is made. Royal Mash is a 40% ABV ultra-premium vintage vodka. It is produced from the world’s finest potatoes and hand-crafted in bespoke 200 litre copper stills. Rachel says “We set out to make the best vodka imaginable. We live on the beautiful island of Jersey which produces the only potatoes we know of to boast the equivalent of an ‘appellation d’origine contrôlée’ .” The combination of these finest of ingredients, brand owners with exquisite taste, an expert Master Distiller, and a distillation process that creates the purest spirit, has resulted in a superior and memorable vodka. “When blind-tasted against well-established brands, ours is in a league of its own.” Each batch of Royal Mash is individually taste tested, approved, and signed off. The terroir and the quality of the fine potatoes ensuring that each vintage will be of a superb quality.

name: Royal Mash Vintage Vodka 70cl bottle
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Hand crafted in bespoke 200 litre copper stills, the Royal Mash Master Distiller expertly removes the heads and the tails of the distillation, retaining only the purest part of the heart. Distilled only once, Royal Mash vodka retains the character of the ingredients thereby producing a spirit with both personality and purity. Royal Mash has been created by two people with a passion for fine food and drinks; Rachel de Caen, a trained chef, and Peter Le Fol du Taillis. The Jersey-based owners have an interesting royal connection too. The logo is the crest of the Le Fol family, who were ennobled by Henry IV in 1594.

name: Royal Mule - Cocktail Bundle
description: Royal Mash Vintage Vodka 70cl 6 x Schweppes Ginger Beer INGREDIENTS 50ml Royal Mash Half a fresh lime - juiced (optional) 150ml Ginger Ale Garnish - Fresh ginger sliced (optional) Fresh mint leaves (optional) METHOD: Fill chosen glass or tumbler with ice. Add the vodka and lime juice – stir. Top with chilled ginger beer and fresh ginger slices and mint

name: Royal Saint-Vincent Blanc de Blancs Brut 75cl

name: Royal Salute - Richard Quinn Fashion - Limited Edition II Blended Scotch Whisky
description: Size - 700ml ABV - 40% In its second year, enter the new Kingdom of Royal Salute and Richard Quinn collaboration as we discover a brand new world, as playful and unexpected as our whisky. A new and exquisite 21-year-old blend meticulously co-created by Royal Salute master blender, Sandy Hyslop, and Richard Quinn in Strathisla distillery in Scotland. Carefully crafted from a hand-selected range of the finest Scotch whiskies, this bespoke blend has rich fruity flavour notes, elevated with hints of spice and gentle smoke characteristics, resulting in a blend that is wonderfully balanced and opulent. The 21-Year-Old Richard Quinn Edition represents the fusion of two worlds: the masterful whisky universe of Royal Salute and the bold and daring imagination of Richard Quinn. Leveraging the designer's unique style and his love of traditional patterns, this bold, energetic and contemporary limited edition perfectly encapsulates Richard Quinn's dedication to pushing the boundaries with a brand new design. Channelling the idea of Future Heritage, the second collaboration builds on the first, celebrating the legacy of both brands whilst looking forward to a future of innovation.

name: Royal Salute 21 Year Old Sapphire Flagon Blended Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% ABV Size: 70cl A special Sapphire-coloured edition of Chivas' Royal Salute 21 year old - a superb blend. Blended by Chivas Brothers, Royal Salute was launched on the 2nd of June 1953 in tribute to Queen Elizabeth II. Named after the traditional 21 gun salute this rich, classy blend is aged for a minimum of 21 years and is bottled in a Sapphire Blue Wade porcelain decanter and complete with a velvet dust jacket and presentation box.

name: Royal Stag Deluxe Whisky 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 42.8% Size: 75cl Royal Stag, is one of the most popular whiskies in India. Also known as Seagram's Royal Stag, is an Indian brand of whisky launched in 1995. It is Pernod Ricard's best selling brand by volume. It is a blend of grain spirits and imported Scotch malts. The brand redefined the spirits space by not using molasses but choosing instead to pioneer grain spirit blended with Scotch malts. It is named after a deer species known for long antlers. It is the first whisky brand launched in India which did not use any artificial flavour. It pioneered blending Indian grain spirits and imported Scotch malts – the first whisky in India not to use any artificial flavourings and to offer an international quality blend. Royal Stag has become an iconic brand with a large and fiercely loyal following. Royal Stag Deluxe Whisky is smooth, woody fruity, with a touch of smoke.

name: Royalita - Cocktail Bundle
description: Royal Mash Vintage Vodka 70cl Cointreau 70cl INGREDIENTS 50ml Royal Mash 50ml Fresh Lemon Juice 50ml Fresh Lime Juice 25ml Cointreau 25ml Simple syrup Few slices of Jalapeno Pepper Garnish - Lime wedge, jalepeno slice, salt METHOD: Salt the rim of either a tumbler or Margarita glass. Put all the ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake for 1 minute. Strain once into your chosen glass. Garnish with the lime wedge and jalapeno slices.

description: Alc Vol: 42.5% Size: 70cl RumTing Flavoured with Passionfruit, Mango and Elderflower is created using our premium Caribbean born Rum then flavoured with natural tropical fruits. Our gins and rums taste like how we feel about life. They’ve won awards and they’ve won fans not by being fusty or fussy or fancy or fake. They’re full of flavour and full of colour. Perfect over ice with your favourite mixer if that’s your 'Ting'. Or to bring big fruit flavours to your next summer inspired cocktail creation Tasting notes : Tropical fruit notes explode into life with ripe mango, charred pineapple and passion fruit puree with a creamy backdrop of vanilla and light floral elements. name: Russian Standard Vodka 12 x 5cl - Miniature
description: Alc Vol: 38% Size: 12 x 5cl Miniatures The miniature version of this premium and modern vodka. Premium ingredients and glacial waters go to ensure that this an exceptionally pure vodka. The word’s number 1 premium Russian vodka. Distilled 200 times for extra purity and superior taste, Russian Standard is a marriage of passion, expertise and craft. A gentler vodka than classic Russian crafts, Russky Standart’s original vodka has a very distinct and recognisable mouthfeel, resulting from careful distillation of its winter wheat and Lake Ladoga-water brew. A more authentic Russian vodka. Perfectly smooth with a hint of spice and ever so subtle sweetness—a more grown-up drink than most other vodka brands, with a gutsier spunk You’ll pick up a Russian Standard for its crystal clear sparkle, but will be hooked by the incredible smells of white pepper spice and wheat and stay for its smoothness and black pepper spice-forward palate that finishes off squarely and cleanly

Insulated Design: These double-walled mugs feature an insulated design to keep your beverages icy cold for longer periods. name: Sailor Jerry The Original Spiced Caribbean Rum 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl The undisputed father of the old-school tattoo, Norman 'Sailor Jerry' Collins build his rep tattooing in Hawaii's brawling Hotel Street district of Honolulu, where sailors and soldiers came to raise hell before heading off to war. He was a master craftsman of unflinching integrity and in his name, we make our rum. Blended with the finest rums from the Caribbean and our unmatched recipe of natural spices. name: San Miguel Limited Edition Chalice Half Pint Glass - TRÓPICO DESIGN - Celebrating 130 Years
description: This year San Miguel are celebrating 130 years of richer experiences with new limited edition glassware. Please Note that this is a Half Pint Glass, Expressed in an abstract artistic style, the design depicts our never-ending pursuit of rich experiences since our journey began back in 1890, from our tropical origins in the Philippines through every corner of the world to Spain. Take a moment to explore the adventures we’ve been on over a beer with friends. Here’s to the next 130 years exploring the world. Salud! TRÓPICO As the name suggests, Trópico celebrates our journey through the Tropics. It all started in Manila, Spain’s colonial capital in the Philippines, in 1890. Back then, it was a lively place, and also the crossing point of liberal ideas. Born out of some of these conversations with our friends and like-minded explorers, we decided to open the first brewery in Southeast Asia. It was in this moment that San Miguel was born. For our next stop, we crossed the sea and anchored in Hong Kong. We introduced our beer to new friends and a population of tea drinkers – they loved it. We couldn’t have said we journeyed through the tropics without talking about Africa. It was here that we savoured rich experiences after travelling through jungles, deserts and even savannahs. These memories always come back to us whenever we take a sip of San Miguel and enjoy the fruity aroma of white fruits and banana.

name: San Pellegrino Sparkling Natural Mineral Water 12x500ml
description: Size: 12 x 500ml Enhance your moments Sparkling Natural Mineral Water San Pellegrino Sparkling Natural Mineral Water has a unique blend of minerals, fine bubbles and subtle nuances. It is one of the most renowned waters globally and a perfect accompaniment to some of the world's finest ingredients. It flows from natural springs in Val Brembana in the San Pellegrino Terme area, at the foothills of the Italian Alps, near Bergamo and evokes the quintessential Italian way of living in every bottle. 12x500ml PET perfect for on-the-go occasions. Everything starts with rain: it falls on the mountains of Northern Italy, seeps into deeper layers of rocks, absorbing the mineral salts that shape its taste. San Pellegrino spreads a distinct taste of Italy around the world; a taste of a place where every moment is considered precious. The unique taste of San Pellegrino mineral water is the product of a natural journey that takes place in the dolomitic mountains overlooking Brembo River valley. It's here, in the untouched lands of Italy's Northwestern Alps that San Pellegrino begins its 30-year-journey inside the earth. During this journey the water flows slowly through the different rock formations collecting minerals such as calcium, magnesium and potassium as it goes that create the unmistakable taste of S.PELLEGRINO Sparkling Natural Mineral Water. 30 years later, San Pellegrino emerges pure and untouched and is bottled directly at the source in San Pellegrino Terme. Good to know: Water contributes in the maintenance of normal physical and cognitive function and normal regulation of body temperature. At least 2L of water, from all sources, should be consumed per day as part of a healthy diet & lifestyle.

This wine is from a small producer who emphasis the quality. Flinty and fruity, a wonderful nose, with all the classic flavours that follow. Gluten Free.

name: Sancerre. Les Lorys. Marquis de Goulaine, Loire Valley 2015 75cl
description: Made from the Sauvignon Blanc grape this is an expressive wine with a smooth, well balanced style. It has ripe, gooseberry aromas with flinty flavours and a fresh palate of limes and grapefruits. Ideal partner for seafood and fish dishes. Sancerre is a small appellation of the upper Loire Valley and this medieval, hilltop town is situated almost in the middle of the country in the eastern part of the Valley. The rolling limestone hills and semi- continental climate deliver rich Sauvignon Blanc with ripe gooseberry aromas and flinty flavours. All wine labelled Sancerre is made from the Sauvignon Blanc grape. The vineyards here are planted on the south facing slopes. As a cool, semi-continental region, one of the main viticultural threats is spring time frosts. The most dominating geographical influence of Sancerre is the nearby Loire river which does help to moderate the temperature throughout most of the growing season.

name: Sandhills Sauvignon Blanc Marlborough
description: Size - 75cl ABV - 12.5% Grape - Sauvignon Blanc Clear and bright with a clean, delicate aroma of gooseberry, passion-fruit, citrus, mineral and yellow apple. name: Sant’Ilario Chianti Classico Red Wine 75cl
description: ABV - 13% Size - 75cl Vinification and ageing - The wine is made using the traditional method of fermenting the grapes on their skins, a procedure that takes around 10 days at a temperature of 28 °C. Once the malolactic fermentation process has come to an end, the wine is aged for 6 months in Slavonian oak barrels and a further 4 months in the bottle. Colour - Bright ruby red flecked with burgundy. Flavour - Full, well-structured and long-lingering flavour, with a personality that conveys all the character of Sangiovese. Food matches - Pasta dishes served with meat sauces, roasts, braised meat dishes and barbecued meat like the classic T-bone steak, as well as well-aged cheeses.

name: Santa Teresa Claro Rum 70cl
description: ABV 40% Size: 70cl Founded in 1796, Hacienda Santa Teresa in Venezuela is where it all happens. Sugarcane is cultivated and rum is distilled, aged and bottled. Santa Teresa Claro is made from Venezuelan molasses and has aged for up 2 years in ex-bourbon casks. Finally, it is lightly charcoal filtered, a process which removes some of the color imparted by the casks. A Venezuelan white rum aged in American white oak for around 3 years. Santa Teresa Claro offers plenty of fruity notes, and is great in cocktails.

name: Schweppes Indian Tonic Water 1x200ml
description: UK’s leading tonic water brand, Schweppes has a long history of prestige. It was granted its very first royal warrant way back 1836, 53 years after the brand’s founding in 1783. Schweppes Tonic was introduced in the 1870s and was hugely instrumental in popularizing gin and tonic across the UK—first as a cautionary measure against malaria and then as a tasty pleasure drink. The quintessential tonic brand in the UK Crystal clear in appearance with a nice and steady effervescent stream of small, rising bubbles Lemon zest-smelling with mild quinine notes and faint orange blossom aromas Slight effervescent-tasting, with a well balanced, cleansing mouth-feel and pronounced butter quinine flavours and a coying mid-palate taste. Schweppes Tonic has distinct lemon notes and faint rose water undertones and leaves a zesty orange aftertaste and a lingering quinine dryness

description: A sugar free variant of the classic carbonated mixer from Schweppes, Slimline Tonic Water offers a low-calorie option for your favourite cocktails without sacrificing taste. The Slimline range—much like other Schweppes mixers—can be enjoyed on its own or with some fruit juice and/or alcoholic beverages. Schweppes Slimline Tonic is lovely mixture of soda water, citric acid natural flavourings like quinine, and sweeteners like aspartame Also contains sodium citrate as acidity regulator A no-sugar tonic ideal for those who want a low-calorie version of their favourite mixers without compromising the feel and flavour Clear in appearance and effervescent once gas escapes from the bottle, hence the brand’s famous and iconic Schhhhh… Schweppes advertising vehicle

name: Schweppes Soda Water 1x200ml
description: Schweppes Soda Water brings a unique-tasting carbonated water drink great for after-meal drinks or for combining with classic mixers, and even with simple fruit juice. It is a tasty blend of carbonated water and sodium bicarbonate, which produces a crystal-clear stream of rising bubbles. Crystal clear in appearance with obvious effervescence that looks ultra-refreshing This carbonated drink gives of a clean mineral-ly to chalky aroma, that’s true to its neutral and clean mineral taste, with the cleansing bite of carbonation Enjoy a mineral aftertaste with mild CO2 bitterness Great carbonation and clean-tasting throughout, with mild mineral notes that don’t interfere with cocktail flavours

name: Scrumpy Jack Premium British Cider Cans 24x500ml
description: ABV - 6% The iconic Scrumpy Jack never changes - tart apple and straw bales conjure up feelings of the countryside. AROMA: Long and dry, almost sherry like. FLAVOUR: Cider apples and hay bales. MOUTHFEEL: Mouth-watering with sharp green apples. FINISH: Fresh acid bite and clean dryness. Crafted using 100% locally grown British cider apples. Apple varieties include Dabinett and Chisel Jersey. Scrumpy Jack was first made in 1727 by the Symonds cider family.

name: Sebor Absinth 50cl
description: Alc Vol: 55% Size: 50cl Packaged in a unique, distinctive bottle, Sebor Absinth is an incredibly popular spirit, made by blending 13 herbs and spices to a century-old Swiss recipe. Made with the maximum amount of wormwood permitted, The result is a rich, mellow, spicy absinth, at the not-too-ridiculous strength of 55% Very herbal and tasty! This herbal absinthe is best enjoyed in the traditional way - diluted with water, with or without sugar.

name: Seedlip Garden 108 Non-Alcoholic Spirit 70Cl
description: Looking for a refreshing, herbal, non-alcoholic drink? Discover Seedlip Garden 108. A floral blend of Peas & Hay w/ traditional garden herb distillates in celebration of the English countryside. To make a delicious non-alcoholic drink, pour 50ml of Seedlip Garden 108 over ice, top w/ tonic & garnish w/ a Sugar Snap Pea or Mint sprig. WE ARE THE PERFECT NON-ALCOHOLIC DRINK: Seedlip Garden 108 is a non-alcoholic spirit with a herbal flavour profile. NATURAL BOTANICAL BLEND: It has sophisticated top notes of Peas & Hay with a complex herbal base character of Spearmint, Rosemary & Thyme. SEEDLIP GARDEN 108: brings a perfectly balanced & refreshing experience to any occasion. Whether midweek, driving, relaxing at home or just looking for something exceptional Seedlip Garden brings a perfectly balanced & refreshing experience to any occasion. BEST SERVED WITH TONIC: Serve 50ml of Seedlip with tonic over ice & garnish with a Sugar Snap pea. SEEDLIP is Alcohol, Sugar & Calorie free

name: Seedlip Grove 42 Non-Alcoholic Spirit 70Cl
description: A non-alcoholic citrus blend using three varieties of Mediterranean Orange, Lemon peel, Ginger and Lemongrass distillates with the cool prickle of Japanese Sansho Peppercorn for a sophisticated finish. - The Seedlip Story began when founder Ben Branson ordered a non-alcoholic drink in a restaurant and received a pink mocktail with an umbrella in return. Feeling distinctly silly, he thought he couldn't be the only one who wanted a non-alcoholic adult drink that delivered on both taste and sophistication. - Bringing together 300 years of farming heritage and a love for design, Ben tinkered with distilling home-grown herbs and spices in a small copper still. His experiments resulted in Seedlip Spice 94, the first of three variants in the range of Seedlip non-alcoholic distilled spirits. - Seedlip's alcohol-free spirits can now be found in the world's best restaurants and bars, but Seedlip is most enjoyed after work, mid-week, and on Sunday afternoons at home. - If you're moderating or looking for a fantastic alternative to alcohol to enjoy yourself or serve to guests when hosting, Seedlip is for you. - Seedlip Grove 42 is best enjoyed mixed with your favourite tonic over ice, ideally with a large orange peel to enhance the citrus. Pop your feet up and fix yourself a beautifully balanced, non-alcoholic Seedlip & Tonic. Seedlip is alcohol-free, sugar-free, sweetener-free & calorie-free.

name: Seedlip Spice 94 Non-Alcoholic Spirit 70Cl
description: An aromatic non-alcoholic blend of Allspice berries and Cardamom. Lemon and Grapefruit peels provide fresh citrus top notes to balance the long bitter finish from high-quality Oak and Cascarilla barks. The Seedlip Story began when founder Ben Branson ordered a non-alcoholic drink in a restaurant and received a pink mocktail with an umbrella in return. Feeling distinctly silly, he thought he couldn't be the only one who wanted a non-alcoholic adult drink that delivered on both taste and sophistication. - Bringing together 300 years of farming heritage and a love for design, Ben tinkered with distilling home-grown herbs and spices in a small copper still. His experiments resulted in Seedlip Spice 94, the first of three variants in the range of Seedlip non-alcoholic distilled spirits. - Seedlip's alcohol-free spirits can now be found in the world's best restaurants and bars, but Seedlip is most enjoyed after work, mid-week, and on Sunday afternoons at home. - If you're moderating, looking for a fantastic alternative to alcohol to enjoy yourself or serve to guests when hosting, Seedlip is for you. - Seedlip Spice 108 is best enjoyed mixed with your favourite tonic over ice and a slice of grapefruit. Pop your feet up and fix yourself a beautifully balanced, non-alcoholic Seedlip & Tonic. Seedlip is alcohol-free, sugar-free, sweetener-free & calorie-free.

name: Selva Volpina Cabernet Sauvignon 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 13% Size: 75Cl Vintage: 2019 Grape: Cabernet Sauvignon 100% Colour : Intensive and brilliant red Aroma: Fruity, with notes of spices and fresh peppers Taste: Full-bodied, warm with an elegant finish Pairing: Best enjoyed with pasta and rice dishes, red meat, roasts and aged cheese Serving temperature 18°C Contains sulphites GMO free

name: Sex On The Beach - Cocktail Bundle
description: This Bundle includes: 1x 70cl Archers Peach Schnapps 1x 70cl Absolut Vodka 1x 1L Ocean Spray Cranberry Classic Juice Method: 1. Fill your glass with ice cubes. 2. Pour the vodka, peach schnapps and fruit juices into a large jug and stir. 3. Divide the mixture between two glasses and stir gently to combine. 4. (Optional) Garnish with the cocktail cherries and orange slices.

name: Shackleton Blended Malt Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Following the success of Journey and Discovery, this release of Shackleton is a mainstream, accessible version. Inspired by Shackleton's story, Master Blender, Richard Paterson, has recreated this lost whisky in a personal and deeply felt project. Building on his recreation of Mackinlay's Rare Old Highland Malt, combining the best Highland malt whiskies and allowing them to marry over a long period, Paterson has created an enigmatic blended malt with a dash of body and a whisper of smoke. Complex notes of vanilla, honey and orchard fruits, the whisky has real warmth and depth. A fitting tribute to the great explorer Shackleton himself.

name: Sharish Blue Magic Gin 50cl
description: Sharish Blue Magic Gin really is magical. One minute it's a vibrant, deep blue hue... but pour over tonic and ABRACADABRA, your G&T is suddenly a beautiful dusky purple/pink colour. Not to be outdone by its colour-changing properties, the gin itself is exceptionally smooth with a unique fruity aroma and citrus taste. Made in Portugal, the botanicals include Juniper, Cinnamon, Coriander Seeds, Clove, Vanilla, and, rather originally, totally fresh Orange Peel, Lemon Peel, Bravo Esmolfe Apple and Lemon verbena. ABV 40%

name: Sharish Magic Gin 5cl Miniature
description: ABV 40% Size: 5cl Miniature Made in the small provincial town of Monsaraz, Portugal from 100% Portuguese fruit, Antonio Cuco has carefully hand crafted this exceptional and unique Mediterranean gin. When mixed with a tonic, the gin magically turns to a beautiful lovely dusky purple/pink colour. (This is all about the pH levels changing with the addition of tonic. You will see varying shades depending on what tonic you use.) The gin itself is exceptionally smooth with a unique fruity aroma and citrus taste. Made in Portugal. The botanicals include; liquorice, ginger, cinnamon, Clove, Vanilla, fresh strawberries and raspberries, and, rather originally, totally fresh Orange Peel, Lemon Peel, Bravo Esmolfe Apple and Lemon verbena. This wonderful combination creates a gin with flavours of apple, vanilla and cinnamon with a hint of spicy ginger, rounded off by the fresh berries.

description: Alc Vol: 4.3% Size: 24 x 500ml Can Doom Bar is inspired by its namesake, located near our home at Rock on Cornwall’s North Atlantic coast Accomplished and precise, Doom Bar is the epitome of consistency, balance and moreish appeal. Doom Bar is a perfectly balanced beer combining subtle yet complex flavours. This creates an amber ale which is both satisfying and deliciously moreish. Established in 1994 at Rock on Cornwall’s North Atlantic coast, Sharp’s Brewery strives to raise the bar for British brewing by producing exceptional beer for the enjoyment of all.

name: Sheep Dog Peanut Butter Whiskey Liqueur 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 35% Size: 70cl Blending peanut butter with whiskey? We thought the idea sounded a little nutty too. But it’s high time a whiskey was bred to take the party to the next level. Grab a bottle of Sheep Dog Peanut Butter Whiskey, break away from the pack and woof down some good times

name: Shepherd Neame Master Brew Kentish Ale Bottles 8x500ml
description: ABV:4% Size: 8x500ml Master Brew is brewed using only the finest Kentish barley and hops and is Shepherd Neame's flagship beer in the brewery's Kentish heartland. The "Local Hero" is a distinctive, mid-brown bitter ale, with all the hoppy aroma you would expect of a beer brewed in the heart of the hop country. Hand-crafted by the Faversham brewery's talented team of experienced brewers, it is a well-balanced traditional ale. Delicate and devilishly drinkable, this quintessentially Kentish ale lays the county's hallowed, herbaceous hops on a firm, biscuity bed of pale and crystal malt. Endowed with an inviting auburn-amber hue and a tantalising toffee-ish aroma, it's an enlivening English ale that, given its unassuming ABV, pleasures the palate with a remarkable fullness of flavour.

name: Sheridans Coffee Layered Liqueur 50CL
description: Alc Vol: 15.5% Size: 50cl Coffee Layered Liqueur Sheridan's is an innovative combination of dark coffee chocolate liqueur and a smooth vanilla cream liqueur. It's unique pack consists of two bottles, one with coffee and whisky flavoured liqueur and the other white chocolate flavoured liqueur. When layered in the correct proportions Sheridan's resembles a terrific Irish coffee. Tilt the glass when pouring to allow the dark chocolate coffee liqueur to layer beneath the smooth cream liqueur When layered in the correct proportions, Sheridan's resembles a terrific Irish coffee Coffee Chocolate Liqueur 333ml Vanilla Cream Liqueur 167ml Innovative combination of dark coffee chocolate liqueur and a smooth vanilla cream liqueur Coffee, chocolate flavoured Best served over ice or with coffee

name: SHETLAND REEL - FILSKA SCOTTISH GIN 5cl
description: ABV - 40% Size - 5cl Filska means high-spirited and flighty in Shetland dialect, and it's reflected in this citrusy, zesty red grapefruit gin! Shetland Reel Filska Gin is a citrus-forward gin made and distilled on the Isle of Unst. To complement the bitterly sweet grapefruits and the frontal, expect a flair of creamy almonds, flavourful and piney junipers, and a soothing yet warming cinnamon finish. For the perfect serve, it is recommended that you use 50ml Filska Gin combined with a premium tonic and ice as well as a slice of red grapefruit for the ultimate citrusy G&T.

name: Shipyard American IPA 8 x 500ml Bottle
description: ABV: 5.0% Size: 8 x 500ml Bottles From this family-owned brewery in the heart of Portland, Maine, famed for shipbuilding and ambitious world discovery, Fred Forsley drove the original American craft beer movement. His mission to this day; to take original American craft beer around the world making it accessible to everyone. Combining the finest malted barley with a whole bunch of audacious American hops. This refreshing and gutsy American IPA is crisp, refreshing and explodes with a grapefruity citrus flavour. Style: American IPA See: Deep Gold Smell: Vibrant, Citrus Hop Taste: Citrus fruit with grapefruit prominent

name: Shipyard American Low Tide Low Alcohol Pale Ale 8x500ml Bottles
description: ABV: 0.5% Size: 8 x 500ml Bottles A juicy, tropical low alcohol American Pale Ale, rounded with a sweet citrus hop flavour. Generous quantities of hops are added throughout the brewing process to deliver Low Tide’s richly fruity hop character, with tropical fruits, and notes of subtle citrus and blueberry. Just like our American pale ale, Low Tide’s citrus flavours work perfectly to cut through richer meats & cheeses, cleansing the pallet after sticky BBQ ribs or a pulled pork sandwich. Alternatively pair with Tex-Mex favourites like burritos, spicy fajitas or enchilada and take the edge off any chilli heat. Brewed and packaged in the UK.

name: Shipyard American Pale Ale 10  440ml cans
description: Alc Vol: 4.5% Size: 10 x 440ml Shipyard APA is a crafted 4.5% American style Pale Ale to satisfy the growing thirst of British drinkers for American craft beers. This refreshing, smooth ale is dry hopped with a quartet of four American hop varieties - Chinook, Cascade, Columbus and Centennial. From his family-owned brewery in the heart of Portland, Maine, famed for shipbuilding and ambitious world discovery, Fred Forsley drove the original American craft beer movement. His mission to this day; to take original American craft beer around the world making it accessible to everyone. Enjoy Shipyard American Pale Ale cans with rich meats & cheeses, cleansing the pallet after each sticky BBQ rib or bite of a pulled pork sandwich. Alternatively pair with Tex-Mex favourites like burritos, spicy fajitas or enchiladas and take the edge off any chilli heat. Original American Craft From his family-owned brewery in the heart of Portland, Maine, famed for shipbuilding and ambitious world discovery, Fred Forsley drove the original American craft beer movement. His mission to this day; to take original American craft beer around the world making it accessible to everyone. Check out the rest of our incredible line-up The Shipyard range also includes three effortlessly refreshing pale ales in bottles. For laid-back and easy-drinking, without compromising on flavour.

name: Shipyard American Pale Ale 8 x 500ml Bottle
description: ABV: 4.5% Size: 8 x 500ml Bottles An easy-drinking American style pale ale bursting with fruity citrus hop aroma and flavour. Dry-hopped with a quartet of four American hop varieties - Chinook, Cascade, Columbus and Centennial. Shipyard Brewing Company has been brewing hand-crafted beers in Portland, Maine for over 20 years. Founded in 1992 at Federal Jacks Brew Pub in Kennebunkport Harbour. Rooted in tradition and brimming with innovation. Their award-winning beer is handcrafted by their team of brewers who learned their art from the world-renowned master brewer, Alan Pugsley. Brewed and bottled in the UK. Ingredients Water, Malted Barley, Wheat, Brewing Syrup, Hops, Yeast Nutritional Info Per 100ml Calories 172kJ/41kcal Fat 0g Saturated fat 0g Carbohydrates 3.76g Sugars 2.08g Protein 0.26g Salt 0.01g

It’s ready for you to take on your next great adventure or as your every day IPA. name: Shortcross Citrus Drizzle Gin 50cl
description: ABV - 43% Size - 50cl A welcome addition to the excellent Shortcross Gin range, Shortcross Citrus Drizzle gin showcases a tantalising blend of oranges, lemons and grapefruits muddled with apples, pears and blackberries to create a brightly-flavoured zesty gin. Ideal for a Gin Paloma or a G&T garnished with a thick wedge of pink grapefruit spiked with fresh rosemary.

name: Siberian Dream Premium Vodka 40% 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Extra Smooth Triple Distilled Pure Quality Vodka Proudly Original Siberian Dream Premium Vodka 40% 0.70cl is a top-quality vodka known for its smoothness and pure taste. With an alcohol content of 40 per cent, this premium vodka is perfect for sipping neat, chilled, or in your favourite cocktails. It pairs wonderfully with savoury dishes like smoked salmon, caviar, or pickled vegetables, making it an excellent choice for elegant gatherings.

name: Sibling Winter Edition Cranberry & Clementine Gin 5cl Miniature
description: Alc Vol: 38% Size: 5cl Miniature This seasonal Gin is 100% made from scratch to the Sibling quality, then infused with fresh cranberries and clementine peel. This is the perfect gin for an winter G&T, with bitter-sweet flavours. Served with orange peel, regular tonic or ginger ale and lots of ice. These gins are flavoured and coloured naturally, so over time the colour may fade. Shake before use if left untouched for a long period.

name: Sierra Milenario Cafe Tequila Liqueur 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 35% Size: 70cl Coffee Liqueur made with Tequila Sierra Millenario cafe is a dark tequila-based coffee liqueur with an intense coffee flavour from some of the best Mexican coffee beans located in the chiapa maya jungle and vanilla from the hear of Mexico's prime vanilla-growing region, Veracruz. carefully produced at the family-owned Destilerías Sierra Unidas in Jalisco, Mexico. A true Mexican original: freshly brewed coffee, matured agave and notes of chocolate and vanilla enriched with roasted Arabica coffee beans, nuts and a hint of summer fruits. Sierra Milenario Café is represented by the Mayan Zodiac Sign “LAMAT – Q’ANIL”, the rabbit, which delights through a snow-white, eye-catching orange color combination. As a female character, the rabbit stands for curiosity.

name: Sierra Reposado Rested Tequila 5cl Miniature
description: Alc Vol: 38% Size: 5cl - Miniature The Sierra distillery is located in a historical hacienda in Guadalajara, the Tequila Capital of Mexico. With years of experience Sierra’s jimadores care for their agave plants by hand, with the plants taking 8 to 10 years to fully mature for harvest. Traditionally, Sierra Tequila Reposado is distilled twice in copper pot stills. Reposado is the most popular Tequila quality among Mexicans. Tasting Notes: The freshness and irresistible fruitiness of Sierra Tequila Reposado are characterised by gentle notes of vanilla and caramel, but also by the aromas of fragrant herbs. Suggested Recipe: Mexpresso Martini 50 ml Sierra Tequila Reposado 30 ml Sierra Café 25 ml Espresso 5-10 ml Syrup Coffee Beans to Garnish - Shake all ingredients with ice cubes in a shaker. - Strain the mix into a chilled martini glass - Carefully drop 3 coffee beans on the froth.

name: Sierra Silver Blanco Tequila 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 38% Size: 70cl Sierra Tequila Silver is a mature, clear tequila. Its full, fruity, fresh aroma dominated by a subtle chili note reflects the Tequilana Weber Azul Agave and also contains slight hints of green apple and young pineapple and pepper. Nuances of pepper give Sierra Tequila Silver that certain something, making it a feisty tequila.

name: Sierra Silver Tequila 5cl Miniature
description: Alc Vol: 38% Size: 4cl - Miniature The Sierra distillery is located in a historical hacienda in Guadalajara, the Tequila Capital of Mexico. With years of experience Sierra’s jimadores care for their agave plants by hand, with the plants taking 8 to 10 years to fully mature for harvest. Using a coa, the jimadoers cut the agave by hand to reveal the heart or piña. The piña is gently cooked and then undergoes a step-by-step extraction process with special yeast added to ferment and then twice distilled in copper vessels before maturing. Tasting Notes: Mineral notes on the nose with a light hints of fruity agave. Heavy on the tongue with an almost metallic minerality with sweeter agave only coming in on the very end. Suggested Recipe: Spiced Michelada 25ml Sierra Tequila Silver 50ml sangrita 15ml fresh squeezed lime juice 2 dashes of Tabasco (if desired) Mexican beer to top Lime and chilli salt and wedge of lime to garnish - Prepare a chilled highball glass by coating the rim with lime and chilli salt (rub the rim with a slice of lime to moisten and dip / pour the salt to coat) - Add Sierra Tequila Silver, sangrita, lime juice and Tabasco (if desired) to the highball glass and stir - Add plenty of ice and top with Mexican beer and garnish with a wedge of lime and additional chili and lime salt if desired

name: Sierra Tequila Reposado 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 38% Size: 70cl Traditionally distilled twice in copper pot stills, Sierra Reposado matures for nine months in toasted oak barrels bringing with it a golden colour. Reposado is the favourite variety of tequila among Mexicans. The fresh fruitiness of Sierra Tequila Reposado carries delicate notes of vanilla, caramel, and herbs whilst there is a complex aroma. A recipient of numerous international awards.

name: Sierra Tropical Chilli, Passionfruit & Mango Tequila 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 18% Size: 70cl SIERRA TROPICAL CHILLI – THE NEW SIERRA SHOT with mango, passion fruit and chilli. The absolute must-have at the next party, perfect pure as a shot. Sierra Tropical Chilli combines the fruitiness of Sierra Tequila Blanco with a unique tropical note: an intense taste of mango and passion fruit and a hint of chilli for a special spiciness in the finish. Only high-quality ingredients and 100% natural flavours as well as mango and passion fruit concentrate are used for the production of Sierra Tropical Chilli. Light liqueur with Sierra Tequila Blanco Tropical taste of mango and passionfruit with a hint of chilli Fruit liqueur with 100% natural flavours and ingredients Perfect as a party shot, to be enjoyed chilled or at room temperature.

name: Signature selection Cream Liqueur 5cl trio
description: Gift set includes - 1 x Baileys Original 5cl 1 x Disaronno Velvet 5cl 1 x Tequila Rose 5cl

name: Silent Pool Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 43% Size: 70cl This gin is named after the place where it is made—in Albury Estate, Surrey Hills, next to the beautiful and mysterious spring-fed Silent Pool lake. It is crafted with 24 botanicals that lend to its distinctively amazing and intricately balanced flavour. Its 24 botanical ingredients include local honey, chamomile, lavender, and kaffir lime Subtly sweet, but well-balanced With a floral aroma coming from lime leaf, lavender, and violet, and a kick of spice from juniper and cardamom The first sip is distinctive with orange blossom, chamomile, and elderflower, then warms up with the sweetness of honey and a gentle burst of black pepper Finishes with a rich vanilla-honey note

name: Silent Pool Gin Copa Glass
description: PERFECT PARTNER; Beautifully designed with our signature Silent Pool teal and copper color palette, this luxury copa glass is the perfect way to way to enjoy a G&T. RELEASE THE AROMAS; Aroma plays an important role in how we experience ‘taste’. That’s why we’ve designed our glasses with an extra wide-brim to release the aromatic oils from the gin to fully enhance the drink. OVERSIZED GLASS BOWL: Allows the glass to be filled liberally with large ice cubes. Large ice cubes melt less and therefore reduce dilution. Retaining that crisp clear flavour. Aaahh! PERFECT SERVE; Serve with a generous handful of ice, a dash of tonic and a twist of orange peel to garnish. SUSTAINABLE; we are constantly minimising our impact on both the local & wider environment by reducing carbon footprint & removing plastic.

name: Silent Pool Rose Expression Gin - Special edition 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 43% Size: 70cl Distilled with a unique rose tea infusion to create a distinctive yet delicate rose flavour. Rose Expression Gin shares the Silent Pool Gin DNA in terms of its complexity and refreshingly individual character, however the core recipe has been refined to compliment and enhance the rose notes. Some of the original botanicals – pear, bergamot, cubeb and cardamom – have been increased while lemon becomes the leading citrus. Light, elegant and smooth with notes of vetiver and cardamom mingling beautifully on the palate. Delicate rose notes build in the back of the mouth, along with a lingering finish of citrus and spice. Recommended Serve: 50ml Silent Pool Rose Expression Gin 150ml Premium Elderflower Tonic Handful of ice Garnish with a slice of pear

name: Silent Pool Tin Gift Set 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 43% Size: 70cl This gin is named after the place where it is made—in Albury Estate, Surrey Hills, next to the beautiful and mysterious spring-fed Silent Pool lake. It is crafted with 24 botanicals that lend to its distinctively amazing and intricately balanced flavour. Its 24 botanical ingredients include local honey, chamomile, lavender, and kaffir lime Subtly sweet, but well-balanced With a floral aroma coming from lime leaf, lavender, and violet, and a kick of spice from juniper and cardamom The first sip is distinctive with orange blossom, chamomile, and elderflower, then warms up with the sweetness of honey and a gentle burst of black pepper Finishes with a rich vanilla-honey note

name: Simpatico Spumante Rosa Prosecco 75cl
description: This Simpatico Rosa Spumante is a light and off-dry sparkling rosé with oodles of red fruit flavours and hints of strawberry sherbet.

name: Simply Dragon Fruit & Mango Cooler (1 Litre)
description: Simply Dragon Fruit & Mango Cooler (1 Litre) Add a punch of sweet flavour and vibrant colour with Simply Dragon Fruit and Mango Cooler. This is the best choice for making an eye-catching drink that also tastes amazing. Add a splash of white rum for a boozy tropical vibe, or mix with our blended Mango Smoothie for a delicious two-toned crushed cooler. • No Hydrogenated Fats • Halal Certified • Vegetarian Society Approved • Gluten Free • GMO Free • No Artificial Flavouring Ingredients Water, Sugar, Acid: Citric acid (E330), Concentrated Lemon Juice, Clouding agent (Emulsifiers (Gum Arabic (E414), Glycerol ester of wood rosin (E445)), Natural Flavouring), Natural flavouring, Concentrate (Sweet potato, Carrot), Sweetener: Sucralose (E955), Preservatives: Potassium sorbate (E202) and Sodium benzoate (E211) Directions Add portion (approximately 30ml) to a glass / cup of 170ml water with ice and stir before consumption Storage Instructions Store in dry, cool ambient conditions, away from heat sources and odorous materials. After opening, keep the container closed. Keep the cap area clean and free from syrup residues. Do not refrigerate – crystals may form in the liquid at low temperature. Shelf life after opening: 12 months. Suitable for vegans.

name: Simply Iced Tea Syrup 1L - Peach
description: One of the most popular flavours around, our Simply's Peach Iced Tea Syrup is perfectly sweet and absolutely delicious. For a super fast drink with a wide profit margin, you need this syrup on your Summer menu. Simply's Iced Teas are super easy to use and make the perfect quick refreshment. Perfect throughout Spring and Summer, all you need to do with these syrups is add cold water and you’ve got a delicious, quick serve beverage. Ingredients: Sugar, Water, Glycerine, Concentrated Fruit Juices Reconstituted (Lemon, Peach (10%)), Natural Flavour, Colour: E150a, Black Tea Extract (0.5%), Salt, Preservative: E202 Suitable for Vegetarians: Yes Suitable for Vegans: Yes

name: Simply Strawberry, Basil & Cucumber Cooler (1 Litre)
description: Simply Strawberry, Basil & Cucumber Syrup (1 Litre) This delicious Strawberry, Basil & Cucumber Cooler is the perfect summer drink and makes a great addition to your menu. Simply add to either still or carbonated water with ice for a long, refreshing drink. When used with the portion pump (available separately), each bottle contains approximately 125 shots. • No Hydrogenated Fats • Halal Certified • Vegetarian Society Approved • Gluten Free • GMO Free • No Artificial Flavouring Ingredients: Water, Sugar, Acidity regulator: Citric Acid, Concentrated Lemon Juice, Natural Flavouring, Clouding Agent (Emulsifiers (Gum Arabic, Glycerol Ester of Wood Rosin), Natural Flavouring), Colour: E163, Sweetener: Sucralose, Preservative: Potassium sorbate. Shelf life after opening: 12 months. Suitable for vegans.

name: Singha Lager Bottles 12x630ml
description: Alc vol: 5% Size: 12x630ml Best known for the lion that graces the front of every bottle Singha beer is a premium lager brewed from the finest ingredients. Brewed from the finest ingredients and the highest quality hops, Singha Premium Beer offers a floral, peppery aroma and fresh, zesty, hoppy bitterness in the taste. Full-bodied and rich in taste, with strong hops character Pilsner style Lager is perfect for enjoying with or without food Brewed in Thailand since 1933 German Style Lager Brewed from Imported yeast from Germany 5% alcohol by volume

name: Singha PerfectDraft 6L Keg
description: Alc Vol: 5% Size: 6lt Crisp, refreshing and smooth, Singha is crafted with a signature blend of the finest Saaz hops and 100% premium malted barley to offer delicate floral and herbal aromas with a well-balanced taste. Born in Bangkok and brewed for the world, Singha represents the joyful Thai spirit that helps spark magic in every moment. Discover the joy of every occasion and unlock the flavour of all pan-Asian cuisine with the original Thai beer in your Perfect Draft machine. Only to be used with Philips Perfect Draft dispensers Must be used in conjunction with the PerfectDraft Machine or a PerfectDraft Pro Machine

name: Singha Premium Beer 24x330ml
description: Brewed from the finest ingredients and the highest quality hops, Singha Premium Beer offers a floral, peppery aroma and fresh, zesty, hoppy bitterness in the taste. Full-bodied and rich in taste, with strong hops character Pilsner style Lager is perfect for enjoying with or without food Brewed in Thailand since 1933 German Style Lager Brewed from Imported yeast from Germany 5% alcohol by volume

name: Singleton of Dufftown 12 Year Old - 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl A relaunched Singleton, this time from Dufftown, to replace the now-defunct Singleton of Auchroisk. This smooth, mellow dram is designed to attract new drinkers to the malt category.

name: Singleton Scotch Whisky Game of Thrones Limited Edition 70cl
description: Singleton of Glendullan Select Single Malt Scotch Whisky 70cl House Tully located at Riverrun, rules as the lord of the River lands. The power of water flows through both House Tully and The Singleton Glendullan Select as it is made on the banks of the River Fiddich in the wooded hills of Dufftown. Here they harnessed the water that flowed through the land utilizing a water wheel to power the entire distillery. ABV 40%

name: Singleton Spey Cascade 70cl
description: The Spey Cascade single malt Scotch whisky from the Singleton of Dufftown is created with a balanced mix of whiskies aged in both bourbon and Sherry casks. The end result is warming with baked orchard fruits, demerara sugar and golden barley. Perfect for early evening dramming, this one - laid back with good flavour behind it. The folks at the Singleton of Dufftown also say Spey Cascade combines well with chocolate truffles, too. If you're feeling decadent, go for it.

name: Sipsmith London Dry Gin 5cl Miniature
description: No G&T is complete without a good old London Dry Gin and this edition from Sipsmith London guarantees exceptional taste. Bursting with notes of fresh citrus fruits and spicy pepper, be sure to add this one to your collection. Sipsmith London Dry Gin is a revolutionary gin, guaranteed to get lovers of this fine expression. A handcrafted gin which pays homage to the legacy of its hometown, London. Distilled in traditional coppers pots, this exemplary gin is perfect for lovers of a classic G&T. A traditional juniper base is uplifted with zesty notes of orange marmalade and lemon tart. Grassy herbs paired with the warmth of pepper add balance to the flavour, for a rounded and harmonious finish. This 5ml miniature is ideal for a one-off drink, or pick up the full-sized 50cl bottle. Perfect Serve: Do you need us to tell you? Make it a G&T

name: Sipsmith London Dry Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 41.6% Size 70cl “Juniper, almond, lemon: this new-school gin will become a classic.” - The Sunday Times Sipsmith was the first London Distillery to be opened in over 100 years, and quickly acquired an iconic status around the world. This, The London Dry Gin, is distilled from the finest English Barley spirit using 10 carefully selected botanicals, and blended with the exceptionally pure water of Lydwell spring, (a source of the River Thames). The result is an interpretation of the classic London Dry style that pays homage to its heritage, tasting particularly dry with a wonderful burst of juniper and a zesty, citrus freshness. One of the most interesting new Gins to emerge for quite some time. The expression of a classic, traditional London Dry Gin. Bold, complex and fragrant, smooth enough for a Martini, yet rich and balanced, perfect for a G&T.

name: Sipsmith Origin 1639 Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 42% Size 70cl Forget everything you think you know about gin’s past and discover our newly bestowed Sipsmith Origin 1639 gin. This devilishly delicious blend revives a 17th-century recipe, offering a fresh twist on a classic spirit. You might say, we’re taking it back to how it was gin-tended. Inspired by the very recipe that sparked modern gin, tucked away in the 1639 standards manual of the Worshipful Company of Distillers of London – The Distiller of London. It’s juniper-forward and bursting with berries, just like they made it in the 17th century. Embracing our tradition of innovation, we’ve recreated this ancient recipe with a unique approach. We start with a new make spirit, typically used in whisky, which lends a rich, buttery mouthfeel. The juniper heart remains the star of the show but we’ve elevated the flavour with the addition of ripe raspberries and strawberries. After resting in oak barrels and chill filtering, the result is a gin that’s as complex as it is smooth. Origin 1639 Gin is a perfect blend of classic juniper, vibrant citrus, and a spicy backbone. With its rich berry notes and unique character, it shines on the rocks, in a classic Gin Rickey, or an Old Fashioned garnished with candied ginger.

name: Sipsmith Sipping Vodka 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Our spirits at Sipsmith are distilled from the finest 100% wheat spirit, which is perfectly showcased in our Sipping Vodka. Distilled on copper for added purity, we have no need to filter, add glycerine, fructose, or any aromatisers. Award winning Sipsmith Sipping Vodka; With no added extras, this copper distilled vodka requires no filtering. This is a pure and unadulterated vodka, designed to be sipped. The best sipping vodka on the market.

name: Sipsmith Strawberry Smash Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl. The second of our Sipping Series of limited-edition gins is Strawberry Smash, inspired by our partnership with Wimbledon. A unique London Dry Gin distilled with the 2020 strawberry harvest from Hugh Lowe Farms in Kent, exclusive grower for Wimbledon. Hand crafted in London, with the addition of a hint of English mint for perfectly balanced flavour, enjoy as a G&T with a winning garnish: a freshly sliced strawberry. Distilled from wheat. It is with this award-winning quintessential expression of a classic London Dry Gin that we have been credited with bringing back gin to its birthplace of London and pioneering the British gin boom. Every bottle is lovingly laboured over by our dedicated team of distillers, hand crafted using traditional copper stills and a classic ten botanical recipe. An ideal choice for a beautifully rich and balanced G&T. Suitable for vegetarians

name: Sipsmith V.J.O.P. Gin 70cl
description: ABV - 57.7% Size - 70cl All hail the juniper berry! If, like us, you think the juniper berry is a proper champion of the botanical world, then you'll love Sipsmith's V.J.O.P., which is jam packed with the fresh, peppery berries. V.J.O.P. (which of course stands for "Very Junipery Over Proof") is made in a similar way to Sipsmith's regular gin, except that the juniper has been turned up to eleven. With extra juniper added to the original recipe, even more is added while the gin is in Sipsmith's lovely pot still, and it's also vapour infused via their Carter Head. As if this wasn't enough to make the V.J.O.P. stand out in a crowd, it's also been bottled at 57.7% to give it a hefty, "junipery" kick.

name: Sipsmith Zesty Orange Gin Miniature 5cl
description: 40% ABV Size: 5cl Miniature The Zesty Orange gin of Sipsmith packs in plenty of citrus sweetness. It’s bright and floral on the nose, with marmalade in the palate and cinnamon in the finish.

name: Sir Passo 2016 Duca di Saragnano Toscana IGT 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 14% Size: 75cl Country : Italy Grapes: Sangioves Sir Passo by Duca di Saragnano is a blend of red berried grapes born from the desire to experiment with new flavours, new aromas and new scents that can surprise and amaze from the first taste. With an intense ruby red coat, it brings intense aromas of ripe red fruit, primarily cherry and black cherry. In the mouth it is soft and velvety, with smooth tannins and a nice overall freshness. Excellent with savoury first courses, excellent red meat and game. Deep red color. It is characterized by unique aromas of ripe red fruits and black cherries. The taste is soft on the palate with a velvety finish.

name: Siren Lumina IPA Perfectdraft 6lt Keg
description: ABV: 4.2% Size: 6L Can Only to be used with Philips Perfect Draft dispenser Siren is a modern brewery based in Finchampstead, Berkshire, creating flavourforward beers devised to excite and intrigue. Lumina is an epiphany moment for Siren, a coming together of experience, experimentation and evolution to create our most accessible session beer ever, with poise and adventure of universal appeal. It's the brand's shining light, glowing with juicy tropical fruit notes. Hoppy aromas of mango and pineapple guide you towards explosive flavour, flashes of delicate citrus highlights and refreshing balanced bitterness. Siren Lumina is brewed to a gluten-free recipe. However, during the PerfectDraft keg filling process, we cannot guarantee the absence of trace amounts of gluten, as the filling lines are not tested for gluten. As a result, this product cannot be certified as gluten-free in PerfectDraft keg format. Style: IPA Country: UK Brewery: Siren Serving Temp: 6 °C Price Per Pint: £3.26

name: Skips Prawn Cocktail Crisps 16 x 45g, £1.35 PMP
description: Size - 16 x 45g Light & melty Suitable for Vegetarians Snacks can be enjoyed as part of a balanced diet and healthy lifestyle, including regular exercise. name: Skreach Cider Brandy, Port Cask Finish 50cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 50cl THE ORCHARD’S LOVECHILD We have teamed up with Noah from Skreach Cider to produce this truly amazing Cider Brandy. It has been an excruciating last few month waiting for this baby to mature but finally it is here! Working with Noah has been an experience in itself, a larger than life Cornish farmer who just happens to make a really good cider. He is true to his craft and picks, mills and presses his own apples and then ferments for months until the right flavours have developed. He doesn't take any shortcuts and he certainly doesn't rush the process, a perfect match, needless to say we get on well. The Cider Brandy itself has been double distilled in our copper pot still, Jackson. The distillate has then been split and left to mature in American Bourbon oak casks. Only 400 bottles are produced every year.

name: Slane Irish Whiskey  - Triple Casked 70cl
description: Slane Irish Whiskey is made using whiskeys drawn from a trio of casks - virgin oak casks, seasoned casks (which previously contained Tennessee whiskey and bourbon) and Oloroso Sherry casks. name: Slingsby Blackberry Gin - 70cl
description: Size - 70cl ABV - 40% Slingsby Blackberry Gin is crafted with our award-winning London Dry Gin base and infused with Yorkshire blackberries. The Slingsby range is made using locally sourced botanicals, water drawn from the world-famous Harrogate aquifer, pure single grain spirit and a handful of the finest ingredients sourced from around the world. Like all our flavoured gins, Slingsby Blackberry Gin has been sampled by customers through our instore Kilner jars at our Spirit of Harrogate store and after receiving such positive feedback, we have decided to launch this as our newest fruit-flavoured gin. Initial floral hints of violet followed by rich blackberry jam notes. The result is a bright, fruity and refreshing gin with a beautifully sweet finish and a well-rounded mouthfeel

name: Slingsby Gooseberry Gin 70cl
description: Size - 70cl ABV - 40% Slingsby Gooseberry Gin, a testament to the restorative power of nature and craftsmanship, brings the essence of a serene Yorkshire town to your glass. With crystal-clear aquifer water and locally sourced botanicals, including the star, Yorkshire gooseberries, it offers an unmistakable tangy sharpness tempered by fruity sweetness. This gin retains the classic citrus notes of a London Dry Gin, making it a delightful balance of tradition and innovation. Serve it over ice with premium Mediterranean tonic water, garnished with freshly sliced green apple, and let the symphony of flavours elevate your gin experience.

name: Slingsby London Dry Gin 70cl

name: Slingsby Navy Strength Gin - 70cl
description: Size - 70cl ABV - 57% Bottled at 57% ABV, Slingsby Navy Strength Gin continues the tradition of the Royal Navy’s ‘proof test’, whereby gunpowder can still ignite if gin is accidentally spilled upon it. The Citrus from the Grapefruit is more pronounced than the London Dry Gin and once the Citrus has mellowed, it allows the Softer and Earthier botanicals to become more dominant.

name: Slingsby Rhubarb Gin 70cl

These unique botanicals are complemented with sweet Yorkshire rhubarb, water drawn from the world-famous Harrogate aquifer, pure single grain spirit and a handful of the finest ingredients sourced from around the world.

name: Smokehead Islay Single Malt Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: ABV: 40% Size: 70cl Smokehead is a popular single Islay malt from Ian Macleod distillers. Smokehead Islay Single Malt Scotch Whisky is intensely rich yet subtly sweet. With immense smoke and notes of sea salt and spice, this is a vigorous whisky that stands out from the crowd. A whisky that’s uncompromising, unexpected and defiantly different, Smokehead embodies a wild spirit that’s custom built for outliers. THE FIRST IMPRESSION The aroma of something powerful and fiery awaiting you. Thick, heavy woodsmoke. Rich, earthy peat. Extremes of spice and sweetness. Fresh lemon, zesty ginger, rich plum jam. THE FULL-ON FLAVOUR An explosion of breathtaking peppery, peaty heat, soothed by honeyed sweetness, before the smoke comes to the fore again THE FINALE Exotic spices and a curious citrus tang of mandarin, both lulling you into a false sense of calm as the peat roars back to hit your senses again.

name: Smokehead Rum Cask Rebel Islay Single Malt Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: Size - 70cl ABV - 46% Not so much finished in rum casks, more a rebel barely contained within, bursting to get out. This rebel is rich, peaty, salty, Smokehead colliding beautifully with spicy, sweet Caribbean Rum casks. Immense smoke and spice takes on citrus, banana, pear drops and a hint of honey, for a taste of true anarchy. The First Impression - Fiery peat kicks things off, naturally. But then comes a sweetness - burnt marshmallows, charred pineapple, banana.... Bacon? We warned you The Full on Flavour - A briny, oily, intense smoke hits hard but doused quickly with a spoonful of honey and lemon The Finale - And, when the dust settles, the smoky dying embers of toasted oak remains. Along with just a hint of a fruity aftermath .

name: Smokehead Tequila Cask Terminado Islay Single Malt Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: Size - 70cl ABV - 43% Terminado brings together Smokehead Islay single malt with tequila. It’s the meeting of two restless spirits – and the awakening of a mesmerising whisky. There, in this tequila cask finish, fiery peat awakes with wild agave. You ain’t tasted nothing like this before. The first impression: Peaty smoke struts with vanilla and shortbread. Almonds mix with chewy meringue. Blood orange stirs with burnt sugar. And barbecued pineapple brings a surprise move. The full-on flavour: A riot of smoke and citrus. Peat and malt go toe-to-toe with toffee, lime spins with peach, and citrus balances perfectly with burnt corn-on-the-cob. The finale: The finish is long and sweet with a gentle heat. With a dash of citrus and sprinkle of pepper. But it’s still not the end. There’s always time for another dance.

name: Sourz  Raspberry 70cl
description: Alc Vol:15% Size: 70cl A delightful spiked berry liqueur with intense raspberry flavours. This raspberry liqueur in an electrifying red tinge gives off a nice and sweet spirited berry scent One swig will send your mouth to an exhilarating frenzy with its strong fruit flavours, neatly balanced with equal hints of sour and sweet This flavourful drink is hard to resist, especially when mixed in a raspberry ripple of Sourz Raspberry and your favourite lemonade Drink on its own or as a pleasant addition to your fruity cocktails

name: Sourz Apple 70cl
description: Alc Vol:15% Size 70cl A crisp-tasting apple liqueur with a fresh and intense fruity flavour. Great as a neat shooter or as a sweet and sour mixer for a range of cocktails. Launched in the year 1999 as Sourz Sour Apple, later renamed and repackaged while maintaining its original, convincingly apple flavour. A distinct vibrant jade green colour, reminiscent of classic apple drinks This spirited liqueur’s aroma is one of green apple skins with hints of boiled green sweets and faint passion flower and honeydew melon scents You’ll pucker your mouth and lips with Sourz Apple’s bittersweet acidity, mixed with an intense but nice sweetness, balancing out the citrus sourness. Expect hints of lime zest, lime cordial, and granny smith apple peels Savour the lingering citric acid and tart apple sweet-and-sourness and lasting soapiness

name: Sourz Blackcurrant 70cl
description: Alc Vol:15% Size 70cl Sourz Blackcurrant balances deep hits of dark fruits with hints of sweet and sour. Something to celebrate? Whether its a birthday, graduation or simply to raise a toast, Sourz Blackcurrant is perfect on its own, or with lemonade and prosecco to amp up the fruity flavour. It comes in a colourful glow-in-the-dark bottle, perfect for adding an eye-catching touch to your home bar. Sourz first entered the UK party scene in 1999 and is now one of Britain's best-known liqueurs. At home or in the bar, Sourz is made to be shared with friends. It's become one of the UK's most iconic liqueurs since the original flavour – apple – launched in 1999. Today there are lots of fun fruity flavours to choose from, and some limited editions to try. Each one is the perfect combination of sweet and tangy, with a mouth-puckering taste that can liven up any pitcher drink or cocktail. The iconic bottle has become a regular sight at gatherings and celebrations and, because of the glow-in-the-dark label, it's easy to spot in the club too. Spirit Drink Spirituose Mit Farbstoff

name: Sourz Lemon & Lime Liqueur 70cl - New Flavour
description: Alc Vol:15% Size 70cl Sourz Lemon & Lime liqueur is super versatile and can be used as a shooter or long drink ingredient. Pour a 25ml measure into a clear shot glass for a fruity, tangy shot. Or, mix it into your favourite cocktails to bring a burst of summer flavour. It's super refreshing mixed into a chilled Spritz or Slushie, and can also be added to Prosecco for a bold twist at your next celebration. Zesty and zingy, Sourz Lemon & Lime liqueur is perfect for parties. Great for shots or mixing into a spritz or slushie cocktail. Vivid lime green colour brightens up mixed drinks. Lively citrus flavour with a sour twist. Glow-in-the-dark bottle adds statement style to your home bar.

Perfect as a shot every bottle of Sourz is sure to give you that bitter bold taste you will forever crave.

Proudly colourful and bursting with sweet and sour flavours, with a surprisingly tingly aftertaste!

And now it's available in 6-litre PerfectDraft keg format so you can pour a perfect pint every time. name: Spitfire Premium Amber Ale Bottles 8x500ml
description: ABV: 4.5% Size 8 x 500ml A true classic, Spitfire Amber is the head of the Spitfire family and a true taste of Kent. It was first brewed to commemorate the 50th anniversary of the Battle of Britain, played out in the skies above Kentish soil. It is brewed using 100% Kentish hops, the finest malt and water drawn from a well deep beneath Shepherd Neame’s Faversham brewery.

name: Spitfire Premium Golden Ale Bottles 8x500ml
description: ABV: 4.3% Size: 8 x 500ml Spitfire Gold is an easy-drinking versatile ale, lightly golden in hue, well-balanced and full of flavour. Sweeter and more mellow than its amber counterpart, it has proved an enduringly popular addition to the Spitfire family. Pure golden ale. Golden ale with substance and character. Brewed by Britain's oldest brewer, Spitfire Golden Ale is a well-balanced ale. Its sweet malt base is complemented by subtle bitterness and tropical aromas imparted by some of the world's favourite hops, including Challenger, Centennial and Saaz. Official licensed partner of the RAF Brewed by Britain's oldest brewer, Spitfire Golden Ale is a well-balanced ale. Its sweet malt base is complemented by subtle bitterness and tropical aromas imparted by some of the world's favourite hops, including Challenger, Centennial and Saaz

This product is for use with Perfect Draft Dispensers only and cannot be used on its own. Please check the compatibility of your beer pump.

description: Serve your spritz in style with our St‑Germain Spritz Signature Glasses. Inspired by timeless Art-Deco design, these glasses are engraved and delicately gilded for a luxurious finish that perfectly complements the elegance of St‑Germain. The elegant St. Germain glass is just right for enjoying the summery St. Germain cocktail with soda and sparkling wine. The St. Germain glass has the brand name embossed twice on the side and the logo of the brands on the bottom of the glass, which consists of a "St. G", which you can easily read if you look deeply into the glass. The eye-catcher of the St. Germain glass is of course the gold-plated drinking rim. In any way other than that gold rim, a St. Germain cocktail should never kiss her lips again. name: Star Finest Lager Beer Bottle 20 x 450ml - Imported from Nigeria
description: ABV: 5.1% Size: 20 x 450ml Bottles Nigeria's number 1 beer is now available in the UK. Dated BBE: Star Beer is a popular lager beer produced in Nigeria. It is a product of Nigerian Breweries Plc, one of the largest brewing companies in Nigeria. The beer has been produced since the mid-1940s and has become a staple in the Nigerian market. Star Beer is known for its crisp, refreshing taste and slightly bitter finish. It has a golden-yellow colour and is made from the finest natural ingredients, including water, malted barley, hops, and yeast. The beer has a moderate alcohol content of around 5% by volume, making it a popular choice for social events and gatherings. The brand’s logo features a prominent red star representing excellence and quality. The packaging of Star Beer is also distinctive, with a green bottle and a red label bearing the star logo. Star Beer has won numerous awards for its quality and taste, including the Monde Selection gold medal and the International Taste and Quality Institute’s Superior Taste Award. It is also a popular export product, with a strong presence in other African countries and beyond. Star Beer is a well-known and beloved Nigerian beer brand, prized for its quality, refreshing taste, and cultural significance.

name: Star of Bombay London Dry Gin 70cl

name: Stella Artois Unfiltered 24x440ml Cans
description: Alc Vol: 5% Size: 24 x 440ml Cans Introducing Stella Artois Unfiltered Lager. ​​ Naturally Unfiltered for a more flavourful taste. ​​ ​Description:​ Our Belgian brewmasters honour the brewing methods of the past to create this unfiltered premium lager. The absence of filtration allows the fresh flavours of malt, Saaz and Mandarina Bavaria hops to burst through for a naturally flavourful taste. ​Stella is crispy, hoppy and refreshing with every sip. The absence of filtration allows the fresh flavours of malt and Saaz hops to shine through for a naturally vibrant and refreshing taste. Best enjoyed chilled. ​A naturally crisp and vibrant taste profile is encapsulated within this hazy, golden lager. It delivers malty notes and smooth refreshing finish. Perfectly complemented by a pleasant round, fruity hop aroma, with hints of ripe pineapple in background.​ ​Style:​ Unfiltered premium lager​ ​What is unfiltered lager?:​ Bypassing filtration is a more natural way of brewing, less processing allows for a more flavourful beer. This beer is slightly more hazy because the beer has been able to retain more of its natural goodness.​​ ​As this is a natural product, some sedimentation may occur on the bottom of the bottle. If this happens, please turn the bottle upside down once to release the sediment.​

name: Stella Artois Unfiltered 6L Keg Perfectdraft
description: ABV: 5% Size: 6L Only to be used with Philips Perfect Draft dispensers Stella Artois’ Belgian brewmasters honour the brewing methods of the past to create this unfiltered premium lager. The absence of filtration allows the fresh flavours of malt and Saaz hops to burst through for a naturally vibrant taste. ​​Unfiltered is bursting with natural flavour because the yeast and smaller proteins that would normally be removed are left in, giving the beer a more vibrant taste and a hazier appearance - all at 5% ABV. It pours a slightly hazy golden colour, packed with fresh flavours coming from the Saaz hops, enjoy 6 litres of Stella Artois Unfiltered on your PerfectDraft machine This product is for use with Perfect Draft Beer Dispensers only and cannot be used on its own. Please check the compatibility of your beer pump. Product Type: PerfectDraft Kegs Style: Lager and Hybrid Beers Country: Belgium Brewery: Stella Artois Serving Temp: 3°C

name: Stock XO Brandy 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl The Famous Brandy from Italy was first made by Lionello Stock in 1884. This Stock Extra Old Brandy pays tribute to the founder being aged longer than any other brandy from the company. Dark, rich and smooth it is testament to the legacy of its forefather, Lionello Stock. To celebrate the brand's 120th anniversary and to honour the legacy of more than 120 years of excellence, they have produced this extraordinary Stock XO Extra Old brandy. By selecting and distilling the best grapes, followed by a long maturation in oak casks, longer than for any Stock brandy ever before, they are able to present this extraordinary brandy. Dark, rich and smooth, it's an experience that has to be discovered. Produced and bottled in the Czech Republic.

name: Stoli Elit Vodka Night Edition - Light Up Bottle 70cl
description: ABV - 40% Size - 70cl Planning a special vodka night? Light up your night with a premium bottle of Stoli Elit Vodka Night Edition. This special edition bottle illuminates in the dark. The bottle takes inspiration from the night sky, lunar eclipses and is a celebration of nightlife. The slender bottle, finished in matte black, has the ability to light up by simply pushing the button on the LED insert located at the base of the bottle. Nose: Dry, clean aromas. Slightly grainy. Hints of woody notes. Palate: Hints of charcoal meld with an oily, creamy palate. Very supple and refined. Finish: Long, becomes slightly sweet.

name: Stolichnaya Cucumber Vodka 70cl
description: ABV 37.5% Size:70cl STOLI Cucumber flavored vodka is bursting with the crisp, cool flavor of fresh cucumber. Light and savory with a sweet edge, its natural taste works wonderfully in a variety of refreshing cocktails. Our meticulously crafted vodka is made from natural flavors and grain, triple-filtered through quartz sand and a birch activated charcoal column, ensuring outstanding quality and unparalleled smoothness. STOLI has won over 100 awards around the world.

name: Stolichnaya Elit 70cl
description: The quintessential Russian Vodka, this ultra premium classic from one of the largest drink producers in the world is made using a patented freeze filtration method. This gives Stolichnaya Elit its smooth, unparalleled purity, accentuated by lush aniseed flavour and subtle spicy hints that makes for that classic vodka taste. Dry and clean to the nose, with a slightly grainy aroma and subtle woody notes Lovely hints of smokiness over an oily and creamy base for the supple and refined palate Clean and smooth with grainy influences of cracked black pepper and smoother vanilla and a faint cream of soda-feel Long and strong finish that ends with a slightly sweet aftertaste

name: Stolichnaya Lime Vodka 70cl
description: Size - 70cl ABV - 37.5% I'm Stoli® Lime - with the pleasant taste of fresh limes. My origins are in the fertile region of Tambov, where my own wheat farms surround my state-of-the-art distillery, Talvis. Here, my certified 'Alpha Grade' spirit - the finest reference of purity and quality - is distilled just three times to preserve my gentle, grainy character. My spirit then travels to the historic Latvijas Balzams in Riga, where I become vodka. Here, I am married with natural lime flavors to achieve my distinctively smooth Stoli® Lime taste.

name: Stolichnaya Raspberry 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 37.5% Size: 70cl Stoli Razberi is a raspberry flavoured Russian vodka, distilled using Stoli’s revolutionary freeze filtration process, resulting in a fresh, fruity aroma and zest that keep true to its vodka roots. Pairs brilliantly with ice-cold citrus drinks. Taste the natural essence of berries in this flavoured vodka The crystal clear appearance and pungent-hard candy/boiled sweets-smelling of this fruity concoction will lure you in and keep you wanting more Extremely aromatic with strong hints of ripe cherry and raspberry jam sweetness Slightly sweet flavour with fresh and sweet raspberry jam undertones and smoky-grainy black pepper taste that doesn’t overpower the freshness of its vodka base Ripe but dry cherry-raspberry finish Authentic Latvian product

name: Stolichnaya Red Premium Vodka 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Stolichnaya Red Premium also known as Stoli ® Vodka is a classically styled, exceptionally smooth vodka. Crystal clear in color with marshmallow, mineral and mild fruit peel aromas, a soft, supple entry leads to a smooth, medium bodied palate with pastry frosting, talc and citrus rind flavors. It finishes with a clean, lightly sweet, sugar dust, wet straw and balanced pepper fade. Stolichnaya's origins are in the fertile region of Tambov, where its own wheat farms surround state-of-the-art distillery, Talvis. Here, certified 'Alpha Grade' spirit - the finest reference of purity and quality - is distilled just three times to preserve gentle, grainy character. The spirit then travels to the historic Latvijas Balzams in Riga, where It becomes vodka. Just four filtrations through quartz sand and birch wood charcoal are all that is needed to acquire unsurpassed smoothness. Made with certified alpha grade spirit 100% grain neutral spirits

name: Stones Original Green Ginger Wine 70cl
description: ABV: 13.5% Size: 70cl Stone's Original Ginger Wine was first produced in 1740 at the Finsbury Distillery in London, and still uses a secret recipe which contains the finest raisins, ginger, and a pepper from Australia. Stone's is very versatile. Perfect to drink on its own, or add to a scotch whiskey to create the famed 'Whisky Mac', Stone's Original can be enjoyed all year round in a variety of cocktails and delicious food recipes. How do you like yours? Lemonade Cup Try 2 shots of Stone's in a tall glass topped with chilled lemonade and lots of ice. For a seasonal twist add a few slices of cucumber and any ripe fruit.
