description: ABV - 42.8% Size - 70cl Quality gin: Stranger & Sons Gin was conceived to celebrate the agricultural diversity and abundance of India and its love affair with spices Glorious taste: A selection of inherently Indian botanicals lend the gin a wonderfully strange Indian personality Spirit of India: In addition to juniper, the 8 ingredients include a bouquet of locally cultivated and hand-picked spices plus a medley of four Indian citrus peels Legendary gin: The recipe for Stranger & Sons Gin was supposedly passed down to our founders by a mythical two-tailed, three eyed creature who appeared to them in a dream Includes: 1 x 70cl bottle of Stranger & Sons Gin (42.8% ABV). Serve with tonic water & a slice of ginger

name: Strawberry & Balsamico Gin 70cl That Boutique-y Gin Company
description: Alc Vol: 46% Size: 70cl We've created an astoundingly decadent tipple with Strawberry & Balsamico Gin. A classic gin base acts as a canvas for the addition of fresh strawberries, strawberry and black pepper distillates and the very finest balsamic vinegar money can buy - Aceto di Balsamico tradizionale di Modena DOP, aged between 12 and 25 years in casks made from chestnut, cherry, oak, mulberry, ash and juniper (of course). So yeah, we HAD to find a way to use it in a gin. Ta-da! Tasting notes: Nose: Dark red fruits - cherry, strawberry and cranberry - mixed with the rich and mysterious darkness of the balsamic, creating a rich chocolate-treacle note. Taste: A delightful balance between the plump, juicy strawberries and the complexity of the balsamic, which provides some woodiness and a touch of refined bitterness, but minimal acidity. Finish: Cinder toffee and the lasting sweetness of strawberry. When it comes to flavours, you really do get two for the price of one with this gin! Perfect Serve: Cream Soda.

name: Symphonia Dry Gin 70cl
description: VOL - 70cl ABV - 40% • The Champion of Champions at the Irish Gin Awards – Best Gin in Ireland. • Cold distilled in a glass still makes this dry gin delicate, sophisticated, complex and smooth. • The freshest local botanicals sourced from a few miles around the distillery. • Features juniper, rosemary, rose and then dandelion for a peppery finish. • Delicate flavours are preserved using cold distillation giving the gin a wider palette of • flavours compared to a gin produced in a traditional still. • Produced by a unique process which only generate 2% of the CO 2 of a typical still making it • the most sustainable spirits production ever. • Enjoy a fantastic gin knowing you are doing your bit to slow global warming. • Winner of Two Stars at the Great Taste Awards and Silver Medal at the IWSC. • Enjoy with your favourite tonic, ice and a slice of lemon.

name: Symphonia Irish Apple Gin 70cl
description: VOL - 70cl ABV - 40% • Like drinking a Gin and Tonic and eating a Granny Smith apple at the same time. • Protected Geographical Ingredient (PGI) the Armagh Bramley apple gives a crisp green apple • taste which works in harmony with the juniper botanicals to provide a refreshing twist on a • classic gin. • Cold distilled in a glass still makes this apple gin delicate, sophisticated, complex and • smooth. • The freshest local botanicals sourced from a few miles around the distillery. • Delicate flavours are preserved using cold distillation giving the gin a wider palette of • flavours compared to a gin produced in a traditional still. • Produced by a unique process which only generate 2% of the CO 2 of a typical still making it • the most sustainable spirits production ever. • Enjoy a fantastic gin knowing you are doing your bit to slow global warming. • Winner of Two Stars at the Great Taste Awards • Enjoy with your favourite mixer or as a replacement for dry gin in a cocktail to give a • refreshing crisp apple burst.

name: Symphonia Raspberry Gin Liqueur 70cl
description: VOL - 70cl ABV - 40% • A subtle sophisticated approach to a pink gin , not overly sweet showcasing local raspberries • and orchard honey. • Cold distilled in a glass still makes this raspberry gin liqueur delicate, sophisticated, complex • and smooth. • The freshest local botanicals sourced from a few miles around the distillery. • Delicate flavours are preserved using cold distillation giving the spirit a wider palette of • flavours compared to a gin produced in a traditional still. • Produced by a unique process which only generate 2% of the CO 2 of a typical still making it • the most sustainable spirits production ever. • Enjoy a fantastic gin liqueur knowing you are doing your bit to slow global warming. • Enjoy with lemonade or elderflower tonic with lashings of summer fruit and a sprig of mint, • or for a different twist, combined with cold bubbly prosecco.

name: Taittinger Brut Reserve 75cl
description: ABV: 12.5% Size: 70cl Our signature cuvée, Taittinger Brut Réserve, is assembled from more than 35 crus and incorporates 40% Chardonnay - this high level is seldom offered in a non-vintage Champagne. Distinguished by a delicate nose marked by subtle brioche notes, it has a palate of considerable depth and balance with hints of honey and fresh fruit with a long, fresh finish. Brut Réserve Taittinger is one of the last great Champagne Houses to remain independent and is owned and actively managed by the family named on the label. The family are guardians of Taittinger's style quality and integrity. The hallmark of their fine Champagnes is the high proportion of Chardonnay used in their winemaking which is key, in the Champagne region, for producing wines of great elegance and finesse. Additionally, with its vineyard ownership of 288 ha (one of the largest in Champagne), Taittinger can guarantee a flawless signature, and wines heralded worldwide for their consistent quality. Our signature cuvée, Taittinger Brut Réserve, is assembled from more than 35 crus and incorporates 40% Chardonnay - this high level is seldom offered in a non-vintage Champagne. Distinguished by a delicate nose marked by subtle brioche notes, it has a palate of considerable depth and balance with hints of honey and fresh fruit with a long, fresh finish.

name: Taittinger Brut Reserve NV Champagne 75cl In Gift Box
description: Size: 75cl Alc Vol 12.5% The Taittinger Brut Reserve NV is a beautifully brilliant golden colour with bubbles which are fine and a mousse both discreet and persistent. On your palate, the flavour is both fruity and bready, exuding aromas of peach, white flowers, honey and vanilla. This lively, fresh Champagne is aged for three to four years in the cellars where it achieves perfect maturity and well-developed aromatic maturity too. A perfect accompaniment to white meat, lamb with chanterelles, crayfish and mushroom quiche. Beautifully brilliant golden colour wine With bubbles which are fine and a mousse both discreet and persistent On your palate, the flavour is both fruity and bready A perfect accompaniment to white meat, lamb with chanterelles, crayfish and mushroom quiche

name: Takamaka Dark Spiced 70cl Rum
description: Alc Vol: 38% Size: 70cl A sweet, spiced rum from Takamaka, made with rum from the Seychelles that is infused with locally-sourced spices, including vanilla, caramel, papaya and tropical spices. The result is a versatile rum that works as well over ice as it does in a fruity, tropical cocktail. Definitely one for those with a bit of a sweet tooth!

name: Talisker 10 Year Single Malt Whisky 70cl
description: ABV: 45.8% Size: 70cl, Talisker 10 Year Old is the stalwart of the Talisker family and is highly prized by the whisky community. It is one of the most awarded single malt Scotch whiskies in the world including Double Gold medal winner at the San Francisco World Spirits Competition for four years in a row, including 2020. It is double distilled to create a rich, deep character embodying the maritime characteristics of a coastal whisky and then aged for a minimum of 10 years in American oak casks. Talisker 10 Year Old makes a perfect present for adventurers who share the wild spirit of our founders, who rowed to the Isle of Skye in 1830 where Talisker has been distilled ever since. Founded by the intrepid MacAskill brothers in 1830, Talisker is a whisky for adventurers, those happiest close to nature. Presented in a gift box, it makes the perfect present for adventurous wild spirits looking to explore smoky island whiskies. Delivered in a beautiful maritime gift box.

name: Talisker Select Reserve Game of Thrones House Greyjoy Limited Edition 70cl
description: House Greyjoy rules the Iron Islands and worships the Drowned God. This single malt is distilled on the shores of the Isle of Skye, one of the most remote and rugged areas of Scotland. Talisker's layered flavours and signature maritime character are the result of its wave-battered shores. Creating an intense smoky single malt scotch with spicy, powerful and sweet elements combined with maritime flavours.

name: Talisker Skye Single Malt Scotch 70cl
description: ABV: 45.8% Size 70cl Talisker is a highly awarded family of single malt whiskies, with Skye receiving Gold at the International Wine and Spirits Competition 2015. Made by the sea on the rugged Isle of Skye, Talisker Skye Single Malt Scotch Whisky is well balanced and approachable, with a lively interplay between sweetness, smoke and spice A well-rounded and sweet flavour profile packed with fresh citrus, sweet smoke, peppery spice and traditional Talisker maritime notes. It's matured in a combination of refill and toasted American oak casks, with a slightly higher proportion of toasted casks. Talisker Skye takes the distillery's classically rugged character and softens it out, while maintaining the smoky and sweet notes the distillery is known for Skye is a fresher, brighter cousin to the Talisker 10 Year Old, with fresh citrus bursts and underlying sweetness, matured in a combination of refill and toasted American oak casks for depth of flavour.

name: Talisker Special Release 2021  Single Malt Scotch Whisky 2012 - 8 year old
description: Alc Vol: 45.8% Size: 70cl Returning for the second year in a row, we are welcomed with another 8-year-old Talisker from Diageo's 2021 Special Releases, though this time the whisky has been matured in heavily peated refill casks. Bottled at natural cask strength, expect a big, bold character from this Talisker. Following the theme of Legends Untold, the label features a fire-breathing sea monster emerging from the coastal waters of Skye - the home of Talisker.

name: Talisker Special Releases 2024 - 8 Year Old Single Malt Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 58.7% Size: 70cl Discover Talisker 8 Year Old Special Release 2024, a whisky meticulously crafted on the Isle of Skye, Scotland. This expression showcases a complex character with maritime notes complemented by subtle spice and oak influences. Talisker distillery, established in 1830, is renowned for its distinct coastal profile, derived from the salty air and rugged landscape. This release reflects the distillery’s commitment to producing quality single malts that encapsulate the essence of their unique Scotch heritage.

name: Talisker Surge Single Malt Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 45.8% Size: 70cl Single Malt Scotch Whisky made by the sea, from rugged coastlines and beastly storms, to warming sunbeams and soaring skies, the Isle of Skye powers through our veins and invigorates our souls. Fierce and formidable this force of nature is captured within this rich spiced whisky.

name: Tamdhu 12 Year Old Single Malt Whisky, 70cl
description: ABV: 43% Size: 70cl Aged for just longer than a decade, Tamdhu 12 Year Old is a 43% ABV dram displayed in a rather dashing and sleek bottle. Matured in Oloroso sherry casks for the entire aging process, this highly loved expression features a nose with notes of orange sweets, cinnamon rolls and some toasted oak with a little hint of mint chocolate. The palate has lots of juicy fruits including plum and banana, as well as some sweet jammy doughnuts and oaky spice. The finish is bold and smoky with chocolate cake, smoke and some more cinnamon.

name: Tamnavulin Single Malt Scotch Whisky Red Wine Cask Edition 70cl
description: Alc Vol; 40% Size: 70cl Intense floral aromas fuse with orchard fruits and flavours of nectarines, damson plums and gingerbread to give way to a rich and expressive finish. Recognised with a gold medal at the 2020 International Spirits Challenge. Matured in American White Oak Barrels and finished in red wine casks that previously held French Cabernet Sauvignon bringing a unique depth and complexity to the whisky. Consistency and quality of spirit alongside the correct oak for maturation makes Tamnavulin a signature Speyside Malt; light, fruity and always double-cask matured.

name: Tamnavulin Speyside Single Malt - Double Cask Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: ABV: 40% Size: 70cl Speyside Single Malt Scotch Whisky Double cask Matured in American oak barrels finished in sherry casks Double Cask matured for a classic Speyside taste; rich, smooth and mellow. The distillery at Tamnavulin was opened in 1966 on the banks of River Livet, deep in the heart of Speyside, the most celebrated whisky producing region in Scotland. Amber gold in colour, this rich and elegant Speyside single malt whisky has hints of sweet toffee, honey and, marzipan on the nose with refreshing pineapple, pear and subtle citrus notes on the palate. Set on the banks of the corrie stream and the River Livet, we draw our water from underground springs in the Easterton Hills. Formed by Snowmelt from the surrounding mountains, this water is naturally filtered through ancient limestone rock.

name: Tamnavulin Speyside Single Malt Scotch Whisky - White Wine Cask Edition 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Matured in American oak barrels and sauvignon blanc white wine casks to complement the sweet, mellow flavours of Tamnavulin. Signature orchard green apple notes with banana, ripe honeydew melon and white peach skin. Fresh citrus, green grass, sweet hay with jasmine and vanilla coconut cream. Lemon, grapefruit and baked apple tart with a hint of cinnamon spice. Ginger and lime biscuits to finish. Soft, sweet and fruity

name: Tanqueray 0.0 Alcohol Free 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 0.0% Size: 70cl Tanqueray 0.0 Alcohol Free is here! Perfectly balancing four botanicals to give a complex and refreshing taste with the juniper and citrus style that Tanqueray is famous for. Tanqueray 0.0 allows you to discover the definitive experience from Tanqueray, just without the alcohol. Enjoy with your favourite tonic and garnish over ice, then sip, savour and appreciate.

name: Tanqueray Blackcurrant Royale Gin 70 cl
description: Alc Vol: 41.3% Size: 70cl Tanqueray Blackcurrant Royale is a gin Crafted with a Tanqueray London Dry gin base, luxurious, rich, juicy French blackcurrants and subtle notes of vanilla elevated with an exotic mysterious twist of floral notes inspired by Black Orchids, to deliver a rich and fruity gin with subtle sweetness, balanced with the four classic London Dry botanicals. This gin has a rich, delicious flavour. Tanqueray Blackcurrant Royale is inspired by the French heritage and travels of Charles Tanqueray in the 1840s: a blend of the boldness of Charles Tanqueray and mystery and decadence of France in that era. Serving Suggestion: Tanqueray Blackcurrant Royale is best enjoyed in a copa glass with premium tonic water, plenty of ice and garnished with a wedge of lemon and a bunch of dark berries such as blackcurrants and blackberries. Or for a sumptuous serve in a classic coupe glass with prosecco for an unmistakable Royale experience

name: Tanqueray Blackcurrant Royale Gin Miniature 5cl
description: Alc Vol: 41.3% Size: 5cl Miniature Tanqueray Blackcurrant Royale is a gin Crafted with a Tanqueray London Dry gin base, luxurious, rich, juicy French blackcurrants and subtle notes of vanilla elevated with an exotic mysterious twist of floral notes inspired by Black Orchids, to deliver a rich and fruity gin with subtle sweetness, balanced with the four classic London Dry botanicals. This gin has a rich, delicious flavour. Juicy ripe blackcurrant with subtle sweetness of vanilla and a floral finish Tanqueray Blackcurrant Royale is inspired by the French heritage and travels of Charles Tanqueray in the 1840s: a blend of the boldness of Charles Tanqueray and mystery and decadence of France in that era. Serving Suggestion: Tanqueray Blackcurrant Royale is best enjoyed in a copa glass with premium tonic water, plenty of ice and garnished with a wedge of lemon and a bunch of dark berries such as blackcurrants and blackberries. Or for a sumptuous serve in a classic coupe glass with prosecco for an unmistakable Royale experience

name: Tanqueray Bloomsbury Gin 1 L - Limited Edition
description: Alc Vol: 47.3% Size: 1lt Please note: Only 100,000 bottles have been released worldwide, which means you shouldn't hesitate if you don’t want to miss out on this rarity! Tanqueray Bloomsbury is the latest gin from the legendary house's limited edition series. Master distiller Tom Nichol has pulled out a historic recipe from the 19th century for the creation of Tanqueray Bloomsbury: it's the brainchild of Charles Waugh Tanqueray, son of the house's founder Charles Tanqueray, who took over the distillery in Bloomsbury, London after his father's death. The 20-year-old had a knack for unusual ingredients, and Tanqueray Bloomsbury is an expression of that, containing twice as much juniper as other gins and being enriched with Chinese cinnamon. The Tuscan juniper blends perfectly with the aromas of cinnamon and other botanicals including coriander, angelica, and winter savoury. This both historic and innovative gin is not only great for classic long drinks and cocktails but also allows bartenders and hobby mixologists to come up with new and inventive creations. One of these is the "Tanqueray Bloomsbury Buck": "Buck" is the name for long drinks made with either ginger ale or beer, while "London Buck" is a special form based on gin. For the "Tanqueray Bloomsbury Buck" you need: 4cl Tanqueray Bloomsbury 1cl lemon squash 12cl ginger ale 2 dashes of bitters Pour the gin, the lemon squash, the ginger ale, and two dashes of bitters into a long drink glass filled with ice cubes and enjoy a drink that is equally rare and delicious!

name: Tanqueray Export Strength 1L
description: When you want it lighter, go for Tanqueray Export Strength Gin at 43.1%. But don’t let the numbers fool you. It will still impress with a spicy, fruity palate that makes it a versatile addition to any cocktail. Tanqueray’s flagship gin with a timeless character that makes it a trusty all-rounder Great with classic gin and tonics, as well as martinis. A great staple for the discerning gin lover’s bar Made in Scotland Liquorice root and coriander seed add character to this gin The recipe is a classic that dates back to 1830 Comes in a distinctive green bottle that resembles a cocktail shaker, with a metal screw top lid. It’s easy to spot in a bar

name: Tanqueray Export Strength London Dry Gin (43.1%) Miniature 5cl
description: Alc Vol: 43.1% Size: 5 cl Miniature Miniature format of Tanqueray export strength. Made from just four botanicals, Juniper, coriander, angelica and liquorish. Its incredibly flavoursome with tart cut and snappy, spicy taste. Enjoy with tonic water, plenty of ice and a wedge of lime. It's the bartenders choice for the perfect G&T. It can also be used as a great base for a wide range of cocktails. Its iconic bottle shape is inspired by the three part cocktail shaker, made all the more famous during classic cocktail movement during the Prohibition era of the 1920's.

name: Tanqueray Flor de Sevilla 0.0% Alcohol Free Gin 70cl - NEW
description: Alc Vol: 0.0% Size: 70cl Tanqueray Flor de Sevilla 0.0% Alcohol Free Spirit is a zesty, fruitful flavouring, offering a bold and bittersweet taste of the sun-soaked Mediterranean. Tanqueray Flor de Sevilla 0.0% Alcohol Free Spirit allows you to discover the definitive experience from Tanqueray, just without the alcohol. Our 0.0% Alcohol Free Spirit balances the uniquely bittersweet and zesty taste of a Sevilla orange, with orange blossom and the complexity of the core botanicals from Tanqueray’s London Dry. Expertly crafted to deliver the Tanqueray taste but none of the alcohol. Tanqueray Flor de Sevilla 0.0% alcohol free spirit is the perfect alcohol-free alternative to your usual premium flavoured Tanqueray choice. A delicious alternative to sip, savour and appreciate! Serve just like your usual Tanqueray Sevilla, pour 50ml over ice with your chosen tonic and garnish with a slice of fresh orange. Tanqueray Flor de Sevilla 0.0% Alcohol Free Spirit allows you to discover the definitive experience from Tanqueray, just without the alcohol.

name: Tanqueray Flor de Sevilla Gin and Tonic 12 x 250ml
description: Size - 12 x 250ml ABV - 6.5 % A convenient, premium ready to go option The delicious taste of Tanqueray Flor de Sevilla perfectly mixed with Tonic - Tanqueray's premium ready to drink cans are the ideal choice for those that seek a convenient option without having to compromise on the unmistakable quality of Tanqueray gin - Tanqueray Flor de Sevilla perfectly balances the uniquely bittersweet taste of Seville oranges, with the complexity of Tanqueray London Dry Gin, perfectly mixed with tonic. The perfect option for on the go summer ocassions with friends, or simply serve over ice and garnish with orange for a unmistakable G&T experience at home. Tasting Notes: Tanqueray Flor de Sevilla perfectly balances the uniquely bittersweet taste of Seville oranges, with the complexity of Tanqueray London Dry Gin, perfectly mixed with tonic Serving Suggestion: The perfect option for on the go summer ocassions with friends, or simply serve over ice and garnish with orange for a unmistakable G&T experience at home

name: Tanqueray Flor de Sevilla Orange Flavoured Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 41% Size: 70cl Inspired by Spain’s orange groves, crafted by Charles Tanqueray. It’s a gin recipe that showcases the best of Seville oranges. The formula is over 140 years old, but it’s still a great gin if you’re looking for a citrusy drink that will remind you of laid-back summers. Zesty orange flesh and crisp juniper go together to create the citrus-focused flavour that this gin is known for The citrusy taste is supported by allspice and earthy vanilla Uniquely distilled, with a perfect balance between the complex taste of Tanqueray London Dry Gin and bittersweet flavour of Seville oranges Best prepared with a premium tonic and a wedge of orange Use it to give traditional gin cocktails a citrus twist

name: Tanqueray Gin Copa Green Stem Glass
description: Tanqueray green stemmed gin balloon glass

name: Tanqueray London Dry Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 41.3% Size; 70cl Tanqueray London Dry is distilled four times for absolute smoothness and to allow the flavours of the four classic gin botanicals to shine through. Created by Charles Tanqueray in 1830, Tanqueray London Dry Gin is made today according to the same classic, timeless recipe. Tanqueray London Dry Gin is distilled four times and has the perfect balance of four classic gin botanicals - refreshing juniper, peppery coriander, aromatic angelica and sweet liquorice

name: Tanqueray London Dry Gin Gift Set with Rose Petals and Cardamom
description: The bartenders choice for the perfect G&T. Best enjoyed with tonic and a wedge of lime. Fill the copa glass with ice and pour in the 12.5cl of Tonic.... Add 5cl of Tanqueray London Dry Gin, stir and garnish with a pinch of rose petals and pinch of cardamom pods. Tanqueray London Dry Gin ABV 43.1% - 5cl Tanqueray Copa glass Green Cardamom Pods - 20g Dried Rose Petals - 3g

name: Tanqueray Malacca Gin 1 Ltr - Limited Edition
description: Alc Vol: 41.3% Size: 1lt Tanqueray's limited edition Malacca was relaunched in 2013 and contains less juniper and is more sweeter than the classic style emphasising the levels of citrus similar to the old-fashioned styles of Old Tom gin. Originally introduced late 90's, Malacca has a cult status among cocktail revivalist bartenders as a good substitute for the original Old Tom styles of gin.

name: Tanqueray No 10 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 47.3% Size: 70cl Since 2000, Tanqueray No. 10 has been consistently made in small batches using whole fresh citrus fruits. That means a burst of citrus for every sip. The award-winning gin also nabbed a spot in the San Francisco World Spirits Competition Hall of Fame. Named after pot still number 10, also known as ‘Tiny Ten’ Grapefruit, limes, and oranges are combined to make a citrusy blend Traditional botanicals like chamomile flowers give it a more distinctive, clean taste Aromatic with notes of creamy custard, tangy grapefruit zest, and juniper Spicy and clean with juniper, with cardamom and Earl Grey, yet not overpowering the citrus-rich taste that gives a lengthy and zesty finish

name: Tanqueray No. Ten Gin Martini Cocktail Gift Set 70cl
description: LIMITED EDITION GIFTBOX - This beautiful giftbox was designed by award winning artist KRISTJANA S WILLIAMS. Icelandic artist Kristjana S Williams creates fine art pieces, prints, interiors and more. Her designs are inspired by nature. Her technique involves layering nature Gift Set Includes: 1 x Tanqueray No Ten 70cl 47.3% Alc Vol. 1 x No Ten Branded Strainer 1 x Tanqueray Martini Coupe Glass 1 x No Ten Jigger Measure 1 x No Ten Branded Cut Glass Jug The bartenders choice for the perfect G&T. Best enjoyed with tonic and a wedge of lime. ABOUT - Tanqueray No. TEN Gin is distilled in small batches with whole citrus fruits, and sets the standard as one of the very first ultra-premium gins PERFECT FOR GIFTING - Every Tanqueray No. TEN bottle carries the Charles Tanqueray’s seal of more than 190 years of distilling excellence, the ultimate gift for those who enjoy ultra-premium gins TASTING NOTES - An exceptional taste experience with the aroma of citrus fruits, juniper and the flavour of chamomile flowers HOW TO ENJOY - Best enjoyed with premium tonic water, ice or with dry vermouth and a twist of grapefruit for the perfect martini

name: Tanqueray Paradiso Limited Edition Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 30% Size: 70cl LIMITED SUMMER EDITION - Tanqueray is launching an exciting new variant exclusively for this summer. A delicious new limited edition Tanqueray variant with hints of Brazilian Guava and lemongrass, making it ideal for the summer months!? Get yours before it's too late!. TASTING NOTES - A light & fresh profile with flavours of Brazilian Guava and hints of lemongrass. HOW TO ENJOY - A versatile liquid that could be served with tonic or soda water and garnished with mint?. Simply add few cubes of ice?, one part Tanqueray Paradiso?, two parts tonic or soda water & garnish with mint?!

name: Tanqueray Rangpur Lime Distilled Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 41.3% Size: 70cl Tanqueray Rangpur Lime Distilled Gin offers an exotic twist for the adventurous gin lover. First made in 2006 by adding Rangpur limes, an exotic citrus fruit from India, to the classic Tanqueray London Dry Gin. Rangpur Limes, also known as 'The Rangpur', is an exotic citrus that infuses this premium gin with the zest of lime and the sweetness of mandarin oranges, creating a refreshingly unique flavour profile. Infused with ginger and bay leaves alongside the four iconic London Dry botanicals of juniper, coriander, angelica, and liquorice, Tanqueray Rangpur Lime delivers a zesty, citrus-infused taste that's both exotic and familiar. Distilled four times to ensure unparalleled quality, Tanqueray Rangpur Lime stands out for its easy-drinking character and distinctive citrus twist. Perfect for gifting to the adventurous gin enthusiast, Tanqueray Rangpur Lime can be enjoyed in a Copa glass with premium tonic water, ice, and a generous wedge of lime, enhancing its vibrant flavours. Whether shared in a sociable setting or savoured in an elegant evening, this premium gin promises a flavourful experience with every sip. Embrace the exotic, indulge in the extraordinary, and discover the unparalleled delight of this award-winning gin.

name: Tarquin's Handcrafted Cornish Dry Gin
description: Size - 70cl ABV - 42% A contemporary take on a classic London dry gin, distilled with 12 botanicals sourced from across the globe and locally foraged on the wild Cornish coast. Crisp piney notes from the juniper balance with fresh citrus and a bright floral finish. Try it with red grapefruit and a sprig of thyme. Pairs perfectly with: Mediterranean Tonic, Red Grapefruit and a sprig of Thyme. Vegan friendly.

name: Tarquin's The Cornish Christmas Gin 5cl Miniature
description: ABV - 38% Size - 5cl The sell-out festive gin! Back for Xmas 2025 🍊🌟 'Tis the season for a Tarquin's and Tonic. So, stoke the fire, relax in your favourite chair and enjoy a glass of true Cornish cheer. This limited edition The Cornish Christmas Gin is crafted on the wild Cornish coast with exotic tonka beans, fresh clementine zest and a magical medley of Christmas spices. A special seasonal release packed with festive warmth and Cornish personality. Tasting Notes: NOSE: Candied clementine & aromatic cinnamon TASTE: Fresh juniper, winter fruit & rich vanilla FINISH: Festive warmth, dark chocolate & soft spice Pairs perfectly with: Mediterranean Tonic, Orange wedge & cinnamon stick.

name: Tarquins Blackberry Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 38% Size: 70cl A lip-smacking variati on on the Tarquin's Handcrafted Cornish Gin T recipe, with a focus on blackberries! Tarquin's flagship Cornish Gin is first distilled in small batches then post distillation the gin is lovingly infused with the most brilliant berries around. Just before bottling a touch of local Cornish wildflower honey is added to bring some subtle fragrant sweetness and balance. Tasting notes: Crisp, piney juniper still prominent as the backbone of the gin, with notes of blackberry crumble, wild berries and sweet spice. Summer pudding and frangipani on the palate with a zesty, sherbety finish and fragrant sweetness from the wildflower honey. Pairs perfectly with: Cloudy lemonade, fresh blackberries and a sprig of mint. Superb in a summer-y cocktail, or simply served over ice

name: Tarquins Rhubarb and Raspberry Gin Miniature - 5cl
description: ABV - 38% Size - 5cl This seasonal limited-edition gin has been distilled in the flame-fired copper pot stills with whole, vibrant cranberries and fresh oranges. Once distilled, it's then infused with more cranberries, creating a beautifully balanced gin - with natural sweetness and a zesty finish. Crafted in small batches at distillery on the Wild Cornish Coast.

name: Tarquins Rhubarb and Raspberry Gin Miniature - 5cl (White Top)
description: ABV - 38% Size - 5cl Miniature Tarquin's Cornish Gin, lovingly infuse it with the most delicious rhubarb and raspberries to be found to give this gin it's gorgeous blush. This special gin will definitely bring you a little piece of idyllic Cornish coast directly to your glass.

name: Tarquins Strawberry & Lime Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 38% Size: 70cl Bringing a little bit of Cornish sunshine to every glass with our celebration of the great British strawberry. our flagship Tarquin's Cornish gin is first distilled in small batches, with the addition of extra fresh lime zest, then post distillation we lovingly infuse with the sweetest strawberries in season. Tasting notes: Wild strawberry, fresh juniper and cracked black pepper on the nose. Zesty lime, sweet orange blossom, and warm spice on the palate. With a finish of tart strawberry jam, candied marmalade, and soft pine. Pairs perfectly with: An elderflower tonic and a slice of lime. Vegan friendly.

name: Tattu Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Juniper and citrus on the nose. Pleasant mid bodied mouth feel and a cooling finish.

name: Tattu Vodka 70cl
description: Alc Vol 40% Size: 70cl ULTRA-AFFORDABLE PREMIUM QUALITY VODKA - Tattu exudes a luxury taste, without the heavy price tag of larger brands. Made from a blend of the finest botanicals from around the globe, infused in harmony by our Master Distiller to our own distinctive recipe. Distilled to the highest standards in small batches to create a truly unique, smooth, spirit. A must have in any drinks cabinet. SILKY SMOOTH TASTE - Tattu Premium Vodka is 5 X distilled through old copper pots to produce a soft, elegant, and ultra-smooth taste without the bite or burn. It is quickly becoming a firm favourite among London's mixologist community. 300+ YEARS OF VODKA HERITAGE - Tattu Vodka has been crafted at one of Europe's Oldest Distilleries with unrivalled vodkas heritage since 1658. You can literally taste the history. 28 X PERFECT SERVINGS - The 700ml sized bottle delivers 28 x perfect servings. Perfect for cocktails, with mixers, or sipping neat on the most elegant of occasions. The choice is yours. GLUTEN FREE & VEGAN FRIENDLY - We use all natural ingredients. Free from artificial flavours.

name: Tau Sparkling Spring Water - Glass Bottle 24x330ml
description: Size: 24 x 330ml Tau is bottled at source in the Welsh Cambrian Mountains, an area of mudstone, siltstone and sandstone that is protected and organically managed. Tau still is light and very low in minerals, whilst its sparkling counterpart has very loud bubbles and should be paired with a food with a substantial mouthfeel. Chic and minimalist, the bottle is inspired by the Welsh verb Tau which means to be silent. Composition in mg/litre pH (at source) 7.2 Total Dissolved Solids 202 Calcium 30.5 Magnesium 12.2 Sodium 21.4 Potassium 1.2 Bicarbonates – Sulphates 28 Chlorides 21 Nitrates 0.1 Silica –

name: Tau Sparkling Water Glass Bottle 330ml
description: Tau Spring Water is a pure water with a slightly sweet taste, from an unspoilt and carefully protected source in the foothills of the Welsh Cambrian Mountains.

name: Tau Spring Sparkling Water Glass Bottle 750ml
description: Tau Spring Water is a pure water with a slightly sweet taste, from an unspoilt and carefully protected source in the foothills of the Welsh Cambrian Mountains. Tau is bottled at source in the Welsh Cambrian Mountains, an area of mudstone, siltstone and sandstone that is protected and organically managed. Tau still is light and very low in minerals, whilst its sparkling counterpart has very loud bubbles and should be paired with a food with a substantial mouthfeel.

description: Tau is bottled at source in the Welsh Cambrian Mountains, an area of mudstone, siltstone and sandstone that is protected and organically managed. Tau still is light and very low in minerals, whilst its sparkling counterpart has very loud bubbles and should be paired with a food with a substantial mouthfeel. Chic and minimalist, the bottle is inspired by the Welsh verb Tau which means to be silent.

name: Taylor's 10 Year Old Tawny 75cl
description: Alc Vol: 20% Size: 75cl Best known for its legendary Vintage Ports, Taylor's is also a leading producer of Aged Tawny. This style of Port acquires its characteristic 'tawny' colour, complex mellow flavours and smooth silky palate as it slowly matures in seasoned oak casks. Taylor's 10 Year Old Tawny is a superb example of this style. Combining delicate wood notes with rich aromas of mature fruit, it is fully aged in wood for immediate enjoyment.

name: Taylor’s Historic Reserve Tawny Port - Limited Edition 75cl
description: ABV: 20% Size: 75cl Launched in tribute to Taylor's pioneering spirit, this limited release is set to be treasured among Taylor’s enthusiasts and will undoubtedly build upon Taylor’s legendary collectors status. This Tawny Port is beautifully mature and complex nose, full of evocative, subtle nuances. Aromas of plum, fig and sultana blend with a mellow redolence of marzipan and butterscotch. Hints of cigar box, cedarwood and leather add an exotic dimension to the nose. The wine is seductively round and smooth with discreet, beautifully integrated tannins adding an attractive dryness and grip. The wine is full of rich, fruit cake flavours with some fresh plum character emerging on the long finish. Taylor`s launches a limited edition of a Reserve Tawny Port to pay homage to its long history of pioneering, passion and heritage. The bottle is based on a unique historical English-shaped flask from the first half of the 18th century (around 1720 and 1750). The design incorporates a "4XX" symbol recreation, based on a unique late 17th century sealed bottle first made at about the same time as the foundation of Taylor`s in 1692. It is the earliest example of an intact bottle bearing the merchant`s mark - the "4xx" symbol still used as the Taylor`s trademark to this day. This Reserve Tawny Port was created exclusively for this limited edition. It was carefully blended from the finest wood aged Ports specially selected from extensive Aged Tawny reserves maturing in Taylor’s lodges in Vila Nova de Gaia. It has the smoothness and rich, mellow flavour which are the hallmarks of an Aged Tawny Port. With its harmony and balance, it is a fine example of the blender’s skill and owes its intensity and finesse to long ageing in seasoned oak casks A fantastic Port Gift for any occasion. This special 75cl bottle of Taylors Historical Reserve Tawny Port Limited Edition is housed within a smart gift box

name: Taylor's Late Bottled Vintage Port 2015 - Boxed
description: Alc Vol: 20% Size: 75cl Grapes: Touriga Nacional , Touriga Franca & Tinta Roriz Taylor’s continues to lead the LBV category of Port worldwide, in spite of the fact that many other shippers now also produce an LBV. The wines used to blend Taylor’s LBV were drawn from a reserve of some of the best full bodied red Ports, produced at the 2017 harvest, from grapes grown on Taylor’s own vineyards and on other top properties in the Cima Corgo and Douro Superior areas. Tasting Notes Dense ruby black centre with a narrow brick rim and cerise highlights on the edge. The essence of this superb LBV is the fine red berry and stone fruit character, wonderfully fresh and vibrant, which bursts immediately from the glass. Raspberry, cherry and red plum, subtly infused with richer notes of blackcurrant and liquorice, dominate the nose. Cedary, minty notes and a discreet redolence of violets give the wine a seductive scented dimension. The fine fruit character reappears on the palate which is dense and chewy, the firm slightly austere tannins giving the wine its typically Taylor combination of stamina and restraint. The finish is impressively long and vigorous, with rich dark chocolate flavours adding a touch of lusciousness and opulence to the intense berry fruit. This is an outstanding LBV, full of verve and confidence, displaying the fine fruit quality which is a keynote of the Taylor style.

name: Taylor's Late Bottled Vintage Port 2016 - 1lt
description: Alc Vol: 20% Size: 100cl Grapes: Touriga Nacional , Touriga Franca & Tinta Roriz Taylor’s Late Bottled Vintage Port 2016 has a deep ruby-black core and narrow red rim with purple highlights. The intense and youthful nose displays very fine, complex red and black berry fruit aromas. Ripe strawberry notes and discreet leafy, herbal scents are suffused in a powerful redolence of dark brambly woodland fruit and blackcurrant jam. As is typical of Taylor’s, the nose is beautifully delineated with very fine, focused fruit. Late Bottle Vintage means that the port has been allowed to mature for longer. It has literally been bottled later. Taylor’s created the style of Late Bottled Vintage and is regarded as the finest exponent of it.

name: Taylor's Late Bottled Vintage Port 2016 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 20% Size: 70cl Grapes: Touriga Nacional , Touriga Franca & Tinta Roriz Taylor’s Late Bottled Vintage Port 2016 has a deep ruby-black core and narrow red rim with purple highlights. The intense and youthful nose displays very fine, complex red and black berry fruit aromas. Ripe strawberry notes and discreet leafy, herbal scents are suffused in a powerful redolence of dark brambly woodland fruit and blackcurrant jam. As is typical of Taylor’s, the nose is beautifully delineated with very fine, focused fruit. Late Bottle Vintage means that the port has been allowed to mature for longer. It has literally been bottled later. Taylor’s created the style of Late Bottled Vintage and is regarded as the finest exponent of it.

name: Taylors 20 Year Old Tawny Port 75cl with Gift Box
description: Alc Vol: 20% Size: 75cl In the 20 Year Old tawny, the fruit has mellowed further than in the 10 Year Old, and the spicy, nutty aromas of ageing are more powerful and intense. Intense amber tawny colour. Opulent and voluptuous nose of complex spicy, jammy and nutty aromas, hints of orange flower and a fine oakiness coming from the long period of aging in cask. The palate is full of very rich and concentrated flavour and has a long mellow finish. 20 Year Old Tawny Port is fully matured in seasoned oak casks each holding about 630 litres of wine. Over many years of ageing, the Port wine gradually takes on its characteristic amber ‘tawny’ colour, slowly developing the complex mellow flavours and the smooth luscious palate which are the hallmarks of this style of port. Taylor’s blends its magnificent 20 year old tawny Ports from its extensive reserves of old cask aged Ports matured in the firm’s cool and tranquil cellars (known as ‘lodges’) in Oporto on Portugal’s Atlantic coast. These Port wines are bottled when ready to drink and do not require any further ageing in bottle.

name: Taylors Historical Collection The Mallet Reserve Tawny Port 75cl
description: ABV: 20% Size: 75cl Limited Edition Bottle inspired by 'mallet-cylinder' bottle from circa 1750. Taylors Reserve Tawny Port has been created exclusively for this limited edition. It's carefully blended from the finest wood aged Ports selected from Aged Tawny reserves maturing in Taylor's lodges in Vila Nova de Gaia. It has the smooth, rich and mellow flavour that is the hallmark of an Aged Tawny Port. The bottle shape is based on the 'chestnut' shaped wine bottles manufactured in England, between 1715 and 1740. These flagon shaped bottles were relatively unusual in England but their use in continental Europe was more widespread. The bottle design incorporates a glass embossed '4xx' symbol, based on a unique late 17th century sealed bottle, first made at about the same time as the foundation of Taylor's in 1692. It is the earliest example of an intact bottle bearing the merchant's mark. The '4xx' symbol is still used as the Taylor's trademark to this day. A port that is prized by collectors and praised by the critics. The perfect port. Tasting Notes: Pale brick colour with broad amber rim. Mellow nose of succulent ripe berry fruit with aromas of butterscotch, figs and prunes interwoven with attractive nutty and spicy aromas. Smooth and round on the palate, full of rich strawberry jam flavours. Taylor’s Fine Tawny is drawn from wines selected for their smoothness and mellow character. These are aged for up to three years in oak casks in Taylor’s cellars in Vila Nova de Gaia. The individual wines are then blended together a few months before bottling for balance and completeness. Food Match : Drunk predominantly as an aperitif. For those preferring a lighter style, this versatile port can also be enjoyed after meals. Bottled when ready to drink and does not require any further ageing in bottle Grape : Touriga Nacional, Touriga Francesa, Tinta Roriz, Tinta Barroca, Tinta Cão & Tinta Amarela Producer : Taylors, David Guimareans Country : Duoro Valley, Portugal

name: Taylors Quinta De Vargellas Vintage Port 2013 in Wooden Box 75cl
description: ABV - 20.5% Profound, mature Vintage Port from one of the greatest single vineyards in the Douro – Vargellas – and highest quality producers – Taylor’s. Deep colour, rich nose of Vargellas violets, dark preserved fruits, liquorice and spices. Explosive palate – sweet, rich, textural, with bold black fruit, plums, liquorice (again), soft spice. Very concentrated and lovely structure and balance. Smooth and satiny mouth feel – for all its power remarkably subtle and elegant. Single Quinta Vintage port from Taylor’s, “the Latour of the Douro” (Robert Parker). Picked at the peak of ripeness, has been made into this magnificent release. Tasting notes: Luscious, velvety black fruits, violets, kirsch, dark chocolate, spice Aroma: Ripe black fruit, floral, oak and spice Drink by: end of 2051 Grape Variety: Touriga Nacional is dominant in this blend, which also includes Touriga Francesa, Tinta Roriz, Tinta Barroca,Tinta Cão and Tinta Amarela. Includes grapes which have been traditionally foot trodden. Aged for two years in large old casks, prior to bottling unfiltered and unfined. Food Match: Just ready to drink now, but do decant the clear wine gently (off its sediment lees) a couple of hours, at least, before serving. It will improve with aeration in a decanter. Pair, classically, with a full flavoured cheese board selection, served with walnut bread and quince jelly. Equally enjoy on its own and sip into the evening.

name: Taylors Select Fine Port 20cl
description: Alc Vol: 20% Size: 20cl Full Bodied & Fruity Select Reserve Taylor Fladgate Select Reserve Port is blended from carefully selected young red wines produced in the Baixo Corgo and Cima Corgo areas of the upper Douro Valley, chosen for their depth of colour, intense fruit and full, firm palate. These Port wines are matured for about two years in oak vats, where they soften and develop without losing their fresh, intense fruity character and their deep ruby colour. Tasting Notes Deep ruby-red colour, with garnet rim. Classic intense black fruit nose. Firm, vigorous, full-bodied palate, with powerful fruit flavours and a long finish.

name: Teacher's Highland Cream Blended Scotch Whisky 70cl P.M
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Price Marked £18.99 This blended Scotch whisky comes straight from Glasgow. Made of more than 30 single malts for that fuller and richer flavour! This distinct and memorable blend has won several awards. You will love its delicious smoky taste. It's a richly flavoured whisky that has been a crowd pleaser for more than 100 years. High malt content gives it a big, rounded, and strong palate Smooth and easy to drink, with pleasant ‘crunch’ of maltiness—like peanut brittle Wonderful hints of toffee and liquorice flavours Long in the mouth, with marked fragrance of gingerbread, chestnuts, and oak wood Pairs deliciously with smoked fish dishes, wild boar and venison meats A distinctively different blend, perfect if you’re looking for variety Excellent value

name: Teachers Highland Cream Whisky 5cl Miniature
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 5cl Miniature Teacher's Highland Cream Blended Scotch Whisky uses fully smoked peat single malt whisky from The Ardmore distillery as its fingerprint whisky. This gives it incredible depth and smoothness combined with a rich smokey undertone. Truly a masterpiece.

name: Teeling Small Batch Irish Whiskey 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 46% vol. Size: 70cl This Whiskey challenges the convention of what an Irish Whiskey can be With layers of unique flavour influenced by unconventional cask maturation techniques. Hand-selected casks of grain and malt whiskey are initially fully aged in Ex-Bourbon barrels, then married together in Central American Rum casks for up to 12 months for a unique, dried fruit profile. 46% ABV, non chill filtered and full of natural character TASTING NOTES Floral and herbal, with hints of vanilla, rum raisin notes, and all spice. Creamy vanilla sweetness, with a dried fruit, raisin and apricot character and slight tingling spice. Long, warming finish with lingering sweetness, spice, and oak notes.

name: Teichenne Coconut Schnapps 70cl

name: Tenjaku Japanese Blended Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl An elaborate and delicate blend of the finest select whisky Malt / grain This smooth and well-balanced Japanese whisky is crisp and mild with a light and mellow flavour Colour: Clear amber. Nose: Faint smoky accent with a sweet aroma, redolent of pear and dried fruit. Palate: A slightly edgy attack, well-rounded and mellow. Finish: A long slightly spicy finish with a hint of white oak and a spreading sweetness. Tenjaku suits any drinking style but try it first on the rocks to experience a smooth and pleasant attack, a unique mellowness and a generous sweet after taste. Try a highball to reveal the sweet smoky aroma that bursts from the soda bubbles - or serve mizuwari style and savour Tenjaku's affinity with water. Tenjaku is created in the city of Fuefuki, located in the eastern part of the Kofu Basin in Yamanashi Prefecture. This fertile land is renowned as Japan's top peach and grape-producing region. Looking towards Mt. Fuji and the Southern Alps, it is a place blessed with boundless nature, with verdant forests, beautiful orchards, hot springs, and crystal-clear streams.

Served very cold. Strawberry Cream with Tequila by Teichenné, is made with authentic Mexican tequila. Creamy drink made from dairy products. Serve very cold. Tasting notes Appearance: Creamy drink made from dairy products. Creamy appearance. Strawberry color with whitish nuances. Aroma: On the nose, the strawberry notes are perceived, which perfectly combine with the aromas of cream and the subtle nuances of distilled agave. Taste and texture: Creamy and tasty on the palate. The 17% alcohol content of the milk and tequila goes perfectly with the notes of strawberry. Contains milk.

name: Tequila Patron Silver 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl The white Tequila Patron is light and fresh, favored by tequila connoisseurs around the world. High quality tequila produced only from agave. Small batch Tequila at its finest. Each bottle is hand numbered with absolutely delicious flavours including fruit, citrus (lemon mostly) and light pepper. We highly recommend keeping this permanently in your fridge. Patron Silver is called young or "joven" tequila. A similarity may be made to a young or nouvelle wine. It is known for its light, fresh, crystal clear look and an elegant smoothness not found in other silver tequilas. Many prefer this smooth, soft and light tequila over an aged and slightly oaky flavour. Great gift idea.

name: Tequila Rose 5cl Miniature - 10 Pack
description: Alc Vol: 15% Size: 10x5cl mini bottles Tequila Rose is an exciting alcohol liqueur that is a unique blend of strawberry flavoured real dairy cream mixed with a splash of Mexican tequila. Strawberry cream provides sweetness, softness and roundness with a hint of Tequila that gives the spirit liqueur great body, depth and structure. Tequila Rose is perfect served chilled. Delicious over ice, Tequila Rose Strawberry Cream liqueur also works brilliantly as a mixer and as a base for cocktails. One great way to mix Tequila Rose is in an ‘Espresso Yourself’ shot as 2 parts Tequila Rose and 1 part coffee liqueur. So, go on. Why not embrace the unexpected, defy your expectations and explore a brand new liqueur that’ll get any party started? You'll be enjoying nothing more, nothing less, than the perfect new mix. Just don't forget to shake to wake the ingredients & rouse the strawberry cream liqueur!

name: Tetley's Original Bitter Ale Beer 12x440ml
description: ABV: 3.6% Size: 12x440ml Tetley's Original is an amber bitter ale beer, which has sweet toffee apple flavours balanced with distinctly bitter dry flavours and a lingering dry bitter finish. The unique characteristic of the brewing yeast was just one of the elements that gave each pint its distinct Tetley's taste and we've carried on that tradition in our beers since 1822. After nearly two centuries of perfecting the brewing process, the name Tetley's is synonymous with smooth, tasty beer created from a perfect combination of traditional and modern brewing techniques. What makes Tetley's Ale different to others? It's the unique double strain of yeast that gives Tetley's it's unique taste and aroma. The very same yeast used by Tetley's since 1822.

name: That Boutique-y Gin Company Moonshot Gin 70 cl
description: Alc Vol 46% Size: 70cl Every gram of the botanicals used to make this gin was sent into near-space (over 24km) and exposed to an air pressure of less than 1/100th of that at sea level! That's seriously low. In fact, if you were to find yourself above just 18km, also known as Armstong's limit (where the pressure has already dropped to around 6.3 kPa or 1/16th of that at sea level), then the fluids in your body would vaporise! Juniper, Coriander, Camomile Flowers, Fresh Lemon Peel, Cardamom, Dried Bitter Orange Peel, Cinnamon, Cubeb Pepper, Liquorice Root and Angelica were used. Oh, and Moon Rock. Obviously. Once they returned to earth, we vacuum distilled them at room temperature (at a pressure nearer 1/10th of that at sea level, in case you were wondering) for freshness and elegance. Tasting notes: Nose: Coriander and lemon drizzle cake with subtle pepper adding depth. Taste: Juniper, oleo-saccharum citrus goodness and balancing spice. Finish: Bitter lemon and tangerine. Perfect Serve: Apple and Rhubarb Soda

name: That Boutique-y Gin Company Yuletide Gin 50cl
description: Alc Vol; 46% Size: 50cl Contains real 24ct gold leaf What we've done here is distilled Christmas. We make this jolly tipple using a host of traditionally festive botanicals, as well as ingredients that are traditionally festive though not traditionally botanicals. Here's the list - Juniper, Cassia, Cinnamon, Nutmeg, Raisins, Medjool Dates, Cloves, Allspice, Clementine, Cardamom, Ginger, Whole Pomanders (oranges studded with cloves), Christmas Tree Needles (Balsam & Douglas Fir), Christmas Cake, Charred oak, Chestnuts, Christmas puddings, A big pile of chocolate truffles, Lebkuchen (German Christmas cookies), Mince pies, Panettone, A whole gingerbread house, and all the gifts brought to Jesus, Gold, Frankincense and Myrrh. We then popped some edible 24ct gold flakes into the mix to give a snow-globe quality. Basically, everything that you love about Christmas has been crammed into our Yuletide Gin (apart from Castle Greyskull - despite being the must-have Christmas toy of everyone's childhood, its distillate isn't particularly tasty). Ho ho ho, and all that jazz. Tasting notes: Nose: Initial notes of Christmas pudding - plump and juicy - burst forth from the glass: succulent raisin, cassia, cinnamon and gingerbread. Gradually, the character of a well-stocked biscuit barrel comes through with buttery shortbread and oatmeal cookies. Then there’s amaretto, flaked almonds, cardamom and candied peel, all before a touch of Christmas tree to close. Taste: Plump and jammy clementine with a sprinkle of toasted spice, accompanied by a festive medley of fruity, spicy Christmas confectionery: from mince pies to buttery panettone and everything in-between. A definite note of Christmas tree follows, with a floral splash reminiscent of the incense of Midnight Mass. Finish: Candied citrus, glacé cherries, Turkish delight and toasted pine cone.

name: The Alchemist Copperhead Gin - The Gibson Edition 50cl
description: ABV - 40% Size - 50cl Picture it: A collaborative effort from the renowned head bartender at Islington bar The Gibson, Marian Beke and the second oldest operational distillery in Belgium, Copperhead . What a brilliant idea. Why hasn't this happened...? Wait - it already has! Yes, Copperhead Gin The Gibson Edition, is very much real and is ready to make your Gibson Martinis the best around with its unique savory profile and bounty of flavours! The process of creating this bespoke gin began with Copperhead, who contributed its classic distillate made from five botanicals: juniper, coriander seed, cardamom, angelica and orange peel. With this forming the base, Beke then added 13 of his own botanicals, most of which were spices, including allspice, bay leaf, cassia, dill seeds, fennel, ginger, mace and pepper. Eight-year-old jenever was then added as a sweetener, as Beke wanted to avoid Old Tom territory by using sugar. Nose: Sweet nutmeg, aromatic cinnamon and ginger lead, with prickles of peppery juniper. The gorgeous warming spices are confident and prominent, but leave enough room for a little orange blossom, which is evident among slight creamy aromas of angelica and vibrant hops. A herbaceous twinge lingers in the backdrop. Palate: The juniper becomes deeper and earthier among aromatic fennel and a broad but crisp herbal bitterness. The palate continues the profile of the nose, with subtle sweet notes complementing the wonderful melange of bright and complex coriander, clove and cinnamon. The flavours combine expertly in an exceptionally viscous and savoury delivery. Finish: Incredibly long and lingering, the rich and fragrant spices fizz away for literally minutes after the initial sip. Overall: A singular and utterly enthralling mouthful — this is a savoury gin worth savouring!

name: The Deacon Blended Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol; 40% Size: 70cl The Deacon is a masterful blend of both smoky Speyside and peaty Islay malt whiskies, making for a complex, rich, and smoky dram.. In our blend, the single malts from Islay have a characteristic peaty smoke flavour, while the single malts from the mainland have a bonfire-like smoke character. A nose of charred orange, sweet malty biscuits and woodsmoke gives way to juicy orange on the palate along with delicate spice, and tangy peat. The finish is both sweet and smoky, long and smooth. The Deacon is the most unconventional Scotch you'll ever experience. A one-of-a-kind blend that defies traditional Scotch conventions, featuring a bold and complex flavour profile and unique design sure to awaken your senses. A smooth and rich blended whisky that is perfect for those who like to push beyond the horizon.

name: The Dublin Liberties 10 Year Old Single Malt Copper Alley 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 46% Size: 70cl A very spoiling gift would be The Dublin Liberties Copper Alley which was launched in October 2016. This is an Irish single malt limited release whiskey which is double-barrelled for 10 years in Bourbon casks and finished in 30-year-old Oloroso sherry casks, hand-selected by the Master Blender and Distiller at The Dublin Liberties, Darryl McNally, for six months. There are only 31 sherry casks of this unique whiskey which is non-chill-filtered and bottled Dublin is a cheek by jowl city, and often a city of contradictions. No place demonstrated this better than Copper Alley, which was found next to the city’s Christ Church Cathedral. Whilst this was the centre of the city’s piety, Copper Alley was the hub for debauchery, with bars and taverns that kept up all night. This whiskey pays homage to the spirit of the alley, capturing its vivid and fiery nature. On the nose, this whiskey is rich in spice and fruit aromas, with prunes, sultanas, apples and pears accompanied by vanilla, nutmeg, cinnamon and a slight hint of anise. The palate brings a thick and wine-like mouthfeel, with rich flavours of dried fruit, crumbling sugar, loaf cake and toffee. The finish is long and lingering, with residual dried fruits, and a slightly drying peppery note. This whisky is bottled at 46% ABV and without chill filtration. An excellent Irish single malt! Winner of a gold medal in the 2016 San Francisco Spirits Competition.

description: ABV 40% Explore a sweeter side to our Famous whisky A marriage of finest scotch whiskies matured in seasoned oak cask Mellow Gold is another addition to the Famous Grouse blended Scotch whisky range which leans a little more on the Sherried side of things than their classic expression. The Famous Mellow Gold blends whiskies from rare, handcrafted Spanish sherry casks and charred American oak bourbon casks to arrive at a distinctly smooth, mellow character and rich depth of flavour. Smooth, peaty and aromatic, this is a complex yet approachable blend with hints of dried fruit and soft smoky notes. name: The Glenlivet 12 Year Old Speyside Single Malt Double Oak Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl The single malt that started it all. The Glenlivet 12 Year Old is a perfectly balanced Speyside single malt Scotch Whisky, with a lively gold colour and playful interlacing of floral and fruit aromas. Representing The Glenlivet's signature style, this classic single malt whisky is matured for a minimum of 12 years, first in traditional European oak, before spending time in American oak casks. This imparts notes of vanilla and gives the whisky its distinctive smoothness. The mineral-rich water that comes from Josie's Well helps form the flavours during mashing and fermentation, whilst the specific height and width of the copper stills add a delicate yet complex character. Serving suggestion: Drink to your own preference; straight up, in a cocktail, or simply with a drop of water to open the creamy, smooth character. When serving with ice, large cubes are recommended to allow slow dilution releasing the creamy, sweet characters. Winner of the 2020 International Spirits Competition (ISC) Gold award. Guaranteed eighteen years of age, Distilled, matured and bottled in Scotland The Glenlivet 12 Year Old Single Malt Scotch Whisky

name: The Glenlivet Founder's Reserve Malt Whisky 70cl
description: ABV: 40% vol Size: 70CL Single Malt Scotch Whisky The Glenlivet Founder's Reserve is an award winning single malt scotch whisky. It captures the distinct, smooth, fruity taste that its founder first envisioned. It's a classic single malt style of whisky but with an innovative contemporary fresh taste. It starts with a skillful selection of casks that enhances the signature fruity flavours of The Glenlivet. The traditional oak casks are complemented by selective use of American first-fill casks to give a hint of creamy sweetness - creating an exceptionally well-balanced and smooth malt. Sold with its signature blue gift box, making this the perfect whisky to celebrate a special occasion. Serving suggestion: Drink to your own preference, straight up or with a drop of water to open the creamy and intensely smooth character. When serving with ice, large cubes are recommended to allow slow dilution releasing the creamy, sweet characters. George Smith, The Glenlivet's founder, didn't follow the lead of the illegal still owners. In 1824, he obtained a distiller's licence to become the first legal distiller in Glenlivet, Scotland. 50 years later, George finally won the exclusive right to call his whisky ‘The Glenlivet', definitively marking it as the single malt that started it all. To this day, The Glenlivet remains the benchmark that all other Speyside single malts are measured against.

The rum was named in its honour, as it was as dark and mysterious as the beast's ink The Kraken is housed in a replica of a Victorian flagon, which allowed the bottle to be hung up on board ships so it would not roll around and come to harm Suitable for vegetarians and vegans. Tasting Notes Appearance - Black, opaque Aroma - Caramel, toffee, spice Flavour - Cinnamon, vanilla, nutmeg Finish - A spicy and lingering finish Preparation and Usage Signature Serve: The Perfect Storm - The Kraken Rum over cubed ice, topped with fiery ginger beer and a squeeze of fresh lime.

name: The Kraken Black Spiced Rum Dark Caramel & Cornish Sea Salt Limited Edition 70cl
description: The Kraken Black Spiced Rum Dark Caramel and Cornish Sea Salt Limited Edition 70cl ABV - 40% Size - 70cl The Beast’s latest treasure has surfaced; a limited-edition flavour born of the maritime myths of the rugged Cornish coast. As legend has it, terrified smugglers, fearful of the curse of the mighty Kraken, stashed a trove of contraband in a remote cove, including crates of dark caramel and barrels of delicious Black Spiced Rum. Lost for centuries, these exotic riches were dashed together by time, and preserved amidst the cool breeze and crisp salt of the Cornish Sea. Modern adventurers recently retrieved this rare bounty of rum for fans of The Beast’s darkest delights. Will you be swift enough to seize your share?

name: The Kraken Black Spiced Rum Roast Coffee 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl Kraken Black Roast Coffee Rum A bold and dark version of Kraken rum infused with additional flavours of coffee and spices. A rich fusion of Spiced Caribbean Rum and fine Arabica Bean Coffee. The unexpectedly rich, dark and smooth taste of coffee balances perfectly with the variety of spices in Kraken Rum. The Kraken Roast Coffee is best enjoyed as an 'Espresso Rumtini' Enjoy chilled as a shooter in a Kraken Espresso martini.

name: The Lakes Espresso Vodka Liqueur - 5cl Miniature

It is a luscious and tempting treat too hard to resist, The Lakes vodka miniatures is perfect for every occasion that ranges from formal gatherings as well as come as you are events. The Lakes Espresso Vodka mini bottles are highly presentable with the matte black opaque bottle that comes with white label markings. It’s elegant and it rocks!

name: The Lakes Gin 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 46% Size: 70cl The Lakes Gin is our classic English gin with vibrant notes of juniper, cracked black pepper and orange peel. We elevate flavour by using only a select few botanicals, gently infusing them in the finest British wheat spirit, distilling in our traditional copper pot still and only drawing the purest water from our Lake District National Park home in a UNESCO World Heritage Site. By steeping the botanicals overnight like loose-leaf tea, they interact freely with the warm spirit to encourage the essential oils to release more slowly, protecting their delicate nature. The traditional copper pot still then runs slow and long to extract the maximum amount of flavour. The end result? A classic English gin with vibrant notes of juniper, cracked black pepper and orange peel. Gently distilled with the luxury of time for exceptional smoothness. Simply beautiful. Tasting Notes: Nose: ORANGE ZEST WITH FRAGRANT,NOTES OF EARL GREY TEA AND JUNIPER. Palate: REFRESHING CITRUS WITH VIBRANT OVERTONES OF JUNIPER AND BLACK PEPPER. Finish: LONG, ZESTY AND PEPPERY

name: The London No.1 Original Blue Gin 47% ABV, 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 47% Size: 70cl A high-strength (47%) gin quadruple-distilled in London by master distiller Charles Maxwell, The London Gin has a variety of traditional botanicals inlcuding cinnamon, orange root and angelica alongside less-common ingredients like gardenia and bergamot, which explains its distinct aromas of Earl Grey tea. At 47% alcohol by volume, this gin delivers a powerful and robust taste experience. Each sip is filled with complex botanical notes and a smooth finish that lingers on the palate. Not only does the London No. 1 Original Blue Gin excel in taste, but it has also received numerous accolades and awards. Its exceptional quality has been recognized by experts in the industry, making it a highly sought-after gin among enthusiasts. Indulge in the London No. 1 Original Blue Gin and elevate your gin-drinking experience to new heights. Whether enjoyed neat, on the rocks, or in a classic cocktail, this gin is sure to impress and delight.

This complex combination of oak casks delivers an extraordinarily smooth and delicate character, full of citrus fruits, vanilla and fresh oak. Tasting Notes: Colour: Rich straw Nose: Complex, with hints of vanilla, melon and lemon zest Palate: Medium balanced with lemon citrus, vanilla and light toasted oak and nutmeg Finish: Lingering with melon, papaya, fresh oak and oak spice

description: ABV 12.5% Size: 75cl Made from Grenache, Cinsault and Carignan, this authentic rosé from Provence goes by the name of The Palm. Fruity yet fresh notes can be expected from the palate whilst the signature colour of the wine can catch your eye from anywhere. Great aromatic freshness on the nose followed by more subtle, fruity notes on the palate. The freshness is coupled with exceptional length and roundness. Crisp and suave finish.

name: The Pogues Irish Whiskey 5cl Miniature
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 5cl Miniature The official whiskey made in collaboration with the band themselves; The Pogues Irish Whiskey is loaded with a lot of character, much like the band itself. Strong malt, citrus and cracked black pepper greet you on the nose which carries onto the palate, joining a sweetness laced with nutmeg. Created by master whiskey maker Frank McHardy on the windswept Atlantic archipelago where the West Cork distillery is perched; this exceptionally smooth Single Malt Irish Whiskey is aged in bourbon oak. Breathe in, and you’ll detect a savoury quality, with the nutty aroma of toasted seeds, caramel brittle and chocolate-covered peanuts, and the tiniest hint of Parma violets. Taste woody spice and cinnamon followed by those chocolate-covered peanuts, sesame snaps, and a suggestion of nougat and marshmallow. And the finish; deep, mellow, and thoroughly satisfying. San Francisco World Spirits Competition Gold Winner 2018

name: The River Test Distillery Chalkstream Gold Gin Miniature - 5cl
description: ABV 40% Size - 5cl This fabulous gin is distilled on the banks of the River Test in Hampshire. Made with Maris Otter barley and crystal-clear, chalk-filtered water, it’s a beautiful expression of its home in the British countryside.

name: The Royal Blush - Cocktail Bundle
description: Royal Mash Vintage Vodka 70cl Amaretto Disaronno 70cl INGREDIENTS 50ml Royal Mash 8 Fresh raspberries 20ml Honey Syrup 25ml Fresh lemon juice 20ml Ameretto Disaronno 25ml Egg white ( or aquafaba) Dash of vanilla bitters METHOD: Muddle the raspberries & honey syrup in cocktail shaker. Add the remaining ingredients. Shake hard. Add ice, shake until cold. Fine strain into a cocktail glass.

name: The Singleton of Dufftown Malt Master Selection 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 40% Size: 70cl A bottling that's a perfect introduction for those who are new to single malts, the Singlton of Dufftown Malt Master's Selection was created by The Singleton master of malts Craig Wilson. He hand-selected and blended the whisky before it was maturated in European and American oak casks with three variants; ex-wine, ex-sherry and ex-bourbon. The Singleton of Dufftown is distilled in the Dufftown distillery in Speyside, the heart of malt whisky production in Scotland. Whisky has been distilled at the distillery since 1896 and from fermentation to distillation we do our utmost best to ensure every drop of spirit is the highest quality. It has an aroma of toasted nuts with rich fruits, with hints of blackcurrant, brown sugar and coffee on the palate - before an elegantly drying and crisp finish. It has the flavour profile for new drinkers to malt whisky due to its smooth, rich, accessible flavour. It is perfect neat or with ice, but also mixes perfectly with soda for a refreshing tasting long drink. Perfectly balanced speyside single malt whisky. The Singleton of Dufftown Malt Master's Selection has the trademark Singleton sweet fruity smoothness, with fresh hints of honey and vanilla. Mellow and buttery smooth, The Singleton family are reknowned for their rich speyside character - which comes from a longer fermentation and distillation for a well rounded flavour The unmistakable taste of The Singleton comes from a unique selection of European Oak casks that bring rich fruit aromas and American Oak casks that release honeyed hints of vanilla.

name: The Singleton of Dufftown Malt Master Selection 70cl
description: ABV: 40%. The Singleton of Dufftown Malt Master Selection is a pleasurable, easy drinking, and accessible single malt with a smooth texture and predominantly sweet taste. “First rate: accessible and easy to drink. It will certainly appeal to consumers who enjoy lighter styles of Speyside, but it has plenty of character” - Charles MacLean, Whisky Expert. Hints of honey and vanilla coupled with fresh pear on a faint base of wood ash. Enjoy it neat to experience the notes of fresh fruit and vanilla. Aged in barrels hand-selected by Craig Wilson, Master of Malt, and finished in three distinct barrel types: refill, sherry and bourbon. Its smooth flavour make it the perfect gift for new single malt whisky drinkers Nose: Fresh fruit, hints of honey and vanilla. Taste: Light to medium bodied. Delicate and smooth with fresh fruit, sweet spice and fresh pear. Finish: Medium with warmth, lingering vanilla and sprinkle of white pepper

name: The Singleton Of Dufftown Single Malt 12 Year Old 70cl
description: The Singleton of Dufftown 12 year old is the heart of the Singleton family - smooth single malt designed to be the perfect for new drinkers to malt whisky due to its smooth, rich, accessible flavour. The Singleton of Dufftown is distilled in the Dufftown distillery of Speyside, where fine single malts have been produced since 1896. From fermentation to distillation, in every step of the production process, we have done the utmost to make this the best tasting single malt whisky. Perfectly balanced speyside single malt whisky. The Singleton of Dufftown 12 year old has the trademark Singleton sweet fruity smoothness, with hints of brown sugar and espresso coffee. Mellow and buttery smooth, The Singleton family are reknowned for their rich speyside character - which comes from a longer fermentation and distillation for a well rounded flavour. The unmistakable taste of The Singleton comes from a unique selection of European Oak casks that bring rich fruit aromas and American Oak casks that release honeyed hints of vanilla. It is perfect neat or with ice, but also mixes perfectly with soda for a refreshing tasting long drink.

name: Theakston Old Peculier 6L Keg - PerfectDraft
description: ABV: 5.6% Size: 6L Theakston Old Peculier is a renowned Old Ale beer produced by Theakston, a brewery located in Masham, North Yorkshire, England. It has an ABV (Alcohol By Volume) of 5.6%. This unique and beautiful brew is highly regarded and loved by many, both in the UK and around the world. It has received numerous awards and is considered a prime example of the finest in British brewing tradition. Old Peculier is known for its rich and fruity taste. It offers a complex flavor profile that combines warm caramel and roasted nut flavors. As you sip, you'll notice the fruitiness becoming more prominent, with hints of dark cherries, raisins, stewed figs, and prunes. There's also a spicy quality to the beer, with notes of nutmeg and cinnamon. The warmth of vanilla adds to the overall experience. The finish has just the right amount of bitterness, which perfectly complements the style of this beer. This beer is served best with the PerfectDraft Machine set to between 6-8°C. This product is for use with Perfect Draft Dispensers only and cannot be used on its own. Please check the compatibility of your beer pump.

name: Theodore Scottish Pictish Gin 70cl
description: ABV: 43% Bottle Size: 70cl Theodore Pictish Gin is inspired by the Picts, a tribe who are thought to be some of the very first settlers of Scotland. It contains 16 botanicals including pine, damask rose, pomelo and bourbon vetiver, and is distilled using an old charentais still. The unique tipple aims to branch the gap between ancient legends and present day. Damask rose and oolong tea make a floral bouquet, with both fresh and dried spicy ginger warmth, alongside notes of citric pomelo and crisp pine needles, smoky bourbon vetiver and hints of vanilla. Thought to be some of the very first settlers of Scotland, the Picts arrived on the eastern archipelago as mysterious body-painted warriors. Soon "Pictland" was home to a multitude of clans that would rule—however briefly—over the lands north of Hadrian's Wall. Today, traces of their adventures echo only in the poetry, engravings and forgotten fortresses of Scotland. But through the fragrant aromas of Theodore the Pictish Gin, lost memories of the Painted People are now brought to life. Fragmentary reveries of their exploits add flavour as we distil and bottle, our choice of crisp and citric botanicals invoking an appropriately Pictish sense of adventure. Theodore Gin represents a journey of curiosity, as we forge links between ancient legends and the world we live in today. Not much is known for sure about the Picts, but that sense of mystery only whets our thirst.

description: Alc Vol: 13% Size: 75cl Country: Chile Region: Valle Central Grapes: 100% Merlot Deep ruby in colour, this Chilean Merlot encompasses aromas of rich black cherry and plum, displaying further complexity on the palate with hints of cedar and dark chocolate. Medium-bodied and well-balanced with a rich, pleasing finish. In 1554, whilst struggling to remain heir to the Spanish throne, Philip II of Spain married Queen Mary I of England. In order to give him equal rank with the Queen, he was renamed Tierra del Rey, ‘King of Chile’ by this father and thus became Chile’s only King. The Central Valley is set in between the majestic Andes Mountains and the mighty Pacific Ocean, making it an ideal location for growing grapes. The mountains protect the wine region by creating dry, hot climatic conditions and the cold ocean breezes keep the vines cool. This combination produces full flavoured wines whilst maintaining that all important acidity essential to make perfectly balanced wines. FOOD MATCH Best served at room temperature as an aperitif or an accompaniment to a rich Beef Bourguignon. Vegetarian: Yes Vegan: Yes

name: Tomatin Legacy Highland Bourbon & Virgin Oak Single Malt Scotch Whisky 70cl
description: Alc Vol: 43% Size: 70cl When Tomatin Distillery was established in 1897, the isolated and idyllic setting of Tomatin was almost perfect. However there wasn’t a local workforce; the local inhabitants were scattered shepherds and cattle drovers. The company began a project of construction to accommodate its workforce. Since that time the distillery has been at the heart of the community and the community at the heart of the distillery. This legacy has continued and Tomatin remains one of the few distilleries to provide a home for its dedicated craftsmen. Matured in Bourbon barrels and Virgin Oak casks brings a light sweetness to multi-award winning Tomatin Legacy Highland Single Malt Whisky , which boasts aromas of vanilla, marshmallow, pineapple and lemon. On the palate gentle flavours of candy, pine, lemon sherbet, apples and sponge cake emerge ahead of a light, clean finish.

This excellent terroir is nourished with a natural compost of oak leaves and vine stalks. The plots are marked out with grassy areas.
